| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/7QhHsnbJUljPu70P3pyKNJ6L1HR1PQGigM7q969xVozHsYfj8Weg5_qBiwFx76KQy7gnsuLH1thcamReAnPZq5wqOfBr2Do6gSXZZ_C2t4R0t69iioJ0kt20-0yi-eovwU-1lezyhWqgT6vAKS9yumRrS0IN17B3fOcU_-s9YkVniY0ujmoaFPwQXvJWfrqQidIDsBJmE2H07Myu8Ms_N6HIRwpjCqL8ZmutQM8JtT-3XnCouPRblvqOn2nEe4T5rA52eAY-28HdJDXRRMRTdP4kSdVnezx2HxryDL_xdYgY5IP-o5iTtiobliVkiOqNeQuakBXKYj28NQgk39exGK2ZViI5e8uiMg-rXGRBpbqsAHHL9aUbb9SjqMMsjVoOBk1cijZEIsbkHZlrDt4tnpGosD_OoegiEv2Qm4e9zFSQAd-RI3R57aY4II68MDWtT1ZMcQCuSCpd7ZG2dwYooVsQTWjP/4GRH24OtPASuoQvKki3G-kt_IcspLWCc/7)

Peter, President Trump's trifecta is at risk.
Two critical House seats, **FL-01** and **FL-06** , are facing special elections right now and the Radical Left is throwing everything they’ve got into these races to defeat us and take the House.
This is about much more than just two House seats. This is the first electoral test for the GOP since Trump’s historic victory last November.
This is about maintaining the House GOP Majority as a whole which has been the vanguard for President Trump and his administration.
This is where we must draw the line in the sand. Our GOP House majority provides President Trump with the support he needs to fulfill his agenda and save our country.
Losing these races means that we will hand over the House to the DNC’s minions on a silver platter and any further attempt to fulfill **Agenda 47 will be dead on arrival****.**
The consequences of failing to hold the line are hard to overstate.

The first thing the Democrats will do if they take the House is move to impeach President Trump. If that happens we would be back to 2019 when we were fighting an uphill battle at every turn to overcome Leftist obstruction.
_**Securing our borders**_ , _**unleashing energy dominance**_ , _**reducing inflation**_ , and **_crushing Deep State corruption_** are all on the line.
We have fought too hard to deliver an America First agenda to just let our hard won victory slip away now.

_**[The House GOP Battleground Fund was created to ensure our team of experienced GOP operatives have the resources they need to stay in the fight and defend the House seats that will determine the balance of power in our country](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/XfloO8nPz0UFbakLnchg1IOppgNhfnlmEhxx5i-0WuKntaBVfJGTLlD0WL1iwYJfJgH7HKE2wSg23gWu6wHreyg1T_NvVtLqotzi6OuaQcBdfX22NOjmMDYUWq2dUbU7UzTo7Q8eJiy9Rngb-LroPjG-Oe3sGC7bw90QTyb4M9T1rNVn5VpeH7UoAE6-FWN0_AtiYArHbzm_grLph83NkiQZfuWQUcWbWg2A3LLgwvtAHw5O0S4FPNbWv94U68BuNscIkO3h59za7JkvxbEDo8z9p7LEoktw3U0LP-IHP4RQScBwqU7ET7xwqAF7kcfEh-2lx828BXgfK9onkYcZ6MC7xmuQdLot8vz-zRzMcar8zyNI13P1D5AEkbVNxI4X6YbWI0NOTLyEeev8zSwM81vnmR_mX2gyQgTEDejVuLZq-43Xuta8nP66wh6O4AfIHc1egdvPMf6Y8HGAKJGh102hTP4Y/0Vs2hr2RIBXuq_FZ5jni0wY6UVIR2Wka/7).**_
[DEFEND THE HOUSE](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/7rgfUhiD60wDqhi87QXrAUdQAqjOwakWF9pUOWCUQBG9MQUuHGs2aZw2T8IBzvvRu7sGADPAf0mL86Rv54IeC53wypmQOsm112reTw-JkKwj4B5NbfmIDtYozs91nQ5_FSn-b5I3yNwYU1Kfk3ij7efoUMvla3R7pAESKwoUlBVVP_WyUTd92MCm23JWTPw7i2JuCSnmWdrIjIoenLSMlcGt6P2NHBN83noevnpcMvCBBfoSs_KGZzkiQU0RKfHiGYCE4txrR1JqQ1gZ3fHsk0G8QmWCJjlId1ebLCFSw7khS04ljVh_h04AbWhrMz5NRWZuk8fkUEBgsLVdQvyfMS83mvyXK-EMuvrBPJqOfUuSitwbFTlRUgg5WNACXhLJ1JMBZOVWB5VxnxANpob3KzPQL8w2oBZF1rF0RI0y1EITglYSnQ31ODF-lS2DvZQRaQvlVJx0SMdbvjg6VAA1nKvnyMDv/QHUcuwuA9yyLg_eY-GglrucAOs1eOavs/7)
We have won fights like these before but time is quickly running out to give our team in the field the support they need to make a difference. Both special elections will take place on **April 1st** and that date is rapidly approaching.
Right now, DNC operatives are arriving in the Sunshine State from all over the country...
And according to their leaked donor calls they are securing enough special interest cash to flip both seats **BLUE**.
Peter, If we do not take immediate action then we run the risk of being outspent in the final stretch of these races.
**__[We are calling in the cavalry and we need America First patriots from across the nation to help us secure FL-01 and FL-06](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ox0L91PmxilBbQgRKhS40LBP1UQcOxgvUHUCh0kPKzJPSru5i2Jz3F8PlIh8l3oF004MGX7_VlkKKDFhkxLXtBiKhjjD57_yv5ym42gKTjLu8ynT4ndIK5rXu7b3p-Mddt0fidbpCMDHwn6bgQDebfbjCujYrW0y-Fsxh1WwizMLZTh66udRNxAhkYApQvsuEANOu1KKcoIn3VxRZuFO651SYIQY9AxZDl35R28VkQL1x4pfey8y_-p00M-rfBA_Hm40-pXsKCEjG9plHWw7900q9yrQfx0wXHumPdqE6oTrsVWTy_KwSOzQMlEIneQfkWmn3QA0OoqZMqKIm47LAvz79kh-KUAyyubBcDnJ7r7okuf10j4njO5RXPXucOjcqjJx6ogLB_wOj_ipTf5CSMkxZfNGuBw2RiNvOIuezIbhxHBnxX7P_1LjujL0rAZcyClXGkeFpUOXAbIaGaE1WYPP1U_B/myA2cObGMiPS430eYkBjuvunJiCG9uHm/7)_._**
[SECURE VICTORY IN FLORIDA](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/sJfNA8V31nnYVo9cT6IEncxGixBhKEzJmNu7iQfMcA27ZOr0qbFV-dlbE9gAMxeBzPyqB9ESZKx7MQ0l004d3uJM0VVP7oCfpieDfmBmSn05A3oM77Tdb9_JHmy4Jic1YA8X_Vj7z6bU4m92HmCESmmjiWDK3Ugi5rrkwX4GVRBacMlbN-XlrHfmIKLQS_TPaPtP4Ljw4JLBqLA4qC7ekN5bEU6j2r32Om9ozFoksQkVapXUMxSY1-bq5B8uLWtkpxlnxGQ2ZlordLGGd_Iuby1noYY1LYTj7opkQ_KWJff5x2YBBuPGK2q9XOuKvq8uzhADHuvyXBA_LHL5oekzmGJRg7M1kx__avSw_VrCSNiNq4fpNnIFb__ceU__uCQxLTZ38nXbO7i7S05Uo3bvZJ5z226QAvKW_lDaUGmYn-MXBhcxyhpW_piRpcF9owBlQXKf9fLelPe5UQzvwZs87aExscMU/VDIGn88Q8N8IyvCR91kov_dCEpnVtZCk/7)
Securing these seats means protecting the Trump trifecta.
Last year voters gave President Trump and the GOP control of the _**White House**_ , control of the _**Senate**_ , AND control of the _**House**_.
But if Democrats take back the House they will pass legislation to change our election laws, like allowing illegal immigrants to vote, that will rig future elections in their favor and make it harder for Republicans to secure a trifecta again.
**Democrats are already attempting to pass laws in New York City that would allow non-citizens to vote!**
If they succeed it may take a generation before we see the type of resounding mandate that the American People gave to Save America and usher in a new age of American greatness.
**Our actions now will determine if our children and future generations will inherit chaos or a free and prosperous nation.**
We are the firewall _**against open borders**_ , _**against socialist policies**_ that lead to sky high inflation, _**against radical gender ideology**_ that allows men in girls' private spaces, and _**against the Swamp**_ abusing power.
_**_[To maintain that firewall we need to make a stand and ensure that we send conservative warriors to Congress to represent FL-01 and FL-06. So please consider contributing whatever you can today to fuel our defense of the House](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/BobFe8aSWdVQQUrF3-LlIxMKfaNMDBVQeF8Yi_nFrwfiQMop1s5-hRqgjeUCMDXKoVXSccyeiaS-epYm_g6RHNzuwqLOb4ASJAsAoufIknEtteKxWCFYHZ2zh0NeUNyf56xO4WmkF798yxIcoPTkuGYvnbf5311SIWcINNbmkjmkwuJ-iXwvTzUJuIxeBdlEXUJ2qMwp2eQa8Jxlf27S0IT9UjaZQvANNbdnqGmkVZfVP7n0i_vPR6veG-VTRZJDAUvYhzAmmmBA0ty15UHdjmORW-2aNcjAtaDnHR_0zBybQuJlTCIDoG8A3zFcYzP92jOn_Y_rrBM28_FxKb5KcTf2XoGqDbuuT6arWKVU0DzNNRJLTwDk3sSAo8atH_9DwDNMDMklcCXWsk-cTst8gMBiAxmVRS0mLnzE1pWcpXtnUpGsZUG20WlLX65QncDMt0QaZbi-uWDMkgC01lenkQVT-NMe/1v5UoUMKlx6NL-jXr1QZ5_bFymFBmCyO/7)_.**_
[FUEL THE HOUSE GOP BATTLEGROUND FUND](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/zaPk8D6E40zLfyloPrqRyHvsCzzO1YUscj8DbfebZzGeHQHLemYQ0gix1kb2zjGwLwA81dLV4pgHLMJt0dkCQFDUNHPvpir3ra-_7LWjKfXqd-qm19SB81net6Kc-r7IgMmZMjPNa_VFECMjSFfQLdAIYakMFN_DhrDrwIPCMxFLPGMt_lgi4VBiusvC7gTqi7Hu3tQYuh6oLa-_2BwSz3-n-EqU0UmzqyynHUPKR6wsw-Zvn0uaThrCoXScdsLC8TX5fBh0HefPo4eRhRx0S5A_KG-C5XDxQhxIlUPTkPeTCnjWXhRZVxjSF_2Fd2vFjp-to0cqZU8f6kjTgRPqSkTQre8uyC4lqrX0gUAsJT12e5Y0eMAuGEhyLroeoLiWWDJg3joUdCd86gbVoxH2tLBjtprmq4cxDfzQB2kiV8aR6kDCLRqp1lSSWGzuZC-5ZQoXzZDuUYI3ap-wPeeb3eoQDtes/MuwspjNJIDFYHUXN04ouzh7kvhlg4lVK/7)
Thank you for you time and your continued support of our team and the America First movement. It is because of you that we are able to continue fighting to save America.

body:
This is what we're still up against: States have continued to execute an agenda of voter suppression, driven by partisan lies. Dark money and decades of work by opponents of voting rights have brought us here . It's scary and it shows just how far the vote suppressors are willing to go.
We've got to stop them wherever and however we can. RUSH $25 or more right now to fight back and defend our voting rights >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=lDYv1l+pS9oD8m8/4D4hxCAsIpblWXcOlhc+qrHNXJUKCOhCkUsUaKPYL1RR1EqFHWxgivvEluwMp4kCntxsIdUAuJZZ/9hT8GfB4NpcPUg=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lDYv1l+pS9oD8m8/4D4hxCAsIpblWXcOlhc+qrHNXJUKCOhCkUsUaKPYL1RR1EqFHWxgivvEluwMp4kCntxsIdUAuJZZ/9hT8GfB4NpcPUg=]
Team, we're not kidding: Ten states enacted new voting restrictions in 2024 .
Brennan Center map of 10 states that made it harder to vote in 2024 [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=lDYv1l+pS9oD8m8/4D4hxCAsIpblWXcOlhc+qrHNXJUKCOhCkUsUaKPYL1RR1EqFHWxgivvEluwMp4kCntxsIdUAuJZZ/9hT8GfB4NpcPUg=]
In fact, according to the nonpartisan Brennan Center For Justice, " states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021 ".
From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference, states from Arizona to Georgia to North Carolina did their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Opponents of voting rights have spent the last two decades attacking voting rights and 2025 looks to be no different.
Unlike the vote suppressors driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count . That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now.
Team, this is the fight of our lives. Opponents of voting rights are trying to make the progress we've made a distant memory. Push back in 2025 by pitching in $25 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=lDYv1l+pS9oD8m8/4D4hxCAsIpblWXcOlhc+qrHNXJUKCOhCkUsUaKPYL1RR1EqFHWxgivvEluwMp4kCntxsIdUAuJZZ/9hT8GfB4NpcPUg=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lDYv1l+pS9oD8m8/4D4hxCAsIpblWXcOlhc+qrHNXJUKCOhCkUsUaKPYL1RR1EqFHWxgivvEluwMp4kCntxsIdUAuJZZ/9hT8GfB4NpcPUg=]

clean_body: This is what we're still up against: States have continued to execute an agenda of voter suppression, driven by partisan lies. Dark money and decades of work by opponents of voting rights have brought us here . It's scary and it shows just how far the vote suppressors are willing to go. We've got to stop them wherever and however we can. RUSH $25 or more right now to fight back and defend our voting rights >> [=] Voter Action Project [=] Team, we're not kidding: Ten states enacted new voting restrictions in 2024 . Brennan Center map of 10 states that made it harder to vote in 2024 [=] In fact, according to the nonpartisan Brennan Center For Justice, " states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021 ". From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference, states from Arizona to Georgia to North Carolina did their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Opponents of voting rights have spent the last two decades attacking voting rights and 2025 looks to be no different. Unlike the vote suppressors driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count . That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now. Team, this is the fight of our lives. Opponents of voting rights are trying to make the progress we've made a distant memory. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Pennsylvania Supreme Court Majority is on the line!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter —
Early voting is happening right now in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, and already, GOTV PAC is making our next move.
Because after Wisconsin, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court is on the line.
Three Democratic justices are up for retention elections this year and we must re-elect at least two of them to hold the majority. Normally, these yes-or-no elections don’t make waves. But Republican operatives see an opening—and they’re gearing up for an expensive, coordinated attack to flip the court.
Why? Because this court has been a roadblock to MAGA extremism in Pennsylvania. It protected fair maps, upheld voting rights, and stopped Trump’s 2020 election challenges. If Republicans win, they’ll have the power to rig the next decade of elections.
That’s why we aren’t wasting a second. While our phone banks in Wisconsin are still turning out voters, we are already shifting resources to defend the court in Pennsylvania.
This fight isn’t just about one state—it’s about stopping the far right’s plan to take over the judiciary, one court at a time. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Here’s what we’re up against:
🔴 Republicans are spending millions to sink the justices who stood up to Trump.
🔴 Retention elections are low-turnout, meaning every single voter we reach could be the difference.
🔴 Our voter contact program works. While others spend $75 per voter, our in-house operation allows us to do it for just $10.
This is how we fight back. This is how we win.
Let’s go,
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3172025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3172025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Support my legislation to reinstate veterans fired by Trump →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, last week I introduced legislation to reinstate veterans fired by the Trump Administration, and I need your help to show strong support behind it.
Add your name to my public petition to pass my Protect Veteran Jobs Act without delay → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3K-9ZWMlu0urvToqyi2KGQ2]
President Trump has fired more veterans in his first few weeks in office than any U.S. President in our country’s history.
This is unacceptable.
These men and women have made enormous sacrifices for our nation, and instead of repaying them with gratitude and support, Trump is unceremoniously kicking them to the curb with his reckless and indiscriminate layoffs.
That’s why I introduced the Protect Veteran Jobs Act — legislation that would reinstate the veterans who were axed from their federal jobs as a part of the Trump Administration’s mass firings.
Every one of my colleagues should be able to support this legislation — but if we have any hope of passing it, we’re going to need a huge outcry of grassroots support.
Please sign my public petition to reinstate fired veterans today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3K-9ZWMlu0urvToqyi2KGQ2]
It’s a colossal affront to all patriotic Americans that this President, who has called servicemembers and veterans “loser” and “suckers,” is now going beyond hurling petty insults to actually putting their livelihoods at risk.
I won’t stand for it, and I hope you’ll join me in taking action today:
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3K-9ZWMlu0urvToqyi2KGQ2]
Thanks for speaking up.
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

**_Senator Bernie Sanders,_**

I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the rest of the MAGA mob.

You’re one of the only people standing in the way of Project 2025, and I know the GOP has been relentlessly attacking you for standing up for the American people.

**That’s why I want you to know I’ve got your back!**

Your continued strength gives me hope that Democrats can save our Democracy from the barrage of MAGA threats.

[I can’t thank you enough for all of your work. So I’m signing this card alongside thousands of Democrats to tell you we’ve got your back, and chipping in $3 to UNITEDemocrats now to help leaders like you in the fight against Trump! »](https://udpac.us/l/pEm2ll7mBt1q)

**_X Peter_**

clean_body: The energy was off the charts in Eau Claire tonight. The message was loud and clear: People are fed up with Donald Trump and Elon Musk, and they’re tired of being ignored. | = Peter, The energy was off the charts in Eau Claire tonight. The message was loud and clear: People are fed up with Donald Trump and Elon Musk, and they’re tired of being ignored. = The election didn’t turn out the way we wanted—but that doesn’t mean I’ve stopped giving a damn, and I know you haven’t either. That’s why I’m out here, hitting the road, going to the places Republicans are too afraid to go, and making sure people know exactly what’s at stake. Because here’s the truth: Elon Musk and Donald Trump are coming for your Social Security. Trump’s tariffs are driving up prices for families and small businesses. And while you’re paying more, Republicans are plotting another massive tax cut for billionaires. So, we’ve got two choices: sit back and let them get away with it, or show up and fight like hell. I know where I stand. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m grateful, Tim Walz ********=******

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Vote for me this Saturday at the SPCDP Convention
body:
Now is not the time for timid leadership.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b8b4444f6b0e/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6418219?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# Vote for me this Saturday at the SPCDP Convention
---
| We need **everyone** engaged in local politics right now, including you. I'm running for re-election as the chair of the Spartanburg County Democratic Party this weekend and I have been challenged. We have so much to fight for and I'd be honored to have your vote. **This Saturday** , from 10am to 12pm at Macedonia Missionary Baptist Church, any and every registered democratic voter in Spartanburg County is invited to join us for our County **Democratic Convention**. [Learn more & RSVP at this link.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=015773ade9&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=872ebd6456&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
|
# The people have spoken, and we demand answers.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| Over 500 people showed up on Saturday afternoon for the People’s Empty Chair Town Hall in Greenville. Thank you to Indivisible Upstate for organizing this incredible event to hold our elected officials accountable. Speakers from across the Upstate shared how they have personally been impacted by the cowardice of their elected officials.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f9ba06cc14&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [Watch Kathryn’s Speech from the People’s Town Hall ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5efba9586e&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Join me in the Upstate
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=02bd1fe071&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| |
# WREN Advocacy Training
**April 2 at 6:00pm in Greenville** Join us for another Advocacy Training with WREN in Greenville at Project Host. We will be discussing all of the ways to get involved right now and make a difference.
---
| [RSVP here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8e15a596ab&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
# Monthly SPCDP Meeting
**April 7 at 6:30pm in Spartanburg** Join us for our monthly democratic meeting on Monday, April 7 for our monthly meeting with guest speaker Josh Malkin from the ACLU at the Dr. T.K. Gregg Community Center.
---
| [RSVP here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4a5b4d9fb4&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e9781b51aa&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ff90f0229e&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| |
# So you want to run for office?
**April 9 at 5:30pm in Spartanburg** Join Emerge South Carolina for an information session on running for office at SPCDP HQ 505 East Main Street.
---
| [RSVP here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c3b7e67c66&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | The House passed its version of the state’s $14 billion budget, which includes significant investments in teacher and state employee pay, infrastructure repairs, and recovery efforts from Hurricane Helene. However, Republicans in the South Carolina House tried to push through a provision barring DEI practices in the state budget. It nearly succeeded until Rep. Jermaine Johnson and other Democrats stepped up and called them out.
You can read more about the budget [**here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=49aabcfbdb&e=edbde6c9b1)**** and watch Rep. Johnson’s speech down below.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e2898f7602&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [Watch here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ee8f6ea750&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| The House Education and Public Works Committee will hold a second hearing for[ **House Bill 3927**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=35d5dae8c7&e=edbde6c9b1) , a bill that seeks to ban state agencies, schools, and public institutions from promoting or funding diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs. At the previous hearing, South Carolinians turned out in strong opposition to the bill, and I encourage you to make your voice heard once more. **If you haven’t already,**[**please use this link**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=41cfc6f80d&e=edbde6c9b1)**to tell the committee to vote against this bill.**
The House will be furloughed, meaning there will be no floor debate. However, committee meetings will still take place as scheduled. The Senate Finance Committee is scheduled to hear WREN’s priority legislation, Senate Bill 11 (the bill that expands parental leave for all state employees), along with Senate Bill 32 (the bill to provide taxpayer-funded incentives to crisis pregnancy centers) in the upcoming weeks. We need your help to make sure these bills are properly addressed. If you haven’t already, please take a moment to click these links to urge legislators to [**support Senate Bill 11**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=800b0c73d4&e=edbde6c9b1)**** and [**oppose Senate Bill 32**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=299b3d3ebc&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=66ac7ff646&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Last week we joined democrats across South Carolina to thank Jaime Harrison for all of his hard work at the DNC. When I was running for Congress, Jaime was the first to call and offer help, and he never stopped picking up the phone for me. He will continue to lead with hope and that’s something we all need to do right now.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| I was honored to celebrate the Alliance for Full Acceptance (AFFA) with their Executive Director, Chase Glenn and Linda Ketner to hear about their role in the fight to protect our LGBTQIA community. This organization has been on the forefront of human rights for decades and it’s imperative that we continue to fight right alongside them. [ Learn more about the organization here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8bb0e1e89e&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **READ** : [Spartanburg Democrats Newsletter](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0310fa2101&e=edbde6c9b1)
* **READ:** SC Daily Gazette: [Clemson named among 45 colleges in federal DEI investigation](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ef2430cbf6&e=edbde6c9b1).
* **READ** : Post & Courier: [Republicans won’t host town halls but will insult their critics](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7dbcd7f0ad&e=edbde6c9b1)**READ** : Greenville Online: [Greenville residents voice their opinions at Empty Town Hall](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3e37798a51&e=edbde6c9b1).**READ:** SC Daily Gazette: [SC legislator left the child-care business & wants to help others](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=813c4a19ad&e=edbde6c9b1)
* **READ:** ACLU: [StateHouse Dispatch](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bf4763e143&e=edbde6c9b1)
* **LISTEN:** New York Times: [Interview with Chuck ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c0106eecf1&e=edbde6c9b1)[Schumer](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b7f364c4fa&e=edbde6c9b1)
* **READ:** Post & Courier: [Anti-DEI Bill is bad for South Carolina](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=df72e1415e&e=edbde6c9b1)
* **READ:**[ Where is William Timmons?](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=40e74d9256&e=edbde6c9b1)
* **READ:** NYT: [Warned off meeting voters, Republican who do confront anger ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8a64363c21&e=edbde6c9b1)
* **READ:** Go Upstate: ‘[Radio silence' -- Community activists await word on federal funding for food program](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=fc595d97b4&e=edbde6c9b1)
*

---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Phone Bank with me THIS WEEK to prepare for our convention!**
* **When:** March 18-20 from 11:00 to 3:00pm.
* **Where:** SPCDP HQ 505 East Main St.
* [**Click here for more information and to RSVP**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1f5a8f2b4a&e=edbde6c9b1)**.**

**Virtual Phone-Banking for SCDP to help FLIP SEATS!**
* **When:** March 18 & 20 from 6:00 to 8:30pm.
* **Where:** Join from anywhere virtually
* [**Click here for more information and to RSVP.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3eed840716&e=edbde6c9b1)

**Oppose Cuts to the School Meals Program in the Federal Budget**
* House Budget Committee Chairman Arrington has proposed $12 billion in school breakfast and lunch cuts for budget reconciliation.**** Email your Congressional Representative and US Senators to urge them to reject this cut in the budget reconciliation and help ensure South Carolina children continue to be fed at school.
* [**Click here for more information and to email your representatives.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a3c8e713b7&e=edbde6c9b1)****

---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| March 20 Celebrate our Sister Senators at 5:30pm in Charleston. [RSVP here. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e5ffdb339e&e=edbde6c9b1)March 22 Spartanburg County Democratic Convention at 10am. [RSVP here.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=81224a497c&e=edbde6c9b1) March 26 ACLU Virtual Advocacy Day at 7pm. [RSVP here.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5637567a39&e=edbde6c9b1)April 2 Women’s Rights & Empowerment Network Advocacy Workshop. [RSVP here.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=43259b7fdb&e=edbde6c9b1)April 7 Spartanburg Democrats meeting at 6:30pm. [RSVP here.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=55d2bb6a5d&e=edbde6c9b1) April 9 “So you want to run for office” event with EMERGE SC. [RSVP here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=df2af0e345&e=edbde6c9b1).
---

Jermaine Johnson and other Democrats stepped up and called them out. You can read more about the budget ** and watch Rep. Johnson’s speech down below. | | | | | | | | | | | | The House Education and Public Works Committee will hold a second hearing for , a bill that seeks to ban state agencies, schools, and public institutions from promoting or funding diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs. At the previous hearing, South Carolinians turned out in strong opposition to the bill, and I encourage you to make your voice heard once more. If you haven’t already, tell the committee to vote against this bill. The House will be furloughed, meaning there will be no floor debate. However, committee meetings will still take place as scheduled. The Senate Finance Committee is scheduled to hear WREN’s priority legislation, Senate Bill 11 (the bill that expands parental leave for all state employees), along with Senate Bill 32 (the bill to provide taxpayer-funded incentives to crisis pregnancy centers) in the upcoming weeks. We need your help to make sure these bills are properly addressed. If you haven’t already, please take a moment to click these links to urge legislators to and . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Last week we joined democrats across South Carolina to thank Jaime Harrison for all of his hard work at the DNC. When I was running for Congress, Jaime was the first to call and offer help, and he never stopped picking up the phone for me. He will continue to lead with hope and that’s something we all need to do right now. | | | | | | | | | | | | I was honored to celebrate the Alliance for Full Acceptance (AFFA) with their Executive Director, Chase Glenn and Linda Ketner to hear about their role in the fight to protect our LGBTQIA community. This organization has been on the forefront of human rights for decades and it’s imperative that we continue to fight right alongside them. . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | READ : READ: SC Daily Gazette: . READ : Post & Courier: : Greenville Online: : SC Daily Gazette: READ: ACLU: LISTEN: New York Times: READ: Post & Courier: READ: READ: NYT: READ: Go Upstate: ‘ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Phone Bank with me THIS WEEK to prepare for our convention! When: March 18-20 from 11:00 to 3:00pm. Where: SPCDP HQ 505 East Main St. . Virtual Phone-Banking for SCDP to help FLIP SEATS! When: March 18 & 20 from 6:00 to 8:30pm. Where: Join from anywhere virtually Oppose Cuts to the School Meals Program in the Federal Budget House Budget Committee Chairman Arrington has proposed $12 billion in school breakfast and lunch cuts for budget reconciliation. Email your Congressional Representative and US Senators to urge them to reject this cut in the budget reconciliation and help ensure South Carolina children continue to be fed at school. **** | | | | | | | | | | | March 20 Celebrate our Sister Senators at 5:30pm in Charleston. 22 Spartanburg County Democratic Convention at 10am. March 26 ACLU Virtual Advocacy Day at 7pm. 2 Women’s Rights & Empowerment Network Advocacy Workshop. 7 Spartanburg Democrats meeting at 6:30pm. April 9 “So you want to run for office” event with EMERGE SC. . | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Kathryn for SC. All rights reserved.

* * *
Donald Trump falsely claimed that a Venezuelan gang has invaded the US as a pretense for invoking the wartime Alien Enemy Act of 1798.
_We aren’t at war with Venezuela._
His administration then defied a federal court order that banned the use of the Alien Enemies Act and carried out the deportation of alleged Venezuelan immigrants anyway.
_Trump is in violation of our Constitution!_
**This is rubicon crossing territory, and it lays the foundation for Trump to arrest and deport anyone he deems an enemy.**
******[Trump is IGNORING the rule of law. He must be impeached! Will you chip in to our ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard and newspaper campaign?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHPohwMgKp11PZ_RUb-vCnZNDcZJCiKhR4kiwlFAtxhvndX8MJLz8uzSl0aUEmO2hMErWjqO1Tbm00H2NqhQEY3GglGfC2Tm5Ol9bKkz0D9ee_afgHlpR2YtwH1zdVpTnDvdskccBWb9KLjEb2zD_d8Sq_2jgRvoojUlybCPvvLk5OVv74W15aRIyVnhRmgvdi3KtB5HDSAglql_UhdlALvZT42IRuLw8dUr7zRJkeLTKRfGjn8ms2F9I5tWFzPw8TttJdRIVsoL_DTlXte3cSG1kb86-U29s7xFo8CCzI8oVegBjb6z2gBhyhDOBSwNedJh4Mj4MPJZHZoRIQqbOSdA/4ex/w-sqxZObS3qWGoE1bgNTKg/h2/h001.tVVsOqsDyqO2QR4SYkU51ZG-UXDMquqtAHlDz7J5_2E)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Were they here illegally? Were they in fact, criminals? Were they Venezuelan? No one knows...
A federal judge has stated, “Those people need to be returned to the United States.”
El Salvador’s president Bukele reposted an article explaining that a federal judge had ordered the planes to return to the U.S., adding the comment: “Oopsie... Too late,” with a laughing emoji. Secretary of State Marco Rubio reposted it.
**If presidents can do whatever they want, including putting people on a plane and sending them to prisons in a foreign country with no due process whatsoever, then really, who are we?**
******[We are the United States of America, and we are fighting to have Trump impeached! This is rubicon crossing territory, and it lays the foundation for Trump to arrest and deport anyone he deems an enemy. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. With no evidence nor due process, 200 people were renditioned to an El Salvadoran gulag that Trump hired to house them for $6 million. Were they here illegally? Were they in fact, criminals? Were they Venezuelan? No one knows... A federal judge has stated, “Those people need to be returned to the United States.” El Salvador’s president Bukele reposted an article explaining that a federal judge had ordered the planes to return to the U.S., adding the comment: “Oopsie... Too late,” with a laughing emoji. Secretary of State Marco Rubio reposted it. If presidents can do whatever they want, including putting people on a plane and sending them to prisons in a foreign country with no due process whatsoever, then really, who are we? **** ****Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Phil Izon
subject: Important RCV info and updates. Repeal of RCV petition refiling
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67da32c11f6b1b6cb33e8c54&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67da309b1f6b1b6cb33e753f%26ss_email_id%3D67da32c11f6b1b6cb33e8c54%26ss_campaign_name%3DImportant%2BRCV%2Binfo%2Band%2Bupdates.%2BRepeal%2Bof%2BRCV%2Bpetition%2Brefiling%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-03-19T02%253A58%253A14Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67da309b1f6b1b6cb33e753f&l=en-US&s=CwKFqjYREYr-giBi8cXQt-9svsA%3D) |
---|---
|
#### **Subject:** Refiling Our Petition to Repeal Ranked Choice Voting
Dear Supporters,After thoughtful conversations with various individuals, I have decided to refile my petition to **Repeal Ranked Choice Voting**. Our plan is to target the **2028 election** ; however, if the new group working on this issue successfully places their measure on the **2026 ballot** , that’s great. If their effort does not move forward, we will proceed with our petition for 2026.If their petition does make it onto the 2026 ballot, I will hold ours back to ensure we have another opportunity in 2028 if needed.Our mission is clear: **We will remove Ranked Choice Voting in Alaska — either in 2026 or 2028**.To promote cohesion and strengthen our efforts, I will be using the same language as the new group's petition, with only minor adjustments to the heading and bill description. While our groups are operating independently, we are united by a common goal — the elimination of Ranked Choice Voting.Thank you for your continued support. Together, we will restore fairness and simplicity to our elections.Sincerely,
Phil Izon
---
| | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon
12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113
Eagle River 99577
United States [ Unsubscribe ](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67da32c11f6b1b6cb33e8c54&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2FITn2I-MnXlLtcz0gwOcXcZVliLt8f4811sExHc12SCQ9KgVP-_p-L3H8ZdkTp6S7ZQO4imVjXVKPUfLE4KEVf9v7CHG3VZzAJttCQIGwMOLEm55CYU80yNjRG2QMNlXtAEduizGF1dIvCWv6IelUEO9QdxYAVv8HfooPBaQ6m-TmcGF35YQxwBqsN0QdlZ5iZq0g4PnrkoDvETP3LOgBKijfcxO5jP7CgKypa58FS6CKLIv35SM99_pUwnz03_caOrjBNH5t47wYNxefJp4kwfBR8HIcct0XV_M3S-ukWJrIWvB8ZymYhOf4Yp_Q9kVdYFrEPqzGig4U62SWs9I9nNDo7cNt_bG1yG7WPdfWyRz75Qt7h4VuEF0%3D&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67da309b1f6b1b6cb33e753f&l=en-US&s=5VuGGtt3aDyhLYWe6nbF3_xUsOY%3D)

name: Jeff Frazee
subject: Students conceal carrying on campus?
body:
The fight for our Second Amendment rights is happening in the state

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7t79m6987j35kjl13qdim9jabh1d72pa686hmro_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob4clh2bs)
Friend,

The fight for our Second Amendment rights is happening in the states -- and Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is winning.

In New Hampshire, YAL member and newly elected State Representative Sam Farrington just introduced a statewide Campus Carry bill to ensure college students can defend themselves.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7q6t1tn63qq04553g49i8p680dht8k8svbb1q5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob4clh2bs) And we're not stopping there.

YAL-trained activists have already **secured major Second Amendment victories** , like getting Constitutional Carry signed into law in Louisiana, Texas, Kentucky, and Indiana!

This victory didn't happen overnight. It was years in the making -- starting in 2021 with YAL students knocking on doors, gathering petitions, and working alongside our National Coalition of Liberty Legislators to get the bill passed.

Now, citizens in various states across the country have the right to defend themselves _without_ government "permission" - just as the Founders intended.

**However, the radical Left is _still_ working overtime to chip away at your gun rights -- state by state.**

Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is on a mission to identify, educate, train, and mobilize the next generation of young leaders who will fight for and expand gun rights on the state level.

We're doubling down in 2025 to train 1,000 more activists who will join the fight to pass pro-gun laws, repeal unconstitutional restrictions, and help elect legislators who will defend your right to keep and bear arms.

**You can join our fight to protect the Second Amendment by donating today.**
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf41datnmbjimc0lbel123aspn0f4ou9g1bclvf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob4clh2bs)
Victories like these PROVE you, and I have a winning strategy to advance liberty in our lifetime.

**Young Americans for Liberty has found where you and I can have the biggest impact: It 's at the state level.**

Since 2018, YAL-trained students have -
* knocked over 4 million doors
* helped elect 400 liberty legislators across the country
* gotten over 750 pro-liberty bills signed into law

2025 is our opportunity to build on the momentum of the pro-freedom America
First movement and transform even more states into _**Liberty Lighthouse States**_ --
states that will not only protect but also expand freedom for today and for future generations.

With your support, we will focus our efforts this year on working with state lawmakers to pass critical reforms and make liberty the foundation of policy in states across America.

**Every dollar you give helps us push pro-liberty legislation over the finish line. Please join the fight by donating today.**

name: Behind the Markets
subject: Musk Sounds the Alarm on U.S. Bankruptcy—Here’s How to Prepare
body:
When Elon Musk speaks, the world listens.

Dear Fellow Investor,
When Elon Musk speaks, the world listens.
Recently, he issued a stark warning: The United States is hurtling toward bankruptcy at an alarming pace.
The national debt has surged past $36 trillion, equating to over **$106,000 per American.**
Annual interest payments now **exceed $1 trillion,** surpassing even the defense budget.
Musk cautions that without immediate action, the dollar's value could plummet to nothing, eroding the wealth of countless Americans.
But there's hope.
By understanding the challenges ahead and making strategic financial decisions now, you can safeguard your assets and potentially thrive.
**[We've put all the details in this short presentation >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zut65vbafav7ted7obkhre89e82m22j91ik54g2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob4c3h2bs)**
Don't delay - being informed is your best defense in these uncertain times.
All the best,
Simmy Adelman, Publisher

subject: 5 days to Defend against Project Veritas—HelpMe Finish This Fight!
body:
Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I’ve championed—it’s been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

| [****](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2u7bnt67f2nord6r7h6cd6nfil96sodur5mqpug_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)
[****](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zahlseabl7r2q4vqev0bqo4122thik7a7i2jtvr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm reaching out because I'm staring down the barrel of a make-or-break moment.

**Project Veritas --the outfit I built from nothing over 13 years--fired me in February 2023 and is now suing me to kill my career as an investigative journalist. **[**I need your help to defend against this brutal lawsuit.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6hcq6meaosegi4836tl8iui4g1dcqpbla6nfmlg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)

They're trying to bury me, to snuff out the work I love, the work that's exposed corruption from ACORN to Big Tech to the Treasury's resistance to Elon's DOGE reforms. [**But I 'm damn close to ending this nightmare--and I need you to get me across the finish line.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2r0qjnemmvl9s6ieugsc08e9io2cfr92flqfbpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)

Here's where we stand: after two years of legal warfare, we're in the final stretch before trial.

**Discovery 's wrapping up, and the courtroom's in sight**. My team's been relentless--digging through their lies, proving this is a personal vendetta to stop me from doing what I was born to do: **uncover truth for you, the public**.

But the bills are piling up fast. [**I 've got a stack of attorney fees--$42,000--that I need to pay in the next 5 days to keep fighting**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp1hcrmc730pq0m18eacmk49tnmkeeqf40ga076o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs). Without it, **Project Veritas might just win their war to shut me down for good.**

This isn't just about me--it's about what's worth fighting for.

Truth isn't a luxury; it's the oxygen of a free society. Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

Project Veritas wants to choke that off, to silence a voice that's served the public, not their egos. I've launched O'Keefe Media Group (OMG) to keep the flame alive--our recent IRS expose proves it--**but this lawsuit is a chainsaw aimed at my roots**.

I've spent decades dodging threats, lawsuits, and smears--13 years at Project Veritas, thousands of hours on the ground, scars earned breaking stories that shook the world.

Now, I'm asking you to stand with me. **[**Donate now --$25, $50, $100, whatever you can spare--to hit that $42,000 goal in 5 days**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2qe6704opiu6kghefm4bg7vb5pnvag8jqlgcdh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)**[**.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zntfhab779ececlgnrvu8ku3t5pd42fasatschf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)

Your support isn't just cash; it's a lifeline to finish this fight and keep exposing corruption through OMG. [**The finish line 's close, but I can't cross it alone.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo5uo7i3eeeaiufcuvbljseki3tdpudv81e1lc5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)

[**Donate Now --Get Me to Trial.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2bsr77as6f6qq5c02mse8s4q58gab8tl6drrstg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)

Truth is a fragile thing--without warriors to defend it, it withers.

**Let 's show Project Veritas they can't end me or our mission**. [**Give today, and let 's bury this attack once and for all**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqabp8sao2j561kjt11gk46tf67v1v1kssiko3ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs).

Thanks for having my back,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We're 5 days from the edge--$42,000 stands between me and trial. [**Help me end this assault and keep investigative journalism alive --donate now!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z04519srce9o288kaj5lkg972vcl3s5urnmkjeag_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob6cth2bs)

name: This is Steve Scalise =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmp861sdgbqu98eh3d6u4n9r6eajv1c9dd318g7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob1cth2bs "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdic733mv21jibf079hof2pmq0aogq6sjkv8rq1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob1cth2bs "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvg81a3p8ejm557gqkfrtmd3nsckqj321j17cs08_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob1cth2bs "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs43q16ekgll4pq4j4p1qingnflmmagns0emgd0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob1cth2bs "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm2jje1pt80g0fiacdlbf2dobni41gucdftf039o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob1cth2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcrlgu5b7dcr84qs22nbd934mvpisrdbf85d0o58_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm1ob1cth2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Harvard Warning
subject: HARVARD: Does calcium really protect your bones?
body:
_You 've been lied to about Calcium!_

**Harvard Warning** \- _" You've been lied to about Calcium!"_

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zomah0g6cfei2dm81bs99sb0kdcdulkcca8pk36o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpjm9pj2cdh2bs)

Ask anyone how to prevent bone loss and fractures, and they're likely to answer, "Get more calcium."

Bad news...

According to a 2015 Harvard publication... An intake of 1,000 mg of calcium supplements has been linked with an **increased risk of heart attack, stroke, kidney stones,** and**gastrointestinal symptoms** ...

Now, the Medical Journal BMJ concludes that consuming calcium doesn't even reduce fractures in people over 50!

But there's good news... Because a unique protein seems to act like glue inside your bones -- helping to reverse osteopenia. [**Try this protein swap instead**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9lchh8untceajbm75nkeqbjh37a465uhiclgbb8_rp2ash2s8g21cbhe1r75pt7kcp378tk65qb6t9gegon1ct66uqrf8jh6uh7783gm1ruct5h6ni60or5ccg7ashls9gm0o70cthicd35ssa1ald2c1h6ao36chie69hicnhicdj5s8gq48bi4bh28pr1c9j6ep76c9hm49fg).

So, if you want to STOP bone loss...

And blow your doctor away with your next DEXA scan results...

[**⇒ Try this unique protein instead.**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zeqrb99mgm0h3ibk00sdsk9aene9pchef7dk4630_rp2ash2s8g21cbhe1r75pt7kcp378tk65qb6t9gegon1ct66uqrf8jh6uh7783gm1ruct5h6ni60or5ccg7ashls9gm0o70cthicd35ssa1ald2c1h6ao36chie69hicnhicdj5s8gq48bi4bh28pr1c9j6ep76c9hm49fg)

God bless you,

clean_body: I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate. | | | | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support." Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting." If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?" It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. | | "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE" Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. name: Harvard Warning
subject: HARVARD: Does calcium really protect your bones?
body:
_You 've been lied to about Calcium!_

**Harvard Warning** \- _" You've been lied to about Calcium!"_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zslc7c3ijj2jmecrfd07fnqmf8mnji3c686nid68_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpge4o32cdh2bs)

Ask anyone how to prevent bone loss and fractures, and they're likely to answer, "Get more calcium."

Bad news...

According to a 2015 Harvard publication... An intake of 1,000 mg of calcium supplements has been linked with an **increased risk of heart attack, stroke, kidney stones,** and**gastrointestinal symptoms** ...

Now, the Medical Journal BMJ concludes that consuming calcium doesn't even reduce fractures in people over 50!

But there's good news... Because a unique protein seems to act like glue inside your bones -- helping to reverse osteopenia. [**Try this protein swap instead**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9khs1cufpmok9km35bd12sgmsarph5d5538ri78_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpge4o32cdh238h5e8he4810m5on0tjisujq6chjkeq32t5jeko78cbgmej3fddnk9ojf8jjk1ob0tv6eiojbp30cdim683le8qu4ob0c3g6eop66hiu8or0c1ghb8j0c9im0pj4cjhiccj5scj3cpf24no).

So, if you want to STOP bone loss...

And blow your doctor away with your next DEXA scan results...

[**⇒ Try this unique protein instead.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zifa4br6fs09pl9kmp5e3i6g9o2n6shb9s6ca6g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cpge4o32cdh238h5e8he4810m5on0tjisujq6chjkeq32t5jeko78cbgmej3fddnk9ojf8jjk1ob0tv6eiojbp30cdim683le8qu4ob0c3g6eop66hiu8or0c1ghb8j0c9im0pj4cjhiccj5scj3cpf24no)

name: GOP Alerts
subject: Will you support Trump’s tax cuts and help protect American jobs? ANSWER:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
“In this world nothing can be said to be certain, except death and taxes.”

| | | Peter,

President Trump’s **bold tax plan** is ready to go–and it’s precisely what Americans need to take our country back. He’s locking in the 2017 tax cuts, cutting corporate taxes even more, and putting tariffs on foreign goods to protect American workers.

**The radical left is terrified.** They see this as a direct threat to their pocketbooks. They’ll stop at nothing to undermine President Trump’s agenda and destroy the progress we’ve made. But we can’t let that happen. The more we stand united behind this plan, the more power we give President Trump to fight for everyday Americans.

GOP leaders need to hear from YOU. Do you support President Trump’s tax plan? [**We need your answer NOW.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.--cMu7atjaQ)
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ **ANSWER HERE**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Together, we can make sure that the left doesn’t get its way and that President Trump’s plan becomes a reality.

Thank you for standing with us.-GOP Alerts

subject: Deadly Fires in Oklahoma, Astronauts Return, and Rafting Iguanas
body:
Oklahoma wildfires killed four, injured at least 200, and destroyed over 400 homes as high winds and storms [sparked nearly 150 fires](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-OszAQxJ8GOiPjP4ALF1-TLl97Jdp412FzBkfGF5S3P3HFddeNZkaj0e_jOl-BE2_3_7CSrzHPSiorpBa9mxE4vWfToo9EinRLvh-N0uNknW0XTyGGQOCUQTmYoN1NucmQ1ai1HqbYsj_XpO6ddNZZ1-HoolbRou2dBcTGSEKuuXSPzFtdKKZ3flHpQl7b5Jdan3uj_zXq0qjLcRzddgsbHfuZnw5BXaicihNGLrQ36mIEEqBIBHsVSkrB2-OrEIr8mWDJK4jftihhg94N0yDb4vF5cEq8D2Nj5H0FTj8_6l9cXl59BwAA__9Dy2Wl) across the state.

## Oklahoma Fires Kill 4, Injure Hundreds
Oklahoma wildfires killed four, injured at least 200, and destroyed over 400 homes as high winds and storms [sparked over 150 fires](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-OszAQxJ8GOiPjP4ALF1-TLl97Jdp412FzBkfGF5S3P3HFddeNZkaj0e_jOl-BE2_3_7CSrzHPSiorpBa9mxE4vWfToo9EinRLvh-N0uNknW0XTyGGQOCUQTmYoN1NucmQ1ai1HqbYsj_XpO6ddNZZ1-HoolbRou2dBcTGSEKuuXSPzFtdKKZ3flHpQl7b5Jdan3uj_zXq0qjLcRzddgsbHfuZnw5BXaicihNGLrQ36mIEEqBIBHsVSkrB2-OrEIr8mWDJK4jftihhg94N0yDb4vF5cEq8D2Nj5H0FTj8_6l9cXl59BwAA__9Dy2Wl) across the state. Red flag warnings remained in effect on Monday and Tuesday as gusty winds, low humidity, and dry vegetation fueled the fires, burning at least 179,000 acres. Authorities expect a weather break today, lowering fire danger levels to critical or lower. [See fire map here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL-myUB2mx5w4OASZ3Pphajn2h68a_AIvIP4-xWbb1RJqerp_btPd045rc-_vARXY5lQIbXKtNpOwimfU9-IiyFgME1weujRDCNZamaHJPpBHFmPmm6PqMKNxQorMiQSH01y15oy2ipLlmwng40GIwlpSywCvQqSatm6j5LWOoeYz_IOW_e_LE12c62vHcwfQA_oj-PovnauRfi8CoB-r2U7Af0ajv0KrqmsgP66BfTKAHo9AvrymXkuC7dHyhLTFvZ24RegH5G0Gu2g1ADom83J60g5p_02QK-eC6f8A1N_k_N2-B0AAP__bqlkAg). Damaging winds have also kept [water scooping aircraft grounded](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwgB0Kite4y2u3tIgZ4tlgYwGJlb9fZfutbnGlo6PzdZ2vnhLt9_9-Q9dinkGA4UJxaefgKb1n3QUXEQFVh06OGtR4MdZ0qwN7E1oNyoqLucE4qEHr4CEiLlFKPXTkPjShpBXWWGP7MNqoIJpgpDU-BKYFBmq59N-Z9rZiTO_8wtIveeuSW1s7KlP_GEwMpvM8-0de8udkMPnSaEnIYMqP5Ne8eV6fBxZel5w_eyS_Y-W3Z9krj8k3flIKkQpWftIeGEyDBlByFF1x4TgpJarDyLS4b57Sr0T7K8rLwU8AAAD__4iSZEk), but they're on standby if the weather changes, according to the Oklahoma Forestry Service. Twelve Oklahoma counties remained [under a state of emergency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ8Gd2thMHEoKHKFu9yVKa09s8SbwyYyJChvf3L6v5pPGmk0-m7X6Yocebv_xpVcCWlSUhmQGjo7eeT4mfrGu0CkSDfkuqFXejgba5rFDef5L-JJejopOZxnO3dS6x5tL2dtBtmwO9ak7qy0xhrb-sEGrYLxprMGvRe9JM8l7e0j8VYWCvGT3rS3c1qb6JZSnlnoi1CjUGOttV3zdnRCjbTBKws1blSP-HL6F3FJK0Ll6APvlCESvgmwHJAL9OAJPSgpgbfHaycPuWAhSCHwzBgzZPwINeIOl0v3C__UW7M7_6wcI-fTIHp5X5Hj92H5ydjbqf8BAAD__1Gsba8) Tuesday as crews continued damage assessments statewide. Residents were urged to contact state officials to report wildfire, wind damage, or request assistance.
## Israel Launches Major Strike on Gaza
Israel's military [launched the deadliest strikes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FurDAQRb_GdCB7zDxw4eI1dJs2JRqYYXFizAp7F-3fR6RPd6UrnaPzeRtvFGJI9w_axJdlH0ED1trWxo1MIb7HtmK_iIDYSrzpWrBdjw6r1c96Nshmsj3qnnsgPbGZ0Ha906jZVMFfNG2N0w4duoY7t1hYkNE4JGbVauFQ9qP52kMqqyzxvb_kaOZ9q6JfS3lkZf8rGBQM53k285STnPn6FQzXVDCEfJDEOtIzzavkOpcjfEuuV9oo10kKpTetTwVDdXh-nCHGkP91qtX3jUL8lZW_4l8efgIAAP__lTJc0Q) on the Gaza Strip since the agreement of its ceasefire with Hamas, shattering the fragile truce as Hamas refused to return any more hostages. Benjamin Netanyahu, Israel’s prime minister, said the [war in Gaza is back on](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu5CAUheGnwR0juPgOpqDYhm623dK6NnjMBoNlyFjO00eTPvWRPh39_x7jg2KK-fmXtmDbUkYQgFwoLs3oKaZr7DtvlxAgqC5YqXtQekCD3WrVAP1daJTz4FHqCWfdaxTLNCsMXk9dtG9NKGmEQYPm5rVZFCzoURok71kvgo-tHLf_Jea2hiVd5RWO21y2Ltm1tb0y9YeBY-DytZfa3hMD94YZOKEYODkwcGc5kuc5nJWBi_WgkCLfN55Do3zR-skrXZU_6Yv4SQePlU80f_CSGbjusH4_Y0qx3jXrxXOjmH5OtN-ivCx8BwAA__98BGJf) Tuesday night because he believes it’s the only way to force Hamas to free the remaining hostages, whether they’re alive or dead. _“From now on, negotiations will be conducted only under fire,”_ the premier said in his evening address to the Jewish state. _“We have gone back to fighting with great force.”_ Hundreds were reported killed in the attack, including at least four senior Hamas officials. Hamas accused Israel of having violated the truce.
## Stuck NASA Astronauts Finally Return Home
NASA astronauts Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams returned to Earth Tuesday, [splashing down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ8Gd7ZgMWdTUFxDl2uvtDbZJeFEIAISy29_cvq_mubTzOj7e9kuGFPM9z_4ZNdD2UCCGaUeld0IYzq2eSAXmIH1wE4tM-hlNdYMDyevpJHDddarVKu2HIj4SmjCasFIHqI726RWVlpjjZ1osUFDMGSUNUgkZskUe6nTvxJzf3BIR_lwnW7lOST36P3VhP4twAvw-75P74a9EB4nIMC3XuohwGfe2xnYY8kC_DkrwEstwKv1C2JNMXMdsfVaMr57Gyv3d81je-GNBfgVZquUklIuAvxQHb32mFJsvxYxy_sTY_r-6j95-jj4HwAA__9YZ2ix) in a SpaceX Dragon capsule off the coast of Florida after over 280 days in space. Wilmore and Williams, originally scheduled for [an eight-day mission](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAUBb8GOiy4GNsUFK9xl9duaRG4xKywiYAE5e9X3n67Ix1pRvN12242png-_tsDTQt5Aw6KccmE3ryN6bON1JuACCgpGjGPIOdFaUV3w-8c0EmhnV_sInBS1lk3BzktCnXgNJqLxqXQXCut9OBnHSQE5ZXQynpPRo4-tlyG7xzPtmNIn_zGMrh80GT21p6VyH8EVgJr731w93pir9dPYL0mgdUV7EwzW1vJp321ygq2VzkZ2tJ2Aistxj97TCnWaSYjfxw2pl9H-6v5beAnAAD__8wjWeg), spent nine and a half months in space, covering 4,576 orbits and 121 million miles due to leaks and propulsion system issues on their original spacecraft. President Trump spearheaded efforts to bring the astronauts home, asking for Elon Musk’s help. The SpaceX CEO responded by launching a rescue mission last week. [See Wilmore and Williams return here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6jAQAL_G6YicXS9hCxdIT3kVJ111ZeTgNfHJYGQcLP7-xPVXjzSj-TrNJxdTvF0-3FVsDXkGDbTTuBt49i6m12w6b4MICHZih9EAjgdi6lZLAgPuKbDGwcgyBqADLuL3qJnNmbpo3zaNA2smJu79yAEhkKeByXmvjBYfay79d463ukpIr_yU0p_ztUt2rfX-UHhUMCmYWmv9K291W-TNFUwpPkXBtN3b_wW5HcunwimIq1sRhf8eqyviu2L9vcWU4mM_KqMvVxfTb6D-Nfy08BMAAP__0i9XUg). Fellow astronaut Nick Hague and Roscosmos cosmonaut Aleksandr Gorbunov were also in the capsule, with Hague reporting seeing a “capsule [full of grins, ear to ear](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwMbEpKF7jLq_d0sJwiVlhiADHm79fOf2Wo5k5Gs3XfbmbEEN6_Dc76ubzAgwkZYJytTgT4nsZOqc9IqDoUPNxADFOUslu0_Y2wOhRTIaxyVjOkcPobmJV0-q5GLugLxoTXDEllVS9G5UX4KWTXEnjHBkYutBy6b9zSG1DH9_5haW3ee-i3lp7ViL-EZgJzOd59jat9jIJzBeawMwEgZlPBOY1Y0gPWpspMSQs1NRWcjJHq3Q9mt3oGeKeC9J6pHCJGMxeacF2lPSpPo3FHxpq7be2x65o9_zE6m0kA3vsJsTPtPbXVS8NvwEAAP__b_psvw)” after splashdown.

| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLturDAYhJ_GdKx8wYALF0da0e1pUyIv_g1_5Auyza54-4goRZrU33yj0Xw85odBj3H9bwLo6tLMKZctFS1TszXoz7lrrHYAHEQDmg0dF8MolWw23TtJBzGCcaKjzvRufHJmR8ZGJqCTfYP6aqOCKaqkkupmB-UEd9JKpqSxlnQULNaUb58JY93A-TO9IN-WFBqvt1r3QsQ_wifCJ2dqPZm8GOGTxbKkI1bCp5ByxLg-M7yJmI4a5pKOvAAR99-I9xcKYPEIRNwhGPRt2VMsKZcN95_AYsJucI2XbbJquWyytvsbvcfSD6Sj62V-T6x_XfbS_CsAAP__pvpv9Q) **[Dolphins Reveal a Core Secret to Longevity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu7CAQRb8Gd16ZAWxTUDxp5W5fm9IiZlhPBMYCvNH-feRNUqaY5p45o9F9u803S4G2-38b0VSfZuhAtZ1ouZ6dpfCcZeOMRwQUDRo-SBDDqLRqVjNK6IWC4TULjHJ8V9z6RfZi1Gh1Q-a81gmuO6200hc3aC_AK6e4VtY5Jjt0VFO-fCTa6oo-PNMD82VJsQlmrXUvTPxjMDGYvK31ydXJGEyOypKOrZ7gW2JiOmqcSzrygkxcf2PozziioyMyccVoKbRlT1tJuay0_ywsNu6W7hsT12gz1y2oJhu3f1IIVPqBye5-qq_f6l9dPQx8BQAA___APmxd)
**
What started as a study to improve the health of aging Navy dolphins resulted in the discovery of a critical nutrient, called C15:0, which has been used by nature for thousands of years to extend mammalian longevity.

C15:0 (pentadecanoic acid) is [the first essential fatty acid](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu7CAQRb8Gd16ZAWxTUDxp5W5fm9IiZlhPBMYCvNH-feRNUqaY5p45o9F9u803S4G2-38b0VSfZuhAtZ1ouZ6dpfCcZeOMRwQUDRo-SBDDqLRqVjNK6IWC4TULjHJ8V9z6RfZi1Gh1Q-a81gmuO6200hc3aC_AK6e4VtY5Jjt0VFO-fCTa6oo-PNMD82VJsQlmrXUvTPxjMDGYvK31ydXJGEyOypKOrZ7gW2JiOmqcSzrygkxcf2PozziioyMyccVoKbRlT1tJuay0_ywsNu6W7hsT12gz1y2oJhu3f1IIVPqBye5-qq_f6l9dPQx8BQAA___APmxd) to be discovered in over 90 years, and it supports both healthspan and lifespan by strengthening cell membranes against age-driving lipid peroxidation. In collaboration with the Navy, [doctors spent a decade developing fatty15 as a pure, bioavailable, science-backed, patented, and award-winning C15:0 supplement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu7CAQRb8Gd16ZAWxTUDxp5W5fm9IiZlhPBMYCvNH-feRNUqaY5p45o9F9u803S4G2-38b0VSfZuhAtZ1ouZ6dpfCcZeOMRwQUDRo-SBDDqLRqVjNK6IWC4TULjHJ8V9z6RfZi1Gh1Q-a81gmuO6200hc3aC_AK6e4VtY5Jjt0VFO-fCTa6oo-PNMD82VJsQlmrXUvTPxjMDGYvK31ydXJGEyOypKOrZ7gW2JiOmqcSzrygkxcf2PozziioyMyccVoKbRlT1tJuay0_ywsNu6W7hsT12gz1y2oJhu3f1IIVPqBye5-qq_f6l9dPQx8BQAA___APmxd) that slows aging to meaningfully protect our long-term health, including metabolic, heart, and liver health.

On this day in 1931, the Nevada state legislature voted to , attempting to boost its lagging economy. Gambling taxes now comprise the largest portion of Nevada’s total tax revenue. One of the great culinary controversies of our time is the question of pineapple on pizza. But if you think that's bad, then just look at our Et Cetera item about what they're Today’s sponsor is —the breakthrough health supplement designed to support longevity, cellular health, and overall well-being. Fatty15 is a game-changer and right now they are offering a 15% discount for The Flyover readers. | Oklahoma Fires Kill 4, Injure Hundreds Oklahoma wildfires killed four, injured at least 200, and destroyed over 400 homes as high winds and storms across the state. Red flag warnings remained in effect on Monday and Tuesday as gusty winds, low humidity, and dry vegetation fueled the fires, burning at least 179,000 acres. Authorities expect a weather break today, lowering fire danger levels to critical or lower. . Damaging winds have also kept , but they're on standby if the weather changes, according to the Oklahoma Forestry Service. Twelve Oklahoma counties remained Tuesday as crews continued damage assessments statewide. Residents were urged to contact state officials to report wildfire, wind damage, or request assistance. Israel Launches Major Strike on Gaza Israel's military on the Gaza Strip since the agreement of its ceasefire with Hamas, shattering the fragile truce as Hamas refused to return any more hostages. Benjamin Netanyahu, Israel’s prime minister, said the Tuesday night because he believes it’s the only way to force Hamas to free the remaining hostages, whether they’re alive or dead. “From now on, negotiations will be conducted only under fire,” the premier said in his evening address to the Jewish state. “We have gone back to fighting with great force.” Hundreds were reported killed in the attack, including at least four senior Hamas officials. Hamas accused Israel of having violated the truce. Stuck NASA Astronauts Finally Return Home NASA astronauts Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams returned to Earth Tuesday, in a SpaceX Dragon capsule off the coast of Florida after over 280 days in space. Wilmore and Williams, originally scheduled for , spent nine and a half months in space, covering 4,576 orbits and 121 million miles due to leaks and propulsion system issues on their original spacecraft. President Trump spearheaded efforts to bring the astronauts home, asking for Elon Musk’s help. The SpaceX CEO responded by launching a rescue mission last week. . Fellow astronaut Nick Hague and Roscosmos cosmonaut Aleksandr Gorbunov were also in the capsule, with Hague reporting seeing a “capsule ” after splashdown. **An official message from Vice President JD Vance**
President Trump wanted me to share with you his most critical gubernatorial endorsement since his inauguration as your 47th President.
He and I are PROUD to stand with **_Florida 's next Governor_**, Byron Donalds.
I've known Byron for many years, his record of service to the people of Florida is unmatched, and as your governor, he will keep Florida the Freest State in the Nation.
He will enact our **MAGA Agenda** to the letter; continuing with Mass Deportation, standing against embedded corruption, and encouraging economic growth that benefits Americans FIRST.

Friend,

The fight for our Second Amendment rights is happening in the states -- and Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is winning.

In New Hampshire, YAL member and newly elected State Representative Sam Farrington just introduced a statewide Campus Carry bill to ensure college students can defend themselves.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/L8up2uZWpprLf-AT_p1LY6VPuVTvNO97uQ2t_-Hyr--hrMoJ45Vu89aP4zy-AW_k9UOn7RV2Qxk2sN1Hw8A7z996JOU7s5VsxvHdUpGUdkrqEPMRqSNOrSbwtLCWL2-UqOVE___Z5PVr9u89-EA-ePQBcP3m9V3K8d_jj3EGxPlnH9WVehWacWGMCiCL_UBU7qEDEe5Itw1nEK2oJWwTrgkEcZjdK42fXRxzX3wV1Z37eUPwEX195MssMzmeYzOKS3Dpo6RW4EIsC4X12LYB0wXh4Yn6gCAXt12uQ-QFehuW36TybwFtDh_78lrYx_m9D78oNeBi-5GlwP_M_iWlRMaeTChMa-3gn37Ivdn3H7eGLGFLSdfUN1Z4S3lFh1xX/BsOR6Utt0pYxdk0nshO4FHFjPSU0dgYX/7) And we're not stopping there.

**However, the radical Left is _still_ working overtime to chip away at your gun rights -- state by state.**

subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/8-0rKruDkHYGoWguAyEYbnLEu4b3AWxqxCcfGUcB6l4157tbFX_38T16-D9kD234_HEZDExS2puYGJBtadiLY4t8ECePdSpe3Ni-cQmKXuFqxjweZ5DVq-0X4l2dzKSGtY05kbz_-dCjniRvNyqCIXDB4bVaruPfjqq6pbWVupBtpSLDTE2uQ8L4B0WpUKDukLZvpkD3AZu8k9IrlQhIT06bdtDpS_WD81Y42j4g8A-tV7LugRtfdMhSsZmRCzWISvXFnadG7XpaUs4Q09LqGZK8OgwFVehUK_9nCjjLkimI0yyAnEvBwwi0sv2wppTr1AZHC2--NGasCPirrrHIE1WD1Lu5AQQfiuRAMXr8CdfIcv3RVJlbEhqnTiLnhTBgPBcpQFj2Tfz4pOUETLZczBbCjBj-QC57TXastL61AWb2KA6YUM8an5lXXEaAoJv3v6Ckp7RvVsp5FHpFHFugeLPDRcVeIa2m8ig8ESmhWloJkVm8i4Q0HzFyd958YdjjdmBWsmk/8_hSKIsr7s9feTfvG9ijiCxm4jVKsCka/7 "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/1o8WVVDhd94ZG-HQ9gwvfL5p4ggkRgOhccwNzFQmb66QGyLFtpMYx_k3H0z7bnQRHIP934irgyE3sUbjLpmgF4cZFZsDZ9PbxBQQJINwEOy0XnR2xlnhPZi0CedFL_Ia_v3ZHTfn5okzewBjay4FpE_0Xptuz8zwUHN5ULkQPjudXIyK49T9nI0T2_qsPaIl69Kj48Xq7nOfHUj33kMm4-0KfGI6NwesLKxbcqYn6W_lUx_lNa7RgKK_2E-IJ1mwAQ80kEY38qzR2EzOoZ0awTpzQYQoDtBCZqX8-9ShZ7U-ojP_X6RbGMhhaYH1xH-3X5uns7teh4aq8h1WY5DoZSr-ck4ZnQ7BypQYGJYu89W9FunO9eSxrjF-MnUl7w2KrGkcdQgzpv0-_LRJ_L9fi5dJWzlEzRJwZNNICmoXn8UQvGmUXmB90at4Dzb32XiGqBTQQcVOEHmWY3vYJwDkbGmDxFgEW_-qO5qWt1o4p0FCE2cj5m3ZRAdZwtA_ell0Bss9Yx4/BqjhjYgDYgbK0ebwnYbIQDDjNrgs-gO3/7 "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

clean_body: I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. | | | | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support." Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting." If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?" It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. | | "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE" Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise.
