name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: More Trans Leftist Violence
body:
It gets worse and worse everyday. I need your eyes on this.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSM/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – Recently, I was forced to divert campaign funds to boost my own private security detail after Rep. Robert Garcia went on CNN and **_called for people to use weapons against me_**.
Just a few short days later, **Justin Thomas Nelson,** a mentally ill _man_ pretending to be a _woman_ was arrested after he planted bombs at a Tesla dealership.
| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSM/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSM/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | | _**Justin Thomas Nelson** :__A_ __radicalized Leftist transgender “woman”__ _that tried to_ _murder_ _Tesla employees._
---
Make no mistake: These attacks are **_directly down stream_** from the work Elon Musk and I are doing with DOGE. They are **_directly downstream_** from my bill, the Protect Children’s Innocence Act, which would ban gender transitions for minors.
In New York, a man called **Nate Morelli was arrested for planning to murder me a****nd the liberal NY Judge only gave him four months in prison.** He said, in no uncertain terms, he was going to **“ _take a baseball bat and crack [my] skull_ ”**.
**Where is Nate Morelli now?** Thanks to the soft-on-crime policies in New York State **he is back out on the street**.
There is no telling where he is and if he will try to kill me again.
Down in my home state of Georgia, a retired military sniper named**Sean Cirillo** called my office in DC and **screamed at my staff that he******“ _h_** _as a bead on me_ ” and was going to**** _kill me with a sniper rifle._**
It took the FBI almost 24 hours to track him down but not before **he called my office back several times, screaming that he knew where I was, and telling my staff he would murder them after murdering me.**
**_Deranged leftists have been completely radicalized to extreme violence, and they’re not shy about their plans to kill me, my family, and my staff._**
**__[As Leftist threats intensify, and their violence is clearly ramping up, I’m asking for your help in the form of a donation to my campaign so that I can boost my security and keep myself, my staff, and my family safe](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSM/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
This lunatic targeted Tesla employees because they’re tied to Elon... **_Just like I am._**
This lunatic is targeting the innocent because he thinks our society is going to stop permitting transgender insanity for our kids... **_And I’m leading that charge._**
I don’t get a government security detail. I have to pay for that out of my campaign funds and that’s exactly what I do.
I will never back down in the face of their violence but I’m scared of what might happen if I don’t take steps to keep myself safe.
**__[I need your help right now. Can I count on you](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSM/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?_**
_Forever Fighting,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSM/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_Marjorie Taylor Greene_**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSM/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|

| Last year, Democrats were working around the clock to stop Trump from abusing powers from the Executive Branch. This included the No Kings Act with three important guardrails to our democracy: 1) Trump would be held accountable for his many crimes – including the 34 felony convictions on his record. 2) The Supreme Court, controlled by a 6-3 conservative majority, would stop any corruption that they’ve been a part of! 3) Trump would not be in office EVER AGAIN. This is a democracy, Peter. There are no kings that rule the United States of America. And we need to keep it that way. [So if you agree with JB Pritzker and other Democrats working against Trump's tyranny, can you please add your name in support of our country having NO KINGS before 9:00 AM tomorrow?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T847d53b9-155b-4e29-83bf-75bf21fb24f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump’s War on Federal Workers Just Backfired
body:
But the fight is not over.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wu04g-vqeu8w-kyd76rh8/)
---
# **Trump’s War on Federal Workers Just Backfired**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wu04g-vqeu8x-kyd76rh9/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies **thought they could get away with illegally firing thousands of federal workers** —but they just got a wake-up call from the courts. A federal judge ruled that the mass terminations were **unlawful** , ordering thousands of dedicated public servants to be reinstated after Trump’s reckless attempt to purge the federal government of anyone who wouldn’t bend to his will.
### This wasn’t just routine downsizing. **It was a full-scale attack on the federal workforce** , designed to replace professionals with MAGA loyalists who would do Trump’s dirty work. More than **24,000** hardworking Americans had their lives turned upside down—fired without due process, losing paychecks, health care, and careers overnight—all to fuel Trump’s authoritarian takeover.
Let’s be clear: **This wasn’t an accident. This was the plan.** Trump and his allies want to gut public service, silence those who challenge his corruption, and replace career professionals with puppets who will do his bidding—no questions asked. **He wants the federal government to serve him, not the American people.** And if he wins in November, he’s **promised** to take things even further. His allies are already drawing up plans for **mass firings, mass retribution, and mass chaos.** They want to rip apart agencies, purge officials, and install Trump’s inner circle to enforce his extremist agenda with no checks and balances.
### The courts have stepped in **this time** —but what happens if Trump gets another four years? Who will be left to stop him?
The courts may have ruled against Trump’s illegal firings, but the fight isn’t over. **His allies are already working to reverse this decision, and if he wins in November, he’ll make sure there’s no one left to challenge him.** Trump and his MAGA movement believe they are above the law. They believe **loyalty to him matters more than loyalty to the Constitution.** They have no respect for due process, no concern for the lives they ruin, and no hesitation about wielding power to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
### That’s why **accountability isn’t optional—it’s urgent**. Every American who believes in **fairness, democracy, and the rule of law** needs to stand up and fight back **right now**.
This isn’t just about the 24,000 federal workers Trump fired. This is about **whether America remains a democracy or falls into authoritarian rule.** Trump has already made his intentions clear: **Purge the government. Dismantle checks and balances. Install loyalists who will obey him without question.** We can’t let that happen. **We need every voice in this fight.** If you believe in protecting democracy, if you believe in holding Trump accountable, if you believe in stopping MAGA’s extremist takeover—**step up now.** [**_Trump is already laying the groundwork for his next purge. We must stop him before it’s too late. Donate now to fight back against Trump’s war on public service._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wu04g-vqeu8y-kyd76rh0/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team

They have no respect for due process, no concern for the lives they ruin, and no hesitation about wielding power to destroy anyone who stands in their way. That’s why accountability isn’t optional—it’s urgent. Every American who believes in fairness, democracy, and the rule of law needs to stand up and fight back right now. This isn’t just about the 24,000 federal workers Trump fired. This is about whether America remains a democracy or falls into authoritarian rule. Trump has already made his intentions clear: Purge the government. Dismantle checks and balances. Install loyalists who will obey him without question. We can’t let that happen. We need every voice in this fight. If you believe in protecting democracy, if you believe in holding Trump accountable, if you believe in stopping MAGA’s extremist takeover—step up now. In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team | | | | Thank you for your support in this pivotal time. | | | | | No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 | You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to modify your or .

| Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
---
---
| Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. This SATURDAY, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold one of our twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond. We will be in Waltham this Saturday!
Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed.
Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in.
Here are the details for our upcoming sessions:
Waltham 🗓️ March 22, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Embassy Theater, 16 Pine St, Waltham
Gloucester 🗓️ March 29, 2025 ⏰ 11:00 AM 📍 27 Webster St, Gloucester, MA 01930
Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts!
[Register Now](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FL28QVTsi_GMH7fCE96sRLjwi4UYM2iKLx5WRLlsVPMAEBMfS-DF0zr67G4UMKalPOnfqNbnXwqf1_PbOSTGmmOtIwpXiOYwwWWylbvSbrhBnntZt86BelLbORjz7GnTuFrjoGBi7Hilx1JSB2GE_-J_W6JcLbfvHUZk_08LlL3d8cjXVoGnu0bkokA8SjA9jOo7FKOqOddjaHWrqM1ITDYcbHiFD759YfvC03_Q8ICWdrxPXV0_tgAd6VUIDtgEXK9E1SPYenGHQwef-sgnQxsoAl1UYE_D&c=C97XH36ODW02gXcYinwIhOHBqr75LG-ZVRX2Rx_CUeNe1l5_Ufdssg==&ch=9xUYUV2qfojMs-wdARksF3cgCNCPirG-uyHZezkEAkdBOxlV_eTCvQ==)

**Good morning!** On this day in 1840, a bloody conflict erupted between Texas soldiers and a delegation of Comanches at the [Council House in San Antonio](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71yhCAUQOGnwU4HLuBPQZHGbtOmdBCucicIO8Kuu2-fSfq8wDnzfd2Wm6VIaf-0B5r62vICHHTLZSumxVuK70U13qzcT6JBIwYFcgQhVBOMmFankVu5onYj11pJrcdt2HqpRhiHhsxvjEsxCa5H3neblRxB60FDr5zzTHH0VPPZ1YAVX7Zs8Z2feHYuH000odZ7YfKDwcxgvq6rqyXYnCIl7PK5M5iDTX7N-ZvBjKmehIXB7PIjOYptyI-C7UZ7qM1p_P2iGKn0A1N8PyzFv0391_008BMAAP__x-hbFA), where the two parties had gathered to exchange captives and make peace. A disagreement led to the deaths of about three dozen Comanches and six Texans. Irving's zoning commission has put the ball in motion for a potential new casino and Dallas Mavericks arena near the site of the former Texas Stadium. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2upSAURp8GOwy_ogXFNHZ32inNFrZKBuEGiJ4zTz_x9LdeyfryrT9fyxeEGNL-G0607bXlRTChKZOUT4uHEN-L6rxdmZ94h5YbJeQoOFfdYY3RUmtUI2OcDStwsXk2yGnQI5Orm7pgHxmTfOJMj2zoN5AMhdZGi0E554li6EPLpW8HNnxB3eI7X1h6l88u2qO170rkLyJmIub7vvt7A3ggETOUFlxEIuaEdyVijtlBJGL2ECNUesKFJbi_lSa8KRRMQEO5QtrpZ4o6qCFlWrDm0ui_nB7kDkg7PjoxGuqBe3Cbptw4RpVeFR3ROeol8G3EwcnJdMX67zvEGOpgiGL7CSF-DrQfi15W_A8AAP__ffR3hg) in today's _Around Texas_ section, and reply to this email to let us know what you think about the proposal. If you're an Amazon Prime subscriber, be sure to check out today's sponsor, [Brad's Deals,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyUkbGunDAQRb_GdF7ZY8MuhYtIK7qXNiUa8ABWbExs83jk6yM226ZI6ePRvaMzPz76D3TerfN3DGTK1xR7EFBzobhse4vOn72urBmEbWVFRt41qAdIqavFQPtoG7JD3aK4D4-m1VIgNrXUoPUkoHLmChNKtlLUD9HcJlSCoK7vNTR6HC3TgqwrMd3KQoW-ME_-jJ-UbmMMlTdLKVtm6huDjkF3HMdtSGizJfT5GmHQDT7ODDopOAb8HVe-JReID7TS5ErmZ9x5wJOvsfCfazw4DnEvTHV7CX2OexqJqWdZ6N3MbUEGzfUbyLo9MPW0Lm8ezzceMWzo5pWp53-2_tXKLykMmrF39pXRvp44_upDtOivddJOb7RgsjMWetMqGbsdznuXmzvTYg7o_MtW-ef5Pg38CQAA__8TzJ7O) to take advantage of special deals with Prime you may not be aware of.

## Abortion Investigation Leads to Three Arrests
Three people associated with a network of Houston pregnancy clinics have been [charged with illegally performing abortions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L-OszAQBPCngQ60u_4DLlx8DV2-9kq02EuwZEIOfCF5-1PSX_-bGWm-LuOFU063639exZfnvI0EZBpQDboxcsqvUdfRTxAd1uKx06R6QtT14hV12ElvDdqJJm0BNM7iEDhggODq5N9loNAhmB5sO7MCIWM6Q1aHECsNElPZ9rYsUuTJx5xf20P2Nmxrnf1Syv2o1L-KhoqG8zzfLsityH58__Aub1fR8IlWNPBeUsgyatadY9U3oGZsEGdoehbTxIlCsFOv2el2KWuudx_vZ8o5HbarNFxXTvkzXv584-HpNwAA___wr19p) and practicing medicine without a license. These are the first charges brought under Texas's abortion ban, which took effect after the overturning of Roe v. Wade in 2022. According to a press release from Attorney General Ken Paxton, 48-year-old midwife Maria Margarita Rojas and her 29-year-old employee, Jose Ley, provided abortions to [at least three women](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQhZ_GdEb22PwVLrZxl223RBM8wGgNjoxvSN7-iui2tx19852j8-823pAj78tf3MiV15xGUNBIZaQexoAc36OtgrurMOiKnO4smB60ttXqhqFDZY0y1oYeOt3g3fTUBNXSMNipq9hdMmX0oFXTq7ae0SiCpukaaO00BWEVBS4p12WlQi885vhOT8r1lLYqurWUxyHMHwFegD_Ps54iT_9hTV9HSftFCfA7nYcA__kX4K9MAV4ZAV53AvwPLTETyo3DyTNJzJmOQkHOKUuMkRYK8S0fOT058L5Ivm4YJd5TLpz2S11lFx4nx8hH2wmrlg05frqWX8d7OvgOAAD__8koceA) in the last 18 months and "falsely presented themselves as licensed medical professionals." Ley was reportedly licensed to practice medicine in Cuba, but he entered the country illegally in 2022 and later received parole and a green card. He routinely consulted with a third person, 54-year-old nurse practitioner Rubildo Labanino Matos, whose license is currently on probation. Authorities arrested Matos and charged him with [practicing medicine without a license](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-OnjAQxJ_GdEb-C3yFiy8FTXRpU6IFL7CSsU-2gbu3j7g-5e5ofqOZvx_TB1CguP2BA139WtOkhLJcaC5fkwcK35NpvJuFf8kGneyN0oOS0jS7U6sarAdveivACGk7PVg7D2KZpcTZNOQemNDyJYUdRNeuoAUqa3urOrMsnhmBnmrKbd2x4heUNXynC3O7pKMJbq_1szD9Zmpkarzvuz1KfDSmRoz8LEyNS6YDmRo3jJghPJ905sozLin7wjNeCIFHvLnHChQKp8j3dJaaIj_I37QihznlSilyiheWShv8XHWHh1TOUNE_Ps0hZyz1SYbM32_5C9Jv3WTnP28KgUrXMyO2Ayj8lKj_XfVy6l8AAAD__zQ-fOU). On Monday, a Waller County judge set the bonds for Rojas and Ley at $1.4 million and $700,000, respectively. They [face 20 years in prison](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp8GOiP_AaZwcRu63HZLNNhjGMngyPaG5O1Xibbd7kifdPTpfN2WG1Ckc_sPB9r6DGmRXPaMKyamxQPF16Jbb1fuJ9GiFaOWykghdLtbI50axOTEhI4b0MGEdfBq5OjAu960ZN8yrsQkeG_40AVQHGXfj70ctHO-0Rw91ZS7umPFJ5QQX-mBuXPpaKPda72XRv1r5NzI-bqu7lzdiVd5742c39jI-buwX_o42EH-ooAMcsZS0TO3Q97QszvmkPJB58YoRtwgMlhTrpTOwrI7QUyDEbzN1t8vipHKMDaabwdQ_FyqfzZ6WPkTAAD___7ra68) if convicted on the abortion-related charges.
## Nasdaq Strengthens Texas Ties
Nasdaq announced Tuesday that it will [open a new regional headquarters](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OozAURp_GdEb2tYFQuMhKS5dttpgS3diXYMk_BDsheftRpp_2-6Sjo_N1mS_og0-3fxjJ1NeSZxDQcaG4HGeHPrxn3ThzFW6UDRk5aFAnkFI3q9EnGmwPoDptr9dRkFo6wF5JEAJwHBpvPjCh5ChFdxJ9u6ASBF03dNBrax3TgpyveW_rSpVeWJbwzk_aW5tjE8xa61aYOjOYGEzHcbSxpM_HYKLEH4XBFHOiN4PJ5rhh8vTZEhaHd24p85x43ij5dOOJDu4wBCx8JXT3B-6V9sJ95YVXH4nBhDs_n-UfvP_93-zGbYcPwZd-YFrcIvrwI1Z_LfU08B0AAP__BvBriQ) in Dallas, strengthening its ties to the Metroplex after creating a regional management division in Irving last September. The news from the world's second-largest stock exchange comes on the heels of last month's announcement that the New York Stock Exchange would move its Chicago branch to Dallas and rebrand it NYSE Texas. The upstart Texas Stock Exchange is also slated to [begin trading operations within the next year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO8yAQhJ8GOlvLAnZcUPxNuvztldbGLDESCQlwsfP2J19_1Uwxmk_f12W-UEzxcftPd3ZtD3lGQNuB7tQ0e4rpMxvp3RX8pCQ7NRrUJ1TKyNVNYAcdILCxnmDQKmCwi7niuCgTtJHRHWeg1aTAnmDoA2lgtHa0OJhl8cIA-9hy6dvKjXeqIX3ym0u_5LtMbm3tWYX-J_As8LxtWx_ybh681WMg8HzUI6h6enWFbzE_KHUrk399U2lcaucpJaqyOP_cYkqxDqMwcLtTTL-Y9qf32-FPAAAA___9VluL). Nasdaq Chair and CEO Adena Friedman touted the organization's [800 clients and 200 listed companies](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQBp8GOqP12pyhcJHmukubEi14fVgyNsHO_bx9RPpUX_NpRpqv23SjEEO6f9LGtr58nhCwF6CEHCdHIb4n3To7gxtly1YajWpAKXW7WuMX0rMbGWZtWOOgez8QeZgHM0pHbbAnDJQcJfQDXDpPChj73vR40cviGg3sQs1HV1eu_KLi4zs_-OiWvLXRrrXupVEfDV4bvPqQKC3cvWnN-Xw0eE38LOdQcfQtftKDQyxij5RE3jmJg-8hJ4pCogKljFTdWrfYHtbtzxBjKBfTaLhvFOKftP5b4WHxNwAA__-BT1-X) in Texas, which represent $1.98 trillion in market capitalization. _"With our regional headquarters in Dallas, we look forward to further deepening our relationships with clients and supporting the continued success of the Texas Miracle,"_ Friedman said. Gov. Greg Abbott [celebrated the news](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPozAQBeBfYzoje8DEKVxcQ5drr0TGHsCS8eTwhCT_frXZeuv36enp_btNN59yKutfv6Pj10ITKDBSdVJfp-hTfk99E92s4lU36PSlh86C1n2zOQ3aIM7aGKusNmGxi4lg7BCstcNim-S-y1Snr1oZq4Z28Z1CMOZiYOhDiKJXGBPT0fKGjC9fl_ymE4820N5ktzHfq-j-CBgFjCud7Qe1K50CxoLPKmC8U-WfFI9Ch_TzTMyS6cFVfrzEQIX2FGR9hIC1Ss-y-Br9f5kfJWxIRaYio8_Z1-Zw8f5MOac6XESv1t2n_BnEvz50OvgKAAD__4WOawo) at a luncheon in Dallas yesterday. _" Texas has become the home of capital of the United States, and now it is just a natural evolution for Texas to become the home of capital markets in the United States. Texas truly is the epicenter of business in the United States."_
## 'Yellowstone' Creator Hosting Music Festival
Taylor Sheridan, co-creator of the hit TV series "Yellowstone," is [hosting a country music festival](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O8yAQAJ8Gd0SwxjYuKL7GXb72SgvMEpCwycHmx29_yvVXjzQjzdd1vdqU03H7b3c09A5lBQEDFz2X8-ptyueqOm-c8LPs0MhJQa9BStVFE2AENc3o3OTtjENwWsugpQY39QqwS-YjE72cpRi0GC_B9gJhGKYBRrVtnimBPlGpF4pI-LYt5LM8sV62snfZRKJ7Y_0_BguDJbzo_QEMlu2R6VGRwUL2zKXyFrEmbw9OhcfSiLvSvh_Iqz22yHN6Ik8Hb3gn3B1WBktXjb-_Us6pjRNT4rbblH-79OeIp4GfAAAA__-tmGHD) at his North Texas ranch later this year. Bosque Ranch Live is scheduled for Saturday, September 13, and will feature Drayton Farley, Kaitlin Butts, and Jackson Dean, each of whom has contributed music to "Yellowstone" and its spinoffs. Tickets start at $500, and [only 500 are being sold](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u5CAURp8Gd4zg8mO7oNjGXbbdcnQNlxgJmywQO3771UTbpj7S-fSdP2_PN0w5He-_cSfXv2J5ggDDheJyfgZM-X7qIbhVhFkO5OSoQU0gpR42h9qA8utqJvRxnqzCQJOQY4xrFELaIbmXTCg5S2EmYR8RlSAwZjRgtfeBaUEh9VIffaNOX9hivstJ9eHLPmS39f7RmPrFYGGwXNf1uCLiCzJYsPbkMzFYDroagyUXj5nB0vHOpfK2UU0BD75_tuR5pNbTiZlXPPzGj1L7xr83-Vra30_6D3I6id-Uc7laL8fLD9PIJSjpzey5J-O5RmM4jsLyEQxqO_vVKjVUFz6ulHNqdmRavO-Y8veV_mPb08G_AAAA__8Oinvt). The premium $1,500 "cowboy campfire" package includes space for an RV, three catered meals, and 10 drink tickets. Sheridan has previously hosted cutting horse events at his Weatherford ranch, and he's indicated he plans to offer additional entertainment opportunities there in the future. "_My career is built on the art of storytelling_ ," [Sheridan told Billboard](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnwR0WHMA2BcVt3OW2W1qYnxgJmwjOxvHbrxJtu_18o9F83ZabTTkd9_92DwZfsSzAQFEmKNeLtylfi-y8WZnXvAuGjxLEBJzLbjOaKxkn71bldBQwxIF5q6zkmsXo49Al8y5jgmvO1MSGPlrBAig1Khikc55IFnzCUnvcAoaXbTFf5Rlq78reZbMhPhoR_wjMBObzPPs15bwWW_07QWDev1tyBGZXDhcqNgLzFXIuZ8NyBOpqsFgqRXvlUmnbQk3eHjSm2pB-MP2llINQGoSWE4G5q8Y_zpRzasNIJLvvNuXPKvzzpqeBnwAAAP__O9xr7g). "_And nowhere is the storytelling tradition more alive than in country music. My hope is that Bosque Ranch Live is a space where these stories can come to life and sets the stage for more events like it to come._ "

According to a press release from Attorney General Ken Paxton, 48-year-old midwife Maria Margarita Rojas and her 29-year-old employee, Jose Ley, provided abortions to in the last 18 months and "falsely presented themselves as licensed medical professionals." Ley was reportedly licensed to practice medicine in Cuba, but he entered the country illegally in 2022 and later received parole and a green card. He routinely consulted with a third person, 54-year-old nurse practitioner Rubildo Labanino Matos, whose license is currently on probation. Authorities arrested Matos and charged him with . Bosque Ranch Live is scheduled for Saturday, September 13, and will feature Drayton Farley, Kaitlin Butts, and Jackson Dean, each of whom has contributed music to "Yellowstone" and its spinoffs. Tickets start at $500, and . The premium $1,500 "cowboy campfire" package includes space for an RV, three catered meals, and 10 drink tickets. clean_body: I can't keep asking | | | | | | | | | I thought my last email would've worked, but I guess not. I thought more people would step up to help a Navy SEAL, but I guess not. And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Friend. If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, Democrats will see this as a major pickup opportunity and start flooding cash into my race. This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6. I lead the team of Navy SEALs running for Congress in 2022 and 2024, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm the toughest Republican in Washington, D.C. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. If the Left can get their foot in the door this early, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. But you have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and SEAL Team 6 Commander, if you help me out today, I can promise you that we will ruin the Left's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking - will you help me out? | | | | Ryan Zinke is a retired member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS 704C EAST 13TH ST SUITE 260 WHITEFISH, MT 59937 Pop Acta Media | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: History Facts
subject: Pablo Picasso's surprising full name
body:
Pablo Picasso is one of the most recognizable names in art history, but if the painter had opted to go by his full name, it’d be a lot harder to remember.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dhywbdi1s39a1k9yslsqunod9uq81pnh55tpmidlh6t7t6vn5gcci74gmirq5wluxlal4u6o3e5zc3erpoytditzjwm5ufw8yfvt19d3ij6m9mhmr9c9ycrppcmtiup3uqv34j79nga67tu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Pablo Picasso’s full name was more than 100 letters long.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| P ablo Picasso is one of the most recognizable names in art history, but if the painter had opted to go by his full name, it’d be a lot harder to remember. He was baptized with one first name, two last names, and 12 middle names, for a grand total of 112 letters: Pablo Diego José Francisco de Paula Juan Nepomuceno Crispín Crispiniano María de los Remedios de la Santísima Trinidad Ruiz Picasso. (The exact order and spelling [vary](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) by source.)
---
It’s common in Spanish-speaking cultures to have two last names, [one for each parent](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). In Picasso’s case, Ruiz was his paternal surname, Picasso was his maternal surname, and he was given his first name, Pablo, in honor of a paternal uncle who died a few years before his birth. His many middle names each had their own meaning, too.
Some are family names: He was given Diego for both his paternal grandfather and oldest uncle, Francisco de Paula for his maternal grandfather, Juan Nepomuceno for his godfather, and María de los Remedios for his godmother. Others are religious. Santísima Trinidad means Holy Trinity, while Crispín and Crispiniano come from [St. Crispín](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and St. Crispinian, whose feast day, October 25, is also Picasso’s birthday.
Some of the artist’s earlier works are signed P. Ruiz, P. Ruiz Picasso, or P.R. Picasso — but eventually, he settled on the name known by millions today, choosing just “Picasso” for his signature.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## A composer was named for an entire 36-member orchestra.
Louis-Antoine Jullien was a musical celebrity in the mid-19th century, and made a name for himself in the United States and Europe as a conductor and composer with stunning showmanship. One could argue he was fated for musical greatness: His father, Antoine, a small-town French violinist, was playing with a local philharmonic society when he was urged to baptize then-newborn Louis. Each of his 36 bandmates wanted to be the child’s godfather, so Antoine bestowed the honor on [all of them](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stdaz0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and gave young Louis dozens of middle names (including more than one Thomas).

clean_body: Pablo Picasso is one of the most recognizable names in art history, but if the painter had opted to go by his full name, it’d be a lot harder to remember. | P ablo Picasso is one of the most recognizable names in art history, but if the painter had opted to go by his full name, it’d be a lot harder to remember. He was baptized with one first name, two last names, and 12 middle names, for a grand total of 112 letters: Pablo Diego José Francisco de Paula Juan Nepomuceno Crispín Crispiniano María de los Remedios de la Santísima Trinidad Ruiz Picasso. (The exact order and spelling by source.) It’s common in Spanish-speaking cultures to have two last names, . In Picasso’s case, Ruiz was his paternal surname, Picasso was his maternal surname, and he was given his first name, Pablo, in honor of a paternal uncle who died a few years before his birth. His many middle names each had their own meaning, too. Some are family names: He was given Diego for both his paternal grandfather and oldest uncle, Francisco de Paula for his maternal grandfather, Juan Nepomuceno for his godfather, and María de los Remedios for his godmother. Others are religious. Santísima Trinidad means Holy Trinity, while Crispín and Crispiniano come from and St. Crispinian, whose feast day, October 25, is also Picasso’s birthday. Some of the artist’s earlier works are signed P. Ruiz, P. Ruiz Picasso, or P.R. Picasso — but eventually, he settled on the name known by millions today, choosing just “Picasso” for his signature. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Names in the full name of artist Salvador Dalí 5-6 | | Babies in the United States named Pablo in 2023 850 | Babies in the United States named Pablo in 2023 850 | | Paintings in the collection of Musée Picasso in Paris 297 | | Area (in square feet) of Picasso’s painting “Guernica” 293.25 | Area (in square feet) of Picasso’s painting “Guernica” 293.25 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- A composer was named for an entire 36-member orchestra. Louis-Antoine Jullien was a musical celebrity in the mid-19th century, and made a name for himself in the United States and Europe as a conductor and composer with stunning showmanship. One could argue he was fated for musical greatness: His father, Antoine, a small-town French violinist, was playing with a local philharmonic society when he was urged to baptize then-newborn Louis. Each of his 36 bandmates wanted to be the child’s godfather, so Antoine bestowed the honor on and gave young Louis dozens of middle names (including more than one Thomas). name: Josh
subject: They Took 1 Billion Dollars from Kids and Farmers. We’re Taking Their Seat.
body:
We have a real opportunity to win, but it will take an enormous effort in these final weeks to push us over the finish line.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YdGwzKlWGYLprH6yEIluSvY6HWaUBHPyFrjchxQ0Mb4XZ802IU8XEvdU0-ivfwacLKNqbFPHi5Whqk4ksiBOw7Yc5amrSYkOL2M-wwM1d5yVfAQyMp5b32IR-nLgDLePR9eMtYB73Q55thCaXkinKDMI3X5W3vc3J5fF-RnYqnDJQ6lkGisVryMaipLxpG2dPVxYEIqQEsYyXVSuS-kFbcycEUxrXcpLPPASQGYox1A=&c=Ue1gFYuOw_NYhf0_ISY_6caLBvjVHNC-yjh1YjSu8xchSZ4IxmbDfw==&ch=bfr5HllqWUUg2yOL1U3y1EWSLrVuLO-MBBSiIrEfmALjOqvu3sqfaQ==)
---
| | | | Team,
As a teacher, I have seen firsthand how food insecurity affects kids. I've watched children come into my classroom hungry, struggling to concentrate because they haven't had enough to eat.
That is why when I learned that MAGA Republicans, under Trump's leadership, cut 1 billion dollars from food bank and school meal funding, all while giving tax breaks to billionaires, I was not just upset - I was enraged.
Food insecurity is not a partisan issue. Every child deserves to be able to eat at school. Every family deserves the security of knowing they can feed their loved ones without making impossible choices. But instead, MAGA's priorities have been clear: take from the most vulnerable in our society and give tax cuts to the wealthiest Americans.
It is wrong. It is unjust. And it is unforgivable. When we turn our backs on our children, our families, and our farmers, we are turning our backs on what makes this country great: our shared values of compassion, fairness, and opportunity for all.
This is exactly why we need to flip this seat. If MAGA is willing to harm the most vulnerable in our community to fatten the pockets of billionaires, we need to do everything in our power to stop them. We cannot allow them to continue this assault on working families.
---
| | | | [Will you stand with me in this fight? We have just a few weeks left to make our voices heard. Every contribution helps us power our campaign and fight back against the lies and attacks being thrown our way.](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YdGwzKlWGYLprH6yEIluSvY6HWaUBHPyFrjchxQ0Mb4XZ802IU8XEvdU0-ivfwacRuRQx2-8_gAXMPkkPb6E9sgy9G9HuCWxkrWTa5oxnujWuzDp3vAw1Bl5QY1DQD-bpIF-H2J4vCMckC7vrb9B-UkDLOQXHYqYzsai6hL-hfnKDwSx9ua-Ks-qHuPXqxrEwondwIe0EpJgEEasHRuITdRcgAhM-ahlXYOpo4cKdGKhLmVVarSiOw==&c=Ue1gFYuOw_NYhf0_ISY_6caLBvjVHNC-yjh1YjSu8xchSZ4IxmbDfw==&ch=bfr5HllqWUUg2yOL1U3y1EWSLrVuLO-MBBSiIrEfmALjOqvu3sqfaQ==)
---
| | | | | [DONATE TO FLIP THE SEAT](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YdGwzKlWGYLprH6yEIluSvY6HWaUBHPyFrjchxQ0Mb4XZ802IU8XEvdU0-ivfwacRAlFwDhBcCiuqXc-OrG0Hn5sM_bd5XngCQTRwyc-YCxrUsdlSjiBG8EwWt2JKHf3UKlCLcahrGsbImrbK5o1HmQ6XqOgaMG81O3RWsxVYPcVJ0VUZaIJj5xzTLo_8_seepqV9Bg5IHEvB1_Wz-V7u1n3ZY5oNqpG&c=Ue1gFYuOw_NYhf0_ISY_6caLBvjVHNC-yjh1YjSu8xchSZ4IxmbDfw==&ch=bfr5HllqWUUg2yOL1U3y1EWSLrVuLO-MBBSiIrEfmALjOqvu3sqfaQ==)

| | | | Together, we can make sure that our priorities--feeding our children, supporting our farmers, and ensuring a fair economy for all--take center stage. We have the power to make history, but we need to act now.
Let's do this together.

| | | | -Josh

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 3/19/2025
body:
HB25-1211: A developer giveaway disguised as water conservation?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** A new water conservation bill, [HB25-1211](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), is facing scrutiny as critics argue it’s a developer giveaway disguised as a conservation effort. The bill would allow municipalities to approve dense developments with reduced water supply requirements, raising fears about long-term water shortages.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Attorneys warn Tina Peters' [health is deteriorating](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in jail, fueling concerns over political persecution. Protesters [rallied outside Aurora’s ICE office](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after activist Jeanette Vizguerra’s detention, calling it unjust. In Jefferson County, parents and educators [demand accountability](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as frustration grows over school leadership and declining performance.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** After 286 days stranded due to Biden-era delays, two NASA astronauts [returned home](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with help from Trump and Elon Musk. Trump and Putin agreed to a [temporary ceasefire](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), covering infrastructure, energy, and future maritime security talks.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** A new op-ed examines the Trump administration’s efforts to [cut wasteful government spending](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) through the DOGE, with some questioning whether the cuts go too far.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, March 19, 2025. Don't forget to to listen to our new **Mountain Minute Podcast** , every morning! Click [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
– Heidi Ganahl

**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[HB25-1211: A developer giveaway disguised as water conservation?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Framed as a water conservation bill, HB25-1211 passed the Colorado House on March 17, with unanimous Republican opposition and four Democrats voting against it.

Despite its stated goal of ensuring fairness in water tap fees, critics argue the bill primarily benefits developers over homeowners, forcing local water districts to subsidize high-density developments while shifting costs to existing ratepayers.

Democrat Reps. Rebecca Stewart and Sheila Lieder, sponsors of the bill, argue it is necessary to prevent water districts from using tap fees to discourage development.

“The bill makes sure that special districts aren’t using the levying of tap fees in order to influence land use, discourage more water-efficient, multifamily and affordable housing,” Stewart said during the House Transportation, Housing & Local Government Committee hearing on Feb. 26.

**[Is Tina Peters’ life at risk in jail? Attorneys sound the alarm on her health decline](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Tina Peters' attorneys warn her health is deteriorating in jail, citing weight loss, memory issues, and poor conditions, raising concerns about her treatment.
* Legal advocates argue Peters is being targeted for her political stance, with supporters pushing for a pardon from Governor Jared Polis.
* The Colorado GOP is calling on citizens to demand Peters’ release, framing her case as a test of justice and fairness in the state.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Protesters gather outside ICE in Aurora after immigration activist Jeanette Vizguerra reportedly taken into custody](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Protesters gathered outside the ICE facility in Aurora following reports that immigration activist Jeanette Vizguerra was taken into custody by federal agents.
* Vizguerra, a longtime advocate for immigrant rights, was reportedly detained outside her workplace, prompting outcry from supporters who argue her detention is unjust.
* Officials cite Vizguerra’s prior legal issues, including using false documents, as justification for her detention, while critics claim the move is politically motivated.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Tristan: Is Trump administration’s DOGE cutting waste or slashing jobs?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Trump administration's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is following a long-standing bipartisan tradition of cutting wasteful federal spending, similar to efficiency efforts under Clinton and Obama that also resulted in job reductions.
* While critics claim the cuts eliminate essential positions, history shows that past administrations have implemented similar measures to rein in bureaucratic bloat and streamline government operations.
* Supporters argue that DOGE is simply enforcing responsible spending, ensuring taxpayer dollars are used efficiently rather than funding unnecessary government expansion.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY KEVIN LUNDBERG | STATE | MARCH 17** _The Colorado legislature is more than halfway through this year’s session. Like the past six years of the Polis administration, this session has seen radical bills roar through the legislature with many passing on party-line votes._ __
**[Mesa County Republican Women’s Lincoln Day Dinner to Feature Congresswoman Harriet Hageman](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF | LOCAL | MARCH 17** _The Mesa County Republican Women (MCRW) are set to host their highly anticipated Lincoln Day Dinner on Saturday, March 22, 2025, at the Clifton Community Center. This year’s keynote speaker is none other than Congresswoman Harriet Hageman, Wyoming’s sole representative in the U.S. House and a staunch advocate for conservative values and policies._
**[Ganahl: Smears and fearmongering—The fight for John Adams Academy and school choice in Douglas County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY HEIDI GANAHL****| LOCAL | MARCH 17** _In Douglas County, Colorado, a battle over education choice is brewing as efforts to open a new classical charter school, the John Adams Academy, face fierce opposition. Spearheading the initiative is Ellie Reynolds, a Sterling Ranch resident and mom, and Kim Gilmartin, a seasoned advocate for school choice, who has helped launch multiple classical charter schools across the state._

subject: 5 Days to Defend against Project Veritas—Help Me Finish This Fight!
body:
Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

| [****](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/7DJsRBu6uvRSfqoHOOXmK_zqc2oiHVx7S-5y_M-Gh6V_E6Dfg3lPBTMvGbM5IWBtI4cBqfs6uI8VW7ird1FrT2o-tfo-QwWruClilL4XLj4vlySo7ULY9-Z7CQasjf2BFNUY7aTA58cl4jnWQ-1qt9zxq40TsgHraGqh22EmaWdq8hPjqc0n4jrKa9CW3StLpcT58W48AegrJAlhi_h0zRbmHzx9b5Yt7WfgJMNObT6bVnggQ_uttsh6Icc_r5_99Qru5MqrDERypYFlg3rEDrAtDy2_rImHefkPN5zAblWGIG6-PnvBi3YoJxCX_zUsaSOXVf0ChuyScbZF2aB2sXUfb5RJpxNr-Flvg6iT7U6XsYyq9bpwtMAt5raA7TvIzzb_vrnEm1EGOodbf46198CcLoqDKWkv-mMVXKl7HgIMNcG0BFfEtmM/tWC7aiK97HbY5Pt-qBIcywe7a0YB7AWG/7)
[****](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/EK7NigT9yGxuEyFVZc44gG5vSVHZdWp3oXyH1KsRAWzTHUBNDK-Qpa8bqN3AwtpSVjKPy3NHnzY3ctfCoIHRXHCr0GlMRyfKd6dFxYH2fyrzMY6fk8EbFujfAZ3rGBwNKY_v9R1qk2qvBA8jgl0i3onuB5qnoFcEwZvX3c6UUhY49quxlDB9TPo0w6ug_Z9Fg7B0qoBFz9_CX53FueSApcp0lBrClfBYn_usSJvE5cjBQHTsziOW-sV-7YxKg3tS-3JnN0oadD2ensEeivHyHs2ZxLhjFRotgkll4-CVoCLsv9BrBJzjVCTVDNB3teamIiXEuTD0ixlpJypBUy_Msjv9PYCWfrFJ5yw0PVe3g09eCFSoZ4ZXPVekh3tyPRAbMelWGFAb4Ggz5IBpCH8oWpCDfSgsKAe6AqAVM36ttpDTAkNFMNnYtRM/U-1aRwaC-W_qHCpd4VfvPY44o9Nx-XKQ/7) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm reaching out because I'm staring down the barrel of a make-or-break moment.

**Project Veritas --the outfit I built from nothing over 13 years--fired me in February 2023 and is now suing me to kill my career as an investigative journalist. **[**I need your help to defend against this brutal lawsuit.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/9DfEBj5H441P5Umdfc4VmHV5PiZ9rn07jfWDVCGLoU7bsIJ2WdApG4aDV1TVKz2IP1TDhliLTUzqib-7qoTlvWDi2MNKcFsMt5el1r6ZskhRLVYwEA5NjQdHA1MSacs_EjP6ajrMAOtUoMY9MJV6CVmjt86raDthUh_oTmCZC08ybHWcavwB7o0-DdQnvDgmHVug08ZnFWU4a7UZVlNthmXTbr847KaxdfNHEkEbXvvUWh1BaNbFtd-VjTJ5eGTbYK-s2xdWQ4LMV-0cGDnNArHO8EZmKTRmnuH1EZ3jcCSPET2mYWzWwaPUoe6FEF37HjCoYWPkyVKsZsvRhXUGYrtwI-4rKaNp3XAyFYePdVYdwedVx3_l5ep1jVNRD8CA_Rn3pdo5zKkFrpqVIcI8C8IqpAlUNKrStjWKEKFiPI_w1eBYfT2W3Jk/u3aK2SUyIh9s2cQaSBuQEfp5ueR_rCga/7)

They're trying to bury me, to snuff out the work I love, the work that's exposed corruption from ACORN to Big Tech to the Treasury's resistance to Elon's DOGE reforms. [**But I 'm damn close to ending this nightmare--and I need you to get me across the finish line.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/lKPeTMRrTvd6hpozyndrUQSj5DrCxevieAtexM-tCDgrNQqQkq1g1ZGUnbZHulLM2lGpVah4TYlqVgXytOj56kTAeooDctlPxklcUmTFtWukrVcVPthYC0xzzDJHeJCsjo6Gf0hrzpOJbRTSwrxG-EPXAOx7lbGOKac3r3MCWxtQvcQr4NNt6AmJEEF0Sa3W7-7qQhC4cJ-MiVkw2TXnvJYtmYqxohydGZO2zXoWLAde8f8fqsnBXBf0n3E_wH0iK_hQwf27uEoGPpJtFeHTskhbrWln6Q7bxPX_aop7mw0T-k6j4F8wAURQtrsASpL4Yxmhk5ZHxBK8wCr0OuruIqf1hagP3DWnRwOn6NObbXfuv8jSLn7p6RVogISqOEigTRFt9Ky7gPPXABImai2sOmOU2fJZsE-Ss082km4qofQJ5cuGrQSS8Qs/6q9XwN8e5uahvBB_glQsVkTl2-Aom4kj/7)

Here's where we stand: after two years of legal warfare, we're in the final stretch before trial.

**Discovery 's wrapping up, and the courtroom's in sight**. My team's been relentless--digging through their lies, proving this is a personal vendetta to stop me from doing what I was born to do: **uncover truth for you, the public**.

But the bills are piling up fast. [**I 've got a stack of attorney fees--$42,000--that I need to pay in the next 5 days to keep fighting**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/X0ILJi6xFf1vcdZhPSFp1AcTiTGYIYmQeOrO1w7L2Zf_7Xz2NBmzgfnbak4Zl4CvARuaPIuoJAMmJHCYWJkGLDguL_UBfJCD871Sprch-Mhhsw9GBat8LUJByI-oqF76iaGnM4SWKxqX06dED-WxPFd1hUsPXsgXAjumc5DBX2oais19j98usD-0L-rmJhMTzIxm_v7okArSbLhCzOdKBFw8E2CYZ8cykbSm4kgQ5vwj40qG9VwDjQMtWdqCjLK8QHvIH5scE9gyx71AQqtLeEHKgfsMLD0-0FDKSSy2MjvfWdmyrQjz3KPcFFxerJ3B1840i4HrRYqFmUcpZdUPmIWh3H_i17b11ReQJmxUQf0Tz77nYZ6SfJQAZ7GFzSH0GfDaVg4dvbN3CZ9CcttZvcQIRT-NbiSeP-7Wy2TqfoygwkN65rQxt9k/3kyuNEHl-ItgNWqyELOTydj5eYw7HDo0/7). Without it, **Project Veritas might just win their war to shut me down for good.**

This isn't just about me--it's about what's worth fighting for.

Truth isn't a luxury; it's the oxygen of a free society. Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

Project Veritas wants to choke that off, to silence a voice that's served the public, not their egos. I've launched O'Keefe Media Group (OMG) to keep the flame alive--our recent IRS expose proves it--**but this lawsuit is a chainsaw aimed at my roots**.

I've spent decades dodging threats, lawsuits, and smears--13 years at Project Veritas, thousands of hours on the ground, scars earned breaking stories that shook the world.

clean_body: Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts. | Dear Patriot, I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm reaching out because I'm staring down the barrel of a make-or-break moment. Project Veritas --the outfit I built from nothing over 13 years--fired me in February 2023 and is now suing me to kill my career as an investigative journalist. They're trying to bury me, to snuff out the work I love, the work that's exposed corruption from ACORN to Big Tech to the Treasury's resistance to Elon's DOGE reforms. Here's where we stand: after two years of legal warfare, we're in the final stretch before trial. Discovery 's wrapping up, and the courtroom's in sight. My team's been relentless--digging through their lies, proving this is a personal vendetta to stop me from doing what I was born to do: uncover truth for you, the public. But the bills are piling up fast. . Without it, Project Veritas might just win their war to shut me down for good. This isn't just about me--it's about what's worth fighting for. Truth isn't a luxury; it's the oxygen of a free society. Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts. Project Veritas wants to choke that off, to silence a voice that's served the public, not their egos. I've launched O'Keefe Media Group (OMG) to keep the flame alive--our recent IRS expose proves it--but this lawsuit is a chainsaw aimed at my roots. I've spent decades dodging threats, lawsuits, and smears--13 years at Project Veritas, thousands of hours on the ground, scars earned breaking stories that shook the world. Now, I'm asking you to stand with me. Your support isn't just cash; it's a lifeline to finish this fight and keep exposing corruption through OMG. Truth is a fragile thing--without warriors to defend it, it withers. Let 's show Project Veritas they can't end me or our mission. . name: Vivek
subject: It’s YOUR money, NOT the government’s!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Look: I get that this isn’t popular for the bureaucrats, the deep state, and the career politicians like my opponents.

Look: I get that this isn’t popular for the bureaucrats, the deep state, and the career politicians like my opponents.
Look: I get that this isn't popular for the bureaucrats, the deep state, and the career politicians like my opponents.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._Ox3UdyzXi9Kq-Q)
---
Hello.

Nothing grinds my gears more than unelected, holier-than-thou bureaucrats in Washington DC - and in state capitals across the country - who spend your money like drunken sailors with nothing to show for it.

I campaigned for President Trump so he'd take a BLOWTORCH to the federal managerial class... **And now I 'm running for Ohio Governor to obliterate the business-as-usual waste at the state level, too.**

Whether you live here or not, you deserve a government that works for you. And at the heart of this campaign, I'm running to return power to your hands - and keep more money in your pocket.
| ❌ We will gut the managerial bureaucracy and eliminate waste
---
❌ We will eliminate the state income tax
❌ We will put Ohio on track to eliminate property taxes

_This is your money - NOT the government's._

Look: I get that this isn't popular for the bureaucrats, the Deep State, and the career politicians like my opponents.

That's why they're trashing my name in the press and trying to destroy the only Trump-endorsed MAGA conservative in this race. Luckily, I have a hunch folks like you prefer paying no state income tax, saving on property taxes, and eliminating waste in our government.

**[Now that I've launched my candidacy for Governor, will you join my campaign today?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews. "Now that I’ve launched my candidacy for Governor, will you join my campaign today?")** **I 'm staring down my FIRST end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since launch, and I'm still about 10,500 donations short of my goal.**

I'm not running to rub elbows with party bosses or special interests. I'm running to transform my home state into a low-tax, business-friendly heaven in the heartland of America.

We should be a state that celebrates hard work, not rejects it. And we will set an example for the rest of the country.

_So - in the final days before my deadline - I'm personally asking for your support:_

| | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._ZSeFgegqDZ-nqpZpB9w)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._Ep9lw)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-yHnnKvkmGXRKty_wJJQ)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---

God bless you,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

| To unsubscribe from this mailing list [click here](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDc4LTFkMzY2YjM4YjQwZTRlZTNiNjc1OWMxNWJlMzk3NWUyIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMzkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dpcXRoaW11YzkuZXhlY3V0ZS1hcGkudXMtZWFzdC0xLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vYmV0YS8__R-H3pLl8p3wg)

name: FINAL NOTICE
subject: So many Senators have reached out to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
From our active Republican voter list

Friend,

Shannon Jones is running for Commonwealth Attorney in Newport News, Virginia. The last time voters had a chance to cast their vote for this position, Shannon was 5 years old – **her opponent, Howard Gwynn, has held the seat for 35 years.**

Shannon is a dedicated attorney, community leader, and advocate for justice. She’s ready to bring fresh leadership with an understanding of the updated/modern needs of the people of her city. With years of experience in public safety and the legal system, she is running because she knows the legal system could use new approaches, new ideas, and new voices.

Shannon’s opponent is a male conservative Democrat. She actually reported to him directly when she worked in the Commonwealth Attorney’s Office.

Shannon has years of in-the-field experience in the Commonwealth Attorney’s Office and the City Attorney’s Office, and is uniquely qualified to bring a balanced, community-focused approach to prosecution that goes beyond punishment alone.

**Here is a look at her platform as it pertains to women’s issues:**

✅ Cases involving domestic violence, sexual assault, and other gender-based violence should be handled thoroughly and sensitively. She has a plan to make sure victims have access to necessary resources like counseling, legal support, and housing assistance.

✅ Restorative justice practices for women involved in the criminal justice system, focusing on healing and rehabilitation – particularly for those affected by systemic issues like poverty and domestic violence.

✅ All staff within the Commonwealth Attorney's Office will be properly trained to approach cases with the appropriate sensitivity to the unique challenges women face.

✅ Advocacy for policies that protect women from workplace harassment and discrimination, ensuring that offenders are held accountable.

[**As we’ve seen over the past few months, women judges have been one of our strongest defenses against the Trump administration’s efforts to break our democracy. We need more women in government at EVERY LEVEL. Let’s get Shannon the support she needs to win this historic race by rushing a split $20.25 donation now →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104109247/534318305/-1518768760?refcode=EM_F_250318first_N_CD_90DO_13_NG_TestA_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4OTIwMDExLWMyMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ufHHyTixbgX_rFzMKdu2iLPO8K4uniHTg0D6NwLAo74=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: 30 years in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Immigrants like me understand the promise of America, which is why I know we can do better
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1543%2E791427%2EEFC1T3)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4153?t=2&akid=1543%2E791427%2EEFC1T3)
Friend, this month I celebrate a huge milestone. Thirty years ago, my family came to America.
I was born in Somalia and raised in a refugee camp after my family was forced to flee violence and instability. I came to the US as an asylum-seeker, and eventually earned my citizenship.
Of course, there were many roadblocks along the way. Legal hurdles, financial hardship, xenophobia and bullying to name a few. But my family and I persevered, and I am proud to now represent my community here in Minnesota in Congress.
**Immigrants like me understand the promise of America, which is why I know we can do better, and why I fight for a better future for ALL of us, every single day.**
We can be a country that rejects the fear and hate of the far-right. We can guarantee healthcare, stable housing, and a quality education for everyone. We can do big things like tackle climate change and rebuild public infrastructure.
And yes, we can be a country that continues our legacy of welcoming immigrants from around the world who are looking for a better life just like I was.
These are long-term goals, I know that. But that’s why we’re building a grassroots movement – a movement that can endure through Donald Trump or any other obstacle to deliver on our vision of prosperity for all.
America is and has always been a nation of immigrants. It’s now our job to make sure that everyone enjoys the safety, respect, and dignity they deserve. I hope I can count on you to join me in that fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
* * *

If you want to help Ilhan Omar and our movement as she continues to fight for us in Congress, [**make a contribution today. We need all hands on deck as we take on Trump, Elon Musk, and the far-right.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250319-1-150&t=3&akid=1543%2E791427%2EEFC1T3)

Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=7&akid=1543%2E791427%2EEFC1T3)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1543_791427_EFC1T3&akid=1543%2E791427%2EEFC1T3)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

body:
We are writing today to ask you to make a contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign committee.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2258%2E135344%2EfMg3Tc)

We are writing today to ask you to make a contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign committee.
You may be asking, Elissa just won her Senate race a few months ago – why are you asking me to contribute again?
First, it goes without saying that Elissa Slotkin won Michigan – and so did Donald Trump.
One of the reasons that happened is because we did better than typical Democrats in the "redder" parts of the state. That is something that has happened consistently in Elissa's previous elections. She might not win them outright, but she "loses better."
Looking ahead to 2026, we have a bunch of big elections in Michigan coming up. Every statewide office is up – Governor, Secretary of State, Attorney General. We have an open Senate seat with Gary Peters' retirement. The entire state senate. And we have U.S. House races that could determine control of the chamber.
Elissa is going to be in high demand on the campaign trail. She is going to be running around the state not just as a Senator, but in an effort to help Democrats win everywhere.
That takes resources. We're not asking for a huge contribution today, just whatever you feel is worth it to help Democrats hold statewide offices, our other Senate seat, and to flip the House.
If lots and lots of people contribute, we can help Elissa play her part.
[**Please use this link to contribute to Elissa Slotkin today. Our average online donation is around $40. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are chipping-in to make sure Michigan is blue after the next election.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar25.ecmY5i&refcode=em250319-1&t=2&akid=2258%2E135344%2EfMg3Tc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Patriot,
---
I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart.
---
For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York...
---
...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe.
---
_...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable._
---
**But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up __these__ headlines:**
---
**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_ **
[Source: _MSNBC_]
**“In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” **
[Source: _The New Republic_]
**“...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” **
[Source: _Law & Crime News_]
---
I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – _yours truly._
---
**__And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!__**
---
Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus __state-level__ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely **ABANDONED** , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life.
---
But here’s what the Left will never understand... _America First fighters _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ , and we _NEVER_ _ABANDON_ our fellow patriots._
---
When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMuOnDAQRb_G7EB2GTBesMgEMYomj1ESKY_NyE2Vuz3CQBvcqP9-BEK9PXXke6-Nn3pn7zVTTwzg4nBmAEx-YgDXf6sP8d2_PKdX__4_vZbffbFd4fOh3uAhD50prq-_sBG_zTw-v3z5e-rDTTz05T7RQz5CM_LG9RtVTYK1tMjzhGqhcpCaV2WVXGqpUGnSQufcVLo6IdkCxak0XAulwSSuBg4Fl0ILCSqHTHSy4EVlBSiCQlmW8z0nM56C64yYl9WEMI4-60af9PVlWaZ5L9YyaGfqYqBsdUMg3AwGbYh4T88u9s4MLrWBCEef2jhgqrSRBq1h0OZQElQKUanKcii392QbF__WGT8Zdx6YbI6yikG5XTyhi57J5viKHS4UNrQGcYB5jKEjJpuff96eDtaNw0LDwmTz4-u31yTUOK2u791cKpbz875423er4SMAAP__-c6USg)
__
---
They had hoped that on that day I would also feel abandoned and isolated. **_But today, just like on the day I was arrested, I KNOW I’m not alone!_**
---
Which is why I fully intend to give my booking number a whole new meaning – **2,313,757 PATRIOTS** who joined the fight for my freedom and justice!
---

name: JW
subject: We’re fighting to break out of a death spiral
body:
In aviation there is a concept called a ‘graveyard spiral’ or ‘death spiral’ - a situation often caused by low light/bad weather conditions where pilots spiral out of control.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hoqeXWh3-Xm86hgy0MTIi-dkGn6PrSFQH7hfS36Wqfwa3FC6c-ufxoFJ-Dq8PlpGsD5zZTB3cX1sH_Ud3yE0NbpijK5NC0vNrBtG1FSAhyXApBGxFA0b6dw7y4c2XJ1ramwrgYj5uq2L4cPe30jL6RoviryPrk8V8512YbJvGGbi-jZm_EKNpZ1p9NoFaAjxKpPhlrA-aTqp_98E34vONwGuQmcxQqU5YKgs5o7of5g=&c=IKADy7skyoUKtl2JgwevOCo0jTsc821-iATxMZfdHzOABBvrHXseHw==&ch=UzEx6v3eIPFpl7IGQkjd6OcWM5um1IZri7tCDsJkqwQvpfD4OO71-g==)
---
| | | | Team,
In aviation there is a concept called a 'graveyard spiral' or 'death spiral' \- a situation often caused by low light/bad weather conditions where pilots spiral out of control in search of a horizon whilst losing sight of the plane's altitude, often leading to a mechanical failure, and then an eventual crash.
For campaigns, often in the weeks leading up to an election, supporters, driven by a feedback loop of positive updates from a campaign, will fall into a state of complicity thinking "looks like the campaign has got it from here" and stop making vital small dollar donations.
This can cause a death spiral.
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hoqeXWh3-Xm86hgy0MTIi-dkGn6PrSFQH7hfS36Wqfwa3FC6c-ufxoFJ-Dq8PlpGhYICHS4LPyxmINXlnOJLjk-mAUkpMGppi3gtiEDdoDBg1Wfle-GIYrzxRH7mMzueCIwRPlxayIyRsxz4zxcnyZGjVdMKAwbCISPn1LGCng0dcubCm4MN3CyF0R_g8dZkKHtoZItYMlR8S5cIJVmR8_-Pd8bROBsi6qHjU2R5rCo=&c=IKADy7skyoUKtl2JgwevOCo0jTsc821-iATxMZfdHzOABBvrHXseHw==&ch=UzEx6v3eIPFpl7IGQkjd6OcWM5um1IZri7tCDsJkqwQvpfD4OO71-g==)
---
| | | | On the left is the aeronautical depiction of one of these spirals. On the right is our current ActBlue snapshot - its campaign equivalent. We still have time to become the plane that breaks out of the spiral but that window is rapidly closing.
Here's how a campaign death spirals: first fundraising slows, then we run out of the money needed for 'spending money to make money,' then field/GOTV grinds to a halt, and then we are in a dire spot come E-day.
Presently we find ourselves at extreme risk of heading into such a spiral. Unless we can make a rapid course correction our fundraising situation could drive a cascading set of budget shortfalls and result in the campaign equivalent of 'mechanical failure' that would lead to our demise.
In all departments outside of fundraising things are going beyond great and we have soooo much momentum. But we cannot be complacent now. This is exactly when we need to jack up fundraising and get out the vote efforts into overdrive.
A course correction is achievable and we have 13 days to break out.
---
| | | | [We need your help now more than ever. Can you step up and chip in whatever you can spare to break us out of this vicious cycle as soon as humanly possible?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hoqeXWh3-Xm86hgy0MTIi-dkGn6PrSFQH7hfS36Wqfwa3FC6c-ufxoFJ-Dq8PlpG2UjdvhEdB6gVItjmyMEnL1DcXLydQUJqaW_IxQ8DH_h8bAD13iL165XcZiRmANJIy2lq7GgOMVupGOjLnCQTbN3Ymn8SwD9jsV7ZRiR7iSzbIi7Q4PfusW5ALxr6W98-D6lQQ-YEWXilzjLtu_ObTabB5FB4P1ScB_a2ndmRewMxTxTAerbz0Q==&c=IKADy7skyoUKtl2JgwevOCo0jTsc821-iATxMZfdHzOABBvrHXseHw==&ch=UzEx6v3eIPFpl7IGQkjd6OcWM5um1IZri7tCDsJkqwQvpfD4OO71-g==)

subject: This isn’t your run-of-the-mill Special Election.

body:

**This is Jimmy Patronis - President Trump's pick in the FL-01 Special Election.**

Right now:

President Trump is putting his trust in me.

Matt Gaetz is relying on me to keep his seat in Republican hands.

And House Republicans need this seat to pass Trump's agenda.

**The stakes are higher than ever, and I'm the last line of defense against the Blue Wave that threatens to engulf the nation.**

This is our moment to show the Democrats that we'll _NEVER_ back down, _NEVER_ surrender, and _NEVER_ let them barge back into power.

And as a native of the Sunshine State - I refuse to stand by and watch my home state turn deep Blue. _But the truth is, I need your help. _

Why? Because my Democrat opponent has raked in over TWO MILLION DOLLARS to destroy me. On top of that, early voting starts in less than TWO weeks from now.

That's why I'm humbly asking you to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 right here and right now to help me WIN my Special Election and save President Trump's House Majority:

**ActBlues: Singing the Money-Laundering Blues**

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=4e51cbbe44&e=8763c56857)
---
| _**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**_
**How a Once-Mighty Fundraising Platform Landed in Hot Water—and How I Helped Turn Up the Heat**
It’s official: ActBlue is having a worse year than the Chicago Bears. Once the crown jewel of Democratic fundraising, this progressive money machine is now drowning in allegations of money laundering, fraudulent donations, foreign interference, and general incompetence. If you listen closely, you can almost hear the sad trombone of campaign finance lawyers preparing their defense arguments.
**From Blue Wave to Red Flags**
For years, ActBlue has been the Democratic Party’s golden goose, funneling billions into campaigns while masquerading as a grassroots fundraising powerhouse. The pitch was simple: “Hey, just chip in $3 to save democracy!” And chip in people did—except, it turns out, some of those ‘people’ didn’t even know they were donating.
_That’s where I come in._
As a former Republican candidate in Connecticut and a cybersecurity professional, I started noticing unusual donation patterns tied to ActBlue back in 2018. What kind of patterns, you ask? Oh, just 86-year-old retirees allegedly donating thousands of times, often at oddly precise intervals, as if their credit cards had been hooked up to a donation IV drip.
One Yale professor—sorry, Yalze **(Yale was misspelled in FEC filings! )** professor, according to FEC filings—was recorded as making 2,132 donations totaling $75,000. Another elderly gentleman supposedly made 12,892 donations over 228 months—which, if true, suggests this guy was donating from beyond the grave, or close to it.
And it wasn’t just Democrats who were getting in on the action. A 72-year-old registered Republican from Madison, CT somehow managed to contribute $101,000 in a single year, 29 times more than in previous elections. Funny thing—nobody in Connecticut Republican circles had ever heard of her. Yes, WinRed was occasionally fishy too.
So I did what any reasonable person would do: I knocked on her door. Three different visits. No answer each time. Suspicious? You bet. In fact, I successfully knocked on 5 doors and engaged the would be donors.**Each one (5) signed an affidavit attesting to the fact that donations I showed them were NO THEIR OWN!**
**Follow the (Possibly Laundered) Money**
When we dug deeper, we found that ActBlue’s recurring small-dollar donations weren’t just unusual—they were perfectly engineered to skirt campaign finance laws.
Here’s how the scheme may have worked:1️⃣ Mystery money enters the system—potentially from unaudited federal funds, foreign sources, or donors who didn’t know they were donating.
2️⃣ ActBlue breaks it up into thousands of micropayments under fake or unwitting donors’ names, keeping each transaction under $200 to avoid FEC reporting requirements.
3️⃣ **ALLEGEDLY** : The laundered money gets redirected into Democratic campaigns and activist groups, appearing as small, grassroots contributions.
4️⃣ When exposed, Democratic leadership pretends to know nothing.Sound crazy? Maybe. But when $1.88 million is funneled through just 18 elderly donors in Connecticut alone, it raises a few mild concerns.
**ActBlue’s Response: Running for the Exits**
If ActBlue had nothing to hide, you’d think they’d be eager to clear their name. Instead, they’re acting like a Wall Street exec after the SEC shows up with subpoenas.
**Since February 2025, at least seven senior officials have fled the company faster** than a leprechaun escaping a tax audit. Meanwhile, ActBlue’s remaining legal counsel is **accusing leadership** of retaliation, labor unions are calling for independent investigations, and donors are starting to ask where, exactly, their money has been going.
The panic is so real that ActBlue has even canceled meetings with political strategists—the equivalent of a restaurant shutting down reservations right before the dinner rush.
And let’s not forget **Democratic Senator Chris Murphy,** who has been eerily silent about the allegations. Funny, considering he’s been the loudest advocate for small-dollar donations—and his own FEC filings show donation patterns that look a little too perfect. (Murphy, buddy, people don’t donate four times a month, twice in the same day, unless they’re trying to meet their Starbucks Rewards quota.) **See Graphic Below:**
**What Happens Next?** As the walls close in, Republicans are pressing for investigations at the federal and state levels. There’s talk of subpoenas, forensic audits, and even FBI involvement. If the allegations stick, ActBlue could be looking at serious legal consequences, massive fines, and—best case scenario—a complete overhaul of how online campaign fundraising works.
For the Democrats, this couldn’t come at a worse time. If ActBlue goes down, they lose their most powerful fundraising tool, leaving them scrambling to find a replacement cash pipeline before 2026.
**Final Thoughts: The ActBlues Are Real** Look, I don’t take joy in seeing an entire political fundraising machine crash and burn. (Okay, maybe just a little.) But what I do take joy in is transparency, accountability, and exposing what looks like one of the biggest campaign finance scandals in recent history.
So the next time a politician asks for your **“small-dollar donation to protect democracy,”** maybe ask who’s really behind that transaction—and whether it’s coming from your credit card, some unsuspecting retiree, or a mystery bank account in Venezuela.
ActBlue is singing the blues—and I’m proud to have played a part in turning up the volume.
🚨 If you want to see the full research and data behind these findings, stay tuned. This story is just getting started. 🚨

INDIANAPOLIS — Hoosier officials are working to fight back against antisemitism in schools across the state. On Friday, Gov. Mike Braun signed an executive order to review Indiana's policies for state educational institutions regarding antisemitism and their response. "A wave of antisemitism across the country began over a year ago with the October 7, 2023 terrorist attack against Israel, with universities often at the epicenter of these incidents," Braun said. "With this executive order, we are making it clear that Indiana will not tolerate antisemitic discrimination at our state institutions or anywhere else — Jewish Hoosiers should know the state of Indiana condemns antisemitism and stands with them.” The order forces the Indiana Commission for Higher Education to review state policies regarding schools' official responses to acts of antisemitism. It's meant to reiterate Indiana's support for Israel and the Hoosier Jewish community. Braun's decision comes as the Trump administration is warning universities of their obligations to Title VI — the protection of Jewish students on their campuses. Indiana University is one of 60 universities nationwide under investigation for allegations of antisemitism by the U.S. Department of Education's Civil Rights office. IU was sent a letter warning of "potential enforcement actions" if it did not fulfill its "obligations under Title VI of the Civil Rights Act to protect Jewish students on campus." The consequences could cost the university millions of dollars. The investigation from the U.S. Department of Education has been brewing for awhile, going back to the pro-Palestinian protests at Dunn Meadow in 2024.
[Click Here to Read Full Story](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/6N5382QhdR8UnkHAjoX6J5mA71xOARGOHtZJ_KV3DcPpQ91YAlp8Y7IYpLfQUBYHr2TNZBcsL_uoPixuK4zLWWtiMqMdV25xVQBOORwU1QDn8V8NOZqktCkN0yUCMW9i2faK1W0EVaDWBgRForQReWHYRt2IVlzxt2h1kZMnl8VbuZAxx_z9GaiGc1eKJw2SEG5cCpkD4wRqq_rTehqPMJ3SCozcj6QvhXuVoNfyKLnYVTsbi9PqYv3xU18S-z5rdxGwoQJI7ndkEaxYT08MnnSeYre8Ry89YJ3sTcvQ1kDFtmuj6BEnXegNtnTbYDaYIq4buAojt6w2Q7dUPUgfPgsIT8q3CMTZdlT1-h5y7Ur-DhR1xPXf8QLHtRPKCAVLXPZmtvC6P8o2BQ07FG4x9KPMyhR3WvekWZr4Zj13UhZaJp0q9QQ8iHGM3lIuxCJHb3vaoAsQuTOuTGnfYeL7EUiCeQ/unxbzq3jLUS8UaQUSKo0z0L4Dq_8ofpl/7)

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: I wanted you to be the first to know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I just launched my campaign to unseat Derrick Van Orden in WI-03. I hope you’ll join me. | [](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=QCiJuBs8eo03&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&amount=25)
---
**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just launched my campaign to unseat Derrick Van Orden and flip Wisconsin’s 3rd Congressional District.**

Last year, my race was one of the closest in the entire country as we united working folks from all stripes. When the nation shifted rightward, we still outperformed every other Democrat in this district in years.

Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2026.

[_**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m asking you to split a donation of $25 with Fight for Progress PAC to become a Founding Donor of my 2026 campaign to flip WI-03. We set an ambitious goal of bringing in 2,026 contributions to launch with grassroots momentum, and your support today will go a long way.**_](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=6KOKsxknftWG&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&amount=25)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=H09dX2jWbuUI&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=iwSLzXpJ25Kq&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=S3e3Tr9TgZ6h&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---
Here’s more about why I’m in this race:

We outperformed every Democratic race in our district in 2024, reaching more than five points better than the top of the ticket, and even outperforming the winning Senate race.

We did it with a coalition that united working Wisconsinites, ranging from labor unions, to farmers, to students, and even voters who went with Trump.

And since that time, our call to put real, working class Wisconsinites first has only become more critical.

These past couple of months have the American people reeling from crushing attacks from this administration – policies that have put billionaires first and hit working families the hardest.

I’m feeling it personally. I’m still waitressing at the Good Wives in Eau Claire, and I hear the same ongoing concerns from folks in our community. Basic costs of living like groceries and utility costs are still on the rise, health care is less accessible and affordable, family farms are folding, and home ownership feels further and further out of reach.

We can’t sit on the sidelines as the elites take up every last resource and leave all of us behind. We need action to have public service that works for us.

**I know what working families need, because I’m part of one. And I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone:**

[_**Split a donation of $25 with Fight for Progress PAC today to become a Founding Donor of my campaign. Winning is going to take widespread, grassroots support, and I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort.**_](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=JHMUSSwPgvdW&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&amount=25)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=PgTVnFwte5Cr&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=BfB1yjMrLqNV&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&express_lane=true&amount=10)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=xHsD2pZzUVAX&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=n4yYNj3kVh8w&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---
| [ OTHER AMOUNT ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=KXiZevhhG9JL&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1)
---
Thank you for your support,

Rebecca
* * *
| | [

](https://fight4progress.org/wrapper?t=8rEEBgzPYrnE&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-17_1&amount=25)

Washington, DC 20003

If you would like to stop receiving email communications from us, please [_unsubscribe here_](https://fight4progress.org/l/1wEvLblNAxu3)
