name: Team Evergreen
subject: Friend, your insights could shape our future—let's talk
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Take 5 minutes to help us better serve this movement
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3413972/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| 🚧 We’re building a new website! 🚧
Tell us what you want to see. [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3413973/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi there,

We’re facing so many challenges right now—from unconstitutional funding freezes that are causing real and direct harm to working families to a freshly greenlit GOP funding bill that empowers “co-presidents” Trump and Musk to slash federal spending even more.

And while it's important to keep a pulse on all that’s happening, we won’t get very far by fixating on all the chaos alone. We must ensure we’re working with strategic focus on the things that can make a direct impact and pivot where needed. **One of the ways Evergreen is doing that is by taking a step back to evaluate whether our content meets _your_ needs.**

To get there, we're conducting a survey to better understand how people engage with Evergreen and our website, and how we can best serve you and other climate advocates who follow us. [**Can you take 5 minutes to complete this survey now? Your input is incredibly valuable to us!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3413974/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3413975/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| As we prepare to build a brand new website to meet this critical moment, it’s important for us to understand what motivates our community to be a part of Evergreen. Some of you have been with us since the beginning, while others have found us more recently. However you joined us, we’re so glad you’re part of our movement and can’t do this work without you.

But movements aren’t meant to be one-sided. **By completing this survey, you’ll be giving Evergreen valuable insights on how we can better communicate our work so that supporters like you stay informed and equipped to take action.**

[**Please take a moment to complete the survey now—it only takes a few minutes of your time and your answers are completely anonymous.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3413976/87SdQ4wZ)

Thank you for being a supporter of Evergreen, and thank you in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. |
---
| — The team at Evergreen Action |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3413977/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---

clean_body: Take 5 minutes to help us better serve this movement | | | | | ---|---|--- | 🚧 We’re building a new website! 🚧 Tell us what you want to see. | Hi there, We’re facing so many challenges right now—from unconstitutional funding freezes that are causing real and direct harm to working families to a freshly greenlit GOP funding bill that empowers “co-presidents” Trump and Musk to slash federal spending even more. And while it's important to keep a pulse on all that’s happening, we won’t get very far by fixating on all the chaos alone. We must ensure we’re working with strategic focus on the things that can make a direct impact and pivot where needed. One of the ways Evergreen is doing that is by taking a step back to evaluate whether our content meets your needs. To get there, we're conducting a survey to better understand how people engage with Evergreen and our website, and how we can best serve you and other climate advocates who follow us. | | As we prepare to build a brand new website to meet this critical moment, it’s important for us to understand what motivates our community to be a part of Evergreen. Some of you have been with us since the beginning, while others have found us more recently. However you joined us, we’re so glad you’re part of our movement and can’t do this work without you. But movements aren’t meant to be one-sided. By completing this survey, you’ll be giving Evergreen valuable insights on how we can better communicate our work so that supporters like you stay informed and equipped to take action. Thank you for being a supporter of Evergreen, and thank you in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. | | — The team at Evergreen Action | * | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- 1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036 | | content © 2025 Evergreen Action and paid for by Evergreen Action. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Special Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan.Church Tulsa | Plus JFK Files....
body:
Yesterday, President Trump fulfilled another campaign promise by releasing all 80,000 files about the JFK assassination! Last year, Roger Stone (advi
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11047.1.fd1af02548032281137b3dc3452ac0b5) |
---
Yesterday, **President Trump** fulfilled another _campaign promise_ by releasing all **80,000 files** about the **JFK assassination**! Last year, **Roger Stone** (advisor and friend of Presidents **Nixon** , **Reagan** \+ **Trump**) came to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11048.1.61a6120f3da679e18cf65dec63f62b4a) and gave one of the most intriguing conversations about [Who Really Killed JFK](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11049.1.9070b25ea0483ca62630cbee812ea180) from his book, _"The Man Who Killed Kennedy: The Case Against LBJ"_. You can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/ZphwDct5Mio](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11050.1.502b5073924df40a177562a6d69ffbcd) With that being said... I am excited to announce that **Roger Stone** is coming back to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11051.1.387ecbb789f288c6da20265dcd86f473) to share about the **JFK files** and what they mean _plus_ to discuss how **President Trump** dismantled the **Clinton-Obama-Biden Political Dynasty**. This event will be a BLAST! Seating is **LIMITED**. RSVP today: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1628128](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11052.1.db7d84733bca5f9199ff6555e93323dc) **Date** : Thursday, May 8 **Time** : 6:30pm **Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP For Roger Stone At Sheridan ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11053.1.4e88726f2da111325a8b4d1026e7f88c)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11054.1.7f06c0e5e5d736223d70ac60d788a09c)
---
In life there are times we find ourselves in **desperate need of a miracle** such as a diagnosis of terminal cancer or enough money to pay the grocery bills. I have wanted to this for a while but was able to get it done tonight and that is to answer **how to receive a miracle from God**. In fact, there are **3 things you can do tonight** to receive the miracle you need. And know that God is able and willing. I want to encourage you to watch this video here "[Need A Miracle? Do These 3 Things](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11055.1.c2118c4b9fa150d434c140bd4a05cd00)": [https://youtu.be/TroA1fLyZ8I](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11056.1.0221b7c3812080a83773e8ec23cdba2a)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11057.1.a7561c07a1b4cf312b0cdda7b93c2e36)
---

## Eric Trump Inside | Protesters Outside
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11058.1.c297bde4752995955d84e1aa84c8259a)
---
This week, I sat down with [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11059.1.3c9d8d362eb992d6006500908aeb0c05) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11060.1.ced353eaf9c1685ca6e4ee873574c658) in Tulsa, OK for an _incredible conversation_ about a wide range of subjects from the **2024 Election** , **DOGE** and the **Great American Comeback** while protestors outside were not thrilled with a Trump speaking at a church... Watch [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11061.1.de7c9ac19fc68f0ae4a98214502baf1c) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11062.1.01ea0a933f08a2185febd9ac66e8aad3) here: [https://youtu.be/uH0zK20NJ18](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19948639.11063.1.c498f1f4a888989661f8fb46efec90d8)

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39554%2E3422442%2ECOgFYi)
We’ll cut to the chase, Derek.
Because our campaign rejects donations from corporations, lobbyists, and executives from Big Pharma, Big Oil, and the Big Banks, it’s tougher for us to raise the resources we need to win.
Factor in that California is a big state with a number of expensive media markets, and the climb is even steeper.
**But, we have something most other campaigns don’t: a powerful grassroots movement full of folks like you, Derek.**
Every campaign Katie’s ever run has relied on 100% grassroots donations, and her campaign for Governor is no different.
**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can, so we can elect Katie to fight for the policies that working families deserve?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250319_1_ak?refcode=em20250319-39554&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39554_3422442_COgFYi&akid=39554%2E3422442%2ECOgFYi)**
Thanks for considering,
Team Katie Porter for Governor

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250319-39554&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39554_3422442_COgFYi&akid=39554%2E3422442%2ECOgFYi)**

clean_body: We’ll cut to the chase, Derek. Because our campaign rejects donations from corporations, lobbyists, and executives from Big Pharma, Big Oil, and the Big Banks, it’s tougher for us to raise the resources we need to win. Factor in that California is a big state with a number of expensive media markets, and the climb is even steeper. But, we have something most other campaigns don’t: a powerful grassroots movement full of folks like you, Derek. Every campaign Katie’s ever run has relied on 100% grassroots donations, and her campaign for Governor is no different. Thanks for considering, Team Katie Porter for Governor Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

body:
My Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz is in WEEKS, not months.

| |
---
| | | I'm giving it to you straight -

My Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz is in WEEKS, not months.

There's only ONE DEADLINE LEFT so before I go on, Majority Leader Scalise and I are teaming up to rally 250 Patriots to step up before Election Day.

_**[Can you PLEASE spare $25 to help win this Special Election and save President Trump's House Majority?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcmupvqrd86vjsgs5727gd32ubn0ps6s8b6rcgf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5g61p32cdh2bs "Can you PLEASE spare $25 to help win this Special Election and save President Trump's House Majority?")**_

---
**This is Jimmy Patronis - President Trump's pick in the FL-01 Special Election.**

Right now:

President Trump is putting his trust in me.

Matt Gaetz is relying on me to keep his seat in Republican hands.

And House Republicans need this seat to pass Trump's agenda.

**The stakes are higher than ever, and I'm the last line of defense against the Blue Wave that threatens to engulf the nation.**

_**[That's why I'm counting on YOU, Friend, to step up before Election Day and help supply the financial firepower we need to take down the Democrats once and for all.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0vk86hubgrr7hcgedb6l8fj4kia7v85jibk5j40_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5g61p32cdh2bs "That’s why I'm counting on YOU, Friend, to step up before Election Day and fuel this fight with the financial firepower we need to take down the Democrats once and for all. ")**_

---

This is our moment to show the Democrats that we'll _NEVER_ back down, _NEVER_ surrender, and _NEVER_ let them barge back into power.

And as a native of the Sunshine State - I refuse to stand by and watch my home state turn deep Blue. _But the truth is, I need your help. _

Why? Because my Democrat opponent has raked in over TWO MILLION DOLLARS to destroy me. On top of that, early voting starts in less than TWO weeks from now.

That's why I'm humbly asking you to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 right here and right now to help me WIN my Special Election and save President Trump's House Majority:
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh8v4fpaopj0o9pukdojdf5sdq1n2g9d00q7nq6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5g61p32cdh2bs "CHIP IN $25 NOW")

---

**Make no mistake: This isn 't your run-of-the-mill Special Election.**

If Democrats win this seat, they'll deal a devastating blow to our already razor-thin House Majority. They'll be within striking distance of taking back control of the House THIS YEAR.

And if that happens, we might as well kiss our Republican Trifecta goodbye.

**_[Election Day is a few weeks away so I REALLY hope to see a donation from you roll in before the end of the day.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zve6aat79vu31u0smlvrf5p8kp1osnniog380gv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5g61p32cdh2bs "Election Day is a few weeks away so I REALLY hope to see a donation from you roll in before the end of the day.")_**

To victory,

**Jimmy Patronis **

name: Jim Schultz
subject: Jim Schultz Discusses the Risks of Sanctuary Policies on Fox News
body:
Leaked emails have surfaced showing that some lawyers in Minnesota are actively devising strategies to undermine the lawful efforts of U.S. ICE...

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=baf210d431&u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=b10ca0d3f1)
---
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
I hope this message finds you well. I recently [**appeared on** _**Fox News**_](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=8ac423c11f&e=baf210d431) __ to discuss an urgent issue impacting the safety and integrity of our communities in Minnesota.
---
[](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=0701a1c9e9&e=baf210d431)
| [**Leaked emails have surfaced**](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=bf7ec2026d&e=baf210d431) showing that some lawyers in Minnesota are actively devising strategies to undermine the lawful efforts of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to remove illegal immigrants with violent records from our state. This is deeply troubling.
Sanctuary policies hinder cooperation between local and federal authorities, creating a fertile ground for illegal activities to thrive unchecked, and incentivize the illegal immigration that has led to millions of unvetted illegal immigrants in our country. This not only endangers public safety but also burdens local resources and law-abiding citizens.
[**In my recent op-ed, "The Mistake of Turning Minnesota into a Sanctuary State,"**](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=16953ad561&e=baf210d431) I outlined the negative impacts of such policies observed in other states. For example, New York City now struggles under the weight of an influx of illegal migrants, with daily costs to taxpayers around $5 million and an anticipated expense of up to $4 billion over the next two years to manage 30,000 migrants in various accommodations.
Similar strains are evident in Massachusetts and Colorado, where public services and healthcare providers are overwhelmed by the demands of illegal migrants. These states illustrate the disastrous consequences of sanctuary policies.
Sanctuary policies, while perhaps well-intentioned, lead to dire consequences for the communities they claim to help. They exacerbate humanitarian crises, encourage illegal entry, and are fundamentally unfair to local citizens and lawful immigrants.
As Minnesotans, it is our duty to uphold the rule of law and ensure the safety and prosperity of all residents.
Together, we can guide Minnesota towards common-sense policies that ensure our safety and uphold our values.

Working with you,
**Jim Schultz** PresidentMinnesota Private Business Council
**P.S.** If you believe in protecting our freedoms and safeguarding the rule of law, consider joining the fight by becoming a [**Main Street Member of the Minnesota Private Business Council**](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=5f40ece155&e=baf210d431). Together, we can ensure that our constitutional rights endure for future generations. Membership offers numerous benefits, including:
* **Bimonthly newsletter:** Stay informed with key policy and business updates.
* **Real-time alerts:** Get timely information on critical state legislation.
* **Exclusive insights:** Access to key polling and political landscape analyses.
* **Advocacy:** Join us in advocating for the policies that will renew Minnesota’s promise.

**Cost:** $100 per year—a small investment for a significant impact.
Join us in this crucial fight for the future of Minnesota. Together, we can ensure that our state not only recovers, but thrives. Your support is vital in this mission.
[**Become a Main Street Member today**](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=feac5254a8&e=baf210d431).
---
|
---
| **About the Minnesota Private Business Council:** The Minnesota Private Business Council advocates for commonsense policies supporting Minnesota industry and innovation and benefiting Minnesota’s workers, families, and communities. Comprised of privately held businesses from a broad array of Minnesota industries, the Minnesota Private Business Council advocates for policies leading to job growth, new business creation and entrepreneurship, and broad-based well-being for Minnesota’s workers and their families. For more information, please visit [www.GrowthMN.com](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=7c5268cb85&e=baf210d431).
---
| **Follow the Minnesota Private Business Council:**
---
| | | | | [](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=46fe4f4249&e=baf210d431)
---
[](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=bceb2edc25&e=baf210d431)
---
[](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=44bbb0e507&e=baf210d431)
---
[](https://growthmn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e307c9beec837f7456d65a5e6&id=0e6b40c556&e=baf210d431)

For example, New York City now struggles under the weight of an influx of illegal migrants, with daily costs to taxpayers around $5 million and an anticipated expense of up to $4 billion over the next two years to manage 30,000 migrants in various accommodations. Similar strains are evident in Massachusetts and Colorado, where public services and healthcare providers are overwhelmed by the demands of illegal migrants. These states illustrate the disastrous consequences of sanctuary policies. Sanctuary policies, while perhaps well-intentioned, lead to dire consequences for the communities they claim to help. They exacerbate humanitarian crises, encourage illegal entry, and are fundamentally unfair to local citizens and lawful immigrants. As Minnesotans, it is our duty to uphold the rule of law and ensure the safety and prosperity of all residents. Together, we can guide Minnesota towards common-sense policies that ensure our safety and uphold our values. Working with you, Jim Schultz PresidentMinnesota Private Business Council P.S. If you believe in protecting our freedoms and safeguarding the rule of law, consider joining the fight by becoming a . Together, we can ensure that our constitutional rights endure for future generations. Membership offers numerous benefits, including: Bimonthly newsletter: Stay informed with key policy and business updates. Real-time alerts: Get timely information on critical state legislation. Exclusive insights: Access to key polling and political landscape analyses. Advocacy: Join us in advocating for the policies that will renew Minnesota’s promise. Cost: $100 per year—a small investment for a significant impact. Join us in this crucial fight for the future of Minnesota. Together, we can ensure that our state not only recovers, but thrives. Your support is vital in this mission. . | | About the Minnesota Private Business Council: The Minnesota Private Business Council advocates for commonsense policies supporting Minnesota industry and innovation and benefiting Minnesota’s workers, families, and communities. Comprised of privately held businesses from a broad array of Minnesota industries, the Minnesota Private Business Council advocates for policies leading to job growth, new business creation and entrepreneurship, and broad-based well-being for Minnesota’s workers and their families. For more information, please visit . | Follow the Minnesota Private Business Council: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Minnesota Private Business Council. All rights reserved._

clean_body: Fellow American, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country. | I go to work every day to fight for YOU , Fellow American! My constituents and supporters are the first and last thing on my mind daily. Today, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country. I created the 2025 Spring Survey to do just that. Here is a quick preview of the questions: What issues do you think the U.S. Senate should be prioritizing right now? How important is it to you that Donald Trump has a Senate he can count on for his entire term as President? How would you evaluate the job performance of our Republican majority in the U.S. Senate so far? | I hope you will take a moment to complete this survey - your feedback is very important to me. Thank you, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. State Sen. **Ghazala Hashmi**(VA-LG) has been a trailblazer in Virginia's Senate, serving on committees focused on health, education, and local government. While Republicans sought to restrict reproductive health care, state Sen. Hashmi led efforts to protect contraception access. She's fighting to ensure that future generations, including her two daughters, enjoy more rights — not fewer.

**Shannon Taylor**(VA-AG) has 28 years of courtroom experience, and has led one of Virginia's largest prosecutorial offices as Henrico County's commonwealth's attorney since 2012. In a political atmosphere where Republicans are working tirelessly to attack our rights, Shannon will champion justice and safeguard Virginians' rights from day one as attorney general.

[**Virginia needs leaders who will stand up to the extremist Republicans rolling back our rights. Donate now to help Shannon and Ghazala win their statewide races in 2025. She's fighting to ensure that future generations, including her two daughters, enjoy more rights — not fewer. White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller **[took as wrecking ball to CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/939d7345-1223-46c0-885b-bba2dd2047ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for challenging President Trump's authority to remove enemies of the United States using deportation.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/939d7345-1223-46c0-885b-bba2dd2047ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/939d7345-1223-46c0-885b-bba2dd2047ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
CNN's Kasie Hunt pressed Miller on the Trump administration's deportation of criminal illegal gang members over the weekend, right as a federal judge issued an order halting deportation flights until further review.
"How are you going to expel illegal alien invaders who are raping little girls, who are murdering little girls, if every deportation has to be adjudicated by a district court judge?!!" Miller exploded at Hunt. "That means you have no country! That means you have no sovereignty! That means you have no future!!"
"We do have separation of powers in this country!" Hunt fired back. "Did you ignore the judges order because you thought you could?!"
Watch Miller take down CNN in the explosive interview right here:

# Tom Homan gets surrounded by woke reporters, what he does next is pure FIRE
Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[took on a swarm of woke reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/3045d192-92ab-4cee-ac29-e5aac8e8c8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in front of the White House, fending off accusation after accusation pertaining to his roundup of illegal criminal gang members and terrorists in the U.S.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3045d192-92ab-4cee-ac29-e5aac8e8c8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3045d192-92ab-4cee-ac29-e5aac8e8c8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A reporter asked Homan about the timeline "behind the scenes" of when deportation flights departed over the weekend while an activist federal judge issued an order halting such flights until further review.
"Look, I'm going to say this," Homan started. "The President through proclamation took his authority under **[the Alien Enemies Act and imposed it, which he has the right to do."](https://substack.com/redirect/3045d192-92ab-4cee-ac29-e5aac8e8c8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Later in the discussion Homan clarified that the deportation flight in question was "already over international waters" when the judges order came through.
The Trump administration's deportations have targeted members of the violent Venezuelan gang Tren de Aruagua, who were notoriously active and causing mayhem in major American sanctuary cities like New York.
**["TDA has been designated as a terror organization,"](https://substack.com/redirect/3045d192-92ab-4cee-ac29-e5aac8e8c8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Homan explained. "They've invaded this country to unsettle this country, whether through fentanyl killing thousands of Americans or through the violence perpetrated in our cities. The President did the right thing!"
Another reporter asked Homan "is every one of those guys a member of a gang? How do you know that and why can't they sort that out with a lawyer in a hearing?"
"I'm not familiar with every single case on that plane, but that's my understanding, MS13 members and TDA members," Homan clarified.
"We removed terrorists from the country this weekend!" Homan told reporters. "I can't believe any media that would question their president's ability**[to remove terrorists from this country!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/3045d192-92ab-4cee-ac29-e5aac8e8c8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch Homan take on the left-wing press single handed:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3045d192-92ab-4cee-ac29-e5aac8e8c8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: We're helping to build a warchest of funds for the two Democrats who run for these open Florida seats - we need your urgent help! Chip in NOW so we can flip these red seats blue >>> [] Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida: Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline. To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor). Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard. They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress. We CANNOT let them get away with it! Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [] Thanks for taking action, Team RTP [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. body:
| | | **We’re getting on the ballot to fight Trump and Musk this November in Virginia’s pivotal House of Delegates elections - where Democrats hold a slim 51-49 majority.**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6E3r-8BahUSFbwOkWs5ux9uUTm1tcKsbwuDqRZKbz_8dBy3Pvq_asqssdpV8SveE4a8qpDNq0WHJxDM7Cx-e_55YvID9oMuPWkkYpje7vtbjJV66KV8tbDcCd5yezrKAkS9ss0_5EtEoZ0wbPVWeYSu3CvVB-Vs9RFAxfUvDz_S4LcfyM4s5NawLqNdKeZCKm7fY1dn8HiJzhTb4X_e07uFV7_SrHzgIbLppvotl5gRWGdCQSlfhCrEc4q99-2EMUw/4ex/4rg5aGu3Q72BZlwNUS3ajA/h0/h001.pBdWXTH5Z59dzdHnR0fP-QespcNrOvKPK7f0pYZt7J0) **[Will you chip in to help Elizabeth Guzman flip a red seat to blue and expand our Democratic majority?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviGD0mMOw0bwi-xezY7v7Np7quIvB9tLoiN8aLn4TcKLr9PRIcybRACL-9xsLCQi15Pa71mu6wf_3v8gFVhRAV1J0DHl-Lpt_3pK4h0r8i8kiOgAzCXysrh0raYUvZjIyajXjqQ_rAIpt9HEO7jUv0Adw5axUPFu756f594zY-6Z8hz7qYdYBCcI9mqehhT83JJXGP0OSvl1jAPwx_Qc9o-zDiQFl6ILPoBX9QuxpLRslZEinFJeIHg8YSW0BOhEbjA/4ex/4rg5aGu3Q72BZlwNUS3ajA/h1/h001.N7Jmir0b2x1Gxk5VUZrvjA9FOUb1yeZHnsGaVzkfdDs)**
* * *
Friend, We are thrilled to announce that we have officially turned in our petitions to get Elizabeth Guzman on the ballot for Virginia House of Delegates this year Together, we can flip this district from red to blue and expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the House of Delegates - one of the closest chambers in the nation. Elizabeth is prepared to fight back against Trump and Musk’s assault on our democracy. She will stand up for the rule of law, federal workers and our children's access to a quality public education. We believe in a future where every child has access to quality education, every worker is treated with respect, and every family has a chance at the American dream. **With your support, we can RESIST Trump’s Project 2025 and build a strong grassroots movement that resonates with the people of Virginia's 22nd district.**
******[We are asking for your generous donations to fuel Elizabeth’s campaign before our first fundraising deadline on March 31. Every dollar counts and will go directly toward outreach efforts, community events, and mobilizing voters.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnodpF17bneoDKp9_miyn0tf60nuK7_ab4smAY0hZWhODlzRmMH6mQdmyHpX9rdc-ji20RyC_VYPpJlOEXHEIFMmTFRvG5ZkWW8R2SusRLVfm8e5g6df8W29tTkARttMkkyUlUl8QkvXdL1pDrT1h9ihIRRB7SMQPmBkefL_gBFegjRoQjthUQAYBQ28BaIc60RGy-J3bMgCFsWMDixa3Mg9J5WtMv7C6c4LguzPIMS5sZIGMLzp4cQRB_J5Y3SNh2Q/4ex/4rg5aGu3Q72BZlwNUS3ajA/h2/h001.8Rbo4NKQkl-dmTOmTb0Ihh_R9VYZRcN9FBBEixQc3P8)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Friend, We are thrilled to announce that we have officially turned in our petitions to get Elizabeth Guzman on the ballot for Virginia House of Delegates this year Together, we can flip this district from red to blue and expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the House of Delegates - one of the closest chambers in the nation. Elizabeth is prepared to fight back against Trump and Musk’s assault on our democracy. She will stand up for the rule of law, federal workers and our children's access to a quality public education. We believe in a future where every child has access to quality education, every worker is treated with respect, and every family has a chance at the American dream. With your support, we can RESIST Trump’s Project 2025 and build a strong grassroots movement that resonates with the people of Virginia's 22nd district. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support! -Guzman for Virginia | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Elizabeth Guzman, please .

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Victory: Fifth Circuit Rejects Appeal to Undo Decision Ending Counting of Votes Received after Election Day
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that the U.S. Court of Appeals for
the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear its previous ruling, in which
it agreed with Judicial Watch that it was unlawful for Mississippi to
count ballots that arrived after Election Day. The full Circuit
declined to hear the case by a vote of 5 to 10.

body:
This Tuesday, we have a pivotal opportunity to defend our hard-won majority in the Pennsylvania House in a must-win special election | | |
---
| |
---|---
[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD-0Fr2Pgyy2ET802uj5Jd385x0R5PPZ7lAxHD9cOVbJsjmS_itBI-KnjUAqNl4ILpWpEQI8oylcNfBud7vChK33HK9mvojuBPo92vPdTbrQeJTQj_2rT6v6B6oWSlM0iys18_jYBq13-boUdze8X9UIar9POl8YkQCYLvkG321tzXQ6Z3-ZXv033dOORgwm2xzJDM_SF3Y0fo5pz06JBPlmDMdAYUvf_vBZKZBx5IihvPM23zxVtSFHQIkPTAxogU1EdPjkQ1bvJ4TL3SE8dKjzJFxTUFljy4sP3B-zzA0nV1691NcFUk1t1zACDJkUtoD4_fGOfFgLeUCjowLmWsP9HNBNXcYDDSyklTH4ipbmOsyGgdozoS71YPA93VQt2H4R8LjpWtw8vN-zwFIE9kLg/4ex/RHfHxdXGQIKqgvwC9u21Cw/h0/h001.9UIx7-IefQP56vqR6jNkqZoKp4aqK0We6ceIz5ZOyPg) This Tuesday, we have a pivotal opportunity to defend our hard-won majority in the Pennsylvania House in a must-win special election! With so much chaos in Washington, we must focus on our efforts to secure progress in our statehouses. **State legislators make decisions that affect your everyday life – everything from affordable housing to healthcare to gun safety measures.** Defending our majority in the Pennsylvania House is critical to growing our Democratic power and halting Republicans' ultra-MAGA agenda. Republicans will be throwing everything they have into this special election, so we need to be primed to fight back. body:
Add your name today
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104124636/534361815/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_eng_2025.03.19_b1_shq_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDRlOGNiYS1kMDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbPPbhKk-_0l0a0lsgUtdEttCIXDtBxyxuK_uYmObTY=) Peter, **House Republicans, Donald Trump, and Elon Musk have made clear their plan to take an axe to Social Security.** Cutting staff, closing offices, removing phone services for seniors – _all of it done to cut taxes for Trump’s billionaire donors._ **Emilia is fighting to defend Social Security for the thousands of Northeast Ohioans who rely on it. Will you stand with her today?** **[Help defend Social Security by adding your name. Let’s show Emilia we have her back!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104124643/534361824/-800142748?refcode=em_eng_2025.03.19_b1_shq_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDRlOGNiYS1kMDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbPPbhKk-_0l0a0lsgUtdEttCIXDtBxyxuK_uYmObTY=&emci=35212596-0e04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=704e8cba-d004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=11703046)** | [**Add your name!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104124650/534361832/-800142748?refcode=em_eng_2025.03.19_b1_shq_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDRlOGNiYS1kMDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbPPbhKk-_0l0a0lsgUtdEttCIXDtBxyxuK_uYmObTY=&emci=35212596-0e04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=704e8cba-d004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=11703046)

_– Sykes HQ_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

Hi Peter,
I wanted you to be the first to know that I am running for Congress! My passion for serving this community has not changed and will not change. We need the next generation of new leaders in Washington to combat Trump’s attacks on jobs, healthcare, and education. The stakes are far too important to stay on the sidelines right now. But I can’t do it alone, we are launching this campaign today and we need your support. subject: These Powerful Bluetooth Hearing Aids Are Hard to Beat
body:
The Next Generation of Bluetooth Hearing Aids Is Here | [ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4tsOQhUTyLLHS_psjDgHBsQ9mvCcRkJQ_WM6v81CCOzcn2U3h5oftV-1wJqZSJKnm42vazM_MRtVXluOLDxGUAGYZJVZ5YZHDPxNk9u6munUvIt5Fk1gFgNgT1ZiPiHGJ000jYyp9e76ghi7KiHTQC9w%3D%3D)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4t7wGFGOA0ckvkDA6vI7CM30CP-RCbUu_r23CzV3x1Axmp9vvNqU1BKg4gSuxGODYMcrcVtMgs6vIOYPPgYxxWEKAhp4B4WyscZbbg6hgujCAJzM0RoEmAPG7W4uJ9frqHE1JKuRwdMcd06VFL9F1ImQ%3D%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4tPKJZj0Z2R1710vrSm2101KI9vxaTwav7NIjLD2Cn7lI2Cg6Cu51OpakjBgp1-Dg2LS89gU5HInOkdrR3Ili6kpRtbS0eso3MERYpVApC8RhLOnzgbxLgs0L66hE6-pXOJO0yM5tk9qomBNsXIwTs8A%3D%3D)'s **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4tH6goJSWTrkDcdlVF8ILlylnvzNmGndbE2SzGMQhiapxemYaZjh3pd3y2Q_CqfHaSjlMhmbRDmThFUewLQDLyuwhy-kN3LOJJtj9LkZIX1RSEyAfbyPkw6_XKCA2uqTp50liw4FMhn-9PHI8wTbEgXQ%3D%3D)'s IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4tFOIOR2jx4WIGO8VqG5UKX7hSWqCkCOOmkEK5WL9lJCRHIMbwD7WtKSewagl48HAc-e3EgiYBsIYgPNq541U1tKjNLsuSmbaBZ-aik29cslO5uwg3VdsJxlTJ8hAp8Eh33Y0TIMWfIn4ZFgPoMqpn-Q%3D%3D)
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4th9VzdU_nGtYxcastUjEKWMyJ8ta3DAlMVovIYBtcqN3TncApfp7dsqyeQPjBOFlJCykvFl1BVa9AkgdRMSlpkHpzFZiK0ZtFtP1OmaFmoDLvyp-ftLJpy6tnaIdu-dW_QN7hs-qERX8iAlaNYhsqZA%3D%3D)
What makes [hear.com](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4tUFPOT83gBLfW8whS3r3lMGmH7xI8aJyn4Ljc6rum7VNFyWCIegoEbPXgS99I9iik9_9x9UuGABzG0zE1F-eJFPyL1E_js3HAE0onRfJCdxsQ433gdanUTeU9D0tWw4HwTkDM0XuUCBddxN8L-2QJaQ%3D%3D)’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4tO5fWGdHGetI29ljKyEDqZs4Am3fa5l7FXYngAWGGUocdax2cW0NTLdk0hvGY898-aBo4t9ayaXdK0dcbKeSOQCi_DtW1VVFKmIhCtaCSFAoamIReDGoNG1I47NY7tB1i9dcUcodozKxmWchkrOCo6A%3D%3D)’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c6d20315610b468288c733864bf2ed84&_e=dlelne-SksmZGGv635g1J-9BES_wBQiQ4VPIqT6iY8I3FoABC2G621hwuS6t5Gd77zwDchI4qzOO0kRDJEDDbRQQM7C_du8zcLxw4cqZc7XNIU2e95iV7ltu9MrypqBsSMVsZ829KsUUF8GK6M-jyXUQrCcPLwhdFtILpMrs2mshO2k-HEQl2udDYsuEMgPDXgooYX_StjrcmWE6VHwhscn1LDlSvzrva-AxVEagfEKlt1BbZpcDG7QMNj1sXUqR9KS4qQrlG-QiF5QVLeDqzZwAnwG1n8-gg1o6x8SzKPDh5QbAQfc1jJnYQMTKfs4t6hATStNvYIaFYUsNa8u2ymvqlOY39c4Qy2vIw0-xpbDu-2nHslnHBdLcutqk4dP4cy3_2mZ5RQt5qxmCZkGPnSgQXU2alYY22Fzz7Oc05lNVK5t22sZUKyiRU1fcr7pJR5fIDfCuLjXeIWNSgXAsxA%3D%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

clean_body: The Next Generation of Bluetooth Hearing Aids Is Here | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes ’s IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that ’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today.

Friend, We cannot separate repression and fascism in the U.S. from U.S.-supported fascism abroad. For example, hundreds of protesters at Columbia and Harvard Universities showed up this month to protest events featuring former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett, who has participated in war crimes, boasted about killing Arabs, and pushed against Arab self-determination. He called himself “more right-wing” than current genocidal Prime Minister Netanyahu, who has warrants out for his arrest from the International Criminal Court.1 Detained Palestinian activist and Columbia University graduate student Mahmoud Khalil has been advocating for U.S. divestment from Israeli apartheid and genocide, and we must continue that fight, which is more urgent than ever. This month, I introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block Trump’s attempt to bypass Congress and send billions of dollars worth of weapons and bombs to Israel’s government. These are the same weapons that have been used to kill mostly children and women in Gaza; weapons that enable Israel to continue carrying out war crimes. Representative Pramila Jayapal and I introduced Joint Resolutions in the House of Representatives, and Senator Bernie Sanders has introduced new ones in the Senate. **Now, both legislative branches of our federal government have the opportunity to block over $8 billion in weapons and bombs to Israel.** The head of Amnesty International USA has urged Congress to pass these resolutions, saying: _“Congress must step in to block the transfer of U.S.-origin weapons to Israel when there is a grave risk that these weapons will fuel further violations of international law, including the crime of genocide.”_ [**Sign on to urge Congress to support our latest Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block over $8 billion in weapons to From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Tue, Mar 18, 2025
Subject: Sign to block weapons to Israel’s government
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
For years, Israel’s government has denied and limited Gaza’s access to food, water, medicine, electricity, and the conditions necessary for life.1 **When the first phase of the latest ceasefire agreement ended over two weeks ago, Israel again announced that it would close Gaza’s borders and block all humanitarian aid from entering Gaza.** The United Nations, the International Criminal Court, numerous countries, and human rights groups have spoken out against this illegal blockade.
**Yesterday Israel also resumed heavy bombing of Gaza, killing hundreds of Palestinians in a day.**
Millions of Palestinians in Gaza are facing famine, with all of their borders tightly controlled by Israel. The one entry into Egypt was supposed to stay open for people to exit for medical care abroad, but **Israeli tanks keep firing on ambulances with sick children who are trying to leave**. In violation of the ceasefire and international law, Israel’s government has continued killing civilians and destroying civilian infrastructure in Gaza.
**Despite these clear war crimes, the U.S. government continues to supply Israel with weapons and bombs that will be used to kill more civilians.**
Already, Trump has bypassed Congress multiple times to send billions of dollars worth of weapons to Israel.2 He’s also gloated about ethnically cleansing all 2.3 million Palestinian residents of Gaza and turning it into a “Middle East Riviera” with hotels and beachfront properties he can profit from.3
**This month I introduced multiple Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block over $8 billion in weapons and bombs to Israel** , along with my colleagues Rep. Pramila Jayapal and Sen. Bernie Sanders.
Amnesty International USA supports these resolutions, saying: _“Amnesty International has continuously provided extensive evidence that Israeli forces have repeatedly used U.S.-origin weapons in violation of international law as well as U.S. law and policy... We urge all members of Congress to lean into their oversight role and support these Joint Resolutions of Disapproval.”_

Amnesty International is also among multiple human rights groups that have named Israel’s actions genocidal. **Our taxpayer dollars should go to housing, healthcare, and other community needs—not genocide.**
As Americans continue to protest against Mahmoud Khalil’s illegal imprisonment and the State Department’s targeting of other students, let’s remember that U.S. repression of our own residents can’t be separated from U.S.-supported repression and fascism abroad.
This month, Mahmoud and hundreds of other Columbia University students protested as former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett spoke on their campus. Bennett has said there are no Palestinian children (outrageously calling children terrorists) and has himself personally been involved in war crimes, like the 1996 Qana massacre of more than 100 civilians and UN peacekeepers in Lebanon.4
After his visit to Columbia University, Bennett went to speak at Harvard, where hundreds of students also protested his arrival. When the moderator for the Harvard event warned that audience members who interrupted Bennett would be removed, Bennett said, “I think we’ll just give them a pager.”5 This disgusting comment about killing Americans on U.S. soil referenced last September’s attacks, when Israel’s government killed children and healthcare workers by exploding pagers throughout Lebanon’s civilian population.
When current Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu came to the White House to celebrate Trump’s electoral win, he brought a golden pager—again dehumanizing Lebanese and Palestinian people and making light of war crimes—along with a plaque calling Trump Israel’s “greatest friend and greatest ally.”
**The fight to divest U.S. weapons, funds, and support from Israel is more urgent than ever.**
**Instead of continuing to arm Israel, our government should be pushing to begin the second phase of the ceasefire deal, which includes Israel’s total withdrawal from Gaza.** Complete withdrawal from the occupied territories in Palestine is what international law demands, which has been affirmed by recent orders from the world’s top court and from the vast majority of countries in the United Nations.
[**Please sign on now to support the latest Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block weapons transfers to Israel, and to demand Israel let in humanitarian aid and withdraw from Gaza and the West Bank.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_sEx477Renf-Md5EVu9dKibHGnHMA90JD39DyBwb7CrP-SI3a3W-ArY9q3qadiNGZNzNjoE75-UbQ9mI9xVXRS5ZDgrqcqhSQ7zUpuDlnYZwaBwxq8SP48lzxwLPxJfvLKKd2gDczBQjNKj0ODU6VXMmycBsFC1hshoyeDU2NexeJfHu_6lLstLk49rLkGnTSteLwxN-vjLnr_UTSDcky-hVZ_mlgpax0b6MkrB2selfVpBYWXfnoKTtn5FpbME9Oz5grVCvbfw1UaNoscUQHO-UaROSyOK4-q65ziPPWiUsEW_K59KbDACiusSwSYzNiX6Ycw95rieR0LBwD4s75peUp7FgH1CEInLA4I3Ho5RGXNiDH7fz9UsGjQC6s8Zvf3EzuK5K96cJuok2AS0fyLN1aHqN_RMrotQknYm-5AoW3wA7K8VNDxniPMefNPRLyueUpAmNwbRP7etL60tCiI/4ex/RPLzXCOERCWHGyTqemkfIA/h7/h001.AADFv7rmU0Pk15uf5vVFhwI7KdW0Ot2I2gVc3-L0lbo)
Thank you for demanding an arms embargo. Together, we will keep pushing our government to end its support for apartheid and genocide, and instead save lives at home and abroad.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: I introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block billions of dollars in weapons from going to Israel’s government. | | | Friend, We cannot separate repression and fascism in the U.S. from U.S.-supported fascism abroad. For example, hundreds of protesters at Columbia and Harvard Universities showed up this month to protest events featuring former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett, who has participated in war crimes, boasted about killing Arabs, and pushed against Arab self-determination. He called himself “more right-wing” than current genocidal Prime Minister Netanyahu, who has warrants out for his arrest from the International Criminal Court.1 Detained Palestinian activist and Columbia University graduate student Mahmoud Khalil has been advocating for U.S. divestment from Israeli apartheid and genocide, and we must continue that fight, which is more urgent than ever. This month, I introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block Trump’s attempt to bypass Congress and send billions of dollars worth of weapons and bombs to Israel’s government. These are the same weapons that have been used to kill mostly children and women in Gaza; weapons that enable Israel to continue carrying out war crimes. Representative Pramila Jayapal and I introduced Joint Resolutions in the House of Representatives, and Senator Bernie Sanders has introduced new ones in the Senate. Now, both legislative branches of our federal government have the opportunity to block over $8 billion in weapons and bombs to Israel. The head of Amnesty International USA has urged Congress to pass these resolutions, saying: “Congress must step in to block the transfer of U.S.-origin weapons to Israel when there is a grave risk that these weapons will fuel further violations of international law, including the crime of genocide.” | Thank you for continuing to stand up for our shared humanity, and joining human rights groups in demanding the U.S. government end arms transfers to Israel’s apartheid, genocidal government. We will continue pushing back against fascism and instead pushing to save lives—at home and abroad. With you in this fight, Rashida 1\. , \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Tue, Mar 18, 2025 Subject: Sign to block weapons to Israel’s government To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, For years, Israel’s government has denied and limited Gaza’s access to food, water, medicine, electricity, and the conditions necessary for life.1 When the first phase of the latest ceasefire agreement ended over two weeks ago, Israel again announced that it would close Gaza’s borders and block all humanitarian aid from entering Gaza. The United Nations, the International Criminal Court, numerous countries, and human rights groups have spoken out against this illegal blockade. Yesterday Israel also resumed heavy bombing of Gaza, killing hundreds of Palestinians in a day. Millions of Palestinians in Gaza are facing famine, with all of their borders tightly controlled by Israel. The one entry into Egypt was supposed to stay open for people to exit for medical care abroad, but Israeli tanks keep firing on ambulances with sick children who are trying to leave. In violation of the ceasefire and international law, Israel’s government has continued killing civilians and destroying civilian infrastructure in Gaza. Despite these clear war crimes, the U.S. government continues to supply Israel with weapons and bombs that will be used to kill more civilians. Already, Trump has bypassed Congress multiple times to send billions of dollars worth of weapons to Israel.2 He’s also gloated about ethnically cleansing all 2.3 million Palestinian residents of Gaza and turning it into a “Middle East Riviera” with hotels and beachfront properties he can profit from.3 This month I introduced multiple Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block over $8 billion in weapons and bombs to Israel , along with my colleagues Rep. Pramila Jayapal and Sen. Bernie Sanders. Amnesty International USA supports these resolutions, saying: “Amnesty International has continuously provided extensive evidence that Israeli forces have repeatedly used U.S.-origin weapons in violation of international law as well as U.S. law and policy... We urge all members of Congress to lean into their oversight role and support these Joint Resolutions of Disapproval.” Amnesty International is also among multiple human rights groups that have named Israel’s actions genocidal. Our taxpayer dollars should go to housing, healthcare, and other community needs—not genocide. As Americans continue to protest against Mahmoud Khalil’s illegal imprisonment and the State Department’s targeting of other students, let’s remember that U.S. repression of our own residents can’t be separated from U.S.-supported repression and fascism abroad. This month, Mahmoud and hundreds of other Columbia University students protested as former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett spoke on their campus. Bennett has said there are no Palestinian children (outrageously calling children terrorists) and has himself personally been involved in war crimes, like the 1996 Qana massacre of more than 100 civilians and UN peacekeepers in Lebanon.4 After his visit to Columbia University, Bennett went to speak at Harvard, where hundreds of students also protested his arrival. When the moderator for the Harvard event warned that audience members who interrupted Bennett would be removed, Bennett said, “I think we’ll just give them a pager.”5 This disgusting comment about killing Americans on U.S. soil referenced last September’s attacks, when Israel’s government killed children and healthcare workers by exploding pagers throughout Lebanon’s civilian population. When current Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu came to the White House to celebrate Trump’s electoral win, he brought a golden pager—again dehumanizing Lebanese and Palestinian people and making light of war crimes—along with a plaque calling Trump Israel’s “greatest friend and greatest ally.” The fight to divest U.S. weapons, funds, and support from Israel is more urgent than ever. Instead of continuing to arm Israel, our government should be pushing to begin the second phase of the ceasefire deal, which includes Israel’s total withdrawal from Gaza. Complete withdrawal from the occupied territories in Palestine is what international law demands, which has been affirmed by recent orders from the world’s top court and from the vast majority of countries in the United Nations. Thank you for demanding an arms embargo. Together, we will keep pushing our government to end its support for apartheid and genocide, and instead save lives at home and abroad. In solidarity, Rashida 1 2 , 3 , 4 5 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Forward Party
subject: Fast Forward - Healthcare Follow Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
So what do Forwardists think about the state of US Healthcare?

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_55_healthcare_fol&n=1)
---
Wednesday, March 19, 2025 | Peter -- Last week we kicked off our _**Controlling What You Can**_ series by asking for your thoughts on the state of healthcare in the U.S. The last few years, more than any other time in modern U.S. history, have highlighted the strengths and weaknesses of our healthcare system. We faced a global pandemic that stressed our systems in a way that we haven't seen in generations. We're a decade and a half out from our last major healthcare legislation (the ACA, or Obamacare as it's sometimes called), and it is without a doubt time for us, as a country, to address the shortcomings that have persisted in our system. It's a lot to digest, so we asked all of you what you thought about the current healthcare system in our country. Here were your thoughts: An overwhelming majority of Forwardists were dissatisfied with the state of healthcare today. Over 2/3 highlighted the high cost of services as the biggest issue facing our system, while nearly 1 in 5 said that it was a lack of preventative care. Additionally, you wrote us by the hundreds on our website and social media with your thoughts and ideas on what's wrong with our healthcare system and what we can do to fix it. Here are the top five takeaways from those notes:
1. **Affordability and Cost**

* Most all of you were concerned with the rising costs of premiums and out-of-pocket expenses.
* Medicaid and Medicare users worry about potential impending cuts.
2. **Insurance Challenges and Coverage Limitations**

* Many of you were not happy with the accessibility of employer-provided insurance, making insurance unattainable for retirees and low-income individuals.

* Many also discussed situations where a legitimate claim was denied, and statistics about the rate of claim denial were shared.
3. **Accessibility and Provider Availability**

* The complexity of our current healthcare system was a constant refrain.

* Wait times for treatments were also highlighted as a problem across the country.
4. **Quality of Care and Patient Experience**

* There were many discussions of how doctors have to cram in too many patients in a day to make money, meaning that visits are rushed and don't often lead to the right solution.
5. **Systemic Issues and Reform Suggestions**

* You proposed a flood of ideas to fix these problems, but the most common (more than 70% of those who made recommendations) were a single-payer or a public option.

* For those who didn't propose a specific solution, they highlighted that any solution must must solve the inefficiencies that plague our healthcare system today, as well as providing more preventative care to improve outcomes and lower overall costs.

Thank you all for participating in our first edition of _**Controlling What You Can**_ _._ We will continue to highlight your voices in these roundups, and we will ensure that our candidates know exactly what you think about the best way to address our healthcare system, as well as other issues in future editions.

clean_body: So what do Forwardists think about the state of US Healthcare? | | Wednesday, March 19, 2025 | Peter -- Last week we kicked off our Controlling What You Can series by asking for your thoughts on the state of healthcare in the U.S. The last few years, more than any other time in modern U.S. history, have highlighted the strengths and weaknesses of our healthcare system. We faced a global pandemic that stressed our systems in a way that we haven't seen in generations. We're a decade and a half out from our last major healthcare legislation (the ACA, or Obamacare as it's sometimes called), and it is without a doubt time for us, as a country, to address the shortcomings that have persisted in our system. It's a lot to digest, so we asked all of you what you thought about the current healthcare system in our country. Here were your thoughts: An overwhelming majority of Forwardists were dissatisfied with the state of healthcare today. Over 2/3 highlighted the high cost of services as the biggest issue facing our system, while nearly 1 in 5 said that it was a lack of preventative care. Additionally, you wrote us by the hundreds on our website and social media with your thoughts and ideas on what's wrong with our healthcare system and what we can do to fix it. Here are the top five takeaways from those notes: 1. Affordability and Cost Most all of you were concerned with the rising costs of premiums and out-of-pocket expenses. Medicaid and Medicare users worry about potential impending cuts. 2. Insurance Challenges and Coverage Limitations Many of you were not happy with the accessibility of employer-provided insurance, making insurance unattainable for retirees and low-income individuals. Many also discussed situations where a legitimate claim was denied, and statistics about the rate of claim denial were shared. 3. Accessibility and Provider Availability The complexity of our current healthcare system was a constant refrain. Wait times for treatments were also highlighted as a problem across the country. 4. Quality of Care and Patient Experience There were many discussions of how doctors have to cram in too many patients in a day to make money, meaning that visits are rushed and don't often lead to the right solution. 5. Systemic Issues and Reform Suggestions You proposed a flood of ideas to fix these problems, but the most common (more than 70% of those who made recommendations) were a single-payer or a public option. For those who didn't propose a specific solution, they highlighted that any solution must must solve the inefficiencies that plague our healthcare system today, as well as providing more preventative care to improve outcomes and lower overall costs. Thank you all for participating in our first edition of Controlling What You Can . We will continue to highlight your voices in these roundups, and we will ensure that our candidates know exactly what you think about the best way to address our healthcare system, as well as other issues in future editions. | Utah Political Watch The Forward Party is happy to announce the addition of Utah State Senator Daniel Thatcher to the ranks of sitting officials who are part of the Forward Party. He joined Forward to get away from the political infighting in Utah and start solving the problems his constituents need. | CNN Governor Christine Todd Whitman served as the head of the EPA under President George W. clean_body: Virginia is the last state in the South with full reproductive freedom—but that could change if we lose in 2025. | Holding the line isn’t enough, Derek. As the last stronghold of reproductive freedom in the South, we know what’s at stake. While neighboring states have faced cruel abortion bans — some with no exceptions for the most extreme circumstances — our Democratic leaders have protected access to care. But we have the opportunity to codify abortion into our state constitution if we get a Democratic governor in office and expand our majority in the House of Delegates. Republicans are ready to push an abortion ban if they win big in November. We’ve seen it before, Derek: when Republicans take power, reproductive rights are one of the first things on the chopping block. We have to beat them to the punch. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = If we elect a Democratic governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, and expand our majority in the House of Delegates, we have a real shot at doing more than just defending abortion rights, we can enshrine them into Virginia’s constitution. That means lasting protections, no matter who’s in office. It means a firewall that extremist Republicans will never be able to tear down. We can’t afford to lose this fight, Derek. The people of Virginia — and the people across the South — are counting on us. = ************=************ Together, we’ll ensure that no one will have a say over our bodies. – Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? body:

---
Peter,

The Democrats and their media lapdogs have found their next target: Elon Musk.

Just weeks into his leadership at DOGE, they’re already smearing him – calling him a _“Nazi,”_ accusing him of a _“coup,”_ and claiming he’s _“taking over the government.”_

Why? **Because he’s exposing their decades of wasteful spending and saving American taxpayers BILLIONS.**

And here’s the real reason they’re panicking: Elon is uncovering fraud that threatens the bureaucratic politicians’ secret slush funds! The loudest voices attacking him are the ones with the most to lose – and they’ll do anything to protect their corrupt schemes.

Instead of fixing the mess they created, they’re doing what they do best – attacking, distracting, and lying.**But we’re not going to let them get away with it.**

**[We’re collecting 5,000 signatures from American patriots to show the radical left that we STAND with Elon Musk and DOGE. Peter, will you be one of them?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**

name: Tim Walz
subject: We are not powerless
body:
---
Derek, Every day we see the disastrous consequences of Trump’s presidency. In the short time he’s been in office, he’s already tried to rip away fundamental things like child care and health care access that working people rely on. Right now, the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, is trying to defund everything from Social Security to your public school. JD Vance recently claimed that federal judges “aren’t allowed” to check the Trump-Vance administration’s enactment of Project 2025. These are the very real circumstances we are living under right now. **But we are not powerless.** Millions of people voted against Trump and his allies. There are millions of us who won’t stand idly by and let Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress do whatever they want. We can — _and will_ — fight back against Trump and his allies’ Project 2025 agenda. But to do that, we’ll need a strong, organized Democratic Party leading the way. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Derek. The Democratic National Committee is the organization best positioned to move resources to the places they’re needed most in 2025, 2026, and beyond, as we work to elect the Democrats who will be a check on Trump’s power. [**If holding Trump accountable and electing Democrats at every level matters to you, I’m asking you to chip in $3 today to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx)**
---
****
Trump, Elon Musk, and JD Vance aren’t above the law. Our democracy is meant to represent the interests of all Americans, not just the rich. And I’m committed to fighting back alongside the millions of people who don’t see themselves represented in Trump’s America.
Thank you for joining me in this fight,
Tim
Tim Walz
Governor, Minnesota
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250319_3002_fr&refcode2=3002_22930333_PWWtCx&akid=3002%2E22930333%2EPWWtCx)
---

Friend - leaders like Pete Buttigieg, Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Robert Reich are leading the charge to ditch the Electoral College and switch to a national popular vote system. Why?
➜ The Electoral College is the reason Trump won in 2016, despite losing the popular vote by millions
➜ Joe Biden nearly lost the presidency even though he won the popular vote by a historic margin
➜ Every day new leaders join our movement, which means we can abolish the Electoral College and give us a true democracy
We’re so close to getting rid of the Electoral College, but we need to bring in more pro-popular vote supporters across the country to cross the finish line. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us ditch the Electoral College? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2]

We keep talking about this because it's true: 16 states plus DC have already indicated that they're willing to scrap this electoral scheme and move to a national popular vote.
It's clear that our democracy needs reform to be protected. But we're only going to be able to forge the country we deserve if we stand up for our rights, push back against the gerrymandering and voter suppression, and finally make a national popular vote a reality. Too much is at stake for us to give up now.
Help put us over the top in the states we need to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2]

Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith.

|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/EKIaf3Zkscz3nGosp8IWPXevck3MYT8blEzRngmP6UtXOwhUkpF2HLllan7R0ryzwVgyJVDuSVJLjbSQ3EFKYEghXzoH1TS3am8DpxCyZRw9uGEx1ngOvN-ZNpGMQShC3eB6likd2JdCezpMSduw4Lh11myP13rw6dMYpBZ7THmjLHDoIDQBugKx/Uuomsav8GVqThG5azm6Kac5wY87ZhI8Z/7)_
