| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/cMY-9E7-6OfCkQiB5l68yOFmT51EtjLlQ7J1rgkazGukKqdAnSPRh5s-2NgZVDD2KBupGug2SiPyJ_2OVnPNAjylgIZ0LgG3_WVFr5nLXbsfoLpw0F44MZFz_SInSJp6aq4v0E6weJ6qaOLHI5keaLx_igpfeAMOqK6XcEsXqB6vXRkwsfbxtUDnRB_78DAB0w9Xtp4WWrj_B_RMuBtLPZo6N4lxjOFKj9uQEVMQu8AXSZHnijwMJQx5irlt-UTG7eRKlVkGPeR9DohcLMrQlNFKpvGbr_NQdNzeAxPGqlwP7XDCw6S5KR2BEjFHO4jIGtWI2Jaii1WrYNBmXvlmRHrOiBNouxGUguMJ5lwWY9qJVyrlMIalQUKYFRqLgV7TJie6kJwg2guN5QJbHYXFVSXLK9NO0hdtVHtGG-EnPaxzxvqgAS6rbk4Sl7b2AduXJaGkXSie1nBfENAfsm3ft2saI5FWy44JhBF-dFIWPbHB8A_lMA/qdmA3CiHWoVWqUcnTEUIMBZhuTon82Sq/7)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/fz6eE0Ubx2PwaZWs03351cdFSSVu3sKqpBuUN04kTEchFvTd-cpU3-hDYejCTWZ88R3_yqFTs_vtvpFoplZpiBXHyZB2sQDh9Y7ZFkKexfwiqud42ftU7YyAuEtFdSXw6Xc3iccyytDKRjm06JNgTEKvVNHRpwO0ImgK7fP1QI07MxHkyzReqqt3358LTinJwOKtKNPXqSJxW2polgpHbrt-Kd5WmBeGt37AyyhS-OxcomXB_Mr8fNZEI4F3vQplR-x4cQUaGWJlQ8WU-NS_8TqOWsRmo35oCI66JKpQwxAh2nnFATQ3GmufAX0YDhkn1dGr2TDkfbzRYU0cYlT1eQ9L-jFB38IkJGOArVgvhapD6y5f8kIJYvpGGCa_YFrulhExOc4EU5oK4O7433QkimV7F1SUkdmtRHgbKuAcdPFepm0zl0w1bnKDV7lWvV9OgYOHukBrIpCUMxZK41MFtF9yfHLSspxV09FA_jpIUgy-F96jWg/qK7cfBvbMj8Qv2lDvewCIGuzrmoCbdud/7)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.

clean_body: Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Dear Friend, Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "," now available on DVD. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below: Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College . | |

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Amanda Chase is winning in NOVA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025
body:
Here's how to sign her petition
| | |
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
|

---
| Let's Get Amanda Chase's name on the ballot for Virginia Governor
---
|
# ONLY 2 FULL WEEKS LEFT
# UNTIL THE DEADLINE
---
|
# SIGN AMANDA'S PETITION UPDATE
---
| | [CLICK HERE AND PRINT OFF THE PETITON ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TXfRaPQBnGJV_RAsm6dYR6wP1ZwDXpt2axGrIzXHsOHwTYl_PjiHZH3xt9d42s2VPjaYo0OcjziRvUqyr987QVp3NnrmIVW_3vxgsz6OQbf4vEJA88GcwtkxRLzAf07VfR4p-Fgq4pK0_FgNwXiCEHIBR8gBV_bd&c=0Z0MICMdDrAq1uTWTGoT0gHd3XPL5oizxBXBCzvknwy88CiNfVM0YQ==&ch=_AX0TDBTgPYaBgQr-HHGmIEJs_Zt6ZbYCQNuLUujoh0-rvbhNcuWyg==)
---
|
Dear Hello While we still need your help collecting signatures all across the state in record time, I wanted to specifically give you an update on our efforts in NOVA. Like it or not, NOVA has the population to control much of what happens in Virginia.
I'm super excited to report to you that despite entering the race just 2 weeks ago, we already have half of the signatures we need in NOVA (Northern Virginia) to get my name on the ballot. Please be sure to collect by Congressional District.
639 signatures to be exact in less than 2 weeks. We need at least 1,200 signatures.
We have exactly 2 more weeks to collect the other half. So we need all hands on deck in Northern Virginia. Please reply back to this email if you are willing collect signatures to help me get my name on the ballot.
Last night, I attending the very well attended and enthusiastic Fairfax GOP, which is chaired by Katie Gorka. Wow! Well over 250 Republicans in attendance.
They are so well organized and working hard to get all Republicans on the ballot. They had conducted a petition drive for all of the candidates and when we walked in the door last night, they handed us a pile of notarized petitions, several hundred signatures as we walked in the door. As a candidate, I'm so grateful. Now that's how the party can help our candidates. Thank you, Katie Gorka and the Fairfax GOP.
I'm pleased to report that most GOP units around the state are working hard to make sure all Republican candidates are getting their names on the ballot, to give people a choice.
Also, if you are willing to volunteer to speak on behalf of my campaign at your local GOP, please contact our campaign by replying to this email. Our campaign is run by volunteers, not paid campaign staff. So if you are supporting me, please speak up at your local GOP, please print off the petition and collect signatures at your next unit meeting, witness each signature, get it notarized and Fed Ex it to our Appomattox campaign office to:
Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522
So back to Northern Virginia.
Here's where we are: We need 400 signatures in each of these Congressional Districts, Congressional Districts 8, 10 and 11
Congressional District 8, represented by Democrat Don Beyer: McLean, Falls Church, Alexandria, Annandale
Congressional District 10, represented by Suhas Subramanyan: Loudoun, Prince William, Manassas, Purcelville, Leesburg, Ashburn, South Riding, Bristow
Congressional District 11, represented by Gerry Connolly: Chantilly, Fairfax, Herndon, Reston, Centreville, Vienna, Tysons Merrifield
We need 40o signatures in each of the 3 NOVA Congressional Districts. If you live in or around NOVA, would you be willing to collect signatures for our campaign? If you are willing please reach out to us 804 370 8727 and we will walk you through what to do. We can even connect you with people in the area who are collecting as well.
Those who collect over 400 signatures will be invited to a by invitation only dinner at my house.
Tonight, I will be attending the Rockingham GOP meeting. So please come sign my petition or drop your notarized petitions off to us. We will be there from 6:30 to 8:30pm
So if you can help out, please print off the petition on our website at [www.chaseforgovernor. com](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TXfRaPQBnGJV_RAsm6dYR6wP1ZwDXpt2axGrIzXHsOHwTYl_PjiHZJhV_C-UUpu8itJWpMIMoRMdVd4z2R-WU8Us02ni1tLU64J46Ccn_cn92YkfvDZt6R7OX0Z2dWU9ngKnb3KLxpTGVkTMo-o5qtiQXVdEKZlS&c=0Z0MICMdDrAq1uTWTGoT0gHd3XPL5oizxBXBCzvknwy88CiNfVM0YQ==&ch=_AX0TDBTgPYaBgQr-HHGmIEJs_Zt6ZbYCQNuLUujoh0-rvbhNcuWyg==) and give us a call at 804 370 8727 and we will walk you through what to do, or you can read instructions below.
I will also have a table at both the Richmond Gun Show at the Richmond International Raceway from 9am to 5pm this Saturday and Sunday and next Saturday and Sunday at the Hampton Gun Show. I'll be there Saturdays and we will have volunteers manning the booth each Sunday. Please stop by and sign our petition or drop off your notarized petitions.
Many of you are still collecting. Please go ahead and Fed Ex to us the ones that you have already signed in front of a notary, so our team can verify the signatures. It takes about 20 minutes to verify each petition.
Then, please continue collecting. Remember, we need 400 signatures in each Congressional District.
I am so impressed with the commitment level of so many of you. And I want you to know I am just as committed, working every hour of the day to collect and verify our signatures at night.
Keep this in mind. We need a minimum of 400 signatures in each Congressional District. That's about 35 pages of signatures. So please keep going to parking lots across Virginia to find gracious people willing to sign our petition.
We must collect 10,000 valid signatures, 400 in each Congressional District, and as a campaign, turn the signatures into the State Board of Elections before Thursday, April 3 at 5pm.
We would like to receive all forms before Monday, March 31, so that we can properly organize and vet the signatures before turning them in to the Virginia State Board of Elections.
Hundreds of you have reached out and are actively collecting signatures. Thank you. It's only through your efforts that my name will appear on the ballot. Currently, our campaign is 100 percent run by volunteers in each locality. We have no paid staff. The amazing organization you've seen from my campaign is all run by volunteers who want an American First Governor, who can beat Abigail Spanberger in November.
If 500 people collect just 2 pages or 24 signatures, we meet our goal. Will you commit to helping?
Thanks to many of you who have already answered that call. If everyone does their part, you will be able to vote for me in June. If not, you won't have a choice.
We have a team of grassroots volunteers in every Congressional District across the state actively collecting signatures. To join a team in your area, please reply to this email and I will personally connect you with volunteers in your area.
In order for you to vote for me on June 17, please print off the attached petition and collect the signatures of your family, friends and neighbors, so that I can get on the ballot.
WE CANNOT COLLECT SIGNATURES ONLINE.
Signatures must be witnessed in person by signing an old fashioned paper petition ballot.
Are you ready to say yes? Here's what you need to do:

1. Print off the attached form on one sheet of paper, front and back.
2. Witness your friends, family and neighbors sign the petition form. Please make sure they actually sign the form. Please also make sure their writing is legible so that signatures can be verified.
3. Keep in mind that you can't sign your own petition form.
4. Please collect signatures by[ Congressional District.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TXfRaPQBnGJV_RAsm6dYR6wP1ZwDXpt2axGrIzXHsOHwTYl_PjiHZE1n8BCo7i0PKuW-iVX3clQRe7veUHhYYCQ6s6uve9oWgCaNuuNeeAHOqp0wKUFpDgXlrgqZ3knQ_ng0vhaWO5Bh7Omm5-L3xd1FgsTiBrFUTHwrjGn5s9FwMryB47JV4PmoHFd-BZSRO0fqSIPu-ok=&c=0Z0MICMdDrAq1uTWTGoT0gHd3XPL5oizxBXBCzvknwy88CiNfVM0YQ==&ch=_AX0TDBTgPYaBgQr-HHGmIEJs_Zt6ZbYCQNuLUujoh0-rvbhNcuWyg==) One Congressional District per form. You can write the Congressional District in the upper right hand corner.
5. Get the petition notarized at your local bank for free.
6. Drop the petition off in person to: 2023 Church Street, Appomattox, VA 24522
7. Or Fed Ex the petition to:

Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522
For security reasons we will not publish a public calendar, but you can call us at 804 370 8727 or email me at amanda@chaseforva.com to find out when we will be in your area and to coordinate picking up your petitions with the volunteer coordinator in your area.
---
| Please use the link below to print off the petition forms.
Please remember the forms must be double sided and printed front and back. You must also witness every signature and visit your local bank to have a notary sign off on your petition form before mailing.
Please note that we need the original copy. Photocopies are not allowed.
If you have any questions please email Craig at craig@chaseforva.com or call 804 370 8727. If you have trouble printing the forms, we can mail you the forms.
I can do this with your help. Please print off a petition now. Don't wait. Get your immediate family to sign the petition and then get your friends at church and work to sign your petition. Time is not on our side. Less than 19 days to collect signatures.
If not you, then who?
Please click the button below to print your petitions today and start collecting signatures as you run your errands throughout your day.
---
| | [CHASE PETITION FORMS CLICK HERE](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TXfRaPQBnGJV_RAsm6dYR6wP1ZwDXpt2axGrIzXHsOHwTYl_PjiHZIOveqjSDZ-GEOVCSvCMEV_WunQsyx7QCh4RqGObMnwpMSl5b0wJrQnN6ZaQkhkuh8gcCCG2jQv4BoNjj7SwzmE77nz2h85EgBsIWWPy9uIk&c=0Z0MICMdDrAq1uTWTGoT0gHd3XPL5oizxBXBCzvknwy88CiNfVM0YQ==&ch=_AX0TDBTgPYaBgQr-HHGmIEJs_Zt6ZbYCQNuLUujoh0-rvbhNcuWyg==)
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO FIND YOUR CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TXfRaPQBnGJV_RAsm6dYR6wP1ZwDXpt2axGrIzXHsOHwTYl_PjiHZHmoXXmrwiYE8aPMq1i1-O9D4OdbvxZfoHsNtsYAi8umtZbjdLjojAiAX-6UOaP1SgGXqnkNrx2CLZIiWl6S89dI6NkWunFqJtA8MdFKNNSs3n0OFlhGNNC79ScMoA66MVTviQbSQZPRUIxGiEFGGTQ=&c=0Z0MICMdDrAq1uTWTGoT0gHd3XPL5oizxBXBCzvknwy88CiNfVM0YQ==&ch=_AX0TDBTgPYaBgQr-HHGmIEJs_Zt6ZbYCQNuLUujoh0-rvbhNcuWyg==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# MAP OF CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS
---
| Adopt a Congressional District. We need 400 signatures in each of the 11 Congressional Districts. Please text or call 804 370 8727 and let us know where you are collecting signatures so I know where I need to focus our efforts.
Please be sure to collect signatures by Congressional District. If you aren't sure which Congressional District you live in, you can check the map below.
---
| |
---
| | [Click here to view the Congressional Map](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TXfRaPQBnGJV_RAsm6dYR6wP1ZwDXpt2axGrIzXHsOHwTYl_PjiHZLfVntpl69mVKgSV5wqvJoziJ5Wl00R3oRvPtfJDhMFMKwums4xfyMGEsQtmKbBT71np8Vxskc0OgrWRQJr1ZeYpxrGnltRF_lECIdgIjatH42BUKwsV1rLeo4nvKnrn2ve0hhPrThtcYbDtdSRs4bgHEV-Mh6rQTr685B4U7fqN1aWfS1e9LVuByE0vCT1RXh2NpOAHmaOEy-fG258ci5aLn6SP-leDsyCDbCORf9Kwfh-v8LmPdIBWmt7zAcbH9235DyP8V3wp3icCH2FZJonOduTwH4I1qJufuK-P1K520TLcWwOYZfqRm9TuqwNnOw==&c=0Z0MICMdDrAq1uTWTGoT0gHd3XPL5oizxBXBCzvknwy88CiNfVM0YQ==&ch=_AX0TDBTgPYaBgQr-HHGmIEJs_Zt6ZbYCQNuLUujoh0-rvbhNcuWyg==)
---
|
# IMPORTANT DATES
---
|
Petition Signatures due to State Board of Elections: Thursday, April 3, 2025, at 5pm (please get your forms to us ASAP)
Primary Date: Tuesday, June 17, 2025 General Election Date: Tuesday, November 4, 2025

---
|
# PLEASE GIVE GENEROUSLY
---
| Abigail Spanberger has raised over $15 million dollars for her campaign for governor, but the people are not with her. She's out of touch with most Virginians. And I'm not intimidated by her. Once people realize where she gets her money her campaign is going to implode.
Please give your best donation to help pay for gas to travel the state. Thankfully, many across the state already know me. So we don't have to spend as much as our opponents who have no statewide name ID.
Our campaign is run by volunteers not paid campaign staff and operatives. But we do have to pay event fees for gun shows, entrance to events and office supplies. Any contribution you can make is greatly appreciated.
---
| | [ DONATE HERE ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TXfRaPQBnGJV_RAsm6dYR6wP1ZwDXpt2axGrIzXHsOHwTYl_PjiHZB1lmqgEabM1i_e7W4bwmulz3Bx8bnC7b3sJTN0Bj2LORcWQmYpL4oVj4XeI1sF7xNgkNhT2AdczPtZitrCtvcvuMtszM-VWSgA7vynsQ8ow_Z2vpjtYc227g_qLt0t1KroyTZmOmpB9pKkKgsmwsKM9u6RpC5mGsAvDP2vkKVyA&c=0Z0MICMdDrAq1uTWTGoT0gHd3XPL5oizxBXBCzvknwy88CiNfVM0YQ==&ch=_AX0TDBTgPYaBgQr-HHGmIEJs_Zt6ZbYCQNuLUujoh0-rvbhNcuWyg==)

| Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025

| | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US

The amazing organization you've seen from my campaign is all run by volunteers who want an American First Governor, who can beat Abigail Spanberger in November. If 500 people collect just 2 pages or 24 signatures, we meet our goal. Will you commit to helping? Thanks to many of you who have already answered that call. If everyone does their part, you will be able to vote for me in June. If not, you won't have a choice. We have a team of grassroots volunteers in every Congressional District across the state actively collecting signatures. To join a team in your area, please reply to this email and I will personally connect you with volunteers in your area. In order for you to vote for me on June 17, please print off the attached petition and collect the signatures of your family, friends and neighbors, so that I can get on the ballot. WE CANNOT COLLECT SIGNATURES ONLINE. Signatures must be witnessed in person by signing an old fashioned paper petition ballot. Are you ready to say yes? Here's what you need to do: 1. Print off the attached form on one sheet of paper, front and back. 2. Witness your friends, family and neighbors sign the petition form. Please make sure they actually sign the form. Please also make sure their writing is legible so that signatures can be verified. 3. Keep in mind that you can't sign your own petition form. 4. Please collect signatures by== One Congressional District per form. You can write the Congressional District in the upper right hand corner. 5. Get the petition notarized at your local bank for free. 6. Drop the petition off in person to: 2023 Church Street, Appomattox, VA 24522 7. Or Fed Ex the petition to: Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522 For security reasons we will not publish a public calendar, but you can call us at 804 370 8727 or email me at amanda@chaseforva.com to find out when we will be in your area and to coordinate picking up your petitions with the volunteer coordinator in your area. | Please use the link below to print off the petition forms. Please remember the forms must be double sided and printed front and back. You must also witness every signature and visit your local bank to have a notary sign off on your petition form before mailing. Please note that we need the original copy. Photocopies are not allowed. If you have any questions please email Craig at craig@chaseforva.com or call 804 370 8727. If you have trouble printing the forms, we can mail you the forms. I can do this with your help. Please print off a petition now. Don't wait. Get your immediate family to sign the petition and then get your friends at church and work to sign your petition. Time is not on our side. Less than 19 days to collect signatures. If not you, then who? Please click the button below to print your petitions today and start collecting signatures as you run your errands throughout your day. | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | MAP OF CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS | Adopt a Congressional District. We need 400 signatures in each of the 11 Congressional Districts. Please text or call 804 370 8727 and let us know where you are collecting signatures so I know where I need to focus our efforts. Please be sure to collect signatures by Congressional District. If you aren't sure which Congressional District you live in, you can check the map below. | | | | == | IMPORTANT DATES | Petition Signatures due to State Board of Elections: Thursday, April 3, 2025, at 5pm (please get your forms to us ASAP) Primary Date: Tuesday, June 17, 2025 General Election Date: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | PLEASE GIVE GENEROUSLY | Abigail Spanberger has raised over $15 million dollars for her campaign for governor, but the people are not with her. She's out of touch with most Virginians. And I'm not intimidated by her. Once people realize where she gets her money her campaign is going to implode. Please give your best donation to help pay for gas to travel the state. Thankfully, many across the state already know me. So we don't have to spend as much as our opponents who have no statewide name ID. Our campaign is run by volunteers not paid campaign staff and operatives. But we do have to pay event fees for gun shows, entrance to events and office supplies. Any contribution you can make is greatly appreciated. | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025 | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

name: Miracle in FL-06
subject: Trailing by 17 votes - Dem could WIN 1st major race of 2025
body:
Early voting stats from the special election in Florida’s 6th Congressional District are coming out in local media and it is clear that we have made a historic breakthrough.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hrunrmXBqKPfGmPkf_d1CWaRhZaDNirkv-DBWqNQr7UaOO9hZpEsFhXLV4EUb0MjE9yXk-3X3w2AeRfIySPSIji45CgMzr6DuQj-SsnKEOtuvTJXA01_lSfOWdtC7OF3m-QLOxmrLLPiLdkej2xLrTQrUnX-rPF5D1lXp1l4UULmCc5joI80cpjXNdNqSr_1x9UQUSXv3Ilxlw2eCfjRr_dt2OgjvXyF&c=vVj3LiSczkF3GerM83bG8kukUdqt4V6TcYv_CZm1YXRR5PS1RES3Ag==&ch=rmPx9vj8LeUtQznA_cX9-QVNOFt6GNYmT98KzPQ6ENwpmx8joj1HQg==)

| | | | Team,
Early voting stats from the special election in Florida's 6th Congressional District are coming out in local media and it is clear that we have made a historic breakthrough.
In the most populous county of our district, Volusia County, we trail our opponent by just 17 votes.
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hrunrmXBqKPfGmPkf_d1CWaRhZaDNirkv-DBWqNQr7UaOO9hZpEsFhXLV4EUb0MjlI3hqkSTkc91_6G99K1xPaIr1JQozefiyeiYJPPYJXWUdwYDsP9u7M2eVv14cgkNp3XR0kjnm3d55ehD3QbzHG2m9_ehsgRVQUOkmiXlWu71PQpQwpee_UuXawlMlGvvIKUKeyPibU2kvuI9DSwFQAtgOzCLf-CEUjHBE8qY7S0=&c=vVj3LiSczkF3GerM83bG8kukUdqt4V6TcYv_CZm1YXRR5PS1RES3Ag==&ch=rmPx9vj8LeUtQznA_cX9-QVNOFt6GNYmT98KzPQ6ENwpmx8joj1HQg==)
---
| | | | In a district that went for Trump by 64% in 2024, Democratic mail-in-ballots trail Republican ballots by a margin of 42.7% to 40.2% - meaning we trail by just 2.5%. Considering 17% of mail-in-ballots have come from voters with no party affiliation, a segment of voters we poll extremely well with, we are likely leading in vote-by-mail by a sizable majority.
Democrats have overperformed in every special election of 2025. But those races have all been state and local races - this is the first major congressional race of 2025 and by the looks of it, the Democrat has an incredibly real shot at winning.
Our GOP opponent is freaking out--yelling on conservative radio about our campaign, spreading lies and disgusting smears like that we have MS-13 knocking doors for us and that Josh is a Jihadi - even calling for Josh to be arrested just two weeks before E-Day.
While promising for us, these early voting stats are going to ring out as a distress beacon to every major Republican PAC and donor to bail out our opponent. We are now competing at the highest level against everything in the MAGA arsenal.
With so much on the line, every moment, every dollar, and every door knocked counts.
---
| | | | Friend, this is our moment. We can manifest the miracle in Florida's 6th. [Your donation could be the difference between victory and a devastating defeat in a super tight election. Please give what you can today to help us make this miracle happen:](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hrunrmXBqKPfGmPkf_d1CWaRhZaDNirkv-DBWqNQr7UaOO9hZpEsFhXLV4EUb0Mjt3HqVgyWeN-YPFip9ylDDGGhsZ89WycFlcNNfHfVRcFgA9rNLM1NfN2ylPTEnnidiwLlae8u1566oSaotYf1HOm4v6KOoFmToCAEo7SGOy6plGNxblusRiMFuif6oYpf-MVu1GFakpTZNlog2SomxJJrrKGFEwW50W0fYwduO3o=&c=vVj3LiSczkF3GerM83bG8kukUdqt4V6TcYv_CZm1YXRR5PS1RES3Ag==&ch=rmPx9vj8LeUtQznA_cX9-QVNOFt6GNYmT98KzPQ6ENwpmx8joj1HQg==)

Team Weil

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: We need to talk about last week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends–
We need to talk about what happened in the Senate last week.
If you were following the national news, you probably heard that the House and Senate were hotly debating a Continued Resolution (commonly called a CR) that would keep the government open and funded past the March 14th government funding deadline. Typically, CRs are put forward as “clean” – meaning there are no real policy changes in the text of the bill and its main purpose is keeping the government funded until substantive policy changes can be meaningfully debated and agreed on.
But these aren’t normal times, and this isn’t your mom’s Republican Party. This month, the Republican majority put forward a truly horrendous CR that includes $13 billion in cuts to domestic spending – including catastrophic cuts to veterans’ health care, housing and food assistance, disaster relief, mental health services, rural broadband, and more. The bill emboldens the Trump agenda, continues to erode our balance of power, and gives a green light to DOGE’s harmful cuts.
It was a bad bill in the House and it was a bad bill in the Senate.
House Democrats voted almost unanimously against the bill. Unfortunately, because we are currently in the minority, it passed the House anyway.
The Senate was another story. The Senate has an archaic rule known as the filibuster, which means that it takes 60 senators to vote in favor of ending debate on a bill for it to be taken up for a final vote. Right now, the Senate has 53 Republicans, 45 Democrats, and 2 independents – which means Republicans could not pass this horrible bill without support from Democrats and independents.
Without additional support, Republicans – in the triple majority – would be faced with two options: 1) Shut down the government – an incredibly unpopular move causing general chaos across the country and withholding pay from service members, TSA workers, air traffic controllers, and more. Or 2) Come to the table and negotiate in good faith with Democrats to keep the government open and keep the bipartisan debate going.
Senate Democrats had the opportunity to force Republicans’ hands – force them to work across the aisle and avoid catastrophically harmful cuts that impact kids and families all across the country. Instead, Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and eight other Democratic Senators voted with Senate Republicans and one independent to let the bill move forward.
I was and still am outraged. In the triple minority, there are only so many tools in our toolbelt. But this was absolutely one of them. And to give away our leverage without so much as a fight is inexcusable.
I have no interest in taking the focus off of Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and House and Senate Republicans who are causing irreparable harm to our country. But we also need to call a spade a spade. When people in our own party aren’t up for the fight, we need to say it – or no one will ever trust us to lead again.
The vast majority of elected Democrats are standing up and fighting back. But it’s going to take ALL of us to keep up the pressure, push back against this Republican-led chaos, and get our country back on track again.
As we make our way through this fight, we’re sure to face more challenges and even crises – in our country, here in Congress, and within the Democratic Party. I want you to know: I will always speak out and tell you the unvarnished truth about what’s going on – and what we can do about it.
I’m still all in. Are you? I’d love to hear your thoughts.
Thanks for letting me vent.
-Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zehvr1b14iomi059j3shj35eiu240pc58lcv7ato_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z89qamd5srhj10nvhp586nnegsf5at0gsdcd88s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl7tdqb2ms2eh8pa7nevl0mjse06t5s45ce3tqmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlfkoiqq47cptu3q86mkre2acjgkuq5dag7d0pc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuc9aeih2hhnskenl2ce9nou74m8efnjpg90095g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---

clean_body: I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. | | | | | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: | | | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach in his commentary, Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. name: DOGE ALERT [via House GOP]
subject: JOE ROGAN drops the hammer >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Friend – Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington

|
---
| | | Friend - Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington, and it's a must-see for every patriot!

Joe Rogan went off on the critics of Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), calling them out for their ridiculous claims that Elon is trying to enrich himself through his work with the government.
_"'Elon's going to steal everybody's money!'_ Give me a break," Rogan said, mocking the idea. "He has $400 billion. **I'm telling you he's not going to steal your money. I'm telling you that's not what he's doing.** "
Joe Rogan knows what's really going on here: **Elon is a genius entrepreneur who's taking on the corrupt bureaucrats in Washington, and they're terrified.**

---
| | [STAND UP FOR DOGE!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmuijjepeu0gm7010bis1fuu6f2aia9borigpf18_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs "STAND UP FOR DOGE!")
---

As Joe Rogan said, **"He's gonna find out what's going on, and that's good, that's good for everybody. That's how you should be looking at this, like, 'Wow we have a brilliant mind that is examining these really corrupt and goofy systems.'"**

Joe Rogan gets it -_Elon is on a mission to expose the waste and corruption in our government, and we need to support him._

**That 's why we're turning to you, Friend. **

**[Take our quick 2-minute survey to share your thoughts on DOGE and how we can work together to drain the Swamp in Washington, DC!>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi11g4aak30gu3blqns5mv9kshbob6sf2mqomemo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs "Take our quick 2-minute survey to share your thoughts on DOGE and how we can work together to drain the Swamp in Washington, DC!")**

As House Republicans work to support Musk's efforts and make our government more efficient and effective, we need to know what you think.

---
| | [Do you support DOGE, Friend?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeids3s0u6iulu0bhm8lltdimr3pcglpp39hskf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i64or4cth2bs "Do you support DOGE, Friend?")

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Fair College Admissions for Students Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Sign my petition in support of the Fair College Admissions for Students Act.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104129444/534376471/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGJiYzY2NS1kODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NJW-MSUQXZ5l5CpWDBH4uyyHEBu0jMtEgV4MpECgYU4=&emci=b87fc2ab-0c04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=30bbc665-d804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Earlier this month, I reintroduced bipartisan legislation to ban legacy admissions at colleges. Here's why this bill is good news for everyday Americans: Legacy preferences blatantly favor the wealthy and well-connected over other deserving students. That's unacceptable. **We need to end legacy admissions nationwide, and my**** _Fair College Admissions for Students Act_****would ban alumni and donor preferences at institutions participating in federal student aid programs to give all students a fair chance in the admissions process.** [**Will you sign my petition in support of the**** _Fair College Admissions for Students Act?_****We all benefit when we ensure fairness across the board in college admissions.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104129445/534376472/1325443852?contactdata=UJkVISbb7NFdiqCu/oI5UbgYN6UoTEE90Xkq3n8w/1Q4QY1+iDWG38J2WH5J0toZoYdb+2ntDIywy/32j0pIRqDx0ovDz1RInFQ1tL966cz7WZl1Q+rsL/OwJCgFPBs0aOaUh0PCwX4RYE6k+9Bgvw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGJiYzY2NS1kODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NJW-MSUQXZ5l5CpWDBH4uyyHEBu0jMtEgV4MpECgYU4=&emci=b87fc2ab-0c04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=30bbc665-d804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215) [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104129446/534376473/1325443852?contactdata=UJkVISbb7NFdiqCu/oI5UbgYN6UoTEE90Xkq3n8w/1Q4QY1+iDWG38J2WH5J0toZoYdb+2ntDIywy/32j0pIRqDx0ovDz1RInFQ1tL966cz7WZl1Q+rsL/OwJCgFPBs0aOaUh0PCwX4RYE6k+9Bgvw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGJiYzY2NS1kODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NJW-MSUQXZ5l5CpWDBH4uyyHEBu0jMtEgV4MpECgYU4=&emci=b87fc2ab-0c04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=30bbc665-d804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215) I introduced the _Fair College Admissions for Students Act_ following the 2023 U.S. Supreme Court decision that overturned race-conscious college admissions decisions. Legacy admissions overwhelmingly benefit affluent, mostly white students at a time when access to higher education for students of color is under attack. **Make no mistake: affirmative action is still alive and well for children of alumni and major donors, and your tax dollars should not be propping up a system that only benefits the rich and powerful.** I was the first in my blue-collar family to go to college, so I understand the struggles facing students whose families have never been through the complex admissions process and don't have the money for expensive test prep, tutors, summer enrichment programs, or advisors to help them craft the perfect essay. Education is supposed to be the great equalizer, but it never will be as long as admissions officers perpetuate a system to favor the children of those born into wealth and privilege instead of embracing a system that benefits students without those connections, too. [**I hope you'll join me in urging Congress to pass the**** _Fair College Admissions for Students Act_****and make college more accessible and equitable**** _._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104129447/534376474/1325443852?contactdata=UJkVISbb7NFdiqCu/oI5UbgYN6UoTEE90Xkq3n8w/1Q4QY1+iDWG38J2WH5J0toZoYdb+2ntDIywy/32j0pIRqDx0ovDz1RInFQ1tL966cz7WZl1Q+rsL/OwJCgFPBs0aOaUh0PCwX4RYE6k+9Bgvw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGJiYzY2NS1kODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NJW-MSUQXZ5l5CpWDBH4uyyHEBu0jMtEgV4MpECgYU4=&emci=b87fc2ab-0c04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=30bbc665-d804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215) Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: Sign my petition in support of the Fair College Admissions for Students Act. | | | | Earlier this month, I reintroduced bipartisan legislation to ban legacy admissions at colleges. Here's why this bill is good news for everyday Americans: Legacy preferences blatantly favor the wealthy and well-connected over other deserving students. That's unacceptable. We need to end legacy admissions nationwide, and my Fair College Admissions for Students Actwould ban alumni and donor preferences at institutions participating in federal student aid programs to give all students a fair chance in the admissions process. I introduced the Fair College Admissions for Students Act following the 2023 U.S. Supreme Court decision that overturned race-conscious college admissions decisions. Legacy admissions overwhelmingly benefit affluent, mostly white students at a time when access to higher education for students of color is under attack. Make no mistake: affirmative action is still alive and well for children of alumni and major donors, and your tax dollars should not be propping up a system that only benefits the rich and powerful. I was the first in my blue-collar family to go to college, so I understand the struggles facing students whose families have never been through the complex admissions process and don't have the money for expensive test prep, tutors, summer enrichment programs, or advisors to help them craft the perfect essay. Education is supposed to be the great equalizer, but it never will be as long as admissions officers perpetuate a system to favor the children of those born into wealth and privilege instead of embracing a system that benefits students without those connections, too. Onward! They then give themselves ... insane salaries, expense everything, buy jets and homes ... on the taxpayer's dime ... This is happening at scale." _ **This is a serious issue.** How can we allow Democrats and liberal government bureaucrats to send millions _and even billions of dollars_ to far-left non-profits with no oversight and no accountability? This is a corrupt system designed to steal taxpayer money to fund insane far-left projects and organizations - that are wasteful at best, and at their worst are designed to harm our country and give power to the hard-Left. **[WATCH THE DISCUSSION HERE>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)** **[DONATE TO HELP US](http://trk.tedcruz.-b31rsmbQ)[EXPOSE & STOP THIS NOW >>](http://trk.tedcruz.-gMwOj8YbQ)** ** **_Thank you so much for your vital support that is keeping us on offense!_

name: Royce White
subject: You’re getting scammed, and they all know that I know.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
What we can say for certain about this globalist establishment and their American UniParty running dogs is they’ve made people poorer. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=42574b06f62147faaf67cdadf9616786&_e=m7kMf8UaL6yL6c5YQvOUcNxUtS6bgqhuyXR82RxtXFfphfKqaducLiLOzYaXfN5s3jf1nQ4g8gnRfmN5dJMhFJSpYXsDeJScNH3oOLnxqa_Ao6FEjPkHSF4g1qCGSC3WOX_dTwMCsaR0bRSobk7CuKVLknQxsksD_3aEcl2tumoda7NyPzbBw05PKj6TrbCRfGaupJh9JLmKWbh7hNibksyoCrN8-CUo1btY6F6yjp5tpIsSifVk-0Ow50lEaQ7tFHklxLq9BiRbpblgEePznFbkuVE77K2WkcjJphkjFar5ZaSX8SsIdQnDCZ-NnSwhpp8v1qe7AkaE6R3lrVF28A%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

Making more people poor only makes it easier to buy more people off. It makes it easier for people to sell out at all levels. **What we can say for certain about this globalist establishment and their American UniParty running dogs is they’ve made people poorer.** They’re just fleecing us with better drugs and more free stuff.

Imagine a person paying you in t-shirts and candy. That’s what’s happening on a much larger scale. Now, 60% of people’s time is spent online. _You’re getting scammed, and they all know that I know._

Capitalism and Communism at the highest level of corruption are the same. When you socialize the financial risk of fiat currency and, on top of that, trade with places that hold none of your moral or ethical values... You have become a Godless state. We have become a Godless state.

_Show me a candidate that will talk to the American people like this, and I’ll show you somebody with no major donors, and they’ve tried to “cancel” over and over. I’m still here... I’m the best candidate for U.S. Senate, not just in Minnesota but maybe in the entire country. Because I have the balls to say what it really is and the virtue to not sell out._

[**Click here to join my team today. Together, we will return America and Minnesota to greatness. With your support, I will become the first Black Senator from the state of Minnesota.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=42574b06f62147faaf67cdadf9616786&_e=m7kMf8UaL6yL6c5YQvOUcNxUtS6bgqhuyXR82RxtXFfphfKqaducLiLOzYaXfN5s3jf1nQ4g8gnRfmN5dJMhFJSpYXsDeJScNH3oOLnxqa_Ao6FEjPkHSF4g1qCGSC3WOX_dTwMCsaR0bRSobk7CuKVLknQxsksD_3aEcl2tumoda7NyPzbBw05PKj6TrbCRRiNSbOuDw6wnEvknHlboB7mwxlpYSMMbDUKWt1N_MN-OBP6U2CR7VloPu9umaQmisEBZmLvWaSm0KcAfkWlFRCWkJOFZhoGtT7Go8e1aAUw5Qzc49Z_We2-jCqHN3UpfZTOaxcma8x8EE7TCUm09Xw%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

name: American Briefing
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqo3f9ia5iqeo0gugrv0bii5rbla5kcp0giegee0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i6cpb2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbefj4ksvud1gt151lnutrucukin0lsfmlmicu38_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i6cpb2c3h2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ftkabds3u0f0jdd5hktsq7vgug5ohnaolelbdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i6cpb2c3h2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3qlg0em6p84k1feq1n5kosuiethn2rt4koj0a9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i6cpb2c3h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0il2cp5vsjvgtfmccds12gto98tqdt7mr51hogg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i6cpb2c3h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

Pop Acta Media | American Briefing
---

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbe6716a-677f-4bf2-a232-707df3e73433/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Elon Musk and his unqualified DOGE employees are recklessly firing and rehiring federal employees with no regard for how it will affect our national security or how our government is run. It’s rash decisions like these that could lead to serious consequences: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta808b5de-2594-4991-9891-30586b4f6426/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Firing highly specialized workers who are in charge of our nuclear arsenal is about as careless as it can get. This is why we need leaders who will put America's interests first, not unelected billionaires with no understanding of how the government works. Mistakes like these cannot be made when the stakes are so high, and people’s livelihoods are at stake. Virginia is home to more than 140,000 federal employees, many of whom are highly specialized, nonpartisan career civil servants. They deserve better than this. While Virginia’s Republican leadership stands idly by and supports Trump, Musk, and DOGE’s reckless actions, I’m speaking out, and I need your support to help me flip the Governor’s office blue this November. [So, can I count on your support with a contribution split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d7c404e-0fac-424b-9ad8-318c2c4ea72e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T037478a5-3722-419d-abb2-9e9722d92519/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Care in Action
subject: URGENT: Worker leader Jeanette Vizguerra detained by ICE — act now
body:
This is urgent.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104130591/534379486/664783965?ms=031925_freeJeanettevizguerra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmYzZTkyNi1kYTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goBwJMcBnPZdEgwZprnTTgFQ9RgXD37zhCa0kYvcaTM=&emci=59d8c921-d604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ff3e926-da04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)
Peter — **Jeanette Vizguerra, a longtime member of our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance (NDWA), and a worker leader and activist, was just taken by ICE without warning.**
Jeanette has called Colorado home for over two decades and now could be torn away from her children, grandchildren and the community.
**This is urgent. Jeanette is in detention right now and facing deportation.****[**_Add your name to stand with Jeanette and call for her immediate release._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104130592/534379487/-928112486?ms=031925_freeJeanettevizguerra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmYzZTkyNi1kYTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goBwJMcBnPZdEgwZprnTTgFQ9RgXD37zhCa0kYvcaTM=&emci=59d8c921-d604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ff3e926-da04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)**
**_**********__[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104130593/534379488/-928112486?ms=031925_freeJeanettevizguerra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmYzZTkyNi1kYTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goBwJMcBnPZdEgwZprnTTgFQ9RgXD37zhCa0kYvcaTM=&emci=59d8c921-d604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ff3e926-da04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Jeanette is a longtime community leader and member of NDWA and the American Friends Service Committee, as well as a former SEIU member and co-founder of the Metro Denver Sanctuary Coalition. She has always wanted what all mothers want — safety for her family, herself, and her community.
**Jeanette was targeted by immigration authorities in 2017 and spent three months living in sanctuary in a Denver church to avoid being deported and separated from her family.**
Since then, she's spent years supporting hundreds of other mothers and workers with their own fights to remain, even being recognized as one of **Time Magazine's 100 most influential people in the world for her work.**
Jeanette deserves to be home with her family. We will not allow our families and communities to be torn apart. Our commitment to our loved ones and neighbors, to each other, is greater than fear. Add your name to urgently call for Jeanette's immediate release.
****__****
**_**********__[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104130594/534379489/-928112486?ms=031925_freeJeanettevizguerra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmYzZTkyNi1kYTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goBwJMcBnPZdEgwZprnTTgFQ9RgXD37zhCa0kYvcaTM=&emci=59d8c921-d604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ff3e926-da04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Let's be clear: The abduction and disappearing of people from our communities is an assault on our families, and our right to live safe, dignified lives.
We will not allow our communities to be torn apart, or our friends, neighbors and loved ones to be terrorized for speaking out. We will protect each other.
Thank you for standing with Jeanette,

clean_body: This is urgent. Peter — Jeanette Vizguerra, a longtime member of our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance (NDWA), and a worker leader and activist, was just taken by ICE without warning. Jeanette has called Colorado home for over two decades and now could be torn away from her children, grandchildren and the community. This is urgent. Jeanette is in detention right now and facing deportation. ************ Jeanette is a longtime community leader and member of NDWA and the American Friends Service Committee, as well as a former SEIU member and co-founder of the Metro Denver Sanctuary Coalition. She has always wanted what all mothers want — safety for her family, herself, and her community. Jeanette was targeted by immigration authorities in 2017 and spent three months living in sanctuary in a Denver church to avoid being deported and separated from her family. Since then, she's spent years supporting hundreds of other mothers and workers with their own fights to remain, even being recognized as one of Time Magazine's 100 most influential people in the world for her work. Jeanette deserves to be home with her family. We will not allow our families and communities to be torn apart. Our commitment to our loved ones and neighbors, to each other, is greater than fear. Add your name to urgently call for Jeanette's immediate release. ** ************** Let's be clear: The abduction and disappearing of people from our communities is an assault on our families, and our right to live safe, dignified lives. We will not allow our communities to be torn apart, or our friends, neighbors and loved ones to be terrorized for speaking out. We will protect each other. Thank you for standing with Jeanette, Care in Action

Jason vs. the NCAA: Here’s how the matchup ends...| | | Friend, Before our nation’s top collegiate basketball players take the court, did you know that Jason Miyares has been fighting for them in the court?

_**[Fighting — _and winning._](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/x_OCIW3LNZ59ZoRDU4adjnlRW41hVTnwRdpyeBmKmglWbrbbK63UYvJZ6ACcgrT27Xias7YYYmYBYTs811MMA-VBpRQUiVwIcQcU7DoINXozjrEF1FnM36i0QjL4Ywa3x2ZXe0yGNg42jWd9UJY_IdBO3dh5Gg-nJuWVHCUb9ViD2xdV0uHof_t0rt-RQ0pJ6tr1coMGVNM8Mu268Y-86Qgsy7uC92_m020lOOneYSh_d5T5nFEGEbE8AvtVZTAC4M6AJQQMLQwoiwMsfFXbgNIMumlODvAPmFHo8Yc7kurNYAoy22UabhjFE-q_vKE2UCCGZNAnJV10_p0wBWzFbWE9QzvgPCs6jmrP12O7Pmd2-uL6GYa9zTy4_8s/RrHBkkhTZMMTYOSl66Xm9YRadOqiprdc/7)**_
Let’s do an instant replay of last year: **The NCAA had taken advantage of talented young athletes for too long. **

Student athletes put in countless hours of hard work, sacrifice, and determination and generate millions of dollars for the NCAA, its members, and corporations within the college sports industry. It's only fair that these athletes should have the freedom and capability to negotiate and benefit from their talents.

**Jason had to do something — so he issued this bold challenge and took the cartel to court:**

**And this week, he annnounced their final agreement** _**[_**permanently barring the reinstatement of the unlawful NIL Recruiting Ban,**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/JXf0R1qwgXiX5AqvK5lgUwk9cu8cWIhAUmBQInvHUAFYoYhNyHejQeh9ci9FQFtqYKLkFoD17gdz6rfi5gMEOCOmNetuGkw_ME0KXa4PUPcpyaAIa4NPYkBWYRFmEwVlW-JzROVC6KnGpR4_vNfyP-tGPJkitdNxWDZCK5pySoVRvOTft0x_Oa6PtSC3Z7J9PJWVzlI7eEqhaAQr1uTvrrPn6oo4X0oM_3hyWmY4tcrKXnVUS9bYeKQxQHIh2Ty6MintoL2BL9Qp6S1QnHT5wDc00w8LsEIOUTMtC_DpfItxAiisw-Oqt-NyAh0RpGubBSbaYnMRSyFld_iZAjno_rDNp6x_7j9hRSd8QxA1Bltfdde3AQLZcZ26uoA/U4mAvHGZ2Vfbt7PTpyuYGN95snOO4oN1/7)**_ **securing student-athletes' right to control their future and benefit from their talent and hard work.**

name: Royce White
subject: Can we be reasonable here?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Only I can save Minnesota from the Radical Left | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c923f13ac434109bb9c674a52045ca3&_e=fdpKrK-dtvMGtBVdrDBCVasKBUtQEFUnYFc4lvPSG81BXaSRotFs73ZlCwZfoX90LoSV2XZkwYIpp1QK02BtFqEuUBht_2htoE6THafsZwrXrxT3vOheV4Qhi97ZDn1rNgB99iO965EKLxnDJXAzjW3k_SciDnaD1Vka6wXvl_Q2KZolbJJ8ZDdRsgO7ieEqPMozT_R4EoilEUFgNaX1o55bhtrBuPCQCkVbiHfMs1TAnwkKrbOFKLPZRVbmQzC3hxTfj1-Q-lFsMf45qBCUEOIP-uGHPf_HZw-I3yogzzjfXWGHPY4MtxmhES9vceV0n25SzDztFk3_xV7NbzoaQQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

My Democrat U.S. Senate opponent in 2026 for Tina Smith's open seat... Lt. Governor Peggy Flanagan! 1st, I have to get through all the RINO Republicans. Minnesota, for the love of God, can we be reasonable here? Help me help you! Let's just be better.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7c923f13ac434109bb9c674a52045ca3&_e=fdpKrK-dtvMGtBVdrDBCVasKBUtQEFUnYFc4lvPSG81BXaSRotFs73ZlCwZfoX90LoSV2XZkwYIpp1QK02BtFqEuUBht_2htoE6THafsZwrXrxT3vOheV4Qhi97ZDn1rNgB99iO965EKLxnDJXAzjW3k_SciDnaD1Vka6wXvl_Q2KZolbJJ8ZDdRsgO7ieEqVmTGV2H8u9DepwHZB-kzD2GIbTPJ2t8RwQOnA1DPDPpKnZkiHEnj1in1TejjP3uWunaEfBKA8Y8o7yfGXTQJTFsE8XAf0aexqC6eBmd0Z2wk-ApQB3X8OHpq_0xMe69ewaIaOFAEPfXLGwI-7dfV9A%3D%3D)
**IF Peggy gets through the rest of the Democrat hopefuls, this should be THE EASIEST SENATE RACE TO WIN EVER!**

_But it won’t be._

**In a world where running for election is fair and equal, all I would need to do is show the voters the picture above. No one in their right mind would vote for that.**

But we live in a world where the Radical Left essentially controls the elections in Minnesota. They have the Industrial Media Complex in their back pockets, along with the money from billionaire deep-state donors like George Soros.

_I’ve run twice in Minnesota, and I learned those lessons the hard way. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

name: The Kash Foundation, Jesse Binnall
subject: The Deep State is in full panic mode.
body:
Biden’s DOJ targeted conservatives, censored free speech, and let the real criminals walk free.

|
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgus15qgcoc17n8a8g9kkk0ap7j1vfqmtvvjv6v8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i62ob1cph2bs)
Friend,

The Deep State is in full panic mode.

They spent the last four years under Biden stacking the government with DEI radicals, weaponizing our institutions, and pushing their woke agenda on every American.

Biden’s DOJ targeted conservatives, censored free speech, and let the real criminals walk free.

_They thought they’d get away with it..._

**The Kash Foundation is making sure they don’t.**

We are exposing and holding these corrupt bureaucrats, radical activists, and Deep State operatives accountable. From targeting pro-life activists to abuse of J6ers, we’re shining a light on the corruption they hoped would stay hidden.

**Between 5,000 and 6,000 FBI special agents, meaning roughly 46% of all FBI special agents, were working on J6 cases.** This highlights how deeply politicized their operations have become and why we must expose the truth.
But we need your help to finish the job.

**Please use this link to help the Kash Foundation continue our mission of holding Deep State operatives and DEI radicals accountable for their actions: **[**https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/donate**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo868id2j682npu7f5eh2bngmf4e93p72ng75850_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i62ob1cph2bs)

Here’s the Kash Foundation’s step-by-step guide to how we remove remnants of the previous administration's radical agenda.

**Step 1:** Educate and advocate for the removal of all government gangsters from positions of power. I am talking about sweeping personnel changes.

**Step 2:** Advocate for the replacement of all the government gangsters with credible and talented personnel.

**Step 3:** Educate and advocate for Congress to use its Congressional oversight power to subpoena government gangsters who abuse their power.

**Step 4:** Hold those accountable who violated their Oath of Office and violated the law.

**Now is the time to strike! **

Every dollar you give helps us expose their crimes, take legal action, and ensure justice is served.
[DONATE](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z89ijoa4ou6vp8rehj1lalsdp1mnrvl4cptnlao8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i62ob1cph2bs)
Let’s keep the pressure on. If we don’t, no one else will.

Thank you,

Jesse Binnall
President
The Kash Foundation

My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---

---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: | | | My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | |

body:
They handed Trump everything.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104132940/534386066/1328794144?refcode=ea.f21749d5-db04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.f21749d5-db04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyMTc0OWQ1LWRiMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aglsAntj6fk9oAtro1J-GiVraN9kTSqWJAgM3YPOabg=&emci=4ffd3b24-2604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f21749d5-db04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

_A lot of people are angry_. Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer had one job: Stand up to Donald Trump and protect the American people. Instead, Schumer and a group of other Senate Democrats handed Republicans exactly what they wanted and passed a continuing resolution funding bill that threatens Medicare, Medicaid, food assistance, and climate funding. Is this really the best leadership the Democratic Party has to offer? While these senators caved, every single House Democrat but one refused to sign off on this dumpster fire of a bill — including JanePAC-endorsed progressive leaders Reps. Greg Casar, Jasmine Crockett, Maxwell Frost, and Summer Lee. They fought back, while Schumer and company waved the white flag. That raises a critical question: **Should Schumer continue leading Senate Democrats, or is it time for him to step down?** | **Before the end of the day, take a moment to tell us:[Should Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer step down? name: Dr. Maxine Dexter, M.D
subject: Should have been a “Hell no!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
The Senate passed the stopgap budget bill—and I have some thoughts.
I want to be clear: I never wanted a government shutdown. The people who would’ve been hurt by it are not billionaires like Elon Musk—they are hardworking families, seniors, and veterans who are doing their best to get by.
That said, the Republican-led stopgap spending bill was unacceptable, and I stand by my decision not to support it.
It should have been a “Hell no!” from our Democratic leaders in the Senate, too.
We need bold leaders to defend our democracy. I’m bringing that energy to the House, but I need your help. Will you pitch in to help me keep showing up and demanding better for Oregon’s working families? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250319_HellNo_act]
This bill will let Elon Musk go after programs like Medicare and the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), cutting billions in healthcare funding nationwide. And for what? To increase tax cuts for billionaires and mega-corporations?
On top of that, it will gut the benefits our veterans earned while raising the cost of everyday expenses.
As soon as he was sworn in, Trump ushered in a new era of chaos. His mandate is unchecked, and the Republicans are bowing down.
I will work with my Republican colleagues as soon as they’re ready to come to the table to work on serious legislation—bills that don’t steal from American taxpayers for the ultra-wealthy.
I won’t bow down to Trump, Elon Musk, or their broken agenda. Will you stand with me by chipping in to support my campaign now? Every dollar makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250319_HellNo_act]

clean_body: [] Peter, The Senate passed the stopgap budget bill—and I have some thoughts. I want to be clear: I never wanted a government shutdown. The people who would’ve been hurt by it are not billionaires like Elon Musk—they are hardworking families, seniors, and veterans who are doing their best to get by. That said, the Republican-led stopgap spending bill was unacceptable, and I stand by my decision not to support it. It should have been a “Hell no!” from our Democratic leaders in the Senate, too. name: DOGE ALERT [via House GOP]
subject: JOE ROGAN drops the hammer >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Friend – Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington

|
---
| | | Friend - Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington, and it's a must-see for every patriot!

Joe Rogan went off on the critics of Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), calling them out for their ridiculous claims that Elon is trying to enrich himself through his work with the government.
_"'Elon's going to steal everybody's money!'_ Give me a break," Rogan said, mocking the idea. "He has $400 billion. **I'm telling you he's not going to steal your money. I'm telling you that's not what he's doing.** "
Joe Rogan knows what's really going on here: **Elon is a genius entrepreneur who's taking on the corrupt bureaucrats in Washington, and they're terrified.**

---
| | [STAND UP FOR DOGE!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0puqe9fmdiolce8708341v6ioj17jo64u9p0fh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i66oj0cth2bs "STAND UP FOR DOGE!")
---

As Joe Rogan said, **"He's gonna find out what's going on, and that's good, that's good for everybody. That's how you should be looking at this, like, 'Wow we have a brilliant mind that is examining these really corrupt and goofy systems.'"**

Joe Rogan gets it -_Elon is on a mission to expose the waste and corruption in our government, and we need to support him._

**That 's why we're turning to you, Friend. **

**[Take our quick 2-minute survey to share your thoughts on DOGE and how we can work together to drain the Swamp in Washington, DC!>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7pe2f3r5ma47kp3n81kb0cs3o6nipgo3u1uh0pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i66oj0cth2bs "Take our quick 2-minute survey to share your thoughts on DOGE and how we can work together to drain the Swamp in Washington, DC!")**

As House Republicans work to support Musk's efforts and make our government more efficient and effective, we need to know what you think.

---

clean_body: This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it. | = Team, I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. This year, the stakes are just as high. Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court. We can't let them win. We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Susan Crawford and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Reproductive rights, funding for public education, voting rights, and so much more is on the line in this race. It’s already clear that this will not only be one of the closest races in the country, but it will also be the biggest race of 2025—and we know that every dollar makes a difference. If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent. = Thank you, Tammy Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

Friends, Think back to November 2024. _**Remember that sinking feeling when the results came in.**_ Trump and his billionaire allies, including Elon Musk, were about to seize control of the White House. It felt like a gut punch, a moment when so many of us feared for the future of our democracy. **But here is the truth. We do not have to wait until 2026 or 2028 to start fighting back. We have an opportunity to strike the first blow against Trump’s agenda in less than two weeks.** My CRUCIAL special election is the first real test of how much power Trump and his cronies actually have. They want to prove that their money can buy anything, including this congressional seat. They are pouring money into this race, flooding the airwaves with attack ads, and trying to drown out our voices. But we have something they do not. **We have people power.** We have a movement of grassroots supporters who are ready to fight back and show that we are not backing down. But we cannot do this alone.
