name: Suzan DelBene
subject: Taking back the House
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104136897/534399514/-2002425095?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlkN2JiNC1lMzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=234NHac62q8degS4SPuu99mhl-naw_uMOkrlqS5JVJQ=)
Peter,

It’s Rep. Suzan DelBene, the Chair of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC). I wanted to make sure you were among the first to know some exciting news. Rep. Whitesides' race has just been named to the DCCC’s Frontline list. Frontline is the Committee’s battle-tested program to provide Democratic Members of Congress from competitive seats the resources to execute effective reelection campaigns.

[**George represents a MUST WIN seat that we need to hold in order to flip the House in 2026. Can you chip in $10 right now to support his campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104136902/534399544/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.19.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlkN2JiNC1lMzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=234NHac62q8degS4SPuu99mhl-naw_uMOkrlqS5JVJQ=)

Since they took office, extreme Republicans have been a rubber stamp on Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s chaotic agenda – dismantling Federal programs while doing nothing to lower costs for American families. It has never been more important to win back the Majority in the House and restore checks and balances to our government.

_We’re confident George will help us do just that._

It is critical that we come together to help Rep. Whitesides get re-elected. With your support, we can take back the House and get things done for the American people.

[**Will you join this grassroots team and chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104136904/534399547/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.19.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlkN2JiNC1lMzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=234NHac62q8degS4SPuu99mhl-naw_uMOkrlqS5JVJQ=)

I know that together, we can flip the House, retake the Majority, and get to work for families in California and across the country.

Thank you,
Suzan DelBene

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: This revival mission needs you!
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z73p27s8ts8d64ojhac75fttuig8fvkf1oinvhd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cdh2bs)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbgdmqbegbqaouqicqb4i714r170jd0v1u80t1t0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cdh2bs)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztsoe0tbr0re3ash0o3amuj9oca8runp3r48huu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cdh2bs)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z607ejqbhtvmkan80mvrlbmhrnus48amlg4bi7f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cdh2bs)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z53ojqj3q0g1bmp0uj6c49v0g8pdb2bsrqt572po_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9d5hok8igbshbgeh9ocncd18totp288bjeju4s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cdh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. **[**Please help us point families to the empty tomb this Easter with your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zud256n680sg2tglg8qa6o69a1berunhe972cfag_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cdh2bs)** As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you!
---

It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you! | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024. Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats.

subject: We’re not letting extremism win.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104137673/534401316/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5OTM0OS1lNDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3D0B9XM8QIb8-pxWdi0voz4YgP5iX5EKIe0ylnyTF0=)

Peter, it’s Ritchie.

Trump and Republicans like to label the Democratic Party as “extremists” and “radicals” — and to that I say:

→ Fighting for affordable housing is _not_ extreme.

→ Protecting Social Security and Medicare is _not_ extreme.

→ Advocating for LGBTQ+ rights is _not_ extreme.

→ Standing up for reproductive rights is _not_ extreme.

**Republicans going after these things,_however,_ _IS_ extreme — and it’s out-of-touch with what _most_ Americans want.**

[I’m fighting day and night for our common-sense, progressive values in Congress, and I refuse to let the extremists win. But I need your help: Will you join me in this grassroots movement by rushing $3 or $7 today? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104137674/534401317/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250319_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5OTM0OS1lNDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3D0B9XM8QIb8-pxWdi0voz4YgP5iX5EKIe0ylnyTF0=) | **[$15,000 GOAL: RUSH $3 TO HELP RITCHIE FIGHT BACK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104137675/534401318/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250319_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5OTM0OS1lNDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3D0B9XM8QIb8-pxWdi0voz4YgP5iX5EKIe0ylnyTF0=)**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The genocide and ethnic cleansing has resumed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This week, after repeatedly violating the ceasefire on multiple occasions
already, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu broke the ceasefire
deal and resumed dropping bombs on Gaza – with Donald Trump’s blessing and
coordination.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250319-arms-embargo/?source=em20250319-36516&akid=36516%2E1203867%2EbnD5Eu ]The Washington Post: Netanyahu says ‘just the beginning’ after Israeli
strikes kill hundreds in Gaza

As far as we know, over 400 Palestinians — including entire families,
babies, and over 100 children — have been killed and many more injured.
The carpet bombing of Gaza came in the night after thousands of
Palestinians returned to their destroyed homes just weeks ago.

What makes this even worse is Israel has blocked ALL food, medicine,
electricity, and other aid from entering Gaza for weeks, so there are few
medical supplies left to treat the injured and little to help them rebuild
their communities.

The Israeli regime has always made its genocidal plans clear. They never
wanted a permanent ceasefire: they've been starving and killing
Palestinians, and now resumed their all-out genocide and ethnic cleansing.

Donald Trump is more than happy to start another endless war — Democrats
should be united against it. Once again, Justice Democrats’ members in
Congress like Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee are leading the call against
these war crimes, but we need to demand every Democrat stand against these
crimes against humanity.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250319-arms-embargo/?source=em20250319-36516&akid=36516%2E1203867%2EbnD5Eu ]Add your name to our petition urging EVERY Democrat in Congress to
support an arms embargo against the Israeli government now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250319-arms-embargo/?source=em20250319-36516&akid=36516%2E1203867%2EbnD5Eu ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250319-36516-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36516_1203867_bnD5Eu&akid=36516%2E1203867%2EbnD5Eu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36516%2E1203867%2EbnD5Eu

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: DOGE ALERT [via House GOP]
subject: JOE ROGAN drops the hammer >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Friend – Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington

|
---
| | | Friend - Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington, and it's a must-see for every patriot!

Joe Rogan went off on the critics of Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), calling them out for their ridiculous claims that Elon is trying to enrich himself through his work with the government.
_"'Elon's going to steal everybody's money!'_ Give me a break," Rogan said, mocking the idea. "He has $400 billion. **I'm telling you he's not going to steal your money. I'm telling you that's not what he's doing.** "
Joe Rogan knows what's really going on here: **Elon is a genius entrepreneur who's taking on the corrupt bureaucrats in Washington, and they're terrified.**

---
| | [STAND UP FOR DOGE!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkrg7sotudi5ev7ll9b3pel2h71tp5mt0fbsv7u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cth2bs "STAND UP FOR DOGE!")
---

As Joe Rogan said, **"He's gonna find out what's going on, and that's good, that's good for everybody. That's how you should be looking at this, like, 'Wow we have a brilliant mind that is examining these really corrupt and goofy systems.'"**

Joe Rogan gets it -_Elon is on a mission to expose the waste and corruption in our government, and we need to support him._

**That 's why we're turning to you, Friend. **

**[Take our quick 2-minute survey to share your thoughts on DOGE and how we can work together to drain the Swamp in Washington, DC!>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfu68hbs1ee6cmmu1fci63l3agicsi0a1forr4eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i61o34cth2bs "Take our quick 2-minute survey to share your thoughts on DOGE and how we can work together to drain the Swamp in Washington, DC!")**

As House Republicans work to support Musk's efforts and make our government more efficient and effective, we need to know what you think.

clean_body: Friend – Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington | | | | Friend - Podcast legend Joe Rogan just delivered a brutal takedown of the Swamp in Washington, and it's a must-see for every patriot! Joe Rogan went off on the critics of Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), calling them out for their ridiculous claims that Elon is trying to enrich himself through his work with the government. "'Elon's going to steal everybody's money!' Give me a break," Rogan said, mocking the idea. "He has $400 billion. I'm telling you he's not going to steal your money. I'm telling you that's not what he's doing. " Joe Rogan knows what's really going on here: Elon is a genius entrepreneur who's taking on the corrupt bureaucrats in Washington, and they're terrified. | | "STAND UP FOR DOGE!" As Joe Rogan said, "He's gonna find out what's going on, and that's good, that's good for everybody. That's how you should be looking at this, like, 'Wow we have a brilliant mind that is examining these really corrupt and goofy systems.'" Joe Rogan gets it -Elon is on a mission to expose the waste and corruption in our government, and we need to support him. That 's why we're turning to you, Friend. "Take our quick 2-minute survey to share your thoughts on DOGE and how we can work together to drain the Swamp in Washington, DC!" name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: re: the WI Supreme Court race
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104138300/534402863/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTA0OTE5YS1lNTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9K0I3tpEW672hcAHhEQ-FfGQL-LVb3az46AAeUwwcU=&emci=c6b6d674-e504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7504919a-e504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
Peter, We are exactly two weeks before the first race in Wisconsin that we _have_ to win this cycle. Susan Crawford is who we need on Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, and with so much money from out-of-state elites pouring in, she needs our help to get out the vote for these final critical days. [**With early voting underway, I hope you’ll join me in supporting Susan Crawford for Wisconsin Supreme Court. If you can, chip in $3 or whatever you can to keep Wisconsin courts in the hands of Wisconsinites.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104138302/534402866/-1087258774?refcode=em-3.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTA0OTE5YS1lNTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9K0I3tpEW672hcAHhEQ-FfGQL-LVb3az46AAeUwwcU=) Reproductive rights, workers rights, public services and so much more are on the line in this race. And it’s attracting attention from every corner of the country. Even Derrick Van Orden’s favorite billionaire Elon Musk has given more than $12 million to Susan’s opponent – which tells you all you need to know about how little they’ll work for Wisconsinites. Even while launching our own campaign here, my team and I have been knocking on doors, making phone calls, and canvassing every inch of the district to ensure folks know there’s someone just like _us_ , who’ll actually fight for _us_ , on the ballot. And it’s attracting attention from every corner of the country. Even Derrick Van Orden’s favorite billionaire Elon Musk has given more than $12 million to Susan’s opponent – which tells you all you need to know about how little they’ll work for Wisconsinites. We’re reaching out to you directly to make sure you renew your Official 2025 DLCC Membership. | | | | | ---|--- Hi, We’ve got some exciting news to share with you: Our DLCC Membership team just surpassed 9,000 members! We are so grateful for the support from folks around the country – grassroots Democrats from every state in the country have stepped up to join the team, including dozens of members in your area. But we can’t slow down just yet. State Dems are facing critical special elections over the next few months in places like South Carolina and Pennsylvania. To give state Dems the resources they need to take on their GOP opponents, we’ve set a goal to hit 10,000 active members before March 31st , and we’re reaching out to you directly today to make sure you renew your Official 2025 DLCC Membership → Here’s the bottom line: With a slew of must-win special elections on the horizon, we need to build our strongest possible membership team. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC The information provided above is associated with the following email address: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. | |
---
| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c29c04d28185447f9d2058140387dce5&_e=V_F_8r3QHDfGQ2BOE9l9OsE1Dkyl6kI8YbdGE_F4OVAeHV7CaDJNf-kuXGyUcXFiuUrIZoeQFvVwLTbCOWsT1QFJw-fFz4C1v92GS1-egJ57Q6si4n8Dx7bLssWk44UattMS8qRXI6Zj_3vI9whXMOqLUDnLzDAG1zH23F0VQwQOcZbO7txl1sKmifQ3gG3DR5hLfbLqgLrj-mr2Z-uovqKc4j3-VZ6M7i5AZjGweozp8M-JUXdVvt15kufPH6pOUgqmW1NYpEVDgRBfpgQ8TCQYH4CVSl1-wjELXxHs4VH5C5fQ-jGkT0Sg2tDmqOi2aVGcntiKLpk8vew98gKwhrT9zIA6Z9e6wPb9S1jAX7UZ8ZeIZWyQYFi-zq0MZ5lPwSDPld0aQb-T5iJ534qTOA%3D%3D)
---

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c29c04d28185447f9d2058140387dce5&_e=V_F_8r3QHDfGQ2BOE9l9OsE1Dkyl6kI8YbdGE_F4OVAeHV7CaDJNf-kuXGyUcXFiuUrIZoeQFvVwLTbCOWsT1QFJw-fFz4C1v92GS1-egJ57Q6si4n8Dx7bLssWk44UattMS8qRXI6Zj_3vI9whXMOqLUDnLzDAG1zH23F0VQwQOcZbO7txl1sKmifQ3gG3DR5hLfbLqgLrj-mr2Z-uovqKc4j3-VZ6M7i5AZjGweozp8M-JUXdVvt15kufPH6pOZZr32D_j0mlIehtJQS_zyhiU4eX5LmY9d7p66y-3V_4VIRYbbcUCr1bYXFTLPw_4zwDyY2FdiG6B4c3uv_8zekV38fZI5fOZ6Pv3XaoIhWbJhm09PRMy4PB3KRkB1Y6eswy6vGBsaDZD_abN6AKYIQ%3D%3D "Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c29c04d28185447f9d2058140387dce5&_e=V_F_8r3QHDfGQ2BOE9l9OsE1Dkyl6kI8YbdGE_F4OVAeHV7CaDJNf-kuXGyUcXFiuUrIZoeQFvVwLTbCOWsT1QFJw-fFz4C1v92GS1-egJ57Q6si4n8Dx7bLssWk44UattMS8qRXI6Zj_3vI9whXMOqLUDnLzDAG1zH23F0VQwQOcZbO7txl1sKmifQ3gG3DR5hLfbLqgLrj-mr2Z-uovqKc4j3-VZ6M7i5AZjGweozp8M-JUXdVvt15kufPH6pO4qqy3q8sf0wDRUlkW_fLItx3F5BJOWetPiMKrP7Et5shMn5GmB_kNnc44I7CTiAPO5Je0bOAGd9HjDaSo2AeTk8HE2OfIcCNnpB6mG0Zb7BVYhY8GLW723fIjhMisjbabFuk6ZZCML1HxQS8EJnpZw%3D%3D "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_
---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c29c04d28185447f9d2058140387dce5&_e=V_F_8r3QHDfGQ2BOE9l9OsE1Dkyl6kI8YbdGE_F4OVAeHV7CaDJNf-kuXGyUcXFiuUrIZoeQFvVwLTbCOWsT1QFJw-fFz4C1v92GS1-egJ57Q6si4n8Dx7bLssWk44UattMS8qRXI6Zj_3vI9whXMOqLUDnLzDAG1zH23F0VQwQOcZbO7txl1sKmifQ3gG3DR5hLfbLqgLrj-mr2Z-uovqKc4j3-VZ6M7i5AZjGweozp8M-JUXdVvt15kufPH6pOLCpQJ7tKePXZtoPjVngqM90PLpWcTluTr1daknz50noA43VlXB4HcaxT3ImHIZoMVrpA2mwDdRG5P-w-s4TbJHHbwzX1NEUAgig8NSSHaHqhKL26UMxiCh9mI0qY3Hcm628b_bMGHrCsbxURMIzSeQ%3D%3D)

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

name: Josh Hawley
subject: My Promise.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7df448de4ce149cdabffee716d589f47&_e=m0xG8qe7ZRB8uhtTsLsh02MmRPuEXfnO4uBbYUuPYsa7gUxuz81OaJASNE6VX6pBg4FHS0-NIJmOw3Ga6hCBphIxp0AbPsBl9U0jbK8tljmcYgyI7vZAjCXqwSn5WlBrAxzSIJufSCwRRW4-1I4iMyRzZgUPUWS6PgdQGgloWpJ7_5uD5mOwWFwpj280yXCC_9TO8O9M2VvknbN1dQmFv-FcDGzDFxrTw7EdY-A2rVNFdwqR8RIE9miyaq8PpEsTdZNubq9skww993bJamNkDd8ouzbxanIC2D05s330hcv6NC8m-LupZiQ4qKixsptJ3TdpXTPkVjBlixDQYUdxdDzJumNP1pqYKk62gipeE0Bws75xeYgsx3OraP8H_ett)
---
Peter,
---
It’s Josh Hawley, Missouri’s Senator. You may have seen the viral clips of me bringing the hammer down on Joe Biden’s administration in committee hearings or defending Donald Trump’s agenda night after night. And while I am a consummate conservative and one of Trump’s most steadfast allies, my top priority remains being a husband, father, and unapologetic Christian. Since I was a boy, my faith in Christ has been my compass. I was raised to know that we have NOTHING without the grace of God, and as a Senator, I lean on scripture to guide me in every area of my life. That may be why the radical Left attacks me at every turn. Will you stand with me so I can continue to fight for you? I will always protect our shared values. The decisions I make in Washington aren’t just for my family—they’re for yours too. Because our future matters. And we’ve seen how much damage has been done under the Biden administration—how, in just four years, America can descend into despair. **_So here’s my promise to you:_** I promise to fight for a prosperous America.I promise to fight for a strong America.I promise to fight for a safe America.I promise to fight for a free America. I'm fighting for this generation, the next generation and the generations to come. I love my children too much to let the Left impose their warped agenda on their minds, and I know you do too. Join me today to DEFEND the future of America.
---
[**HELP FUND THE FIGHT**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7df448de4ce149cdabffee716d589f47&_e=m0xG8qe7ZRB8uhtTsLsh02MmRPuEXfnO4uBbYUuPYsa7gUxuz81OaJASNE6VX6pBg4FHS0-NIJmOw3Ga6hCBphIxp0AbPsBl9U0jbK8tljmcYgyI7vZAjCXqwSn5WlBrAxzSIJufSCwRRW4-1I4iMyRzZgUPUWS6PgdQGgloWpJ7_5uD5mOwWFwpj280yXCC_9TO8O9M2VvknbN1dQmFv-FcDGzDFxrTw7EdY-A2rVMfnyo3FfAOE4djcemYayvLGs44upf30frBJj9ohXWPZ9sLaJ6kl_fSHD58_jJHfPsV0ju2cwuVlNMYdzdXawYqTIKEVi4YJqLVrc7bfbDi_SQixbhxGH7XGYN9_s32ChtEfI_wtRbAadsz-adazzka)
---
Thank you for standing with us. Together, we can stop the Left from robbing our children of a prosperous, strong, safe, and free future.
---
---
Josh Hawley U.S. Senator, Missouri
---
---
| |
---

---
| | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: WOW. What. A. Speech!

body:
I just flew into the district earlier this week to hear from you and meet with folks who are getting hit by these big cuts.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104139334/534405690/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2IyZjNjNy1lNzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPchwpxXCeOHVcKLP2GpvNOxZoygpnphCCchhpBCjRg=&emci=3cad0397-3504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8cb2f3c7-e704-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)

| | **I am in the district this week to hear from you and meet with the organizations, community leaders, and individuals who are getting hit by the Republican Ripoff's big cuts.** These cuts are impacting access to healthy and affordable food for people as well as access to health care through Medicaid for your friends and neighbors in the community. I am very frustrated and very upset with what the Senate did last week. By voting to pass the temporary spending bill, they have given the President and his unelected, unvetted billionaire, Elon Musk a blank check to continue to sow chaos and confusion. **We need to make sure we fight them hard these upcoming months.** **Tomorrow I will be hosting a telephone town hall at 4:00 PM PT, you can join by phone with our dial-in number (855) 962-0954 or watch the live stream at**[**larsen.house.gov/live**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104139335/534405692/870660513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2IyZjNjNy1lNzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPchwpxXCeOHVcKLP2GpvNOxZoygpnphCCchhpBCjRg=&emci=3cad0397-3504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8cb2f3c7-e704-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)**.** [Join Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104139336/534405693/870660513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2IyZjNjNy1lNzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPchwpxXCeOHVcKLP2GpvNOxZoygpnphCCchhpBCjRg=&emci=3cad0397-3504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8cb2f3c7-e704-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239) More soon, _Rick_ |

By voting to pass the temporary spending bill, they have given the President and his unelected, unvetted billionaire, Elon Musk a blank check to continue to sow chaos and confusion. We need to make sure we fight them hard these upcoming months. Tomorrow I will be hosting a telephone town hall at 4:00 PM PT, you can join by phone with our dial-in number (855) 962-0954 or watch the live stream at. More soon, Rick | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . subject: The Deep State is in full panic mode.
body:
Biden’s DOJ targeted conservatives, censored free speech, and let the real criminals walk free.

Friend,

The Deep State is in full panic mode.

They spent the last four years under Biden stacking the government with DEI radicals, weaponizing our institutions, and pushing their woke agenda on every American.

Biden’s DOJ targeted conservatives, censored free speech, and let the real criminals walk free.

_They thought they’d get away with it..._

**The Kash Foundation is making sure they don’t.**

We are exposing and holding these corrupt bureaucrats, radical activists, and Deep State operatives accountable. From targeting pro-life activists to abuse of J6ers, we’re shining a light on the corruption they hoped would stay hidden.

**Between 5,000 and 6,000 FBI special agents, meaning roughly 46% of all FBI special agents, were working on J6 cases.** This highlights how deeply politicized their operations have become and why we must expose the truth.
But we need your help to finish the job.

**Please use this link to help the Kash Foundation continue our mission of holding Deep State operatives and DEI radicals accountable for their actions: **[**https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/donate**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvepb173anchnhdimsd4s5fnjcdsi33u6usj8uqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i69o72c3h2bs)

Here’s the Kash Foundation’s step-by-step guide to how we remove remnants of the previous administration's radical agenda.

**Step 1:** Educate and advocate for the removal of all government gangsters from positions of power. I am talking about sweeping personnel changes.

**Step 2:** Advocate for the replacement of all the government gangsters with credible and talented personnel.

**Step 3:** Educate and advocate for Congress to use its Congressional oversight power to subpoena government gangsters who abuse their power.

**Step 4:** Hold those accountable who violated their Oath of Office and violated the law.

**Now is the time to strike! **

Every dollar you give helps us expose their crimes, take legal action, and ensure justice is served.
[DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8iihcs2jda8cu4rs6bbsn6q4th0h1288ltued5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5i69o72c3h2bs)
Let’s keep the pressure on. If we don’t, no one else will.

Thank you,

Jesse Binnall
President
The Kash Foundation

Folks, if you’re disappointed in Congressional Democrats’ response to the MAGA takeover, you’re not alone.
Since the election, Democratic leadership has been promising to change gears and put up a real fight against Trump’s agenda.
**Is the fight in the room with us??**
While essential federal programs are attacked and our rights are being threatened, the Democratic Party has hesitated, compromised instead of fighting for us, and overall failed to meet the urgency of this moment.
And before anyone says it, _we know that Republicans control Congress and the White House_. **That doesn’t excuse Democrats’ lack of action.**
Need an example? This past Friday, ten Democratic senators — _**including Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer**_ — voted with Republicans to pass a spending bill that grants Trump’s regime even more flexibility to carry out its extreme agenda.
We’re sick of empty promises and performative anger. Democratic leadership needs to step up and fight for us, or our rights and democracy are lost.
[We’re partnering with our friends at Left Click to tell Democratic leadership to step up. It's more important than ever that we have real opposition to Trump's agenda fighting for us in Congress. Will you sign our open letter and demand action?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104140068/534407989/-1273538033?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjBlMGRkZi1lOTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b22z54RZv95IlsydRICJ-_6J8svUXJRY_nRrhZtp8wo=&emci=f14346b3-d004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cf0e0ddf-e904-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | Folks, if you’re disappointed in Congressional Democrats’ response to the MAGA takeover, you’re not alone. Since the election, Democratic leadership has been promising to change gears and put up a real fight against Trump’s agenda. Is the fight in the room with us?? While essential federal programs are attacked and our rights are being threatened, the Democratic Party has hesitated, compromised instead of fighting for us, and overall failed to meet the urgency of this moment. And before anyone says it, we know that Republicans control Congress and the White House. That doesn’t excuse Democrats’ lack of action. Need an example? This past Friday, ten Democratic senators — including Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer — voted with Republicans to pass a spending bill that grants Trump’s regime even more flexibility to carry out its extreme agenda. We’re sick of empty promises and performative anger. Democratic leadership needs to step up and fight for us, or our rights and democracy are lost. | Let’s do this ✊ NextGen America | | = |

Every day, it becomes even more obvious what Trump and Musk are doing:
taking a hacksaw to our government, slashing Medicare, Medicaid, and
Social Security — all so they can enrich themselves and give billionaires
another round of massive tax breaks.

Outrage is building as millions across the country are hit hard by Trump’s
shock and awe campaign. So NOW is the moment Democrats have to get out of
their Capitol Hill bubble, connect with communities impacted by the chaos,
and FIGHT BACK.

Bernie and AOC are doing just that, going directly to red states and swing
districts where Republican members of Congress are facing massive pressure
not to let Trump slash Medicaid, free school meals and more. And it’s
working — they are attracting thousands who are hungry for a way to reject
Trump’s war on the working class and stop the Oligarchy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1036&akid=7879%2E5885482%2E_Ij-xM ][IMG]

But as we saw last week, FAR too many Democrats are failing to meet this
moment. The Democratic base is getting INCREDIBLY frustrated, which is why
AOC’s name keeps getting floated as a possible primary challenger against
Schumer — she’s leading by example and showing the rest of Congress what
fighting back actually looks like.

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is organizing in key districts and in
DC to stand with AOC and Bernie and STOP Trump and Musk’s oligarchy. Can
you make a monthly donation today to help us win these fights in the
months ahead?

As Our Revolution’s Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told Vanity

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: Did you know? The global trend on abortion rights may surprise you

[**What do you know about the world's abortion laws?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104140719/534409738/1526329166?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter&sourceid=1150551&utm_campaign=25emcgl-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGM0NjBiMi1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nj2fiqQdA2XWdpMzAdwKjaJNmoWlxCa-Sy4arTX0ZyM=&emci=86ac31ac-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9dc460b2-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) In a time when reproductive rights in the U.S. face unprecedented challenges, **there's a powerful global story that needs telling.**

**The surprising truth:** While the U.S. has experienced a significant rollback, the international trend on abortion rights is moving decisively in the opposite direction. [**Test your knowledge and get informed about the global movement for reproductive rights by taking our quiz.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104140720/534409739/1526329166?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter&sourceid=1150551&utm_campaign=25emcgl-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGM0NjBiMi1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nj2fiqQdA2XWdpMzAdwKjaJNmoWlxCa-Sy4arTX0ZyM=&emci=86ac31ac-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9dc460b2-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

For decades, the Center for Reproductive Rights has been at the forefront of expanding reproductive freedom worldwide—and we've witnessed remarkable progress. These global victories aren't just inspiring; they're proof that together, we can overcome the current wave of anti-rights extremism in the United States. | **How many countries have expanded abortion access in the past 30 years?** | [**TAKE THE QUIZ**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104140721/534409740/1526329166?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter&sourceid=1150551&utm_campaign=25emcgl-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGM0NjBiMi1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nj2fiqQdA2XWdpMzAdwKjaJNmoWlxCa-Sy4arTX0ZyM=&emci=86ac31ac-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9dc460b2-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "TAKE THE QUIZ")

Did you know? Authoritarian regimes have historically restricted reproductive freedoms as a control tactic—a concerning legacy that the Trump administration is carrying on today.

By pulling out of the World Health Organization, reinstating the Global Gag Rule, and resurrecting the anti-abortion, anti-LGBTQ "Geneva Consensus Declaration," President Trump is threatening the health and human rights of millions of people around the world.

[**Now more than ever, staying informed about global reproductive rights progress offers both perspective and hope, reminding us that change is possible and that victories around the world can inspire the fight ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104140722/534409741/1526329166?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter&sourceid=1150551&utm_campaign=25emcgl-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGM0NjBiMi1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nj2fiqQdA2XWdpMzAdwKjaJNmoWlxCa-Sy4arTX0ZyM=&emci=86ac31ac-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9dc460b2-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) **Until every person's reproductive autonomy is secured around the world, we fight on!**

Onward,

Center for Reproductive Rights

P.S. After you [**take our quiz**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104140723/534409742/1526329166?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter&sourceid=1150551&utm_campaign=25emcgl-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGM0NjBiMi1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nj2fiqQdA2XWdpMzAdwKjaJNmoWlxCa-Sy4arTX0ZyM=&emci=86ac31ac-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9dc460b2-eb04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237), email us back to let us know: what surprised you? What gave you hope? name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Billionaires first, farmers last
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104141003/534410911/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC120_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzhiOGRmOC1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CAWNbWkeQIyZI8PwsBuY5nRJFd0Lihie3Sy_Tucedr0=)
---
Folks — Extreme House Republicans are leaving Illinois farmers out to dry. They’ve sat by, loudly supporting Donald Trump’s sweeping spending cuts — some seeking out special exemptions for their own districts behind closed doors — all while crucial USDA grants remain frozen in place. This leaves American farmers without the _hundreds of millions of dollars_ in critical support they count on to maintain their operations. Now, tens of thousands of farms are on the hook for a multitude of unforeseen costs. Before the funding freeze, there was already an urgent need for a stronger and more resilient farm safety net. But by falling in line with the Trump administration, extreme Republicans have directly contradicted the needs of their constituents, their districts, and family farmers. **Folks, they’ve put billionaires first and farmers last, but Trump’s chaos in Washington won’t distract me from fighting back.** Illinois farmers grow the food on our tables and enrich our economies. As a member of the House Committee on Agriculture, I’m fighting to ensure they have a seat at the table. I can’t stay in this fight without this team’s support, though. **[So friend, can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can so I can continue my work for IL-13 and our farmers? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104141005/534410915/-1450535376?amount=&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC120_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzhiOGRmOC1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CAWNbWkeQIyZI8PwsBuY5nRJFd0Lihie3Sy_Tucedr0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [PITCH IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104141007/534410944/-1450535376?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC120_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzhiOGRmOC1lYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CAWNbWkeQIyZI8PwsBuY5nRJFd0Lihie3Sy_Tucedr0=)

| | |
**Musk is a threat to global security.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPnEhFfn8sqyJpcUgntcD-CWnSEf1Ar1k49RaL0uAE7mgZMuWAtqw2UedoyRJZ80fAHEKR8XRBLHp7EyxA0vqAiY8sAT9iI-B7KSqmeQOfqpIcQwTCM0wW5OE-87MJPunhP9E-AfbAs2s3evQkeS2e8yrrfpZI99UNB2AuXmX3dRIfbHPBbNbH_9Uw_45-KZ158HnfE3hcsp7BBq1E5gXcXixU3JzOFQZpUz9fL2kzmcPKIgfYJosNjwSl4eXhtH4uEYB3wGcTFb5VXZzFE0i_rk/4ex/tLqMOPsCTTiXDccsQgVt3A/h0/h001.7pUe77DiNGKtWlF1hBNuNK7vECpCv-fThmY4u9pD1u8)

* * *
Musk just taunted Ukraine with his power to shut off "my Starlink system" to the embattled country suggesting HE could allow Ukraine’s front line to collapse.
When called out by the Foreign Minister of Poland, who is paying for it, Musk tweeted “be quiet, little man.”
Our global security is being held for ransom by a ketamine fueled, unelected mad billionaire.
This is not just a tech mogul overstepping his bounds; it’s a direct threat to one of our key allies, orchestrated by those who wish to see America isolated and weakened on the world stage.
**We urgently need your support to help Local Democracy Project stop the biggest security threat to the world, the dangerous and reckless Elon Musk.**
_****Local Democracy Project resists the Musk-Trump administration by electing city and county officials who will FIGHT BACK._

clean_body: | | | Musk is a threat to global security. Musk just taunted Ukraine with his power to shut off "my Starlink system" to the embattled country suggesting HE could allow Ukraine’s front line to collapse. When called out by the Foreign Minister of Poland, who is paying for it, Musk tweeted “be quiet, little man.” Our global security is being held for ransom by a ketamine fueled, unelected mad billionaire. This is not just a tech mogul overstepping his bounds; it’s a direct threat to one of our key allies, orchestrated by those who wish to see America isolated and weakened on the world stage. We urgently need your support to help Local Democracy Project stop the biggest security threat to the world, the dangerous and reckless Elon Musk. Local Democracy Project resists the Musk-Trump administration by electing city and county officials who will FIGHT BACK. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This move is a chilling reminder of MAGA’s continued betrayal of our allies and its willingness to undermine global security for its own twisted agenda. Musk’s actions are not just irresponsible—they’re a direct assault on the principles of cooperation and support that have kept the world safe. name: Battleground Georgia
subject: Jon Ossoff must be stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
he voted to shut down the government

Friend,

**[Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff voted to shut down the government because he hates President Trump.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm0tljqk67ng402e777qjvid567dn7mid7gnobfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5h68or4cjh2bs)**

_He voted against funding border security.

He voted against pay raises for our military and firefighters.

He voted against ensuring America's vets have the care they deserve._

**[Jon Ossoff is an embarrassment. He's also the __most vulnerable Democrat in America__ in 2026.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg422giopmubf7hcgpj7carbhsjuk4sh0nm1unf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5h68or4cjh2bs)**

But if we're going to defeat him next year, we must hold him accountable this year.

_**[That's why Senate Republicans have launched a new ad exposing Jon Ossoff for the deranged liberal he is -- will you help us ensure it reaches Georgia voters?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp0j512hn3unr343coo1hu5vtbbpiaphis89tle8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5h68or4cjh2bs)**_

Thanks in advance.

I was advised against writing this piece because it would be "too controversial."
But if there's one thing I've learned in my decades as a human rights lawyer, its that upholding justice isn't a popularity contest, its a principle obligation. That's why at the end of this piece I'm going to ask you to take action to uphold justice, and sign a petition calling on Los Angeles District Attorney Hochman to recommend new sentencing and possibly a new trial for the Menendez brothers. But don't just take my word for it--let me make the case and convince you that this is what justice calls us to do. **Let 's Address this.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/595d0cee-8fbe-467b-9bb4-c7bbc52ad847?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Menendez Brothers
The Menendez Brothers' murder trial captivated the nation in the 1990s. Two young men accused--and later convicted--of killing their parents in cold blood. The case seemed open and shut, the kind that the media sensationalized, reducing real lives and real trauma to tabloid headlines.
But my job as a human rights lawyer is not to play favorites or tip the scales. My job is to be fiercely committed to justice and due process of law--especially in the most difficult cases. Because if we cannot uphold justice in the hardest cases, then justice means nothing. Worse, we forfeit the right to demand it in any case.
This is not about claiming the Menendez brothers are innocent. It is about recognizing that the justice system is required to follow its own rules, and in this case, it demonstrably broke its own rules. That should be intolerable to all of us.
Here's what went wrong, and what demands correction.
## A Legal System Built to Ignore Male Abuse Survivors
For decades, the Menendez brothers have maintained that they killed their parents after years of horrific abuse at the hands of their father, Jose Menendez. But in the 1990s, society was unwilling to acknowledge that men--especially young boys--could be victims of sexual abuse. That ignorance infected their trials from the very beginning. For example:
* The first prosecutor in the case told the jury that men "_can 't be raped_" because they "_don 't have the right equipment_." That was the mentality the Menendez brothers were up against. That was the justice system at the time--one that denied male victims any recognition or protection. **Today we know the painful fact that approximately one in six boys are sexually abused before the age of 16**.1 The jury in the first trial was denied this information.
* The second trial wasn't fair either. In that trial, the DA's office made sure the jury never saw critical evidence--medical records, family testimonies, and even an essay Lyle wrote as a child about a father killing his son's abuser. Erik Menendez wrote a letter to his cousin months before the murders, detailing the ongoing abuse and his mother's failure to intervene. The jury never saw that letter. The jury had no idea of the harm the boys lived through for decades, nor how long their pleas for help went ignored, nor the impact of trauma that the abuse they suffered had on them. **We now know that the PTSD caused by childhood sexual abuse can fundamentally impair a person 's ability to function normally, and lead to destructive behaviors as a result.**2 Again, the jury in the second trial was made aware of none of these realities the Menendez brothers suffered through.
* Both juries were also kept in the dark about the family's "hallway rule" in the Menendez home. This rule was one that forbade anyone from walking down the hall when Jose Menendez (the abusive father) had one of the boys in a room. The unspoken implication was that Jose was abusing one of the boys, and to leave him alone. Jose would inevitably return after some time to report that [the boy he was abusing] was not feeling well any longer, and would spend the rest of the night in his room, alone.
* Likewise, we now have new corroborating evidence of the abusive acts of Jose Menendez. Former Menudo band member Roy Rosello has come forward with his own testimony--sharing that he, too, was abused by Jose Menendez. The story that Erik and Lyle told about their father is no longer just their story. For those who insist on asking, "why don't abuse survivors speak up?" Much of it has to do with the fact that they are rarely believed. **According to the Rape, Abuse, and Incest National Network, only 3 out of 100 rapists will ever actually go to prison. 3 The other 97 will walk free.**

The Menendez brothers spoke up right away, and they were not believed. Roy Rosello now speaks up decades later, and he risks facing ridicule and questions about why he waited so long? It seems abuse survivors are caught in a catch-22, where they are not believed if they speak up right away, or mocked for waiting too long if they wait to speak up. By demanding a new sentencing and fair hearing, we have a chance to break that stigma and actually believe abuse survivors because it is the right and just thing to do.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TUjkTK-R5k3sOpNFmAZEbWGUX7pb7-MjbAEnWNVeIvM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158684226)
## The Fight for a Fair Hearing
Under California law, the Menendez case should be reconsidered under modern standards for abuse survivors. That's not an opinion--it's the law. But we are short on time. The resentencing hearing is set for March 20-21. DA Hochman's recommendation carries significant weight, but there's already cause for concern.
When Hochman first took office, he made it a priority to convince the public that the Menendez brothers received a fair trial in the 1990s--that society back then understood male abuse survivors just as well as we do today. That is a demonstrable lie. Now, Hochman is implying that Erik deserves a reduced sentence but not Lyle--despite the fact that these two young men endured the same abuse, trauma, and fear together.
What's more, dozens of members of the Menendez family are also calling on Hochman to recommend a new sentence--one that accounts for the abuse the brothers suffered, the denial of critical evidence in their trial, and the additional testimony of abuse survivors who also suffered at the hands of Jose Menendez.
And the brothers themselves? They have spent decades in prison becoming what corrections officers themselves admit are model citizens. They have acknowledged what they did was wrong. They have made amends with family members. They have dedicated themselves to education, rehabilitation, and mentoring other inmates. In every measurable way, they have done the hard work to become better people.
Despite all of this, Erik and Lyle remain behind bars, serving life sentences without parole--a punishment that never took into account the full truth of their story.
## Justice Requires Us to Act
I hope I've made my case and convinced you to sign the petition below, seeking Justice for Erik and Lyle. The bottom line is this. The Menendez case is not just about two brothers. It is about whether our justice system truly applies to everyone--or if it only applies when it's convenient?
We cannot trust the system to do the right thing unless we demand it. Due process means nothing if we allow courts to ignore evidence, silence victims, and operate under outdated, prejudiced assumptions.
The Menendez brothers deserve a fair hearing. Not because of sympathy. Not because of public opinion. Not even because the Menendez family has forgiven them.
But because justice demands it.
Join the fight, add your name to the petition--not because you believe the Menendez brothers are innocent--but because you believe in a justice system that applies equally to every person regardless of their innocence or guilt.
[Petition for Erik and Lyle](https://substack.com/redirect/badf8938-7dec-4fd2-ad38-512885220a62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fdc5732532374c4b8c02f5b545a5000a&_e=KAu5Q2XAefSVzoI3CDS5CGnoKqeeoXsUptKKWrNTe2_njZaGfie25j8wwZToIeRma020L-g40Rw_bG42XLIs8k2gqmBK0HP7RW8FQtAjz9Cs9XOUwJMCJtA1xm92LYQt6F4YPQSPaKXawt--2sQ3-Il_KihnO_nd0anO0cwoSi6fvguViFiLuKcI55jR2MlxYTWSI49gmkGQsIq2VA4j9kWs7C5mvNIAJdg1D6sG_T6_KZscRvV-h6oZg74vMp0JeXMscEvcG84ZbjELjCeASUPCkXZQDd7y09sE7PYl2udDy1DDdhBZhfsM9UsHct7pFtCH412khwcD9c0S1-Vb3a0DUt0_LKr55HaSsaX98V-INgu4Cm804KhOpeKZ7GUcyaBcGI1nq0S2O4jxSYi8o8VQBWlIXq2_hqaGQfXKfTE%3D "Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fdc5732532374c4b8c02f5b545a5000a&_e=KAu5Q2XAefSVzoI3CDS5CGnoKqeeoXsUptKKWrNTe2_njZaGfie25j8wwZToIeRma020L-g40Rw_bG42XLIs8k2gqmBK0HP7RW8FQtAjz9Cs9XOUwJMCJtA1xm92LYQt6F4YPQSPaKXawt--2sQ3-Il_KihnO_nd0anO0cwoSi6fvguViFiLuKcI55jR2MlxYTWSI49gmkGQsIq2VA4j9kWs7C5mvNIAJdg1D6sG_T6_KZscRvV-h6oZg74vMp0JK7ox8VQ7W71jwOlIEXdSZOVa-xq27OFaE4ShxHVQgMtp-I7FPdfzlliuPSMtxF-Pp86qdlKiJzYzuB6Cqtsg_KBTST0Eg2OwndF6jiXc5ehpNgjvn6r9eI27MSMQvkiYHsOjmgRUJJOdQJ_OyrU3vYbo4xHiYSacavs_4D5aYw4%3D "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_

subject: We must make gains in New York and that starts with the special election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The strength of our majority rests on THIS

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7gu9cik8merlgmdqtg8mql8qgesq7uikghn8nn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5h64pb6c1h2bs "Hochul")
---

Friend,

New York has fallen into the hands of woke politicians like Kathy Hochul.

She's taking orders from Hakeem Jefferies to SLOW-WALK the special election to replace MAGA champion Elise Stefanik.

They know this would be a resounding win for our majority and give us an extra MAGA vote in Congress, so they're playing politics.

This isn't fair to the great people of New York's 21st district!

**We need your urgent help to ensure House Republicans can fight back against these dirty Democrat tricks!**

---
| | [ELECT A REPUBLICAN IN NEW YORK](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z75ithic1gd55a51u7n0e1pujpf12v2lpm9l87co_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5h64pb6c1h2bs "ELECT A REPUBLICAN IN NEW YORK")
---

This isn't the first time they've gone around the rules.

They partnered with the mainstream media to cover up the TRUTH about aging Joe Biden.

Now, they're trying to delay elections to gain an advantage.

We can't allow this to happen, but we need your help and money to spread this message.

Can you pitch in to help us EXPOSE the dirty work of House Democrats and Kathy Hochul?

---
| | [PITCH IN NOW](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztqro2v8l5s4s8sth7vbu8k9n847tnmbcbo54cf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c5h64pb6c1h2bs "PITCH IN NOW")

Thank you,

Team NRCC

name: =?UTF-8?Q?This_is_Steve_Scalise_=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.
| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d772dd08f1d64b1b935718f57a859d84&_e=SarkPK6Vcz02yFYGZG79CjXQFUZJ7c2snNmc2OoZTuh7ODJfCjjrcNjoYWoSoMOWZeHqTbE5adOWWyqdM8axoacyk2XOftCBhMzvZjGmiX7jbTG5ioFTjbA-XhkkSER2P9P3R3ud-AaJvIngANV24ghD6-nmYBAE-u6HvtdIKIQHxNBX24adzbnISnTIQj61vge9Pj7VwLd8cAlH03D_6MTa7DxJQb9RZa2oFYwDzjFvCrt9PFzcJnjwxop5AHDtYStsY--1p3eenP9DSBJnttzWsbP-Glnbt56N0IWSAIRbP-yPNn027UMO_K90HkWdlktUTBaz-MY6xx09UdBZwsrd-YeQb65o03zPv-MfLyZcabcukVyFvvNGU1dZNEuUgozwPNlOnkag5WJuFhKH7g%3D%3D "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d772dd08f1d64b1b935718f57a859d84&_e=SarkPK6Vcz02yFYGZG79CjXQFUZJ7c2snNmc2OoZTuh7ODJfCjjrcNjoYWoSoMOWZeHqTbE5adOWWyqdM8axoacyk2XOftCBhMzvZjGmiX7jbTG5ioFTjbA-XhkkSER2P9P3R3ud-AaJvIngANV24ghD6-nmYBAE-u6HvtdIKIQHxNBX24adzbnISnTIQj61vge9Pj7VwLd8cAlH03D_6MTa7DxJQb9RZa2oFYwDzjFvCrt9PFzcJnjwxop5AHDtM-N8gmFIkiQQoekXXM58X3cakbUhLYbJOSsPx0hDgmJkRYUANZNzyS0QWPGNQ7Zry_2jGKiIEiRw00S8RYLNuIFZvPEiw3J5NdR91q2WBKTqGv0S4eQxu1WmJtgHAZX48IbXoNA8Ga16nbYV7PD2rw%3D%3D "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d772dd08f1d64b1b935718f57a859d84&_e=SarkPK6Vcz02yFYGZG79CjXQFUZJ7c2snNmc2OoZTuh7ODJfCjjrcNjoYWoSoMOWZeHqTbE5adOWWyqdM8axoacyk2XOftCBhMzvZjGmiX7jbTG5ioFTjbA-XhkkSER2P9P3R3ud-AaJvIngANV24ghD6-nmYBAE-u6HvtdIKIQHxNBX24adzbnISnTIQj61vge9Pj7VwLd8cAlH03D_6MTa7DxJQb9RZa2oFYwDzjFvCrt9PFzcJnjwxop5AHDtG6mnH5UFPgEfjmtlcn_vcJKCF9n9-b3Veu-0UfdYwK0Tx7zdTax3v5OISmyzl-diYqNqnY_uSbpf0jhqDeXuzD0RJxbmoHati4KhYb4h7md8jSHpgtEvacjg6iAtYESN6ZJrPbKtt1yiFvL1O_gxBg%3D%3D "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d772dd08f1d64b1b935718f57a859d84&_e=SarkPK6Vcz02yFYGZG79CjXQFUZJ7c2snNmc2OoZTuh7ODJfCjjrcNjoYWoSoMOWZeHqTbE5adOWWyqdM8axoacyk2XOftCBhMzvZjGmiX7jbTG5ioFTjbA-XhkkSER2P9P3R3ud-AaJvIngANV24ghD6-nmYBAE-u6HvtdIKIQHxNBX24adzbnISnTIQj61vge9Pj7VwLd8cAlH03D_6MTa7DxJQb9RZa2oFYwDzjFvCrt9PFzcJnjwxop5AHDtyjchvh1qdzs_EXaQKYQF-bKd2XjqouZXCuSaVLtZlCj2IaKOpS-6wkhrK6Ona7MJOLq3PVP0luM48oQ76w3z3W3GRTFJbXXXscnYkEgds4xid4ufEFeDIZSVYegF8SQ-IDhzDC8yWfKv3l5FlS0NdQ%3D%3D "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |

| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d772dd08f1d64b1b935718f57a859d84&_e=SarkPK6Vcz02yFYGZG79CjXQFUZJ7c2snNmc2OoZTujU9PqHXIJkRG_LEv-br6hHoqG7oWhlKj0L3eNt2gRGVf4zmJ-rDFFd7IKtbM-TZSlASRBybyFAjAtr52LU6GZJuXi7sbbYsPscKLkEKW560jRNHlxvQWNgehzgd4RPy31l7G1AcNVrH3sskLfucBM4JtCm798yPUg3QcocOhlpHcBfKmum_Acoh4pwrptqYIHOsirWlGGMdGtMsVqnlS4paBi-L3-TjasCYzSrwza6Yp029ARsL1xJ0GAZ_COy5etDVTtZd6Yxxb6r1w3VTGL_Y-FVdoizCdTi1WhfskNxluA6PfAF1uyWIVpKAl_3sT3JmaZg_GKSh33NvokjdTtcaBxOvZqLyZgRbvKL_UYuOCy1Be8dRBTxbzmEY5Ut2JY%3D "First 100 Day Survey")
---

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate. | | | | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support." Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting." If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?" It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. | | "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE" Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. Team, For years, Susan Collins has tried to sell herself as a moderate voice for Maine. But when it really mattered, she stood with Donald Trump — _at our expense._

Mainers deserve a senator who fights for working families — not one who cowers to Donald Trump’s agenda when it matters most. **Flipping Susan Collins’ seat in 2026 is the first step to taking back the Senate. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Keeping the Torch of Liberty Burning—Trump’s Reclaim Game Won’t Diminish Our Values
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Dear Friends, this is Gay Valimont, FL-1 candidate, and 12 days are what separates us from defending our values, if you would help.
Today, I was reminded of a powerful symbol of freedom—the Statue of Liberty. Discussions about the statue’s return to France push a story that underscores our enduring bond with the values of liberty, equality, and international friendship. Although the details may seem symbolic, they carry a profound message: our nation was built on these ideals, and we must never let them fade.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/706A426C682F62712B43375A4B702B70634D3175364967764A6632556938384B6E713149367244447136636259636A343278746A39453750517A457777427146/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-19%20at%202.05.39%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Unfortunately, we’re also witnessing a disturbing twist in the “reclaim game.” While true leaders stand for the principles of justice and unity, figures like Donald Trump have tried to use the language of “reclaiming” American greatness for their own narrow, divisive purposes. His attempts to rewrite history and hijack our cherished symbols—using them to fuel partisan agendas—do nothing but diminish the true meaning of freedom. His shenanigans have already pinned our allies against us: “purchasing Greenland,” “renaming the Gulf,” and “making Canada a state” have all made us the pinnacle of division, not unity. Trump’s version of reclaiming power is all about exclusion and fear, not the inclusive, hopeful vision embodied by Lady Liberty.
For me, the Statue of Liberty is more than just a monument— it’s a call to action. It represents the promise of a better life, the courage to fight for justice, and the commitment to protect every person’s right to freedom. As your candidate for Florida’s 1st District, I am determined to ensure that our government upholds these core principles both at home and abroad.
As we face these challenges, let’s draw strength from the enduring symbolism of the Statue of Liberty. Let it remind us that the true meaning of our nation is not about reclaiming power for a select few, but about lifting up every person.
Your contribution, no matter the size, will help ensure that we continue to stand up for these timeless values. All we need is $10 and your vote to ensure liberty and justice truly stays for all. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/706A426C682F62712B43375A4B702B70634D3175364967764A6632556938384B6E713149367244447136636259636A343278746A39453750517A457777427146/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-06%20at%203.22.54%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Thank you for believing in the promise of our nation and for joining me in the fight for a brighter, more inclusive future.
With deep gratitude,
Gay Valimont
Democratic Candidate for Congress
Florida’s 1st District
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4390MfsWIkGbMKjh9qfKIA2?unsubscribedata=tID1B4tXZQ3ZE3S3Q7fQd3AVsO3JpO66A0iIvovuh2RW5G%2FZtkKpybzw%2BiMBa9SZmJelIou9g3z5tdgg3Qc%2FIYxh1bi8NC5KfCCP3b%2FhLPTcYo5T2MDn%2BnUxsNA2%2Ff4V7q2iwbVQGKIvGN0Nz9KdUO%2B2Wa4pokMV8PHbvGOSUFdG9qUhYnOMOkiyN6Fr9NoYfVYGgrXrR%2FebAI1i7ax1fsQkb%2FUwXTdTAxF%2BsRQPVQP0ogsGtN9hdRS7fXQHy5ay9FdNOrctbb2sB4lAaaesYl5GUeumsmo%2F4kZXzNoKlFSltZWzlzbqHriHdTRADB73HDW78HGvDFNQ0Ek49PjJJDzjo5t00yQNzZsbFHJx2SQaYUPSR22gyjoa31N7fFv3%2BoSFJBfrb1bdErN1phMvKU%2FHDMcLOVMDNp79HxaXWIQZlQiljWMR%2B2y602r2XbUh .
