name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: ActBlue
body:
Over the last few months, Republicans have escalated their attacks on an unlikely target: ActBlue, the platform many Democrats use to receive campaign contributions.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=474%2E2563979%2EKzch3c)

Over the last few months, Republicans have escalated their attacks on an unlikely target: ActBlue, the platform Kamala Harris and many Democrats use to receive campaign contributions.
The far-right has threatened bogus investigations into ActBlue and over the weekend Elon Musk fired off a bunch of tweets about a massive scandal.
But why are they going after ActBlue and why now?
Republicans are attacking ActBlue because small-dollar donations from people like you are a major advantage for Democratic campaigns up-and-down the ballot. They also provide a huge amount of support organizing to stop Trump's agenda.
And they know that if they can harm or degrade YOUR ability to make those donations, it becomes easier for billionaires like Elon Musk to buy elections and harder for us to stop Trump's agenda.
The Democratic National Committee is leading the fight to elect Democrats and stop Trump. And they can't do it without donations from people like you who make their work possible.
Republicans know that -- and that's why they attack. Hopefully it shows you, today, just how important your donations are. So we're asking:
[**Can you make a donation to the Democratic National Committee to fight back against Republicans trying to disempower small-dollar donors like you? The DNC is looking for lots and lots of donations as Republicans try to pass Trump's agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250310-1A&refcode2=474_2563979_Kzch3c&akid=474%2E2563979%2EKzch3c)

Republicans are attacking ActBlue because small-dollar donations from people like you are a major advantage for Democratic campaigns up-and-down the ballot. They also provide a huge amount of support organizing to stop Trump's agenda. And they know that if they can harm or degrade YOUR ability to make those donations, it becomes easier for billionaires like Elon Musk to buy elections and harder for us to stop Trump's agenda. The Democratic National Committee is leading the fight to elect Democrats and stop Trump. And they can't do it without donations from people like you who make their work possible. Republicans know that -- and that's why they attack. Hopefully it shows you, today, just how important your donations are. So we're asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | When we act together, we are more powerful than any unelected billionaire. But don't take our word for it, watch the way Republicans try and stop you. Team Kamala Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A big Democratic win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends,
This November, Virginians have the chance to send a powerful message.
We’re fighting to flip all three statewide offices blue — electing a Democratic governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general — and to hold our slim majority in the House of Delegates.
The stakes couldn’t be higher.
Republican leadership in Virginia has mirrored the worst of the national GOP in recent years — attacks on reproductive rights, voting rights, public education, and more. We cannot afford to let them continue down this path.
Winning in Virginia is about more than just our state — it’s also about setting the tone for the 2026 midterms and beyond.
A big Democratic win here will show the country that voters are rejecting MAGA extremism and Trump-Musk lawlessness and standing up for democracy. It will energize our movement heading into the next critical election cycle, which we urgently need.
I’m committed to making sure we have the resources to win, but I need your help. If you can, chip in to support our efforts and help elect strong Democrats in Virginia. Every dollar we raise now helps us organize, mobilize, and get voters to the polls. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=500]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Virginia’s motto is “ Sic semper tyrannis ” — directly translated as “thus always to tyrants,” and a centuries-old rallying cry against tyranny and abuse of power.
Let’s send a loud and clear message in that spirit!
Thank you,
Tim Kaine

subject: We knew this was coming…
body:

#
Here we go, folks... Kristen isn’t even three months into her term, and the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is already attacking her.👇 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104144784/534423685/-1606559029?refcode=em-3.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzZlZjQ1ZC1mNDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nNhT3_ayle7s47Tz7AB7nNmO8L1WRPDq1Fn5KtK7lag=)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
There is an election for the Wisconsin Supreme Court taking place on April 1.
**Elon Musk has poured millions of dollars into this race to try to stop a pro-democracy majority.**
The question is: is there enough people power to overcome his effort to buy another important election? It’s critical that Judge Susan Crawford win this race, both for Wisconsin and for what it will portend about the rest of the country in future races.
Amy and I have donated to Susan Crawford’s campaign and we hope that you will join us in making sure she has the resources to fight and win. Keep the faith, keep up the fight, let’s stay in this together.
Beto

name: Michael Nolan & Mitchell Barnett
subject: Meet our friend Seth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
We are proud to support our friend Seth Koslow in his campaign for Nassau County Executive. | | Dear Friends,

We are proud to support our friend Seth Koslow in his campaign for Nassau County Executive. We’ve known Seth for years – he’s a respected attorney, a devoted father, a Little League coach, and one of the most hardworking, decent people we know. Frankly, he’s the last person we ever expected to run for office, but that’s exactly why we believe in him. He’s not a politician – he’s a regular guy who’s stepping up because Nassau needs real leadership.

That’s why we’re hosting an event for Seth at the Davenport Press in Mineola on Wednesday, March 26th, from 5:30 - 7:30 PM. We hope you’ll join us to meet Seth, hear about his vision for Nassau, and support his campaign. [Click here to RSVP and contribute.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104145103/534424407/-664805075?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTcxOWU3ODQtZjQwNC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2bzA-324-wO9BD6_HsmB_Or_eShVtcdxqxIW91CZCls=&emci=4fb79af4-e304-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a719e784-f404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17551891)

Seth knows Nassau deserves better. Taxes are too high, wasteful spending is out of control, and homeowners are stuck with an unfair property tax system. Seth will put an end to political favoritism by making sure county contracts go to the best bidder – not to insiders cutting backroom deals. He’ll fix the broken tax assessment system so homeowners get a fair shake. And he’ll focus on what really matters: safer neighborhoods, better roads, and making Nassau more affordable for everyone. It’s time for a leader who puts people first – not the same old politics.

But Seth can’t do this alone. As a regular guy – not a career politician – he needs our support to introduce himself to voters across Nassau County. [Please click here to RSVP and join us on March 26th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104145115/534424420/-664805075?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTcxOWU3ODQtZjQwNC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2bzA-324-wO9BD6_HsmB_Or_eShVtcdxqxIW91CZCls=&emci=4fb79af4-e304-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a719e784-f404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17551891) If you can’t attend, we hope you’ll consider making a contribution to help Seth take his message to the people who need to hear it most.

Let’s do this,

Michael Nolan & Mitchell Barnett

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9nh/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
My situation is in your hands, friend. I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look – this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia’s highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I’ve been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I’m running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we’ve been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger’s campaign coffers and there wasn’t a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don’t make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I’m making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine;_please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
| | [ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9nh/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn’t ask you to stay in this fight if I didn’t think it was worth it. And friend, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. **[I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9nh/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would’ve made it easier, but I’ve found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9np/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.
---
[ **LEND A HAND**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9np/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

clean_body: | | | My situation is in your hands, friend. I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look – this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia’s highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I’ve been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I’m running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we’ve been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger’s campaign coffers and there wasn’t a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don’t make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I’m making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine;please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn’t ask you to stay in this fight if I didn’t think it was worth it. And friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, and I’ve held many titles in my life. Each one hasn’t been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I’ve tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would’ve made it easier, but I’ve found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Team Conroy
subject: The king and a jester...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONROY FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/conroy4congress/one-week-left-1572?e=a7b299e420)
---
[](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=e1621bd619&e=a7b299e420)
| | | | | Peter,

Monday we celebrated the Patron Saint of Ireland, whose chief contribution to the Europe was spreading literacy—the light of learning—during the Dark Age. Unfortunately, on Tuesday during town hall meetings, our elected congressional representative showed he is on board with creating an American Dark Age.

As prices rise, DOGE attacks public education, and import taxes threaten our farmers’ livelihoods, Representative Michael Baumgartner just voted to surrender MORE power to unelected plutocrat Elon Musk.

The White House is busy crowning the U.S. president a king for jamming up a city’s traffic . . .
---
| . . . Baumgartner is hanging out with MAGA extremists, staging photo ops, and voting to destroy the government services that matter to us.

He’s bragged about working with Ohio representative and insurgent enabler “Gym” Jordon to help media moguls profit from student athletes’ names, images, and likenesses—without paying the students. Grammatically-challenged Baumgartner talks fashion while DOGE makes it harder for working class folks to access education; for farmers to cope with climate change; and for any of us to survive disease.
---
| And in case you were wondering if he has any real priorities like addressing inflation, education, healthcare, or veterans’ services — think again. _He’s focused on naming a chicken painting_.
---
| When Baumgartner’s not focused on old grudges, he’s with Speaker Johnson, part of the party-line vote to gut Social Security, Medicare, and food aid to grant a massive tax break to the greedy ultra-rich, and surrender congressional power to the billionaire who is as eager to crash our government as he crashed Twitter and Tesla.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| And then there’s this: Instead of standing firm against Putin’s invasion of Ukraine, Baumgartner called on President Zelensky to resign—the leader who is fighting for his country’s very survival. **Thankfully, Carmela set the record straight.**
---
| We didn’t ask for this. Michael Baumgartner lies when he says he’s working for us. His votes show he’s working for King Con and his unelected oligarch henchman to corrupt the government for the greedy few.
We deserve better. Join Carmela now by sharing this newsletter with friends; following us on [**Facebook**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=832808f166&e=a7b299e420) , [**Instagram**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=5772c07ece&e=a7b299e420) , and [**Twitter**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=b9f6c2a5f9&e=a7b299e420) ; and [**donating now**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=49cea7bcee&e=a7b299e420) to build a campaign to win a true representative of the hard-working many of Eastern Washington.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, Monday we celebrated the Patron Saint of Ireland, whose chief contribution to the Europe was spreading literacy—the light of learning—during the Dark Age. Unfortunately, on Tuesday during town hall meetings, our elected congressional representative showed he is on board with creating an American Dark Age. As prices rise, DOGE attacks public education, and import taxes threaten our farmers’ livelihoods, Representative Michael Baumgartner just voted to surrender MORE power to unelected plutocrat Elon Musk. The White House is busy crowning the U.S. president a king for jamming up a city’s traffic . . . | . . . Baumgartner is hanging out with MAGA extremists, staging photo ops, and voting to destroy the government services that matter to us. He’s bragged about working with Ohio representative and insurgent enabler “Gym” Jordon to help media moguls profit from student athletes’ names, images, and likenesses—without paying the students. Grammatically-challenged Baumgartner talks fashion while DOGE makes it harder for working class folks to access education; for farmers to cope with climate change; and for any of us to survive disease. | And in case you were wondering if he has any real priorities like addressing inflation, education, healthcare, or veterans’ services — think again. He’s focused on naming a chicken painting. | When Baumgartner’s not focused on old grudges, he’s with Speaker Johnson, part of the party-line vote to gut Social Security, Medicare, and food aid to grant a massive tax break to the greedy ultra-rich, and surrender congressional power to the billionaire who is as eager to crash our government as he crashed Twitter and Tesla. | | | | | | | | | | | And then there’s this: Instead of standing firm against Putin’s invasion of Ukraine, Baumgartner called on President Zelensky to resign—the leader who is fighting for his country’s very survival. Thankfully, Carmela set the record straight. | We didn’t ask for this. Michael Baumgartner lies when he says he’s working for us. His votes show he’s working for King Con and his unelected oligarch henchman to corrupt the government for the greedy few. We deserve better. Join Carmela now by sharing this newsletter with friends; following us on , , and ; and to build a campaign to win a true representative of the hard-working many of Eastern Washington. – Team Conroy | | | | | | PAID FOR BY CONROY FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | Conroy for Congress PO Box 906 Spokane, WA 99201 United States. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: the first statewide election since 2024

body:
| This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.TvalM-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=8371%2E5257348%2EWatw4d)
Derek,
I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. **This year, the stakes are just as high.**
**Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court.**
_We can't let them win_. We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got.
[**Can you split a donation between Susan Crawford’s campaign and Adam Schiff? Your support is critical if we want Susan to win this race.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.TvalM-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8371%2E5257348%2EWatw4d)

Reproductive rights, funding for public education, voting rights, and so much more is on the line in this race. It’s already clear that this will not only be one of the closest races in the country, but it will also be the biggest race of 2025—and we know that every dollar makes a difference.
If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent.
[**I hope you’ll join me in supporting Susan Crawford for Wisconsin Supreme Court by splitting a donation with Adam Schiff. If you can, chip in $5, $10, or whatever you’re able to help keep our progressive majority.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.TvalM-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=8371%2E5257348%2EWatw4d)

name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, U.S. Army (Ret.)
subject: We’re going on offense. Watch our newest ad:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
VoteVets is running a six figure advertising campaign on social media, streaming services, and billboards in the districts of five Republican members of Congress, each of them Veterans.
#
Peter:
We’ve been on defense a lot lately, but we have not surrendered the initiative.
For good reason, to be sure. There is much to defend, and we will always step up to protect Veterans and our members.
With that said, victory is going to depend on us taking the fight to the enemy. We are going to need to put them on defense, occupy ground on their turf, and exploit their weaknesses.
There is no organization in the country that does this better than VoteVets. And that is exactly what we are doing now.
VoteVets is running a six figure advertising campaign on social media, streaming services, and billboards in the districts of five Republican members of Congress, each of them Veterans. Elon Musk is attacking their fellow Veterans, firing thousands, ripping their health care away, ruining their lives — and these Republicans have done nothing to stop him.
It’s time that they hear from us.
[**Watch our newest ad, Stop Elon Musk's War On Veterans, and then chip in to help us keep these ads running.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar25-elon-vets-ad.Fc-jqN&refcode=em250319-1-90&t=1&akid=34264%2E3013755%2El9gJs7)
| [WATCH THE AD](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar25-elon-vets-ad.Fc-jqN&refcode=em250319-1-90&t=2&akid=34264%2E3013755%2El9gJs7)
---
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar25-elon-vets-ad.Fc-jqN&refcode=em250319-1-90&t=3&akid=34264%2E3013755%2El9gJs7)
Thank you,
Paul Eaton
Senior Advisor, VoteVets
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired

The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

subject: Elon Musk’s hostile takeover
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4619%2E35263%2Eo5LAWN ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter, it’s Ben
Wikler, Chair of the Wisconsin Democrats.

I know how we’ve all been feeling lately – like there’s no check on what
Donald Trump and Elon Musk are doing to our country. Like MAGA is
all-powerful.

Peter, if you want
to know where Trump and Musk’s real weakness lies, all you have to do is
follow the money.

Elon Musk has already dropped MILLIONS of dollars to bankroll Brad
Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign here in Wisconsin, because Musk and Trump
know that Wisconsin’s highest court stands as a check on their lawless
coup – and they know that extremist Republican Brad Schimel will be
nothing but a rubber-stamp on their assault on constitutional checks and
balances.

That’s why we’re launching The People v. Musk – our official push to
spread awareness about Musk’s hostile takeover of the Wisconsin Supreme
Court and raise enough grassroots funding to fight back against his
massive ad buys.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-em-wisdems25.bkfscQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4619%2E35263%2Eo5LAWN ]Will you split a $10 donation with Tammy Baldwin to help defeat Elon
Musk, Donald Trump, and Brad Schimel, and keep Wisconsin OUT of the hands
of right-wing oligarchs?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and Tammy Baldwin will go
through immediately:

Elon Musk and Donald Trump want a MAGA Supreme Court to ban abortion with
no exceptions for rape or incest; to overturn elections when they don’t
like the results; and to suppress voters that don’t kiss their ring.

But we’re not going to let them buy this election. With enough grassroots
support from folks like you, we’ll be able to kick our organizing
operation into overdrive, ensure voters learn about the stakes on April 1,
reject Elon Musk’s hostile takeover of our Supreme Court, and elect a true
champion for fairness and democracy, Judge Susan Crawford.

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Hi Peter, it’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Wisconsin Democrats. I know how we’ve all been feeling lately – like there’s no check on what Donald Trump and Elon Musk are doing to our country. Like MAGA is all-powerful. Peter, if you want to know where Trump and Musk’s real weakness lies, all you have to do is follow the money. Elon Musk has already dropped MILLIONS of dollars to bankroll Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign here in Wisconsin, because Musk and Trump know that Wisconsin’s highest court stands as a check on their lawless coup – and they know that extremist Republican Brad Schimel will be nothing but a rubber-stamp on their assault on constitutional checks and balances. That’s why we’re launching The People v. Musk – our official push to spread awareness about Musk’s hostile takeover of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and raise enough grassroots funding to fight back against his massive ad buys. With enough grassroots support from folks like you, we’ll be able to kick our organizing operation into overdrive, ensure voters learn about the stakes on April 1, reject Elon Musk’s hostile takeover of our Supreme Court, and elect a true champion for fairness and democracy, Judge Susan Crawford. Today, I’m checking in from the Democratic Lieutenant Governors Association. I’m excited to be a part of the incredible work they’re doing, and I’m so grateful for their support. Now more than ever, it’s important we remember the power of local government. Electing Democratic Lieutenant Governors who really know the community they are fighting for is how we build a better future. **I will never let what’s going on in Washington change how hard I’m fighting for Pennsylvania, because Pennsylvania made me.** Now, being the Lieutenant Governor of our incredible state, I am honored to have earned your trust. Getting to focus on delivering for working families – from improving support for our schools to bolstering our local economy – is why I love my job. No matter where I am or what I’m doing, I keep the working families of Pennsylvania as my core focus. But in order to keep doing the work, we need the support of a strong grassroots coalition. **[That’s why I have to ask, Peter. If there's anything you can chip in today, my team and I would really appreciate it!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104147097/534430728/397815234?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_fr_031825_DLGAselfie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzllNDhkNC1mODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GR34n3Hg-sx_H7_Ld-PuN5_Wjt5sT7w_R-aRfgrXtqM=)** | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104147098/534430729/397815234?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_fr_031825_DLGAselfie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzllNDhkNC1mODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GR34n3Hg-sx_H7_Ld-PuN5_Wjt5sT7w_R-aRfgrXtqM=)

body:
Let Rob know you have his back by endorsing him in his 2026 re-election campaign today.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250319&t=1&akid=1700%2E1088799%2EJl1utA)
In case you missed it, yesterday Rob officially announced he’s running for re-election to be California’s Attorney General in 2026! **[Will you support Rob by endorsing our campaign today?](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250319-endorse/?source=em20250319-1700&akid=1700%2E1088799%2EJl1utA)**
With so many of our rights at stake under the Trump administration, Rob is ready to keep up the fight. That’s why **he’s already been endorsed by SEIU California and their 750,000+ members** — they know Rob will never stop fighting for working Californians.
[](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250319-endorse/?source=em20250319-1700&akid=1700%2E1088799%2EJl1utA)
From suing the Trump administration whenever they break the law and attack our rights to cracking down on crime and standing up to greedy corporations, Rob has shown exactly the type of Attorney General he is and will continue to be.
**[Can Rob count on you to endorse him today? Your early support will show that California stands with Rob, and is ready to re-elect him as our Attorney General!](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250319-endorse/?source=em20250319-1700&akid=1700%2E1088799%2EJl1utA)**
**[Endorse Rob »](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250319-endorse/?sourcee=em20250319-1700&akid=1700%2E1088799%2EJl1utA)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Bonta

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Saving the Easter Bunny
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/jOivWYcLsYQBm3tW5MZSsc_aNr01SeMGbGIFc6l69uPcUfFSZ8qvEdDZ2E1WpIUhlI0rekj2SrBwljhc9q8FDauu3Vm0MQJ12KI50hNmjooJhjil4i7TnoMEo-ESglYRGE3KRdJIfUXUBPgwOkvTEjhut3Y0dxD-GNAvR6fE4pkqPAKUblxR8cMLTUd3YhcA_nCHDEFTc6FCxvpfl-LqGoiURnd278061RoMoMSiMbtBzk_rPr0PR8BI8U3cUd4oGMauLml-kRWzyZyJ1WBdCJIf7eIBiJnvGWRntRsq80G5e49-hmQ0eUQKqAm2spsjlU_3FbZwaUCrOD9AYukOe6iDr5OSTzrcVQiia2r7oToUepiSHg0SqCjAVxxj_zwBXCqwATZrG74t_NYhzSRoIfYmudxid2J-wgV7YsStlkZryDQRbVnaF7Cmw1nMkSMQgMEJRegmTg/LDBMbOry4jbARr7ACiyWn7kNq2ZtErGW/7)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/E5h9K0_w9y3hcDjxSVYZi0j99b1Hh5tbhyiGCwe6rPzxtciaW_EVkV0xFsQJUElioijKpmMtQwZ1VRq6TUIwOipGV2kVWAjNjE5ftgsBLfCVoRlHxKZaMPudAQQUFVwrJOOlytShxt85AkkVIYXEjP0aQwlagH0WQUKx6w1NT0cBBTqttplx7BCLHF5hfXCGLm6a84sZkhJWZOq1meYRtah8FWy0TpzYY4SsdN3KfMZeMKAVg327v5bLapcSO6qUZSzUtEVqO0cyOmP87fgdx9e-DEIdSlMQ-Vy5LUN6KCTEWRpB7jUA8r_U3UxHm2ACeboZLXxqGkj3TP_HG_xuNyy8cU0LrpH3DSnxf7KeccDOo94PG4Gh_LZ2Qlw4KCNCuzwz-MjujhWONeLXNnF2pW-aXSp_il3VKGM0giGH356XW52KEffo2JXYJqBp_eCDP4UJPVg9jw/K1_0XAbQHAenDLZlfeVRQzTkTZem2nUQ/7)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/AY8W245PgygXXIM6aanngQMAG-U6KtEmlHWRdxI6UIhknlG5R_pA_6K-TrEnqT3sq4imkoUTUP-WUxoxFVdnPMAXhaGdF1N8vGCIxh89IEzUxC57uiiJ3fsm0w02WGAybML47LE5ce-sBHyy1hs6BmZ6qyBfUEmsTd49giKo__SUd1f3dG9eC7ziQOjwSe8irIpIe0jnooeLgJjcbosP5YMXa3SwvSOSdLpNex08ocO0dde8Vf5P_NMaTi-7rQTjy9fbPEE3m1lrir4bzYQYhuZbkh5ahGHudI0uK83Glf2tDN1pSApD8tLPc-utFn9P_xRFVwcrDyaTD8cLVtYwbSvaOumM6zdBEbGMzl-zQ59UTsZpxVgFVbu-3aoIkSZAda_xVs6kfToXzc_a75Il_XUpkTqzHrAAsuyAvH_eRFuaJ4PM9uKGF8xon6m-j2CRSpMFRKBgaQ/TJ_QGJW6Rlcp4DgDLCPxqyZAP8Zt-UoZ/7)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/GLmA70lbGq2Wql4mykW6IEJezlzpNL63Db2APl2YikiEW7YGXh9zC-oz8Fs01XCsqBq3AnhJMYoxtDSTOsrTPK3V3eoPnwcckBFwAFbeGGtTN5dwDXkZBUjSRjSU_Fp5CHWe9VGkUTQURMq67aoizRlsNzpQ-PIlMY9HtyGPhps8fs-KSPz2Ot6Syk04g6kEEWHLrIb0eXAPAqAGxA7xZ-pLoNdy8iisPPkbZfH9UzUAy5E1MLJbSLrr2DzqzGH6UDIB5YIKferl0sqErQKXO5yf0S25eYvaJFucipiHO6oKAWBzoP0m1de3H-SWiWlregKLkzZIP_lRxg7qKcluw_auQpBTDLoQXpEiUpZZOrP3HyWfcAh8TPBQExAAYNnaOszTcziDlSJisUyRHQ6Kf4_NKYSGexI_Ho0o2l649EFhyv5LPYTgvoUh9rTGugRhlOluD7TKNg/TwT4hX9RCd9hFXmL8xfah7RLd-LFnphE/7)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,

My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created Saving the Easter Bunny , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you! | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024. Pop Acta Media | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=Ut7BsJYBtYM4QBBfjMl3Cz5kvfFyjRmU%2F1WojdZ9jCDlTqlBpNpkt16VnO31vvHI9VtGAFDCVLGbWr2SusKa8eQjYeI8Xl9MulZ66U91EExGoFsGe4umkl4TLBXo0dVdP9r%2BybwGCQxE5%2BF0iUUxshfniPyfbFXDhdMeFAiR9BHEaIb9z52kaMpPQN6gqf7SQt4BJ24QI12memo15eHSPCYGE4C%2FKF4N1le%2BEcHLoir3WLAHCNKkljiCAG%2FkTCKs2VLS5MO1J6gFScsGVMW%2FPzkxyMWYw4UyjzuugJRt6J9op2PcMCp6G5yPAr7fO8p4jNkENS7ouOThp1lP36O876t5cZfo2DMwzUQNlLD82HuaVc0Nw5wD1blSSwiyKELXPpVOYs0a0DtnbjmyePR267alkKjhgPlVpPofQ3NUgkvLklXZ7heb2GSlMsI4UNX1)

Peter, Federal workers here in New York and across the country are being fired by Elon Musk and the Trump Administration. These reckless cuts to our federal workforce are rash, unjust and do nothing to make our government more efficient. [Will you sign our petition to stand with federal workers and demand an end to Elon Musk’s attacks on our federal workers and takeover of the federal government?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104147350/534431706/-1263954612?source=SBD_GL_EM_EN_031925_1_1_federalworkersPT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2VlMTMxM2UtZmEwNC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UqamrINIfhsF-lsi2uQApnWnlkBoNfDIYcU_od4hiMs=&emci=60a11a38-fa04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cee1313e-fa04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21388742) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104147351/534431707/-1263954612?source=SBD_GL_EM_EN_031925_1_1_federalworkersPT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2VlMTMxM2UtZmEwNC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UqamrINIfhsF-lsi2uQApnWnlkBoNfDIYcU_od4hiMs=&emci=60a11a38-fa04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cee1313e-fa04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21388742)

Slashing federal jobs has impacted the livelihoods of thousands of professionals who have dedicated their careers to public service. These cuts undermine the job security and financial stability of thousands of hardworking Americans who have taken on careers supporting their country.
These rapid cuts to federal workers are also impacting the services that millions of Americans rely on.
**We can’t stand by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk come after federal workers and recklessly slash our federal workforce.**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Only weeks away
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/D9wiYogAT9G8hTX878reo1t3h3kGIsCfmnnrcOFJFsNN0AIletkiGJ27TLoJ3-o7TPLRAva4i2OeA6MupO3tV_UbNu678gYxW0XWcVCeemW9yZaH9Rr3h4ySvFu7YJJk1VSme00p9R89x0d2HiKPgWDSyWmHKrNwo-ZKB0F8BV8wqZSAQGMrhIfJly8dongK7NbBoO2Mubf7QUcHFqVPghQPNud7OeygKQEsp6jk59OD3VW0Y7S7fuxV5B19KuxRpqvLMczAA0Dnj417eRaQnkekDCW02ZgQy8FLueYiut146aweXn56FRiwlSdO-57gL3WMPZfo7epI0cbHrL7jLmrTbtGLIWDvd2cSmNd6fLoqd3aqSzuULgNMLu3Zsw-hnxYCOEIYaR5rvf2w7iKmwxpI0LLOxxb8yu8x__NmoeOxw-KOQWhf-n93Mzr4B-QNOoArGoIjfg/zJ8_MU_CoISApTfeVYXa_QU9PFMNbnhu/7)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/cW0tYqqIB8ItsDKEvWiXd-afNFJ8rFnOS_FDMepDQZCf_RxIdVj9rHr54xeoBYm0n8mneYzgahpPFqn6AW2V2lrjAF33phNEAHmbbl-fqCdNWYe7-mQwhTZLCRRwuDPPs4EUu78slwIRkXK_ZRF8eKUwSgvXBv9wjwSqLEyhIUmBbJIMir7nx-AhTbTyJIsV0SmKFiuPvfzBkobCXcqUcKcoXdHMx5hzomLcbBL5JMWBa7Csx-TBY3oIZnqeu5yLqUOThAAggmBJdhQjjOVkZPRU_JEW-YKtoPQtgEY9XZeZLEF05rxdXvmgJovHQNqab_tQOosDRugJ7WTjpx-TrMsSGxPvLdPOW3gf7xpqY7i80tOE_sCR-CUDQh8vP8m1DA1KBeX2LnFZMaU7GUVUzv08S2hRczuIaVo1dAM98rrT5pSRxq_0hnNNs-QHrUN3TVbyZg-uxA/ExIXoIAWAD7RkcCUE36dX24W7jm4kuyh/7)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/R8UODmAEvTSnZAnmWTBTs_wNFgE6mSz2vRXDWWZJFiS5NGPHpGTRs1O7Xvl_v80aXnf4LJvp09iDeV81qdkmYXBthA-HuabLPRAViim7aQv_awo8vni7DNyL6yZR_Vo70h0CyH7NebVu3PjYQQo5WZWTQC5iuzy57Nn74cTy3-nK2xSMZg-i40ysiPKv38uIm8ZAOpSLCI9q0BEO4RIxx8VrCizqDzzBqCYgXsNTneS_VvNejuTPj0rluP44It7xNGiPYziFCAcRwfVxt0b3nJyXtX6sTPZR2CVSmtBZ6cRiDhQKz1_CU8XcEvS9k0xBcknOnRICUQa4u6O2EObjTJzlVwuXiFfpCbndTZlOiQxszzwUe9ragbAvS58f5s_2I5NWz8agOuKa5hd0T2_Bglw4aDBmU2JLOb2gLjAwwinqduNRgifJ98cwewFNfsX5qbxQH7SW1A/NlNaL4TYD0d9HitoHk8zdZw1ewpwoWal/7)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/YFY-QzZnipFYKl3aUkElqcQLNq04L9_ND20cU6xcY5szkmLSMEmYNDap8azAToZUELyBrgpLXBHYEIV7ka-aIocscNI7M8D8s9n1BoVDP1XFsnksVyVUsDKXGADtweIfdAVa9mQYklFlPq3Pgcv2AKUTNzF2uvZAw5shYxMrfe66eZXWSc02aHZZx1031lHhiRoL7DyVBrmyrvjCTxsA4I_FLjfQB6GHHw6JXc_NBX7ApwSlXszVTlY6qQDxgP5FwpkhASzL33yl7Zq9Xypfc8bj9ZpZFI94AgYhK6vWvURiGWWO-BtBzC8DKZ23mqP7o3TvYAlkj73BetE7gMKid5gWIsP7SDNIxTY6v2x_3k4I1HRyeqe5cdpBw-e18ybC0viYs7bF2fGs9gNkH99Zv5qbAWVmCYfAa8fX-_-8yjceU_whITojJ-AWMI8uBxjIO3k1a8b7Dw/9-rRHvfjSTZ99qnDI-OB-0Ft_6i2wjpo/7)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,

clean_body: It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away. | | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate... | | | | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created Saving the Easter Bunny , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The **good news** is that Laura is hard at work in Congress, fighting back against the Trump Administration's attempts to illegally fire essential workers and threatening funding for critical programs that millions of hard-working families rely on.

But the **bad news** is that this race will be one of the most competitive in the country, and national Republicans are already gearing up to target this district as they work to protect and expand their razor-thin House majority.

Early investments are critical in a race like ours. The Cook Political Report has named NY-04 as the only **_‘TOSS-UP’_** race in New York, and your support today will help us begin rebuilding our campaign operations so we can stay prepared for any fights that come our way.

name: COURIER
subject: Act Blue is under attack from Trump and Maga
body:
A New York Times report just exposed how Donald Trump’s administration is weaponizing federal agencies to destroy the Democratic Party and the left’s campaign infrastructure

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104147589/534432641/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM2NTc1ZTgtZmEwNC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=trQF0yv8CUzoMC-gcyHI3K8-obZlyRKTUu795k_ootA=&emci=476575e8-fa04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4c6575e8-fa04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
A New York Times report just exposed how Donald Trump’s administration is weaponizing federal agencies to destroy the Democratic Party and the left’s campaign infrastructure — here’s what we mean:
* **ActBlue, the backbone of Democratic fundraising, is under investigation.** Republicans are **pushing for financial records** and working to shut it down.
* **Democratic voter registration tools are being targeted.** The White House is **going after Bonterra** , the company that runs **the Democratic Party’s largest voter database.**
* **Progressive nonprofits and legal groups are in the crosshairs.** Trump’s allies are **threatening to strip their tax-exempt status and cut off funding.**

**This is a full-scale attack on the infrastructure that powers Democratic organizing and elections.**

clean_body: A New York Times report just exposed how Donald Trump’s administration is weaponizing federal agencies to destroy the Democratic Party and the left’s campaign infrastructure Peter, A New York Times report just exposed how Donald Trump’s administration is weaponizing federal agencies to destroy the Democratic Party and the left’s campaign infrastructure — here’s what we mean: ActBlue, the backbone of Democratic fundraising, is under investigation. Republicans are pushing for financial records and working to shut it down. Democratic voter registration tools are being targeted. The White House is going after Bonterra , the company that runs the Democratic Party’s largest voter database. Progressive nonprofits and legal groups are in the crosshairs. Trump’s allies are threatening to strip their tax-exempt status and cut off funding. body:
The GOP is rigging the system — gutting public services, then selling them to the highest bidder. Let’s stop them.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250319-1&t=1&akid=1876%2E587540%2EPu8dWX)
Republicans don’t govern, Peter — they sabotage.
👀 David said it best:
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250319-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250319-1876&refcode2=1876_587540_Pu8dWX&akid=1876%2E587540%2EPu8dWX)
The GOP _intentionally_ makes government dysfunctional so they can justify selling it off to their wealthy donors. It’s not just bad policy — **it’s a calculated scam**.
We’ve seen it happen again and again:
🚨 Cut public school funding, then push private charters
🚨 Gut social programs, then tell families to "figure it out"
🚨 Slash government funds, then hand power to corporations
This is how they rig the system — and it’s working.
**_That’s why we need to fight back._**
Leaders We Deserve and the candidates we support aren’t backed by corporate PACs or special interests. They’re powered by people like _you._
So if we’re going to push back against the GOP’s attacks on the very idea of government, we need a surge of grassroots support.

name: Suhas Subramanyam
subject: Keep Fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Suhas for Virginia
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/sva-em-nov-24?refcode=march [secure.actblue.com/donate/sva-em-nov-24?refcode=march]
Friends,
I have heard your call to fight. That's why I voted against the partisan budget resolution last week.
I joined Ali Vitali on MSNBC this morning to explain that vote and why I think it's important to fight back now more than ever.
The continuing resolution is a bad bill that gives Trump unprecedented power. But the battle isn't over. Can you chip in today to show Trump we won't stop fighting for our community? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/suhas-for-virginia-1?refcode=3.19]https://youtu.be/6PQg5V6qaYg [https://youtu.be/6PQg5V6qaYg] When we fight, they back down. So far, we have:
✅ Blocked 40 actions
✅ Launched 100 oversight investigations
✅ Shared your stories on the house floor, on TV, and everywhere in between
We can't act like it's business as usual because it's not. That's why I'm asking for your support. Anything you can give today will help us continue to push back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/suhas-for-virginia-1?refcode=3.19]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fl-sva-em-oct-24?refcode=EM_FL_SVA_20241031_fr_eom3halloween_cand_oc_act_xx_abt10&amount=10&express_lane=true] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fl-sva-em-oct-24?refcode=EM_FL_SVA_20241031_fr_eom3halloween_cand_oc_act_xx_abt25&amount=25&express_lane=true] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fl-sva-em-oct-24?refcode=EM_FL_SVA_20241031_fr_eom3halloween_cand_oc_act_xx_abt50&amount=50&express_lane=true]

Thank you for all that you do.
Best,
Suhas
Suhas Subramanyam has dedicated his life to public service as a State Senator, and a former Obama White House advisor, Capitol Hill staffer, and volunteer firefighter/EMT. In Richmond, he has worked across the aisle to pass gun violence prevention bills and protect democracy. Suhas resides in Ashburn, Virginia (in VA-10) with his wife, Miranda, and their two daughters.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They’re burning down the house with people still inside.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
That’s the message one of my constituents told me to take back to my Republican colleagues in Washington
#

This is the message one of my constituents told me to take back to my Republican colleagues in Washington:
“When they’re burning down this house, there’s people still inside.”
Ruben Gallego and I held a town hall on Medicaid on Monday, and we heard from a lot of scared people. They’re scared because Elon Musk and Donald Trump have made it clear that they’re going to cut hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid. In Arizona, that could mean hundreds of thousands or even millions of people lose their health care coverage.
It’s important to say why they’re doing this. Why are Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and Republicans in the House and Senate getting ready to rip away peoples health care? **To make room for trillions of dollars in tax breaks for rich people and big corporations.**
It isn’t about waste. It isn’t about fraud. It isn’t about abuse. If it was, they’d have partners to help them root it out. I am all for finding efficiencies and improving outcomes. All this — the entire reason they’re destroying government agencies and programs that millions depend on — is to give a massive tax break to the richest people.
I’m holding these town halls because I wanted to hear directly from my constituents. And I think Republicans in Congress should have to hear from theirs, too. So, I’m going to ask you to sign your name if you agree:
[**Tell Republicans in Congress it’s time to face their constituents and explain why they’re supporting Trump and Musk’s cuts and choosing billionaires over working families.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/townhalls_em_march25/?source=em250319-1-90&akid=6010%2E6688874%2EX2xd9H)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/townhalls_em_march25/?source=em250319-1-90&akid=6010%2E6688874%2EX2xd9H)**
If my Republican colleagues are too scared to face their constituents, well then I’ll deliver your stories to them myself. But that doesn’t mean we can stop holding them accountable to show up.
Thank you for your support,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6010%2E6688874%2EX2xd9H).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72cd9684ef304b6ea583d18d1439c6ed&_e=xZV-euz9kQumsfOKtXvsrwdNaiQ8jgOiHZkV_A2S_N_F1R9sfqi7-Sy1_xuGW479xAFn6-Ji42KsPEjfPtAcrOeghZau-ZeSW7-L5TAZY6P3WpHjQhs1JSkQYxEg9Gi1QfwODkTXJz8XHlgajJd6qRiN_7AysNCxYXde4QgZev8zUR9M3ZndIOBEW9MBIHpnJrNxjQh09ryjpr__-omgMQAmc_hBFcd1-fii0SsY3c3hK9Hmc0KBZgZC5Xg2Z2IU11o3zl5Qs14DI1oF5rSAGCmTdnqZYn_czy6eFsPfJeNpwA0nRMGBR6KNUv83w84JvzOqovI-6-ffaH_I99UPzsDA3e_YcHQ9X46Nf-N6c8qRxyEE8zc_WvKQCP0RWydUfaMJ0FFCA_cv9wVN-SkkN1IMOrtdXTp-FcYX9-2Mnxo%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72cd9684ef304b6ea583d18d1439c6ed&_e=xZV-euz9kQumsfOKtXvsrwdNaiQ8jgOiHZkV_A2S_N_F1R9sfqi7-Sy1_xuGW479xAFn6-Ji42KsPEjfPtAcrOeghZau-ZeSW7-L5TAZY6P3WpHjQhs1JSkQYxEg9Gi1QfwODkTXJz8XHlgajJd6qRiN_7AysNCxYXde4QgZev8zUR9M3ZndIOBEW9MBIHpnJrNxjQh09ryjpr__-omgMQAmc_hBFcd1-fii0SsY3c3hK9Hmc0KBZgZC5Xg2Z2IU11o3zl5Qs14DI1oF5rSAGCS-W1MAFt8NZAxQ2FJe4fLWYLi2SqLMgMqquVoruzWexTFilUHfLgCL6jAAwHjhvIyV9LY-9JfroVnaeeqRvTMvYnCc5ZAiKGsECPDA5Mlp77ZPhECyEoEL1LekVxcP2JW_X88FirYpSfOmNLKA8HE%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=72cd9684ef304b6ea583d18d1439c6ed&_e=xZV-euz9kQumsfOKtXvsrwdNaiQ8jgOiHZkV_A2S_N_F1R9sfqi7-Sy1_xuGW479xAFn6-Ji42KsPEjfPtAcrOeghZau-ZeSW7-L5TAZY6P3WpHjQhs1JSkQYxEg9Gi1QfwODkTXJz8XHlgajJd6qRiN_7AysNCxYXde4QgZev8zUR9M3ZndIOBEW9MBIHpnJrNxjQh09ryjpr__-omgMQAmc_hBFcd1-fii0SsY3c3hK9Hmc0KBZgZC5Xg2Z2IU11o3zl5Qs14DI1oF5rSAGGkK1FSqNPAWHcPwWlCIV4ywkyCwWmeNNNcx_2EQHwPWNJnUUNV65aZJqG1uxVRtPFSrSmMQELzfPhfb2m4CAzWoGeDQdFdOX-ccY9-b_VT-nunUecndQn0idNub8NrgNFDbpdL1gkDEmH1wdSh1o6A%3D)**
