name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Statement on Mayor Michelle Wu’s State of the City Address
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AER1VKcBhvVHT7Aqwid2e4EFEE26LRT0MXTbDtuZZC-ifmEsiC8Hi6h3Foi_dIhuyIkhsd6uoh9D8V5VXPgyeyMIPZbEv77dW92VlUKGPNbY3v2cUw05V-t22r72qpkJ7uyQyvUW_x7Cge18S21tiA==&c=FoSEPYZ-KPQEMuG1p1BNpxiysSs710Mo6Fz0TpbrNZ3nQfXaHVcPgw==&ch=OZCdhT0bJer0QCvPKNfZSBZKbAxN1KGPRhHyZOBgA1m1BTZpqPZthg==)
---
| MassGOP Statement on Mayor Michelle Wu's State of the City Address
---
---
| Boston, MA- Tonight, Mayor Michelle Wu delivered her State of the City Address, attempting to sell Bostonians on her tenure. But just like the majority of residents, the MassGOP isn't buying it. Her radical policies have turned Boston into a progressive experiment at the expense of hardworking families, and we stand firmly against her disastrous agenda.
Under Wu's leadership, Boston Common--once a cherished gathering space--has descended into an open-air drug market plagued by crime. Even Freedom Trail tour guides now avoid the area, unable to showcase it as the safe landmark it once was.
"Mayor Wu's leadership has failed the people of Boston, especially on public safety," said MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale. "What was once the heart of the city has become dangerous and unrecognizable. This is not the Boston residents deserve."
Now, she is pushing to redevelop White Stadium in Franklin Park into a professional women's soccer facility, restricting access for Boston Public School students who have long relied on it for sports and recreation. This costly deal, done despite significant community opposition, will provide little economic benefit while stripping resources from local youth.
"The redevelopment of White Stadium is a direct blow to the communities of Roxbury and Dorchester," Carnevale continued. "This isn't just a financial blunder; it's a betrayal of Boston families."
Meanwhile, Wu's stubborn commitment to reckless policies extends to transportation. Her aggressive bike lane expansions have worsened congestion, delayed emergency services, and frustrated commuters, all while catering to a small subset of residents.
"Bostonians are fed up with these bike lanes," said Carnevale. "They create more traffic, more delays, and only seem to benefit illegal scooter riders. Wu is playing political games at the expense of everyday citizens."
Beyond infrastructure failures, Wu has misled the public on tax policy. She falsely claimed that rejecting a commercial tax hike would result in a 33% increase in residential taxes, when the real figure is just 10.5%--a typical inflation adjustment. This fearmongering tactic was designed to pressure lawmakers and residents into supporting higher taxes, despite Boston's struggling commercial real estate market.
"Mayor Wu distorts facts to justify her progressive agenda," Carnevale said. "She isn't protecting taxpayers--she's squeezing them to fund bloated city spending."
Concerns over transparency only deepened when Wu testified before the House Oversight Committee about Boston's sanctuary city policies. Despite spending $650,000 in consulting fees to prepare for her testimony, she failed to provide basic data on how many illegal immigrants have entered the city or how much taxpayer money is being spent to support them, raising serious questions about fiscal responsibility.
"Wu refuses to be honest with the people she's supposed to serve," said Carnevale. "Her policies drain resources from essential services and put public safety at risk."
Since taking office, Wu has increased Boston's budget by over 15%, ballooning it to $4.6 billion. Rather than cutting wasteful spending, she relies on scare tactics to justify raising taxes and expanding government control.
"Bostonians deserve fiscal responsibility, not higher taxes to fund Wu's extreme agenda," Carnevale concluded.
The people of Boston make this city great--not City Hall. But under Wu's leadership, reckless policies, mismanagement, and deception have become the norm. The MassGOP remains committed to fighting for a Boston that prioritizes safety, and prosperity for all residents--not just the political elite.

### ###
---

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Standing Up for Eastern Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Far left activists turned out in force this week, determined to stop my town hall.

| | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,
The Far Left turned out in force this week, determined to stop my town hall.I wouldn’t let them. We have a job to do, restoring American values, lowering taxes, and downsizing an out-of-control federal government.
---
| _Protestors wave a Palestinian flag at my Spokane town hall._
---
| I’ve held six town halls to let you know face-to-face how things are going and to listen to your concerns.
I had two town halls on Monday -- one in Ritzville and one at a university in Spokane. At both there were voters from different political viewpoints – Democrats, Republicans, Independents and all were welcome to participate.
It’s how we make democracy work.
But in Spokane, far left activists came with the sole goal of disrupting the meeting.
They asked questions, but they didn’t want to hear the answers. They yelled and booed, shouted and interrupted.
The one truly disappointing thing about Monday night was the far-left Democrat crowd’s repeated attempts to excuse the anti-Semitic protests on college campuses that targeted Jewish students at schools like Columbia. That should be roundly condemned, not excused and applauded by anyone.
I am a proud conservative and that is why over sixty percent of the voters elected me last November. We absolutely must follow the Constitution, protect our liberties, and obey the courts; we should be bipartisan and seek consensus when we can – but we must move forward with a conservative agenda forcefully.
If you agree that we can’t allow radical disruptors to break up our town halls, then I could use your support. Write a letter to the editor or post a note on social media to let people know that the majority of Eastern Washington supports this Administration.
And, you can donate to our 2026 campaign. Any amount you can contribute sends a powerful signal that we will not be silenced ... or shouted down ... while we restore America.
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: Economic investments are for all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39555%2E3422442%2EdK6B77)
Derek,
As we continue to push back against Washington Republicans’ harmful budget, we also need to set the record straight about who benefits when the government makes the right investments.
**Every single American is better off when we have a strong, stable, globally competitive economy—and that’s what our government should be investing in.**
_Medical research isn’t just for sick people. It creates innovations that maintain the United States’ competitive edge in the world economy._
_Child care isn’t just for people with kids. It strengthens our entire economy when parents can participate fully in the workforce._
_New housing isn’t just for people looking to buy or rent right now. It helps all of us when people can do the jobs our economy needs because they can afford to live where they work._
We need to shift the mindset that government “spending” is something that is done for other people. **These are investments that benefit _all of us._**
That’s the message that Americans across the country need to be hearing from our leaders at this moment.
I’m running for Governor to keep doing what I’ve always done: to push government to make the right investments and to keep the American people informed about why this work is important.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250319_2_ak?refcode=em20250319-39555&refcode2=39555_3422442_dK6B77&akid=39555%2E3422442%2EdK6B77)
More soon,
Katie

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Wall Street is panicking. Here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
The stock market is tumbling, companies are losing billions, and recession fears are rising. Sound familiar? |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104149281/534438918/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDMwOWRjOC0wMDA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yh4hyK7QTFvoggUg_wDYiQoVgL3pEBiB69qH_kleZ6k=&emci=04476ec1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=60309dc8-0005-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7878003)

The so-called “Trump bump” has officially turned into a **_"Trump Slump."_ The Dow is down over 2%, the S&P 500 has suffered its worst week since September, and the Nasdaq just lost over a _trillion_ dollars in market value. ** Why? Because Trump’s recklessness — tariffs, economic uncertainty, and threats of government shutdowns — is driving instability. clean_body: The stock market is tumbling, companies are losing billions, and recession fears are rising. Sound familiar? | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Team, Donald Trump promised us an economic boom. Instead, we’ve been watching the markets tumble, companies lose billions, and recession fears surge. The so-called “Trump bump” has officially turned into a "Trump Slump." The Dow is down over 2%, the S&P 500 has suffered its worst week since September, and the Nasdaq just lost over a trillion dollars in market value. Why? Because Trump’s recklessness — tariffs, economic uncertainty, and threats of government shutdowns — is driving instability. Greetings

As a reminder, the Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting spring meeting from**May****9-11** in **Minneapolis, Minnesota**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on how we push forward as a party in this troubling time, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. You can find all the information in this email on our website at **[yda.org/ydamsp](yda.org/ydamsp?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-reminder-yda-winter-meeting-in-boston-3&email_referrer=email_2662029&email_subject=reminder-yda-spring-meeting-in-minneapolis&&)****

******
* * *
**Registration
****
[Click here to register](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39ispmPgnyBeLzstfRs0GcNMmQ8i0Uu7JlJXUCxxrJCmdAhrI3WMZ3WpZtbbn7FJUyH8PiIH8zUEWT2Y3pu2hvLIyA8UYNzpJxLsJRA6Lz0_aO1-xk1H_mXxDJU7uBJAjzt4387JskVfRjgqThpDz-JMW_jVdeWbBYm4fhMExNOrY7N74sQinZtvXmFRN2w5zGC6KSLGh98XvbhS1NgAASeQ16RJu6Dz6VP9kfAAEA5_QpXbjlOuEkHLN2ND-4dDp9HN0r50iouK3egMZVnoUGzWAGm2CC4WpyBrtzPuTtTt8JQQZ6RtUHdjyy9caKgh0QC5TMhuWqw-Kj_EzhBa8lJqfAdnhrouC2CNCmJb5scrg/4ex/45pt-69TSISkiq96qQZqyQ/h1/h001.-q5Lu9t93pCS6aLf6joEiGZf6Ep-JVrCbA6NBEKbl5Y) **at the early bird rate of **$60.00**. The early bird registration rate is valid until April**16****, 2025**.
****
* * *
**Reserving a Hotel Room
**
Lodging will be available at the Royal Sonesta Minneapolis Downtown (35 S 7th St, Minneapolis, MN 55402). Hotel reservations must be made no later than**April****25, 2025**. **[Click here to book at our group rate of $ 159 per night](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYVTJ3gaXEQhNrFAZPhr6sabsSNHnk0fk6DOOTQdyE3JosLT_nADN5jURGejAj_8zTcSx74oOvq8JuRihLimg-UNatSKqLMYoZzw9A4pGLtetcBrME2x_39Q18TEOJTZpjU1WmVSNQDLRZ509r2sctFK5lV6s5q8bwkJIM7GpOslHchmDjh6QteDbGElCboM_mbgkT8fNGa_RflOawyJ5bc9XUGFd8HEco-Z1APkM7EGLih98bW3Y-sa1ZPh58SDkjLt7e_lmnO9wVhYxRjxssg8E8Ajre0HSIx7R2wNufGy6rokmGkvqi9XW9gpmx4gmoNoYfoQJzwMBmyMVHeVo2NxN1VcY9C0ho3-IOLvTxaU5vIvFoShk67qkt-mPCoVglasQ0mBSeA7UsmFE2YZYu0qKaYhJ1I46FO8yKw-WQ1YOsX6hFtA-LO4MP8GpmQ88YUeJqGvH8Rdku_tQ90yaHY/4ex/45pt-69TSISkiq96qQZqyQ/h2/h001.fLkgLCdkDBB9bdJITXhaPEQ4DpgbDqkrggFN0Z9uOjI)**.**
**
* * *
**National Committee Proxy Submissions
**
Proxies are due two hours before the start of the National Committee Meeting on Sunday, December 8th. You should submit your proxy by**12:00****PM EDT on Saturday, December 7th** , to ensure your proxy is received and any corrections can be made. **[The Proxy Form is available here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWwGamPY7W-vS4bGbFoLcGE8r2SxUlCWieL9jRw3-wjKhQwpki_fH5-HK24s_fu0E8ek7fAKuV0IrEUbVWMhO3ZUBItQkxlFnHSGhiE58iEKxKf6WP5xA9wW2yiDlAJcMKMQUMbhhftg59RCtH5eWIEwyPc5K3U7Le5eQTePRU9suihh5jEBFQ6O6Aiw_oAnsSRx-kaS6GeerPaV_oHkLy3Z4dm7ki6-RHw6qh1LK4wZQ3SYPO8-MSakNVHGLhLRnad9STqykMjMnA6gfk0ZxU0unEzF_Ri84kjnm6gcWDi_yov0S8XPcX88J8Z53GiNOzUOwekq-UAuzqYiLl-yC2VkG3XuHsT5J4hWCT--liSel/4ex/45pt-69TSISkiq96qQZqyQ/h3/h001.xiNx3O9l4K4WmAzF0aSzisqgYR3QTsk1ufQsreVVy5o)**. **Charter and Standing Rules Amendments
**

The Charter and Standing Rules must have been submitted to YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org by **1:59 PM EDT on Friday, April 11**.

* * *
**Detailed Schedule**

We will be releasing a detailed schedule of our programming soon. _We advise YDA Winter Meeting participants to plan for activities to begin on Friday, May 9th, at 6:00 PM and conclude on Sunday, May 11th, no earlier than noon_. If you have any questions or concerns you need immediately addressed, please send an email to [**office@yda.org**](mailto:office@yda.org)
****
* * *
**Accessibility and Accommodations**

The Young Democrats of America is committed to ensuring that our organization is accessible to all. Accommodation requests related to a disability should be emailed to [**office@yda.org**](mailto:office@yda.org).
****
* * *

clean_body: | | | | | | Greetings As a reminder, the Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting spring meeting fromMay9-11 in Minneapolis, Minnesota. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on how we push forward as a party in this troubling time, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. You can find all the information in this email on our website at yda.org/ydamsp?linkid=1&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-reminder-yda-winter-meeting-in-boston-3&emailreferrer=email2662029&emailsubject=reminder-yda-spring-meeting-in-minneapolis&& ** Registration at the early bird rate of $60.00. The early bird registration rate is valid until April16, 2025. ** Reserving a Hotel Room Lodging will be available at the Royal Sonesta Minneapolis Downtown (35 S 7th St, Minneapolis, MN 55402). Hotel reservations must be made no later thanApril25, 2025. . National Committee Proxy Submissions Proxies are due two hours before the start of the National Committee Meeting on Sunday, December 8th. You should submit your proxy by12:00**PM EDT on Saturday, December 7th , to ensure your proxy is received and any corrections can be made. . Only voting members of the National Committee are eligible to submit Proxy Vote Forms. ** Resolutions Resolutions must have been submitted to YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at mailto:secretary@yda.org by 11:59 PM EDT on Friday, April 11. . No resolutions were submitted by the submission deadline. For more information, please contact YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org. or . ** Charter and Standing Rules Amendments The Charter and Standing Rules must have been submitted to YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org by 1:59 PM EDT on Friday, April 11. . Per the YDA Charter, an amendment to the Charter shall contain a title, the names of all members who sponsor the amendment, a brief description of the amendment and why it is being submitted, and each section of the Charter showing how it is being amended. Detailed Schedule We will be releasing a detailed schedule of our programming soon. We advise YDA Winter Meeting participants to plan for activities to begin on Friday, May 9th, at 6:00 PM and conclude on Sunday, May 11th, no earlier than noon. If you have any questions or concerns you need immediately addressed, please send an email to mailto:office@yda.org Accessibility and Accommodations The Young Democrats of America is committed to ensuring that our organization is accessible to all. Accommodation requests related to a disability should be emailed to mailto:office@yda.org. ** Liability Form for Conference Participants Under 18 Individuals under the age of 18 who wish to attend the conference unaccompanied by a Parent or Legal Guardian will need to have their Parent or Legal Guardian complete . Completed forms can be sent to mailto:info@yda.org ** Proposed National Committee Meeting Agenda The proposed agenda for the National Committee meeting on Sunday, May 11th , is. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. **_** 100 LOCAL DEMOCRATS RESPONSES NEEDED BEFORE 11:59 PM ****_
Donald Trump has been on a reign of terror since he re-entered the White House.

Here’s just a HANDFUL of the bad things he’s done:

– He **pardoned** every single January 6th rioter.
– He **accused** USAID of being corrupt and dismantled it.
– He **investigated** FBI agents who worked on Jan. 6 cases.
– He **froze funding** for Medicare, Social Security, and more.
– He **tried** to enact 25% tariffs on Canada, Mexico, and China.
– He **gave** Elon Musk unlimited access to government servers.
– He **chastised** President Zelensky and stopped sending US aid to Ukraine.

And now, Democrats are working on articles of impeachment to END his tyranny!

[ **_But, we need 100 Democrats in your state to respond to our urgent poll before 11:59 PM._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60275?t=9&akid=22937%2E4449941%2EoSWJv2)
[ **RESPOND ASAP: Do you approve of a THIRD Trump Impeachment?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60275?t=10&akid=22937%2E4449941%2EoSWJv2) | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60275?t=11&akid=22937%2E4449941%2EoSWJv2)
---

---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60275?t=13&akid=22937%2E4449941%2EoSWJv2)

He’s going to HATE this,

_Fight for Reform_

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: A message for Peter Willis : PLEASE join the fight for our Democracy!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

subject: Social Security isn’t “waste” – it’s a lifeline

body:
Elon Musk is shamelessly lying to you, Peter. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104149772/534440733/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU0MmIwNy0wMjA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvUOJjteNF7d76YKa7PPWWYxsOCce0xbI6Zcb25h2ok=&emci=536b53e7-1904-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d0e42b07-0205-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)

**_The Washington Post:_ White House insists Musk cuts to Social Security, Medicare won’t affect benefits**

_“The programs cost more than $2.9 trillion in fiscal 2024, meaning Musk is suggesting that up to 24 percent of their budget is fraud and waste. That figure is much higher than what has been identified by watchdogs.”_
* * *
Peter—At a recent town hall, one issue kept coming up again and again: Social Security.

Washingtonians are worried about their benefits, and for good reason.

Elon Musk is calling Social Security and Medicare _**“mainly waste and fraud spending”**_ and working overtime to ensure these benefits are cut.

But here’s the truth: He’s exaggerating fraud numbers to justify gutting these programs and taking away benefits millions of Americans rely on to survive—including many right here in Washington state.

Kim knows how critical it is to keep Social Security benefits solvent and intact for the people who rely on them. If Musk and his allies get their way, millions could see their benefits slashed. We can’t let that happen. [**If you agree that no one should lose their benefits because of Musk’s reckless agenda, add your name to our petition now. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104149773/534440734/648931151?ms=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&refcode=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&source=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7kWR3421K2+C9Ph6jiCjjFFCT1Xjba9J/AQFlOcYVOIpjG6JXcNRjWHgq2pUCd0ipxT5zXtBAEj4dGe65VGNyegilw290cgu4afd9GBqvGbmbpmKJfLBzovOHjUQ+L+9dVNdNcYdEuFFf++Lo/7bNpXHvTZYgXZcrghXZLnvKTw=&refcode2=d0e42b07-0205-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU0MmIwNy0wMjA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvUOJjteNF7d76YKa7PPWWYxsOCce0xbI6Zcb25h2ok=&emci=536b53e7-1904-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d0e42b07-0205-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104149774/534440735/648931151?ms=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&refcode=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&source=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250319_med_adv_gq_act___DrKSFC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=7kWR3421K2+C9Ph6jiCjjFFCT1Xjba9J/AQFlOcYVOIpjG6JXcNRjWHgq2pUCd0ipxT5zXtBAEj4dGe65VGNyegilw290cgu4afd9GBqvGbmbpmKJfLBzovOHjUQ+L+9dVNdNcYdEuFFf++Lo/7bNpXHvTZYgXZcrghXZLnvKTw=&refcode2=d0e42b07-0205-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU0MmIwNy0wMjA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvUOJjteNF7d76YKa7PPWWYxsOCce0xbI6Zcb25h2ok=&emci=536b53e7-1904-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d0e42b07-0205-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338) Thank you,

clean_body: Elon Musk is shamelessly lying to you, Peter. The Washington Post: White House insists Musk cuts to Social Security, Medicare won’t affect benefits “The programs cost more than $2.9 trillion in fiscal 2024, meaning Musk is suggesting that up to 24 percent of their budget is fraud and waste. That figure is much higher than what has been identified by watchdogs.” Peter—At a recent town hall, one issue kept coming up again and again: Social Security. Washingtonians are worried about their benefits, and for good reason. Elon Musk is calling Social Security and Medicare “mainly waste and fraud spending” and working overtime to ensure these benefits are cut. But here’s the truth: He’s exaggerating fraud numbers to justify gutting these programs and taking away benefits millions of Americans rely on to survive—including many right here in Washington state. Kim knows how critical it is to keep Social Security benefits solvent and intact for the people who rely on them. If Musk and his allies get their way, millions could see their benefits slashed. We can’t let that happen. Thank you, DrKimSchrier.com Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Battleground Georgia
subject: The most vulnerable Democrat in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
the biggest Senate race in America

Friend,

**[Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff voted to shut down the government because he hates President Trump.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/_O2Hqs8vMyQ_qkARc-gA-Q9o8f451zx_RBKiGhtnq_aXP3Pdp2lxBL7ES5_n86AvVXdpU-KF0wSz5MjrWC5FKXgyCSjAyHXXR5xBgAcgdq8CGfHo_dzJ1VWx9lrYIKvL4tH-i6s4BtdHKnlCIAaPtrh8QxOg_pcXYh7rjudAXrDgYfA_zfP6SL9_GKdwV33xIaxSLeOgPgZPbcbdz2t6QJQEjfzkwSty8Qw5altBbFw977KQYq5--VBUAD-bAavXoXmNsV8h88h3qL_r7e1PtxwOF4OKwjjZ1IJpXgYtLotxOVVhlzBeZ-BdcBZtAL9rPgxzbkr78Xl8-hhA8Ojk60dov0nuiaAgtMPE9SS-Iu2qe4uQzERFhmiaY31h12w5okEiRT1ealiajqoQCL_CmwfQTrItGIZZ4Kwvl9akCiZd0FMPtwRODyRXX0gqIPxTwbpNfDEMleT8V3Pr453JBB-lgNoP1HZoMyzDT7CP9w7qT4irVTQe8pXWAuv_tFge2ezDcXlZ1v80PxvSUOSXHi08ERD6WP0blTQk093cXf3oJCKxym7akbp4/F48qzNETa5mrD3RqTZiZEv-q7uJM7UMx/7)**

_He voted against funding border security.

He voted against pay raises for our military and firefighters.

He voted against ensuring America's vets have the care they deserve._

**[Jon Ossoff is an embarrassment. Anti-Homeschooling Bill That Seeks to Jail Parents for Non-Compliance Passes Committee Despite 41K Opposing Witness Slips and Large Protests (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/03/anti-homeschooling-bill-that-seeks-to-jail-parents-for-non-compliance-passes-committee-despite-41k-opposing-witness-slips-and-large-protests.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e23e9440fb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/03/anti-homeschooling-bill-that-seeks-to-jail-parents-for-non-compliance-passes-committee-despite-41k-opposing-witness-slips-and-large-protests.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e23e9440fb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Christian Liberty Homeschools / X)
By Illinois Review

On Wednesday, the Homeschool Act passed the Education Policy Committee 8-4, as hundreds of Illinois families protested at the state capitol – dealing a blow to conservative, hardworking parents who view the legislation as governmental overreach and an abuse of power.

Prior to Wednesday morning’s hearing and vote, a historic number of witness slips had been filed – mostly against the bill. In total, 41,797 opposed the legislation, while 994 supported it.

But the momentum from the witness slips and the hundreds in attendance had zero influence on the Democratic members that control the committee – and all of Springfield, for that matter. And the bill was easily passed.

Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Anti-Homeschooling Bill That Seeks to Jail Parents for Non-Compliance Passes Committee Despite 41K Opposing Witness Slips and Large Protests () (Christian Liberty Homeschools / X) By Illinois Review On Wednesday, the Homeschool Act passed the Education Policy Committee 8-4, as hundreds of Illinois families protested at the state capitol – dealing a blow to conservative, hardworking parents who view the legislation as governmental overreach and an abuse of power. Prior to Wednesday morning’s hearing and vote, a historic number of witness slips had been filed – mostly against the bill. In total, 41,797 opposed the legislation, while 994 supported it. But the momentum from the witness slips and the hundreds in attendance had zero influence on the Democratic members that control the committee – and all of Springfield, for that matter. And the bill was easily passed. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Partisan Smear Tactics WON’T WORK MAGA.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Trump’s latest endorsement Byron Donalds is calling for the removal of Fort Myers council members following an “illegal immigration deadlock.” This isn’t about solving our community’s challenges—it’s about using a complex issue as a political weapon.
You and I have 12 days before our campaign comes to a close; join me in this fight.
Our local leaders in Fort Myers have been working hard to address the tough realities of immigration through thoughtful, balanced policy. MAGA’s latest addition is just following orders, and that isn’t right for our Floridians. Instead of allowing our elected officials to be held hostage by partisan agendas, we must stand up for fair governance that respects the democratic process and the dignity of every person.
If you believe in a future where local voices are respected and our policies are guided by compassion and reason, please join me in this fight. $10 is all we need to keep this fight strong until the end. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
I believe that our communities deserve compassionate, common-sense solutions—not calls for drastic measures that undermine the will of the people. We must reject efforts to politicize immigration and instead support leaders who are willing to tackle difficult issues head on—with respect, responsibility, and a commitment to justice for all.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/63796871794C6E43516661354850593270376E4E4D44573661724E4E6A58416A595439424248474A684C39686B5A614647674754567A30646E3953476B494C30/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-20%20at%209.20.16%E2%80%AFAM.png]
As your candidate for Congress in Florida’s 1st District, I am dedicated to fighting for policies that protect public safety while also upholding the rights of immigrants. I will work tirelessly to ensure that our government remains a place of balanced debate and fair representation—not a battleground for political point-scoring.
Thank you for standing with me as we work to build a brighter, more inclusive future for all our communities.
With deep gratitude,
Gay Valimont
Democratic Candidate for Congress
Florida’s 1st District
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States

Fellow Conservative - I've faced some truly difficult challenges before, but I think this could be the toughest mountain I'll have to climb...

I was barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was **RAKING IN** hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - _a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, fellow Conservative!_

As a Christian woman, I wouldn't lie to you. So, believe me when I tell you this is a _**BAD**_ situation! _The fact is, Spanberger has bottomless dark money to pull from._She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers!__

**This is a _BAD_ situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you with a plea from the bottom of my heart; [please send in any amount you can to help me and my team make up the fundraising difference:](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5f31f48c1f7c4a58ad67d86e8954535e&_e=K7e1yp9AJZ5q2UsSYhRKYNbll7uV1B8biz8YUCmo2cPkREe8oPrR4Wc3bBSZZJVLFwtlkHxUcHOADy5etPyELJezLUPPcW_CCGE7Q-EgiDrvWWIXtYJ-QR_Zx3h_9i_t6VTjjebv8fIsPLp1CQqpZi-0KLCjfL2n267iG4CmQFLonX8AOmRKUn-bqfYiW_uHzP4H03r763OflJlBbXXJkCRxeL7PDhMNe5e8NcgB8bkcyqHCIPdSzPf-IbfwkS1hsziAqUBsBH7flPviHDqUKxZoGPm4s5waBQjYBt0IBYeK_CfZTehSUzQUygi-Q_qsHo-TRPnu48Y4htuox8BCxl5XIXPLrG-soi6UggAcIxW_Or1sPZZ7itLcoO-TVZfN6BmTNWOnDl8CtWSUKI2T2yAiSWN2u2tx4LWYQgk3RoXVdhLdkMpK2ZzsRupLPJtT)**

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. # [#]
Peter, we’ll be upfront: we’re about to ask you to chip in $10 to the Texas Organizing Project PAC to help us raise $5,000 before midnight tonight.

We’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re already on board, consider donating $10 or more here.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10&refcode=sbd_top_em_fr_031925_ten

Since Donald Trump took the White House in January, he’s taken every opportunity to undermine our fundamental rights and freedoms. In less than two months, he has:

❌ Attacked immigrant communities and birthright citizenship
❌ Threatened to cut funding to Social Security and Medicare
❌ Undone years of climate progress to “drill, baby, drill!”

Peter, we refuse to concede to Trump’s extremist agenda and illegal power grabs that threaten the livelihoods of millions of Americans. And with just $10, you can help us:

✅ Organize working Black and Latino communities across Texas
✅ Win issue-based and electoral campaigns for healthcare, housing, climate, voting, and immigration justice
✅ Expand the reach of our message to grow our movement

...and so much more!

Peter, we can only do this if we have you in our corner. Will you chip in just $10 before midnight tonight to fuel our fight for progressive reform for working families in Texas?

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10&refcode=sbd_top_em_fr_031925_ten

**An official message from Vice President JD Vance**
President Trump wanted me to share with you his most critical gubernatorial endorsement since his inauguration as your 47th President.
He and I are PROUD to stand with **_Florida’s next Governor_** , Byron Donalds.
I’ve known Byron for many years, his record of service to the people of Florida is unmatched, and as your governor, he will keep Florida the Freest State in the Nation.
He will enact our **MAGA Agenda** to the letter; continuing with Mass Deportation, standing against embedded corruption, and encouraging economic growth that benefits Americans FIRST.
**_[Byron is the best man for the job - but I have to admit, the fight ahead will be challenging and he’ll need ALL the help he can get.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fdc31dd34cee4499bf85a343c714f448&_e=gk10uMdYLyMeLtGPI-0Dw9dlYsKUfxk8Kw4qxhjVmxTIedd_yVVZaA-XoiB94cfnWEtmxB2WtjEKDusTwZqFhGrQ9bboRuz1SarOmY-Ubogi6eSoORBtHCv18GCQRfqX7iqM9-y66c4uFa7P0PAbTOHiOkYgycpgytnVVrQsUSUIB5KDXRyRw7V_5uhddLPvYk_n3_-S2SFRWioebr73HEJqeEaSmHJ2RSqUBaXs2TIn9jMKHnC9qWE67xC7fYcYbZA-iE-WkXpQwzk6nZ3bX5LL7NIrIEGmEqNNSdemR1yqkVdwgnhj7EjN0lnaXhlUEQArtKi4Zc7CBGEXhMxX8g%3D%3D)_**

name: Defend the House Majority
subject: Two Special Elections in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
_We must work together to protect the legacy of our Republican trifecta._

|
---
Patriot,

**Governor Ron DeSantis has announced TWO Special Elections to replace Congressman Matt Gaetz in FL-01 and Congressman Michael Waltz in FL-06.**

With a slim majority in the House, we must keep these seats red. Democrats are pouring money into these districts to try and flip them blue.

Every seat is crucial to defending the House Majority. Without the House Majority, the America-First Agenda will hit a standstill. **_We must work together to protect the legacy of our Republican trifecta._** Losing just one seat can ruin our Conservative victory.

Republicans nationwide are working to raise money, increase resources, and ensure we WIN in FL-01 and FL-06, but **[we need your support.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=bc82f22791c545c198f478e86c4770f3&_e=9GYBgk7I-ahEIOFaxCIPJH8_lBCFoj_SOwIJzoP3oqjg92JAXJ9zxI52kUs6FYiP4SqPHrWL-BbouxNUlCfW9Vgp0nU3SXDmcooQDbQ58-F-V85vtmfSPfPTlmSaDAm4iyLFrUbJ_n0GEXr6BUc1joA7lT87m_uq4Wn-95ZaLp1KnVLxax00FP0qyq_EjFjMoe-UqE0ULC9rt_XO34Png4aVpp4scX9wV8e93ARRDn_4r_75ZaemuGN6Rsf4zJnn3ZDhKkXXi5TKKo74s0MC53DKXegk1xK_xygDhC33TVRvtYq7rVV-cZ1uLS-XYQrzWcYVFZmqDxHmtlxwIl13Ig%3D%3D)** _Everything we worked for and earned in 2024 is on the line._ We can't lose it all in the early moments of 2025.

It will all come down to the results of these special elections.

We know all the hard work and support you gave us in 2024, which is why we hate asking you for more support. But we wouldn't ask unless it is crucial. **[So, we're coming to you humbly. Will you please make a donation today, Patriot?](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=bc82f22791c545c198f478e86c4770f3&_e=9GYBgk7I-ahEIOFaxCIPJH8_lBCFoj_SOwIJzoP3oqjg92JAXJ9zxI52kUs6FYiP4SqPHrWL-BbouxNUlCfW9Vgp0nU3SXDmcooQDbQ58-F-V85vtmfSPfPTlmSaDAm4iyLFrUbJ_n0GEXr6BUc1joA7lT87m_uq4Wn-95ZaLp1KnVLxax00FP0qyq_EjFjM7QggOm7r88O8_3Q8kGs4ukENd5OccfU6zpsnKb31Ck4sX6ieaIlFMUxEAf4m-cHjGG_v--Fsz93VjLsrFz6_tCRhgBiklq7LA1-zWax-iv7kelBwsVAalpzxyztUi_Q3kBgB1YKVRHaTSCxznMbVpg%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

name: Elect State Dems (via DLCC.org)
subject: If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | |
---
| |
---|---
| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections – one of the most important being a tie-breaking race in the Pennsylvania House. If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans _will_ flip control of the House, giving the GOP full control of the PA legislature.

body:
Voter Action Project
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: After Matt Gaetz's nomination for Attorney General blew up spectacularly, Donald Trump quickly moved to name a MAGA-approved replacement: former Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi.
As Florida's AG, Bondi examined allegations against Trump University, but then suddenly stopped the nascent investigation after Donald Trump made a $25,000 donation to her campaign fund. After she ended her term as AG, she became one of Trump's chief election deniers, spreading the false claim that the 2020 election had been stolen.
Even in her Senate confirmation hearing she refused to answer direct questions about who won the 2020 election, more than four years after the fact. Now she has called for labeling people who commit vandalism against a private company (Tesla) as "domestic terrorists".
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about her job performance. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you approve of the job Pam Bondi is doing as AG?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: Team WFP
subject: Take the Working Families Party March 2025 Pulse Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Do you ever feel like your representatives aren’t listening to you? Like while you’re worrying about Trump and his billionaire cronies taking a hatchet to our federal government, the entire economy, lifesaving services like Medicaid, and our human rights — too many of the people in power are either going along with it, or not doing everything in their power to oppose it? We hear you. body:
i’m absolutely a-paw-lled at what this so-called “DOGE” is doing to the government right now.

CNN Republican brawler Scott Jennings **[SNAPPED at a very rude Democrat panelist](https://substack.com/redirect/f7f6b882-a895-425f-a788-ab917dedaecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for making a condescending remark that demanded a blunt response.
_**" Let me educate you about my position on January 6th!!"**_
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f7f6b882-a895-425f-a788-ab917dedaecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f7f6b882-a895-425f-a788-ab917dedaecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[The clash began](https://substack.com/redirect/f7f6b882-a895-425f-a788-ab917dedaecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when Neera Tanden asked Jennings a gotcha question about his condemnation of Tesla dealership vandals, conflating the matter with January 6th.
"So when they do it to a Tesla dealership, its really bad, but when they do it to the halls of congress we should pardon them, is that your position?"
**[Jennings set her straight immediately,](https://substack.com/redirect/f7f6b882-a895-425f-a788-ab917dedaecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I know you haven't been around for a while, so let me educate you on my position about January 6th!"
"I'm so sorry," Tanden said sarcastically. "You don't need to patronize me."
"And you don't need to be condescending to me!" Jennings fired back. You want to attack me?! I'm sorry you're a condescending person who hasn't been paying attention!"
Watch what happened next:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f7f6b882-a895-425f-a788-ab917dedaecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | You probably thought the election ended on November 5th, but control of the House isn’t settled yet.

The democrats could still win control...

**Here is where things stand:**
**Republicans:****217**
**Democrats: 215**
**Undecided: 3**

If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi.

My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race.

**I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded.**

This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support.

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: We don’t have four years to save our democracy
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250319-1278-foote&t=1001&akid=1278%2E342411%2EJkn-Co ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, we don’t
have four years to save our democracy.

If we want a fighting chance at protecting our futures we need to uplift
leaders who fight for people and the planet, not those who profit from
destruction.

Our Squad is on the frontlines of this battle, but they need resources,
tools, and people power to keep going. As a grassroots funded movement,
some months we exceed our goals, while others, we’re scrambling to catch
up. This March, we can’t afford to fall behind.

We’re headed into a critical part of the month – our final Q1 fundraising
push and a major FEC deadline that will put all eyes on our Squad.

### **HOUSECLEANING**
**Our first Wednesday letter for our paid subscribers!** So first & foremost: THANK YOU! I know we say it a lot, but we do because _it 's_ _the truth_. _**We can 't do it without you**_.
Too much of the week is so deadly serious that we want to up the humor quotient in this special Wednesday edition. Today's paid subscribers-exclusive feature includes:
* A new humor column from me, Cliff Schecter.
* A fun & informative video by former MSNBC Anchor David Shuster.
* Exclusive headlines from the NY Times Pitchbot.
* Plus the funniest insults I've gotten from Trumpers this week!

As time goes on, the list of items **will get bigger.** But, for now, enjoy your first paid-subscriber-exclusive from Blue Amp Media!
### _Trump Always Wanted A Mic Drop ...Just Not On His Face_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0bdcb04d-51a8-4730-a4df-4277550a641e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Karma, as they say, has a sense of humor. It came this week, in the form of a rogue mic that **physically assaulted** the burnt-okra-colored, McDonald's-odored, sweat-congealed, toxic-strip mall known as Trump's face. Yep--during a recent interview, a mic held by a reporter interviewing the Jabba-esque lummox smacked him right in his artificially-hued mug, proving inanimate objects also have a sense of humor.

name: NDRC
subject: This candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court thinks women are “too emotional”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Chip in to help get out the vote in Wisconsin
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104152489/534449475/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ZDY1NzUwLTA5MDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eimkGcgfl6Bcoa3xrRfdBDnrCBE9YLleYQWURpv2Dh0=&emci=c8e4bc07-df04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=58d65750-0905-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Women’s History Month is a time to celebrate the contributions of women in every aspect of our lives. But it’s also a time to acknowledge the constant attacks by Republicans on women’s rights and to push back against those who want to take us backward. Just take a look at how the issue is showing up in one of the most important elections of 2025: The Wisconsin Supreme Court race. Recounting oral arguments in a case challenging the state’s 1849 abortion ban, conservative candidate Brad Schimel claimed that the justices in the majority were too “driven by their emotions,” saying they were “on the brink of losing it.” **Here’s why that’s extremely problematic: All four justices happen to be women.** Peter, that sexist mindset was kicked to the curb generations ago. But today, it’s seemingly still held by far-right leaders who want to take us back to that time when women had fewer rights than they do today — when women couldn’t hold positions of power in this country because some men didn’t think they were capable of it. This Women’s History Month, we’re asking you to power our work to ensure that people who believe that don’t get a chance to take control in Wisconsin. **The NDRC is working hard to help elect Schimel’s challenger and staunch champion for women’s rights, Judge Susan Crawford. If she wins, Wisconsin could protect reproductive freedom, expand voting rights, and defend fair representation — if she loses, Schimel and his allies will retake the majority on the court, placing all these important values at risk.** [**This election is less than two weeks away — will you rush a donation of $30 to help get out the vote as we work to elect Democracy Defenders in Wisconsin and across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104152491/534449477/790884352?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WomensHistoryMonth_email_20250319-NDRC-Tier1-WomensHistoryMonth_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250319-NDRC-Tier1-WomensHistoryMonth_&utm_campaign=WomensHistoryMonth&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ZDY1NzUwLTA5MDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eimkGcgfl6Bcoa3xrRfdBDnrCBE9YLleYQWURpv2Dh0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Chip in to help get out the vote in Wisconsin | Peter, Women’s History Month is a time to celebrate the contributions of women in every aspect of our lives. But it’s also a time to acknowledge the constant attacks by Republicans on women’s rights and to push back against those who want to take us backward. Just take a look at how the issue is showing up in one of the most important elections of 2025: The Wisconsin Supreme Court race. Recounting oral arguments in a case challenging the state’s 1849 abortion ban, conservative candidate Brad Schimel claimed that the justices in the majority were too “driven by their emotions,” saying they were “on the brink of losing it.” Here’s why that’s extremely problematic: All four justices happen to be women. Peter, that sexist mindset was kicked to the curb generations ago. But today, it’s seemingly still held by far-right leaders who want to take us back to that time when women had fewer rights than they do today — when women couldn’t hold positions of power in this country because some men didn’t think they were capable of it. This Women’s History Month, we’re asking you to power our work to ensure that people who believe that don’t get a chance to take control in Wisconsin. The NDRC is working hard to help elect Schimel’s challenger and staunch champion for women’s rights, Judge Susan Crawford. If she wins, Wisconsin could protect reproductive freedom, expand voting rights, and defend fair representation — if she loses, Schimel and his allies will retake the majority on the court, placing all these important values at risk. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. clean_body: | | | A was just leaked that details Trump’s plan to SABOTAGE the Social Security Administration (SSA), and it will result in service disruption, operational strain, and pose challenges for vulnerable populations while offering no solutions to ensure they will be able to receive benefits. Elon Musk’s disproven and bogus allegations of fraud are the pretext to require millions of applicants to come to a field office to verify their identity when they used to be able to do so over the phone or via the internet. This is occurring as they are cutting Social Security’s workforce and closing field offices!This will result in HUGE delays for benefit applications. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. According to SSA, there are NO concerns about fraud at the time of application. There are already multiple processes to verify the identities before benefits are paid. At a time when Social Security’s staff is at a 50 year low, with 7,000 more terminations slated and dozens of offices being forced to close, this new policy will require 75,000-85,000 in person visits every week! SSA does not have the capacity for this influx of in-person visits. Some applicants have to travel more than 100 miles to get to the nearest SSA field office. This is unacceptable and will prevent millions of Americans from receiving their hard-earned benefits! ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. Over the past 20 years, Emerge has helped transform the face of leadership across the country. Because of our incredible grassroots network of supporters, we’ve trained over **6,000 alums** and helped elect more women at every level of government– _from school board to Congress._

In 2024, we saw more women step up to run for office and lead their communities than ever before. With Donald Trump back in the White House, we can’t afford to slow down now!

**We are at a defining moment in history.** The Trump Administration is going after women’s rights, our democratic institutions that keep our elections free and fair, and funding for critical programs that uplift working families across the country.

[_**MAGA extremists are working to undo our decades of progress, and if we don’t take a stand, they will succeed! That’s why we must act now. It's happening again, Peter: Powerful, wealthy, and corrupt men are dominating the headlines.

I'm far from shocked. Ever since I took my oath as attorney general and swore to do everything in my power to finally bring the most corrupt actors to justice, they have not stopped trying to take me down.

**But here’s the thing: It doesn’t matter which office they hold or how much money they have behind them, I will never be silenced. I will put my head down and go to work for the great people of New York, without fear, without favor, every day.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104153038/534451155/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1857-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjU5YjIxOS0wYzA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOKzd1-qSmpHoJ0kU87EW7hWjeUO3_lHJC0Lu81BC_E=)
In the six years I’ve been in office, I’ve stayed true to my mission of holding the shady forces who have ruled our nation for generations accountable. I knew that standing up to these people and groups was going to earn me enemies. I knew that after decades of elected officials turning a blind eye, my mission would put a target on my back. But I also knew that New York’s working families deserved a champion – and I would do it all a thousand times over.

But I’m nowhere near done fighting for the voiceless and vulnerable, _especially_ now that these powerful and corrupt actors have shown their true colors. These men think they can rattle me and scare me off my path, but the truth is, they have only reaffirmed why I went into this work in the first place.

**But Peter, I can only continue to fight for New York with YOUR support. So please:**

Gavin

As Elon Musk's SpaceX was literally rescuing astronauts left stranded by the Biden administration, crazy leftists spent their spare time keying Teslas around the country. Tim Walz, the guy who wanted to be Vice President, showed how unfit for leadership he actually is as he celebrated Tesla's drop on the stock market. President Trump pulled the Declaration of Independence out of a vault to proudly display it in the oval office. As U.S. district judges try and thwart President Trump and the actions his administration is taking, Alan Dershowitz joins us to give his legal expertise. From the district judge restoring USAID to the planes that left with some 200 criminals from the Tren de Augura gang, Alan gives us his insight as to how these cases will play out in the court system. Dershowitz calls for the full release of Epstein, JFK and the MILK files as pertinent details and implications have yet to be revealed to the public.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Key races this year will help shape how elections are run in 2026 and beyond. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104153881/534454246/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250319_f_ElectionsTimeline_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGM1MTk0Zi0wZTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4pviC1WL3foJgEVZ93fQn-Ng25AyaXFIBeeiWcBnE=&emci=7b023c4f-f704-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8dc5194f-0e05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | Sure, presidential elections get most of the headlines. Yes, people are already looking ahead to the 2026 midterms (us too!). But dedicated voting rights supporters like you know that critical elections happen every year. And 2025 is no exception. **Key races this year will help shape how elections are run in 2026 and beyond.** Here are some local and special state legislative election dates we’re tracking in Georgia for 2025:
* April 15: Special runoff election
* April 29: Special election — Cobb County Commissioner for Districts 2 and 4
* June 17: Special primary election / special election — Public Service Commissioner
* July 15: Runoff for the primary election / special election — Public Service Commissioner
* September 16: Special election
* October 14: Runoff for the special election
* November 4: Municipal general / special election: Public Service Commissioner
* December 2: Runoff for the municipal general / special election: Public Service Commissioner

But really, each of those dates is just the tip of an iceberg, because we’re also tracking the different voting dates and deadlines for each election. **And in addition to supporting pro-voter candidates in critical races, we’ll keep working to make sure Georgians have all the information they need to get to the polls.** [**Please chip in $25 or any amount to help elect pro-democracy champions in 2025 and defend the freedom to vote in the years to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104153883/534454247/-594900150?amount=25&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250319_f_ElectionsTimeline_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGM1MTk0Zi0wZTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4pviC1WL3foJgEVZ93fQn-Ng25AyaXFIBeeiWcBnE=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104153885/534454250/-594900150?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250319_f_ElectionsTimeline_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGM1MTk0Zi0wZTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4pviC1WL3foJgEVZ93fQn-Ng25AyaXFIBeeiWcBnE=)

We know how to compete in pivotal Georgia elections, and we know how to win.
In January 2021, we helped power U.S. Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to victory in their runoff races.
Later that year, after the nation’s eyes were no longer on the Peach State, we ALSO helped elect 43 candidates in Georgia municipal elections.
With your support, this team has kept on endorsing and electing voting rights champions — including in 33 Georgia General Assembly races last year, helping to flip three seats that had been held by Republicans and secure one victory by just 48 votes.
**Local and state legislative elections make a real difference in Georgians’ daily lives. And they determine whether voters have fair opportunities to make their voices heard in the future.**
[**So we aren’t sleeping on these races, and we know you won’t either. Will you make a contribution today to help elect pro-voter candidates and fight for equal access to the ballot box?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104153887/534454252/-594900150?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250319_f_ElectionsTimeline_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGM1MTk0Zi0wZTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4pviC1WL3foJgEVZ93fQn-Ng25AyaXFIBeeiWcBnE=)

clean_body: Key races this year will help shape how elections are run in 2026 and beyond. | | | Sure, presidential elections get most of the headlines. Yes, people are already looking ahead to the 2026 midterms (us too!). But dedicated voting rights supporters like you know that critical elections happen every year. And 2025 is no exception. Key races this year will help shape how elections are run in 2026 and beyond. Here are some local and special state legislative election dates we’re tracking in Georgia for 2025: April 15: Special runoff election April 29: Special election — Cobb County Commissioner for Districts 2 and 4 June 17: Special primary election / special election — Public Service Commissioner July 15: Runoff for the primary election / special election — Public Service Commissioner September 16: Special election October 14: Runoff for the special election November 4: Municipal general / special election: Public Service Commissioner December 2: Runoff for the municipal general / special election: Public Service Commissioner But really, each of those dates is just the tip of an iceberg, because we’re also tracking the different voting dates and deadlines for each election. And in addition to supporting pro-voter candidates in critical races, we’ll keep working to make sure Georgians have all the information they need to get to the polls. = | = We know how to compete in pivotal Georgia elections, and we know how to win. In January 2021, we helped power U.S. Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to victory in their runoff races. Later that year, after the nation’s eyes were no longer on the Peach State, we ALSO helped elect 43 candidates in Georgia municipal elections. With your support, this team has kept on endorsing and electing voting rights champions — including in 33 Georgia General Assembly races last year, helping to flip three seats that had been held by Republicans and secure one victory by just 48 votes. Local and state legislative elections make a real difference in Georgians’ daily lives. And they determine whether voters have fair opportunities to make their voices heard in the future. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for being such a dedicated member of this movement. name: Johnny O
subject: Keep Marching On
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/IMG_6362.jpeg]

Last weekend, I joined some of my Congressional colleagues on a pilgrimage to Selma, Alabama, where we walked the Edmund Pettus Bridge on the 60 th anniversary of Bloody Sunday.
It was a powerful experience, standing where activists were once brutally beaten for defending their right to vote. I met a woman who, at just 8 years old, was among the youngest of the original marchers in 1965.
Their determination and resilience has stayed with me through the recent turbulence in Washington – including a near shutdown, the passage of a budget that turns its back on our commitments to veterans and the vulnerable, and the continued assault on our civil servants.
We must follow the examples set by the titans of the civil rights movement and keep fighting for what is decent and right. In fact, we owe it to them.
I will keep sounding the alarm for democracy and I am grateful for your support.

name: AOC
subject: Bring it on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I will not leave an unfair world behind.
#
We have inherited an unfair world.
We have inherited a world where prior generations of leadership have set the table so that companies get richer and richer, and people's incomes stay the same or get even lower.
**I refuse to leave an unfair world to generations to come**.
_We_ will make sure that we leave a different world. One where people can work 40 hours a week, put food on the table, afford their housing, and live a decent life.
And if people want to call me “extreme” for believing that? **Bring it on**.
If you want to call me “extreme” for thinking any person should have rights over their body? **Bring it on**.
If you want to call me “extreme” for acknowledging the Congressional Budget Office assessment that immigrants brought in trillions of dollars in U.S. revenue and paid more taxes than Elon Musk or these other folks? **Bring it on**.
**We have nothing to fear**. There is nothing to fear in moving forward into a better future.
Our work must begin _now_ if we are to prevent the country from becoming a slush fund for Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
That's why I'm hitting the road with Senator Sanders _tomorrow_ to visit Nevada, Arizona, and Colorado — **including vulnerable, GOP-held swing districts**.
[Help power this complicated but essential work on the road by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250319.z6oTsJ&refcode=em20250319-8388-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8388%2E2526796%2EKXm2RH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250319.z6oTsJ&refcode=em20250319-8388-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8388%2E2526796%2EKXm2RH)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: If you come for Marines, you come for me
body:
Ira Hayes is a hero to all Americans, and a legend to all Marines. Not good enough for the Trump administration, though. The Pentagon and Secretary Hegseth just deleted a page about Ira in their “DEI” purge.
#

Peter -
I served alongside brave Navajo warriors in Iraq. They’re as close as brothers to me.
Indigenous people have fought for this country with honor for generations, even as they fight for their own rights and dignity at home. Their stories are important.
I’ll give you two examples:
Ira Hayes, a member of the Pima tribe, grew up on the Gila River Reservation in Arizona. He enlisted in the Marine Corps in 1942 and fought throughout the Pacific. He was one of the six flagraisers on Iwo Jima, featured in the famous picture on top of Mount Suribachi. He came home and helped with the Seventh War Loan Drive, the most successful loan drive of the war. Ira struggled with PTSD and alcoholism after the war, like many veterans. He died just 10 years after raising the flag on Iwo Jima.
Ira Hayes is a hero to all Americans, and a legend to all Marines.
Not good enough for the Trump administration, though. The Pentagon and Secretary Hegseth just deleted a page about Ira in their “DEI” purge of websites.
Another legendary group of Marines in World War Two were the Navajo Code Talkers. These men were tasked with developing a code, transmitting, and decoding messages in combat in the Navajo language. They served throughout the Pacific to immense effect, and their code was never broken.
Every Marine learns about the Code Talkers, and to this day the Navajo people are rightfully proud of their legacy.
The Navajo Code Talkers are heroes. But, again, not good enough for the Trump administration. Secretary Hegseth and the Pentagon deleted their websites, too.
These deletions aren’t limited to Ira Hayes or the Navajo Code Talkers, either. It’s women warfighters, it’s the Tuskegee Airmen, Harlem Hellfighters, the 442nd Infantry Regiment — anybody that isn’t white. If you made the mistake of being born a minority, your service doesn’t matter to this White House.
Sorry for the language, but this is bullsh*t. And if nobody in the Trump administration is going to do anything to make sure these heroes get the recognition they deserve, I will.
[**Please, add your name and join me in demanding Secretary Hegseth and the Pentagon re-up every page they’ve deleted. These are people who served with distinction, and the least we can do is make sure their webpages stay online.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250319//?source=em250319-1-160&akid=3769%2E734936%2EnJEjqQ) Semper Fi, Ruben
Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. clean_body: Ira Hayes is a hero to all Americans, and a legend to all Marines. Not good enough for the Trump administration, though. The Pentagon and Secretary Hegseth just deleted a page about Ira in their “DEI” purge. Peter - I served alongside brave Navajo warriors in Iraq. They’re as close as brothers to me. Indigenous people have fought for this country with honor for generations, even as they fight for their own rights and dignity at home. Their stories are important. I’ll give you two examples: Ira Hayes, a member of the Pima tribe, grew up on the Gila River Reservation in Arizona. He enlisted in the Marine Corps in 1942 and fought throughout the Pacific. He was one of the six flagraisers on Iwo Jima, featured in the famous picture on top of Mount Suribachi. He came home and helped with the Seventh War Loan Drive, the most successful loan drive of the war. Ira struggled with PTSD and alcoholism after the war, like many veterans. He died just 10 years after raising the flag on Iwo Jima. Ira Hayes is a hero to all Americans, and a legend to all Marines. Not good enough for the Trump administration, though. The Pentagon and Secretary Hegseth just deleted a page about Ira in their “DEI” purge of websites. Another legendary group of Marines in World War Two were the Navajo Code Talkers. These men were tasked with developing a code, transmitting, and decoding messages in combat in the Navajo language. They served throughout the Pacific to immense effect, and their code was never broken. Every Marine learns about the Code Talkers, and to this day the Navajo people are rightfully proud of their legacy. The Navajo Code Talkers are heroes. But, again, not good enough for the Trump administration. Secretary Hegseth and the Pentagon deleted their websites, too. These deletions aren’t limited to Ira Hayes or the Navajo Code Talkers, either. It’s women warfighters, it’s the Tuskegee Airmen, Harlem Hellfighters, the 442nd Infantry Regiment — anybody that isn’t white. If you made the mistake of being born a minority, your service doesn’t matter to this White House. Sorry for the language, but this is bullsh*t. And if nobody in the Trump administration is going to do anything to make sure these heroes get the recognition they deserve, I will. Semper Fi, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Tina Kotek
subject: A top priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Here’s what we are on track to accomplish by July: |
#
---
Peter — My administration has made addressing the housing crisis a top priority. Oregonians feel the weight of high housing costs and not having enough affordable housing options available — and my team and I are doing something about it. **Because of our efforts to build more housing that’s affordable, here’s what we are on track to accomplish by July:**
* 2,800 affordable homes financed
* 25,000 homes in the pipeline from infrastructure investments

I’m proud of these accomplishments, but the work does not stop here. **[Please chip in to keep advancing our work to create an Oregon where everyone has an affordable place to call home.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104154632/534456969/-1244273367?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTcyNWNiMC0xMTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ivX_0vyRiCHyKuqPrmlP7lfyQRyHXmiTaHfk8TiHJo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104154633/534456970/-1244273367?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250319_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTcyNWNiMC0xMTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ivX_0vyRiCHyKuqPrmlP7lfyQRyHXmiTaHfk8TiHJo=)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: Department of Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Trump has made it clear that he wants to abolish the Department of Education entirely. If he succeeds, the consequences for Virginia’s public schools would be catastrophic.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104154726/534457372/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-19_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDM4MDkwOGUtMTIwNS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Go5UlXADrgChuMsOy4NVKi_r_sIEQAYgSJeqka_dbpw=)
---
| The Department of Education is cutting nearly half of its workforce — and this is just the latest in a series of devastating cuts to federal agencies since Donald Trump took office. These layoffs are a direct attack on the future of our children and our communities. They’re also an attack on the hundreds of thousands of federal workers who call Virginia home.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104154727/534457373/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-19_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDM4MDkwOGUtMTIwNS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Go5UlXADrgChuMsOy4NVKi_r_sIEQAYgSJeqka_dbpw=)
Trump has made it clear that he wants to abolish the Department of Education entirely. If he succeeds, the consequences for Virginia’s public schools would be catastrophic. Federal funding for education would be slashed, and rural school districts — which rely on this funding for everything from teachers to special education programs — would be hit hardest. Our kids deserve so much better.

I am the mother of three daughters in Virginia’s public schools, a proud graduate of Virginia’s public schools, and the daughter-in-law of a career Virginia public school teacher! I understand that every child in every part of our Commonwealth deserves access to a quality education. It’s personal to me. That’s why I’m committed to making sure that our public schools get the support and federal resources our students need to succeed.

**We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines as Donald Trump and his allies try to dismantle our public education system.[_Will you contribute to my campaign today and help us protect Virginia’s schools?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104154728/534457374/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-19_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDM4MDkwOGUtMTIwNS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Go5UlXADrgChuMsOy4NVKi_r_sIEQAYgSJeqka_dbpw=)**
