clean_body: Trump has made it clear that he wants to abolish the Department of Education entirely. If he succeeds, the consequences for Virginia’s public schools would be catastrophic. | = | The Department of Education is cutting nearly half of its workforce — and this is just the latest in a series of devastating cuts to federal agencies since Donald Trump took office. These layoffs are a direct attack on the future of our children and our communities. They’re also an attack on the hundreds of thousands of federal workers who call Virginia home. = Trump has made it clear that he wants to abolish the Department of Education entirely. If he succeeds, the consequences for Virginia’s public schools would be catastrophic. Federal funding for education would be slashed, and rural school districts — which rely on this funding for everything from teachers to special education programs — would be hit hardest. Our kids deserve so much better. I am the mother of three daughters in Virginia’s public schools, a proud graduate of Virginia’s public schools, and the daughter-in-law of a career Virginia public school teacher! I understand that every child in every part of our Commonwealth deserves access to a quality education. It’s personal to me. That’s why I’m committed to making sure that our public schools get the support and federal resources our students need to succeed. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines as Donald Trump and his allies try to dismantle our public education system.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Team Thompson
subject: FWD: Our major deadline this month
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
---
| | Peter—did you see Mike’s important note? We’re facing our first public Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline at the end of the month, and we need your help with getting a head start now to prove our grassroots strength. Help us prove our grassroots strength when our numbers go public.

**_[Read more from Mike below, and please chip in $10 or any amount to our fight today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104154872/534457909/1278178127?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250319_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_MMFR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDU0NTY4Mi0xMzA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-zbiw77_QF3swaQ-866wbjTQC2xDNylOQEXNLBEIsGw=)_**
* * *
**_Mike's Original Message:_**

Peter,

At the end of this month, we’re facing our **biggest challenge of the year yet** — our first public Federal Election Commission (FEC) fundraising deadline. The numbers we report at the end of this month will go public showing whether or not we have the resources to fight back now while also preparing for our efforts to take back the House in 2026.

We’ve had a tough past few weeks, but we must fight back against threats against our democracy. I need you on my side if we’re going to prove we have the strength to take back the House in 2026.

**_[Can you rush a donation of $10 before our mid-month fundraising deadline on Thursday night? We need to ensure we have the resources to fight back against this administration and take back the House in 2026.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104154873/534457951/1278178127?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250319_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_MMFR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDU0NTY4Mi0xMzA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-zbiw77_QF3swaQ-866wbjTQC2xDNylOQEXNLBEIsGw=)_**

I’m working tirelessly alongside my Democratic colleagues in the Courts, in Congress, and on the streets to fight against this administration. We won’t let their actions and undermining of our democracy go ignored.

**_[Stand with us to take back the House by rushing a donation of $10 here before Thursday at midnight. name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: An update on what Democrats are doing:
body:
---
Derek, I want to share a few quick updates on what Democrats are doing (and no, this is not a fundraising request). First, I wanted to make sure you saw this: [](https://ak.democrats.org/go/14377?t=2&akid=2999%2E22930333%2E24poCN) The DNC has partnered with our local and national colleagues across the Democratic Party to to host _People’s Town Halls_ in all 50 states. And here’s the kicker: we’re holding them in Republican districts. **Since Republicans are too spineless to face their own constituents after putting health care on the chopping block to fund tax breaks for billionaires, Democrats will do it for them.** In the last few days, thousands of voters have shown up at the town halls we organized in Iowa, Nebraska, and Florida — even though their own elected officials did not. What we heard from these constituents is that they’re furious — and fed up — with what Republicans have done to betray their voters in only two months. [Democrats are showing up for voters nationwide. Follow this link to see if there is a town hall near you.](https://ak.democrats.org/go/14377?t=3&akid=2999%2E22930333%2E24poCN) I hope to see you out there. Second, I want to share that the DNC is currently suing Donald Trump over his clearly unlawful attempt to take over the independent agency that ensures we have neutral elections in our country. In the United States, we are guaranteed fair elections with impartial referees — the Federal Election Commission (FEC) helps make sure of that — as opposed to a system where Trump can hand down his preferred campaign rules from his perch in the White House. His executive order to control the FEC is a grave threat to this guarantee. For the future of our democracy, it’s critical that we use every tool at our disposal — including aggressively confronting Trump’s illegal actions in the courts — to defend voters’ right to free and fair elections. I hope to have more updates on this to share soon. Lastly, if you are looking for another way to get involved in the fight to protect our democracy, I highly encourage you to consider volunteering to support Democrats running in April 1 special elections in Wisconsin and Florida. I’ve already traveled to Wisconsin to knock doors for our candidates there and I’ll be volunteering however I can in the lead up to these races. Right now, we need to elect as many Democrats as possible — that’s how we can check Trump and Musk’s power and get back to work at improving people’s lives. The best way to start is by winning the races right in front of us. [Please, get involved using this link.](https://ak.democrats.org/go/14378?t=4&akid=2999%2E22930333%2E24poCN) The fight isn’t coming — it’s already here. Thank you for your support and for taking the time to read this message, Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee [](https://ak.democrats.org/go/14378?t=5&akid=2999%2E22930333%2E24poCN)

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I have big news.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9f1r2yv261vvqct3t439bqrhazori2ajbjijt7nmu40f1xdm1qg7g4xbn7heh9tbcac5wgi4wlx89u0pj&__stmp=ste7hh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ste7hh&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfx2mwnjtfs01nefida5nge2o02dbp21e5i260kszi1r6wl7n13i0fo0x77751rltb6vwlhymd404aby8q4xa816mrmry0lsufitc2xc34sc2bycguduwb0jb1resy6319dxp76rs5loiko2kvja&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ste7hh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ste7hh&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ste7hh&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ste7hh&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfx2mwnjtfs01nefida5ngeqbhl3b0mg5wal9sltwx4mxgee8oywjnmpt8bzbw15cjrt9l0mshf2rsas67olto1bewums3y3oo1yqbirwcqtyu922maoxkphkes1nwvkecx9jwc0349oirfhc7tw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ste7hh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ste7hh&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away. And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate... ...to Jesus. And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood... ...by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love. Here’s exactly what their strategy is... First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic. In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin. Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible. And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS! That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http:)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission... Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture. Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive. But I know we can do it. Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries. >>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this... **[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http:)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](http:)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http:)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http:)
---
| | [](http:)
---
**Kirk Cameron** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. **[**Please help us point families to the empty tomb this Easter with your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more.**](http:)** As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you!
---
[ **DONATE** ](http:)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024.
---
br>

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily.**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: In other news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Here’s what else I and my team have been up to:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104155315/534459724/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk4ZWNlMC0xNTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Apk5RZiKoYONlSGunmJIHIVggJUez6eSSUBgtnbbM-E=&emci=4eb3a86e-2bf9-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2b98ece0-1505-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)
---
| | **A NOTE FROM CHRISSY**
---
**Derek, in my own small act of defiance, the only time Elon Musk and President Trump will be mentioned by name in this email is right here. It’s been a very busy start to the year and here’s some of what we’ve been up to:**
---
| | **My Annual State of the Sixth Town Hall**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104155316/534459727/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1092-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk4ZWNlMC0xNTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Apk5RZiKoYONlSGunmJIHIVggJUez6eSSUBgtnbbM-E=)
---
On a Monday night late February, I held my sixth annual State of the Sixth town hall in the Colonial Theatre in Phoenixville. Normally, 150-200 people attend, but this year we had over 600 people (standing room only) and had to turn away hundreds. The evening is always both a look back at what I and my team worked on and accomplished for our community and an open Q&A to talk about whatever is top of mind. What was top of mind this year, of course, are the reckless and dangerous actions by this White House and what I and all of us can do to push back.
---
| | **JAN. 6 RIOTERS Pardoned**
---
Although our new President swore to preserve, protect, and defend the Constitution, he has been regularly ignoring and disrespecting it. The pardon is a Presidential right granted by the Constitution, but we can add our new President to the list of men who have abused it. It was a shock to most of us – including Republicans – when, on his first day in office, he pardoned 1,500 Jan. 6 defendants, including the most violent of rioters. This is an affront to law enforcement officers and a reckless and dangerous abuse of power.

That's why my colleagues Dan Goldman, Jason Crow, Eric Swalwell, and I, along with law enforcement officers there that day, held a press conference to condemn the pardons. **_As public servants elected by the people, for the people, we have a responsibility to condemn political violence, not condone it._**
---
| | **Why I voted "no" on the Laken Riley Act**
---
I am endlessly frustrated by the willingness of Congressional leadership to abdicate our responsibility to enact smart, strategic, and long-overdue immigration reform. In January, I voted "no" on the Laken Riley Act, a bill that prioritizes the deportation of undocumented immigrants who are simply accused of committing a crime. I voted no because it’s unconstitutional and I take my oath to “support and defend” the Constitution seriously.

Less than sixty Democrats voted yes on this bill and it’s now law. After the role immigration and border security played in the November election, I can understand why that number was so high but it’s still disappointing. We need commonsense immigration reform that will make meaningful and permanent change – without sacrificing our values and trading away constitutional protections. You can read my op-ed on this [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104155317/534459728/1115506841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk4ZWNlMC0xNTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Apk5RZiKoYONlSGunmJIHIVggJUez6eSSUBgtnbbM-E=&emci=4eb3a86e-2bf9-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2b98ece0-1505-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)
---
| | **Benjamin Franklin in the U.S. Capitol**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104155318/534459729/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1092-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk4ZWNlMC0xNTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Apk5RZiKoYONlSGunmJIHIVggJUez6eSSUBgtnbbM-E=)
---
Did you know that there is no statue of Pennsylvania’s very own Founding Father, Benjamin Franklin, on the U.S. Capitol tour? In a historic building with over 100 statues of historic figures?!? I’m working to change that in time for next year’s America250 celebration and was thrilled that my bill to bring a statue – created by a Pennsylvania sculptor – passed the House in late February. Now on to the Senate!
---
Thank you for your support. Thank you for staying engaged during this hard time.
There's work to be done,

Chrissy
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104155320/534459731/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1092-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk4ZWNlMC0xNTA1LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Apk5RZiKoYONlSGunmJIHIVggJUez6eSSUBgtnbbM-E=)
---
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV President
subject: Meet LCV’s new president, Pete Maysmith
body:
A special message from Gene Karpinski

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIyNzIwNjAS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE4MDI5Nzg1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Dear Peter,
---
| | In September of last year, I announced that after 19 years as LCV’s president — and another dozen years on LCV’s Board before — I’m stepping down from my role.
---
| | Today, I’m thrilled to introduce you to **LCV’s next president, Pete Maysmith,** who has been working at the forefront of the environmental movement for more than 30 years.
---
| | Pete brings a wealth of experience to the position, serving as LCV’s Senior Vice President of Campaigns since 2017. Prior to joining LCV, he served for eight years as the founding executive director of Conservation Colorado, an LCV state affiliate with a long track record of successfully organizing and advocating for strong climate, environmental, and public lands policies.
---
| | Now, more than ever, it’s vital that LCV and the Conservation Voters Movement are led by someone who offers steady continuity and a strong vision for how we tackle the climate crisis, confront environmental injustice, and bolster our nation’s democracy. Pete’s extensive experience driving LCV’s political and campaign operations — and his work to build LCV into the premier advocacy organization it is today — make him well suited to lead us through these unprecedented times and into this critical next chapter of our work.
---
| | Pete will be officially stepping into the role of LCV President on April 15.
---
| | As I reflect on my tenure, I’m proud of all that LCV has accomplished over the last 19 years. It’s been a privilege to serve, and I’m so grateful for supporters like you who’ve fueled our organizations’ ability to secure a safer, healthier, and more just climate future and democracy for all.
---
| | I’m also keenly aware of the threats we face and how much we as a movement still have left to do to protect people and the planet and to secure a strong democracy. That’s why I and LCV’s Board of Directors are thrilled to be passing the torch to Pete, who we know will work tirelessly to ensure our movement’s success.
---
| | Please join me in welcoming Pete, and please [**consider supporting — or increasing your support for — LCV’s work**](https://links.messages.lcv.) during this important transition as we continue our work to make our environment, our climate, and our democracy stronger and safer for all.
---
| | Onward,
---
| | Gene Karpinski, LCV President
---
| |
---
| | |

clean_body: A special message from Gene Karpinski If you are unable to see the message below, . | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, | | In September of last year, I announced that after 19 years as LCV’s president — and another dozen years on LCV’s Board before — I’m stepping down from my role. | | Today, I’m thrilled to introduce you to LCV’s next president, Pete Maysmith, who has been working at the forefront of the environmental movement for more than 30 years. | | Pete brings a wealth of experience to the position, serving as LCV’s Senior Vice President of Campaigns since 2017. Prior to joining LCV, he served for eight years as the founding executive director of Conservation Colorado, an LCV state affiliate with a long track record of successfully organizing and advocating for strong climate, environmental, and public lands policies. | | Now, more than ever, it’s vital that LCV and the Conservation Voters Movement are led by someone who offers steady continuity and a strong vision for how we tackle the climate crisis, confront environmental injustice, and bolster our nation’s democracy. Pete’s extensive experience driving LCV’s political and campaign operations — and his work to build LCV into the premier advocacy organization it is today — make him well suited to lead us through these unprecedented times and into this critical next chapter of our work. | | Pete will be officially stepping into the role of LCV President on April 15. | | As I reflect on my tenure, I’m proud of all that LCV has accomplished over the last 19 years. It’s been a privilege to serve, and I’m so grateful for supporters like you who’ve fueled our organizations’ ability to secure a safer, healthier, and more just climate future and democracy for all. | | I’m also keenly aware of the threats we face and how much we as a movement still have left to do to protect people and the planet and to secure a strong democracy. That’s why I and LCV’s Board of Directors are thrilled to be passing the torch to Pete, who we know will work tirelessly to ensure our movement’s success. | | Please join me in welcoming Pete, and please during this important transition as we continue our work to make our environment, our climate, and our democracy stronger and safer for all. | | Onward, | | Gene Karpinski, LCV President | | | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: This all has been rather tough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
With just 12 days remaining in the first quarter, I’m asking if you could contribute $10, $25, or whatever feels right to help us reach Saturday’s goal, which we missed. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=74970c410bd34989a4d06df458b85896&_e=gvEW1hHq71_YFEkTeum-pGVAzZqA79zb8bXY0J4m66otvv3N9Qh5I_dWktCVCwSLm7sY0Cg2RUtQ_DTuzsiA21UsUk3Z-Yk24P-qU4YD3dVzkdrrqR1IXk0OGI4OSu09EiwfcV8D__MudntXPRmub5PThprNp5e1_Duk7xpoyyGmymPaWLgyZ8tEOqwYq9lg-P49iWhoRSFGyj3oNNxRvh-kCWOUfh6dHI3Joiy1DimYKhALCtKz5QbGKJJ6b9ofSLhhdfNcQjm_7ZakKxAFc3_jUzoD9UwVNqP-eNz9OBYIq1qshylfGxu4lC_ChSfh5wNk_-dKcyI3YuEg07rZLGJghqnQJvz8zBctieZGSwY7AHvzoDuAXeOAas9fODVupo7qSUdHqmDCoMHh1mUyEiedhq6oOr2nUWG7Ez_G7QQ7WIYsMCDuY0-44EDgH5LK)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I need to be honest with you – _**we fell short of our fundraising goal by more than $3,000. That’s not where we wanted to be because building a strong foundation for the next election starts now. **_

You know better than anyone that early investments make all the difference. The time between elections is when we organize, strengthen our outreach, and ensure we’re ready to hit the ground running. _**If we wait until it’s urgent, we’ll have already lost.**_

**[With just 12 days remaining in the first quarter, I’m asking if you could contribute $10, $25, or whatever feels right to help us reach Saturday’s goal, which we missed.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=74970c410bd34989a4d06df458b85896&_e=gvEW1hHq71_YFEkTeum-pGVAzZqA79zb8bXY0J4m66otvv3N9Qh5I_dWktCVCwSLm7sY0Cg2RUtQ_DTuzsiA21UsUk3Z-Yk24P-qU4YD3dVzkdrrqR1IXk0OGI4OSu09EiwfcV8D__MudntXPRmub5PThprNp5e1_Duk7xpoyyGmymPaWLgyZ8tEOqwYq9lg-P49iWhoRSFGyj3oNNxRvh-kCWOUfh6dHI3Joiy1DimYKhALCtKz5QbGKJJ6b9ofSLhhdfNcQjm_7ZakKxAFc3_jUzoD9UwVNqP-eNz9OBaAIe9bg22F9p0gOy2KUc8e4O_ALDuqXc5ODX8At5MspjWR0a0-Yl3b8P6TkIqoXALFcFuXOiCRVjjOYa0prZF17YJpxQRX2eKRyMDcCd-paevkVMDAQMjQ8oyvKRhnIOlVwF_0pW0u5Z2yzOkdNhTp)**

Every contribution now helps ensure we’re prepared when it matters most.

[**CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=74970c410bd34989a4d06df458b85896&_e=gvEW1hHq71_YFEkTeum-pGVAzZqA79zb8bXY0J4m66otvv3N9Qh5I_dWktCVCwSLm7sY0Cg2RUtQ_DTuzsiA21UsUk3Z-Yk24P-qU4YD3dVzkdrrqR1IXk0OGI4OSu09EiwfcV8D__MudntXPRmub5PThprNp5e1_Duk7xpoyyGmymPaWLgyZ8tEOqwYq9lg-P49iWhoRSFGyj3oNNxRvh-kCWOUfh6dHI3Joiy1DimYKhALCtKz5QbGKJJ6b9ofSLhhdfNcQjm_7ZakKxAFc3_jUzoD9UwVNqP-eNz9OBYqjfy7tq2qTekFPrji7aBY6tTHgYJuqrDwT7kl1_l4tEVYRBZBeVzUPJOaTUGKLjQh_BYGeIZfNFH4zoUiCq6iyEkMChwV-Fgoa0q5OVWoDr-abkz2oI5Dpb0LV8tIMVGk1g5yzMkqaRl9WHXrTsOc)

Your experience and dedication have helped shape so many critical moments before. _**[Let’s ensure we’re ready for the next one—starting today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=74970c410bd34989a4d06df458b85896&_e=gvEW1hHq71_YFEkTeum-pGVAzZqA79zb8bXY0J4m66otvv3N9Qh5I_dWktCVCwSLm7sY0Cg2RUtQ_DTuzsiA21UsUk3Z-Yk24P-qU4YD3dVzkdrrqR1IXk0OGI4OSu09EiwfcV8D__MudntXPRmub5PThprNp5e1_Duk7xpoyyGmymPaWLgyZ8tEOqwYq9lg-P49iWhoRSFGyj3oNNxRvh-kCWOUfh6dHI3Joiy1DimYKhALCtKz5QbGKJJ6b9ofSLhhdfNcQjm_7ZakKxAFc3_jUzoD9UwVNqP-eNz9OBaOv_qEogDL6_m-ZrXqS0PO935J1wJvWD8ccjAICcjCagHaTZBLmGFElPs225eGFcv6xfX754WVP_dxl9Ar2ylnMWPkhwvXr9jp9x1pI6EdUUj6Ta0IbKKyxd4JodTjQl-YPwEOuMczVQU9w4lrs2OW) **_

Thank you for everything,
Tim Sheehy,
U.S. Senator - Montana
_
__
__
_

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=74e9a103bc754d63a3d13abccd741027&_e=_NMNW_wlr832Qydq7kJbYd2Niqj7c8SW3aTGzpPtUvlFSyBQEqAnEjtEnqgy9SaRaNnR9GOeRh-VIya6t7-YxQXfGLWXO-RlyWITchhdq3z6Xstia_KgpDQ1AmSaeJNaM5X43G_HuoYtRo5tI_y3o1w359aEhwCtUKJ4KeS11TNQ7rTP9o4vyRgTArQl3kT5OSqn67XMORd-I7643vTEk-0PFeVUTdu_XZY3g08yFOfby2nLCU3XuYOvXXd9mJrlzZzmisRl1dnMHYlkqJYaoIK-0ozE3voJJH0wnLlDp6q65xc2xX5i1D4DuWVzTAHzbTPuNzuiz6Oro67vVKrApI0RDR3bKtBcH_XtjC7w74279exRUc6fuSXCpxLFLva9XkZQ_jQQSU7RKW5s5rb2cg%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=74e9a103bc754d63a3d13abccd741027&_e=_NMNW_wlr832Qydq7kJbYd2Niqj7c8SW3aTGzpPtUvlFSyBQEqAnEjtEnqgy9SaRaNnR9GOeRh-VIya6t7-YxQXfGLWXO-RlyWITchhdq3z6Xstia_KgpDQ1AmSaeJNaM5X43G_HuoYtRo5tI_y3o1w359aEhwCtUKJ4KeS11TNQ7rTP9o4vyRgTArQl3kT5OSqn67XMORd-I7643vTEk-0PFeVUTdu_XZY3g08yFOdgpmcE_ZgFS4Tw6XBJqxOv0irdqr8CPh_6MA01Nzfn3b-Xykd3Ii8fUBQMxI3xkG4KkgH1gsrwAP-2ApLD1HpGvXCBa7uqaBQJ04aOIYuBs6uNFXuYSpytlot3DCmtFUuN4zweWbgpC5CnJLLvOs_0PgwM406wdMj1r0e_lxOFJg%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=74e9a103bc754d63a3d13abccd741027&_e=_NMNW_wlr832Qydq7kJbYd2Niqj7c8SW3aTGzpPtUvlFSyBQEqAnEjtEnqgy9SaRaNnR9GOeRh-VIya6t7-YxQXfGLWXO-RlyWITchhdq3z6Xstia_KgpDQ1AmSaeJNaM5X43G_HuoYtRo5tI_y3o1w359aEhwCtUKJ4KeS11TNQ7rTP9o4vyRgTArQl3kT5OSqn67XMORd-I7643vTEk-0PFeVUTdu_XZY3g08yFOeMCtWnqUJZ2V1GdAtNDsRuzWzzFL-Grth1ItXZn4rHRvdpCg9BO9hYqzNBszcm03nsuk7on1KmNHQFyz-XhB-qLHDcwbYDLiqzycBH3VqaQ-SmRj4kOFBbC8pCARrnoT5rAE-QHUGxJpZC6qfK6SJy-K20uQypPbFxTAn8iMqeaA%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=74e9a103bc754d63a3d13abccd741027&_e=_NMNW_wlr832Qydq7kJbYd2Niqj7c8SW3aTGzpPtUvlFSyBQEqAnEjtEnqgy9SaRaNnR9GOeRh-VIya6t7-YxQXfGLWXO-RlyWITchhdq3z6Xstia_KgpDQ1AmSaeJNaM5X43G_HuoYtRo5tI_y3o1w359aEhwCtUKJ4KeS11TNQ7rTP9o4vyRgTArQl3kT5OSqn67XMORd-I7643vTEk-0PFeVUTdu_XZY3g08yFOcVfRKh8r0GT52qtywodfa9tgdTdVPpe4MUO3kEfaKJUI4VqSTuBhwOJg7SHiEAyGmT3PFAoOr2F6G0LotUBZEQxjQngjPGXJv2BZmenUtfXF97NvQZ8Z4BX69B9X3OUjA-90bbBlw9eLyeo6MoFcU-hYrRkrJElrYGRZASfoktPQ%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=74e9a103bc754d63a3d13abccd741027&_e=_NMNW_wlr832Qydq7kJbYd2Niqj7c8SW3aTGzpPtUvlFSyBQEqAnEjtEnqgy9SaRaNnR9GOeRh-VIya6t7-YxQXfGLWXO-RlyWITchhdq3z6Xstia_KgpDQ1AmSaeJNaM5X43G_HuoYtRo5tI_y3o1w359aEhwCtUKJ4KeS11TNQ7rTP9o4vyRgTArQl3kT5OSqn67XMORd-I7643vTEk-0PFeVUTdu_XZY3g08yFOf-lBkc9TDpZL-0vlts36QaJbZI8DiTuIVZGhIjGV8y4k47Xxjg7c10pJRswghaNk4_uYlBKXZvChmLNSUeNRWlCxNPGRHNWcdztfm3p8Rv-OgSm3sps-YDtITM5ymKXBKRkRJAaeMkL8ZqrGBBCuIDT4AHeleaQymsvWmKyVpoSQ%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---

clean_body: Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. This is a rapidly developing case but here’s what we know so far.
* **Khalil was a lead negotiator representing pro-Palestinian student protestors at Columbia University last spring.** At the time he was a graduate student at Columbia under a student visa.
* **Khalil is a green card holder and legal permanent resident** that Trump wants to deport for his pro-Palestinian stance citing “serious adverse foreign policy consequences for the United States.”
* **Khalil is expecting his first child** with his wife, a U.S. citizen who is eight months pregnant.
* **Khalil has been detained since Saturday, March 8** briefly in New Jersey before transferred to where he is currently in Louisiana. ICE has issued Khalil to appear before an immigration judge for deportation proceedings on March 27.

Trump is using the power of the White House to chill activism and dissent — this is an assault on our rights and we cannot let this injustice slide.
_**[Sign the petition. Write to your reps to protect our rights to free speech, our rights to protest, and to demand the release of Mahmoud Khalil.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156487/534464465/1812245098?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250319_pt_freemk_team_oc_act_xx_l1&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250319_pt_rsvp_freemk_team_oc_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzY2MTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYmU4MmRiLTFiMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XuSSAhksN_GwMXydraIXucgCHIsiO-ryytEdiuMdVqs=&emci=a3d67745-4d03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4cbe82db-1b05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=3825287)**_

In less than two months, Donald Trump has already inflicted unmeasurable chaos and harm on our country and democracy.
---
In just the past week, Republicans passed Trump’s budget plan (which will slash veterans’ benefits, affordable housing, and more), cut funding for the Department of Education, gutted the funding for public media – and most recently called to impeach a federal judge who ruled against him.
---
And more keeps coming each and every day.
---
**We can’t ignore how** **unprecedented – and downright scary – these times in our country are right now.**
---
_**But there are steps we can take to fight back and protect our democracy from Trump this week:**_

→ Attending in-person or virtual town halls. Check your town or county bulletin for the week, see what events are taking place, attend if you can, and keep the pressure on.

name: Ben Friedman
subject: Your voice can protect public lands at risk
body:
Join us in calling for stronger protections for parks and redwoods

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156689/534465218/779512579?utm_campaign=an-ben-031925&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhYmVjOTRjLTFkMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQK2NTEuu2Zg_Oc6YcnzyYpoY7Gto254TNsAUthiXtY=&emci=f5c0fff1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=aabec94c-1d05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156690/534465219/779512579?utm_campaign=an-ben-031925&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhYmVjOTRjLTFkMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQK2NTEuu2Zg_Oc6YcnzyYpoY7Gto254TNsAUthiXtY=&emci=f5c0fff1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=aabec94c-1d05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
| | Dear Peter,
---
In recent weeks, we have seen heightened threats to our cherished public lands. From the abrupt layoffs of National Park Service employees to the freezing of critical federal funding, rapid shifts in policy have destabilized the agencies that safeguard our parks and redwood forests.

In this time of uncertainty, one thing is clear: It’s time to speak up for America’s public lands, including our treasured redwood forests. Your voice is more important than ever, and together we have the power to stand up for these irreplaceable places.

Here are key threats to our parks and forests—and ways you can help us push back.
**Pressing threats to our public lands:**
* **Federal layoffs:** A chaotic wave of job cuts at the National Park Service, Bureau of Land Management, and U.S. Forest Service threatens public safety and [visitor services](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156691/534465220/720254242?utm_campaign=an-ben-031925&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhYmVjOTRjLTFkMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQK2NTEuu2Zg_Oc6YcnzyYpoY7Gto254TNsAUthiXtY=&emci=f5c0fff1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=aabec94c-1d05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551), wildfire management, and forest protection. We stand in solidarity with the dedicated workers and trusted partners who manage and protect public lands for all.
* **Funding freezes:** Uncertainty around federal funding, including grants for restoration, research, and outdoor access, has stalled critical conservation efforts. The League calls for the lawful release of federal funds previously authorized by Congress. Without this funding, the forests will suffer.
* **Executive orders:** Recent executive orders on [timber production](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156692/534465221/403585163?utm_campaign=an-ben-031925&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhYmVjOTRjLTFkMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQK2NTEuu2Zg_Oc6YcnzyYpoY7Gto254TNsAUthiXtY=&emci=f5c0fff1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=aabec94c-1d05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551) and [timber imports](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156693/534465222/-342630065?utm_campaign=an-ben-031925&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhYmVjOTRjLTFkMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQK2NTEuu2Zg_Oc6YcnzyYpoY7Gto254TNsAUthiXtY=&emci=f5c0fff1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=aabec94c-1d05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551) call for increased commercial logging on public lands. This puts irreplaceable old-growth forests at risk, including those near California’s redwoods. The League is vigilantly monitoring this threat and stands ready to ensure that the forest remains protected.

**How you can help:**
* **Raise your voice:** Call or email your representatives in Congress and leaders at the Department of the Interior to demand stronger protections for public lands. Your voice matters, whether you live within the redwood range or in any state in the nation.
[Find your representatives](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156694/534465223/2127295227?utm_campaign=an-ben-031925&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhYmVjOTRjLTFkMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQK2NTEuu2Zg_Oc6YcnzyYpoY7Gto254TNsAUthiXtY=&emci=f5c0fff1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=aabec94c-1d05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551) or contact the Secretary of the Interior:
(202) 208-3100 x 3.
* **Lend your support:** Donate to organizations that are fighting to protect redwood forests and other public lands from destructive policies. Your contributions empower us to defend parks, forests, and wildlife in this critical moment.
* **Spread the word:** Share these critical issues on social media with #ProtectPublicLands. Engage with your elected officials online. Talk to your friends and family. Keep sharing stories of laid-off NPS workers and other federal employees to show widespread support for these dedicated professionals who protect our lands and waters.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104156695/534465224/779512579?utm_campaign=an-ben-031925&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhYmVjOTRjLTFkMDUtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQK2NTEuu2Zg_Oc6YcnzyYpoY7Gto254TNsAUthiXtY=&emci=f5c0fff1-2504-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=aabec94c-1d05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
You are part of a powerful movement. Every person who speaks up adds to the chorus of concerned Americans demanding protections for our parks and public lands. The growing outcry is breaking through and momentum is building. Let’s keep pushing forward—together!

By speaking up today, you are standing up for the tomorrow that we all deserve.

In gratitude,
| |

---|---
Ben Friedman
Government Affairs and Public Grants Officer
Save the Redwoods League

clean_body: Join us in calling for stronger protections for parks and redwoods | | | | Dear Peter, In recent weeks, we have seen heightened threats to our cherished public lands. From the abrupt layoffs of National Park Service employees to the freezing of critical federal funding, rapid shifts in policy have destabilized the agencies that safeguard our parks and redwood forests. In this time of uncertainty, one thing is clear: It’s time to speak up for America’s public lands, including our treasured redwood forests. Your voice is more important than ever, and together we have the power to stand up for these irreplaceable places. Here are key threats to our parks and forests—and ways you can help us push back. Pressing threats to our public lands: Federal layoffs: A chaotic wave of job cuts at the National Park Service, Bureau of Land Management, and U.S. Forest Service threatens public safety and , wildfire management, and forest protection. We stand in solidarity with the dedicated workers and trusted partners who manage and protect public lands for all. Funding freezes: Uncertainty around federal funding, including grants for restoration, research, and outdoor access, has stalled critical conservation efforts. The League calls for the lawful release of federal funds previously authorized by Congress. Without this funding, the forests will suffer. Executive orders: Recent executive orders on and call for increased commercial logging on public lands. This puts irreplaceable old-growth forests at risk, including those near California’s redwoods. The League is vigilantly monitoring this threat and stands ready to ensure that the forest remains protected. How you can help: Raise your voice: Call or email your representatives in Congress and leaders at the Department of the Interior to demand stronger protections for public lands. Your voice matters, whether you live within the redwood range or in any state in the nation. or contact the Secretary of the Interior: (202) 208-3100 x 3. Lend your support: Donate to organizations that are fighting to protect redwood forests and other public lands from destructive policies. Your contributions empower us to defend parks, forests, and wildlife in this critical moment. Spread the word: Share these critical issues on social media with #ProtectPublicLands. Engage with your elected officials online. Talk to your friends and family. Keep sharing stories of laid-off NPS workers and other federal employees to show widespread support for these dedicated professionals who protect our lands and waters. You are part of a powerful movement. Every person who speaks up adds to the chorus of concerned Americans demanding protections for our parks and public lands. The growing outcry is breaking through and momentum is building. Let’s keep pushing forward—together! By speaking up today, you are standing up for the tomorrow that we all deserve. In gratitude, | | ---|--- Ben Friedman Government Affairs and Public Grants Officer Save the Redwoods League Photos by mscornelius/AdobeStock, and JasonDoiy/iStock. | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
